# The Amatrix Transmissions

|
|
|
AMATRIX ANGELS
A representation of four Amatrix Beings -- each one assigned one of the four elements (earth,fire,water and air). The angelic realms are not "embodied" and yet angels have the ability to appear to us as we would wish to see them. I have given these Amatrix wings, as the merkabahs in which angels appear to us, 'flash' from one dimension to the next, creating a wing-like arch of light at the point of the heart chakra (in a human form). In the Amatrix Transmissions these angelic images reveal four specific Amatrix Beings as they appear to me. They represent in the context of the "Transmissions" major influences of direct infusion from the Angelic Realm of the Amatrix Phi crystalline matrix.
|
CHARIOTS
These winged wheels indicate the 'movers and shakers' of the universe. They are the deliverers of the 'stuff' with which the Builders build and the whirlwind that carries away the excess 'dust'.
|
GENERATIVE MANDALAS
Keys to universal pathways which generate much of the energies in our spiritual-physical world.
|
PHI MERKABAHS
Vehicles of seed consciousness delivering aspects of Phi awareness into our being.
|
PHI BALANCE POINTS
Points of balance, much like acu-points in the body, which help humanity to align to the Sacred Phi.
|
CRYSTALLINE NODES
Nodes in the phi crystalline geometry building through the Phi Gate and into our planet on all levels of experience.
|
TEMPLE
PATHWAYS
|
ASSISTING AGENCIES
Beings and other dynamics which assist in creating the New Earth Hologram.
In addition to receiving certain triggers to open Phi Light codes in your being
through viewing the images in the Amatrix Transmission Package, you may use it
as a type of intuitive tool as well. I have the default setting of the
screensaver on random display, so each time you view it, a different sequencing
of the images will appear. It is my belief that the individual will draw the
correct sequencing for him/her at that time. You can even set in your intention
before you begin the process, that the first three (specific what number) images
related to you especially for the day or situation in your life that you hold in
that intention.
If two or more balance points appear close together this may mean that a powerful re-orientation in energy is taking place for you.
Two or more Amatrix Angels appearing close together signifies going deeper in opening to your divine nature.
Generative Mandalas are about being aware of the greater universal picture of which we are a part; and in becoming aware of how that “bigger picture” is effecting your own piece of the hologram.
Chariots and Phi Merkabahs are messengers:
Chariots are bringing you the codes of new “world building” but may have the effect of “The Tower” in the tarot if too much old debris needs to be cleared away first.
Phi Merkabahs come with the clues for transformation in the more everyday experience.
Crystalline nodes may quicken in you a healing response in mind and body (inclusive of all the energy bodies); and they present the codes of connect to the microcosm, where whole universes exist in our cells and DNA.
From the Temple Pathways we find ancient triggers of spirit embedded deeply into our incarnative stream. They offer you the opportunity of seeing and experiencing these pathways in a NEW light.
Assisting Agencies reveal to you their connections to your quest and the energies you naturally integrate into your journey.
Yet none of these images are intended to be pondered upon with too much gravity. The more instinctively they are simply accepted into your energy bodies through viewing them in a receptive mode, the deeper they will go.
The Symbols
I have placed certain symbols in this energy art to act as internal stimulus for energy receipt. Some of the symbols I drew myself and are of what I believe to be angelic in nature. Other symbols come from fonts: Enochian, Sanskrit, etc. I chose the particular symbols out of these languages for their vibration and not for their meaning in the actual language.
go to The Amatrix Transmissions Gallery to view some of the images

# Maia's Archives

|
|(Maia's Archives) The material I am receiving from you is
a direct answer to a prayer. I can't even begin to tell you how
important the information is and the activations and energies that
are coming through as I am reading. I am so grateful to you for your
dedication in bringing so much through. -
Aine
The Archival Publications of
Maia Kyi'RA
Archival Material Available in PDF Files
From 1980-1999 I published my akashic/Thoth material in the format of
"The Source" (1980-1989) and "Temple Doors" (1990-1999). From 1995 through
1999 Simeon became a part of this process, editing the material
and including some of his own spirit infusion into these issues. The issues
which I currently have available in electronic format are from 1980-1986 and
1995-1999. (Although we may soon have more of this old archival material
available electronically.) I have decided to offer these Source and Temple
Doors issues in PDF files
I consider these electronic issues "rare out-of-print
material." With the older “Source” issues (1980-1986) a few of these files
contain cover art that was custom drawn for me by Hollow Earth researcher
and artist, Bruce Walton. I have also included some of the “rubber stamp”
art I was doing for my publications in those days...before the advent of the
digital media.
Of note: In the early days of “The Source” and “Temple Doors” my name was
“L. Christine Hayes”.
The writing in these archives is a product of my akashic
interpretations of that time in my life. There are certain keynotes that I
now view through a more expanded lens. The main one is that I no
longer choose to use the world "Fallen" in regard to what I now understand
more fully as a lack of "self-realization" of a unity that is never actually
broken, but simply often not realized for various reasons.
I now have an
akashic definitions
section on this website that will help you with understanding some of the
terminology in both my archival material and newer work. I would suggest that before you embark on our journey through
my akashic landscape, that you read
THIS.
Please go to our Spirit Heart Sanctuary Spirit Store to
purchase these issues. You will also be able to read a synopsis of each
issue from there.
SPIRIT STORE - PUBLICATIONS
WAYS YOU CAN SUPPORT THIS WEBSITE
MAIA'S SERVICES: SESSIONS, PERSONAL ENERGY
ART, COMMISSIONED WORK
WHAT OTHERS HAVE TO
SAY ABOUT MAIA'S SPIRIT WORK
~~~~~~
Visit New Earth Ascension Hologram
~~~~~~
To View our
Spirit Heart Sanctuary Messages Archive

Spirit Heart Sanctuary,
all rights reserved

# New Earth and Pandora

|
home | about | contact | donate | what's new | store | timely transmissions | sm transformation | templum mysterium | holy of holies | cosmos | earth | ancient memories | services | forums | universal child | mandalas | fractals | enchantments | misc | links | my other websites
|
A 44:44 Ascension Portal Preview
New Earth Star and Pandora
Since the mid-1980's I have been writing about the New Earth Star: our ascended future reality - yet also co-existing with our present Earth. When I recently (1/10) watched the motion picture AVATAR I was stunned by the world Pandora's similarity to Numis'OM, the first stage of the New Earth Star world experience. The producer of the movie, James Cameron was shown Pandora in a dream over 10 years ago.
The Nav'i cat-beings of Pandora DO exist in Numis'OM. ThothHorRa calls them the "Kuri." They are a Sirian race originally stemming from a larger gene-pool of Sirians, feline in nature, mixed with human genetics to one degree or another. Several of the Sirian Races are in Numis'OM.
The glowing plants of Pandora are like the ones in Numis'OM. The inter-connectedness of the roots of the trees with ALL LIFE of Pandora the same as in the New Earth.
The Lotus Loci of Numis'OM are seen in Pandora as the "Seeds of the Tree." In Pandora they are small and white. In the New Earth some are small and some are white, but most are large and colorful.
In the move AVATAR there are violent animals and even the Na'vi kill to eat, but in Numis'OM there is no need for that, as it is a world of pure manifestation....
read the entire article
with photos

# homepages for your browser

|
HOMEPAGES FOR YOUR BROWSER USING
MAIA'S ART!
Below simply click on the thumbnails to
select the page of your choice. Then on that page, click on the link below
the image to make it your browser homepage (this is the page that will open
every time you use your default internet browser). You will be given two choices:
"use this webpage as your only homepage" and "add this webpage to your
homepage tabs." I strongly recommend choosing "use this webpage as
your only homepage." You can always select another page in the future. If
you choose the latter, you will have all these TABS coming in,
causing you to wait as they load before you can use your browser! Selecting
the former as homepage only, will bring the page in fast and easy.

# Contact Maia

Please do not put my email address on any email lists, or post it on your
website. We have the email address in the html code on this page protected
through encryption so that the spammers cannot harvest it. If you do not have
the same technology for protecting email addresses then you would give my
address away to the spammers. If you wish to provide a means for people to
contact me please just provide them with a link to this page, that way the info will always be current too!
Thanks for your understanding.
If you send me an e-mail that requires a response and you do not hear
from me in a week's time, please e-mail me again and provide an alternative
e-mail address, if possible. I often get e-mails which in responding,
BOUNCE.

# My Spiritual Venues

|
This website is becoming more of a giant archive for my
work of over 45 years. I am now creating blogs for most of my recent articles,
Although I will keep my "Services" current on this site and
add some more of my older material from time-to-time. To find all my offerings:
websites, blogs and video channels see
New
EarthStar Merkabah (portal site).
TO RECEIVE UPDATES ON
ALL MY WEBS & BLOGS
IMPORTANT: The on-line periodical
Numis'OM - Eye of Metatron no longer requires a subscription to access
and is now part of the Spirit Mythos archives. However, because Spirit
Mythos is so extensive I have not yet found all the pages where
"subscription required" is stated in order to delete this
statement.
~~~~~~~~~~~
My Book:
BLUE STAR LOVE
~~~~~~~~~~~
My
Kyi'Ra" Portal on Cosmic Consciousness website is now up!
By subscribing to my Portal you are
supporting all my considerable work on the internet - mostly
which is free.
~~~~~~~~~~~
SPIRIT
STORE
~~~~~~~~~~~
ALL
MY WEBSITES AND BLOGS AT A GLANCE
~~~~~~~~~~~
We are headed toward a very disorienting
experience. Your entire environment is made up of nothing but symbols. Your
whole mental landscape is made up of only symbols. The whole Hologram of this
reality is made of agreed upon symbols and those agreements are straining at
each and every limit set upon them. (Even if you disagree with something,
first you are agreeing that it exists.) This is going to look very crazy for a
time and many persons will cling all the tighter to fixed meanings of favorite
symbols in the chaos. - Ian
Lungold - creator of the "Mayan Calendar and Conversions Codex"
"A
human being is a part of a whole, called by us 'universe', a part limited in
time and space. He experiences himself, his thoughts and feelings as something
separated from the rest...a kind of optical delusion of his consciousness.
This delusion is a kind of prison for us, restricting us to our personal
desires and to affection for a few persons nearest to us. Our task must be to
free ourselves from this prison by widening our circle of compassion to
embrace all living creatures and the whole of nature in it's beauty."
- Albert Einstein
~~~~~~~~~~~

# Golden Links

Websites of people I know personally and
greatly value their work
COSMIC NEXUS
The Cosmic Nexus
project is dedicated to creating a global Community of Unity to take an active
part in further developing unity consciousness on Earth. This community will be
comprised of various groups such as the spiritual, holistic, metaphysical,
alternative anything and conscious business communities. Free newsletter and
"Share Your Gifts" community board. - Simeon Nartoomid
SACRED
CONNECTIONS
in Highland Perthshire, Scotland, provides information on
various themes,
including local tours of this sacred and beautiful area,
research material about Jesus in Scotland,
talks, spiritual
seminars/workshops, health and spiritual awareness etc
CELTIC FIRE AND
FAERIE - The Shining Path of the Sidhe
Celtic Fire and Faerie explores the world of Celtic Mysticism,
Celtic Mythology and the World of Faerie, the Sídhe (Shee). Celtic Mysticism is
understood as birthed from the ageless teachings of the Elders. The Tuatha Dé
Danann (Tooha Day Danann) are the Elders of the Irish race. Celtic Fire explores
the connections between the ancient Irish mysticism of the Tuatha Dé, the
Druids, Esoteric Christianity through the Céile Dé, and the deeper connection
with the Great Eastern Teachers of the Himalayas. Tele-classes, private
mentoring sessions and an annual Sacred Journey to Celtic Sacred Sites are some
of the offerings.
DESERT LAND
A site on Eastern Shamanism, East-West relations from a spiritual
perspective,
and other thought-provoking topics.
CELTIC TRAILS
Tours to Rosslyn Chapel and other significant spiritual sites in
Scotland and Ireland. Author Jackie Queally started this work in 1999 and is
enjoys working with unity in diversity, as testified by the many souls who are
attracted to travel with her.
GRAIL LANDS
Books, webinars, workshops in synergy light work for beginners and earth grid
tours of UK, Ireland, Malta and France with Jackie Queally, spiritual tour guide
and synergy light worker, and long-term student of William Buehler inventor of
Reshel.
SHIMIR-ORION
William Buehler 's Reshel Grid work - Still Under Construction
RUBY ROSE
LINE
Ruby Rose Line is a spiritual venture initiated by Bart Van
Sichem De Combe and his wife Ruby in 2008 in Antwerp, Flanders. Its main goal is
to assist in the expansion of the human heart and mind through the organisation
of seminars and workshops on science and spirituality, and thus balancing the
Divine Female with the Divine Male energies. We do this through both larger
public events with internationally acclaimed speakers, as well as within more
discrete lightgroups. We are deeply inspired by and work very closely with Rev.
Maia Kamala (Nartoomid) and her life-long friend Rev. William Stuart Buehler.
WEBSITE OF ARIEL
SPILSBURY
author of "The 13 Moon Oracle" and co-author of "The Mayan
Oracle"
"TRANSMUTEO"
by JEAN-LUC
BOZZOLI
DVD mystical journey by a marvelous visionary & artist!
CREATIVE HARMONICS
One of my favorite artist!
HARMONY ART
Angelic paintings, writing and AngelWork e-zine
THE MAGDALENE
MYSTERIES
Honoring Nicole Christine
SHAMANIC ASTROLOGY
UNIVERSAL SONG
Randy Masters has spent his lifetime exploring the mysteries of
science, spirituality, and the arts. Combining his knowledge of music,
mathematics, physics, and art, Randy has developed a beautiful collection of
jewelry and tools to enhance the connection between life on the planet and
existence in the stars.
Heartbeat of Kaua'i
Get in Touch with the Experience of the Garden Isle - Lemuria of
the Ancients!

tags:
  - members

---
# Crysulims - The New Earth Merkabahs

|
Crysulims - The New Earth Merkabahs
Our Starships Home!
art by Maia
The woman stood surrounded by the abundance of nature. she felt fresh,
clean, re-born. Her senses were alive and clearer than she had ever known them
to be....in any incarnation she had ever experienced, and now she was fully
aware of them all. Yet all that was compressed in but a mere moment in time. She
was entirely present in the expanded "Now" of this New Earth she stood upon. Yes
she "stood" but...there was no sense of weight, only a marvelous feeling of
connection, as if her body was growing right out of the soil and yet at the same
time flying high above in the crystalline sky of the "New World." In the
distance she heard birds singing, but the sound was fuller - with greater
expression, for now she knew their language.
It was time, she could sense it. Her whole body responded as if it longed
to expand even further, out into the lavender-blue sky. She lifted her arms and
sang...singing the song of her Soul, which was a sound so revealing her heart
burst into pure LIGHT and her joy knew no bounds. THIS was the I AM of her
totality! Not as a "she" or "he" but as the very pureness of BEING.
As she continued to bring forth this glorious sound from within her, her
heart became more and more radiant until her whole body glowed and was
iridescent and with the transparency of a butterfly's wing. Traces of silken
threads - pure honey-light, floating in the air, streamed gently from her body.
The threads began to coalesce, coming together to from a beautiful, weaving
pattern of color around her. This was her cocoon-merkabah, the crysulim which
would continue to nurture her until her body was completely transformed into its
"pure gem" state.
So as we first "appear" in the New Earth we will undergo the transformation
within our crysulims. This will take place in stages, where the need to create
the crysulim comes upon us and we stay within it for a period of "time" (time
being present but as a much more dimensional experience). We will then take back
the threads and go into other experiences, living our new lives...to return
again into the crysulim later for another cycle of development and nourishment.
Imagine now if you will, the sensation of creating and being nourished for a
time in your crysulim. It is spun from the radiance of the heart when this organ
become fully active as a generator of LIGHT. We now live with hearts that are in
the "hold" mode...pumping away to keep the engine running. When our hearts
become "alive" and radiant they are at full capacity and capable of completely
restructuring our body by turning on all the necessary codons of the DNA to make
this happen.
FEEL how it would be to experience this...to open up and BE - all the senses,
all the potential realized right NOW! Let out of the box. You can now fly free!
Right now in this moment and repeatedly, you can go through this exercise of
imagination and each time you do, you will bring the "future" into the present
just a little bit more. This will allow you to recalibrate your starlight
patterns and expand them, offering you greater potential for health and a sense
of joy and well-being.
Radiant Heart
(click image to enlarge)

# New Earth and Pandora

|

New Earth Star and Pandora
Since the mid-1980's I have been writing about the New Earth Star: our ascended future reality - yet also co-existing with our present Earth. When I recently (1/10) watched the motion picture AVATAR I was stunned by the world Pandora's similarity to Numis'OM, the first stage of the New Earth Star world experience. The producer of the movie, James Cameron was shown Pandora in a dream over 10 years ago.
The Nav'i cat-beings of Pandora DO exist in Numis'OM. ThothHorRa calls them the "Kuri." They are a Sirian race originally stemming from a larger gene-pool of Sirians, feline in nature, mixed with human genetics to one degree or another. Several of the Sirian Races are in Numis'OM.
The glowing plants of Pandora are like the ones in Numis'OM. The inter-connectedness of the roots of the trees with ALL LIFE of Pandora the same as in the New Earth.
The Lotus Loci of Numis'OM are seen in Pandora as the "Seeds of the Tree." In Pandora they are small and white. In the New Earth some are small and some are white, but most are large and colorful.
In the move AVATAR there are violent animals and even the Na'vi kill to eat, but in Numis'OM there is no need for that, as it is a world of pure manifestation.
Here is a brief slideshow of some of my past art images reflecting Numis'OM which reveal a very Pandora-like world.
Nothing has to date affected audiences as has the movie AVATAR. There are many who are even saying they found themselves depressed having to leave it behind in the theatre - wishing to stay on Pandora! Of course beautiful fantasies tend to effect people in that way as we long to escape our everyday challenges. Yet I believe there is far more to it than that, and Pandora expresses it more dynamically before us than anything previously has been able to. "Fantasy" comes from the "imagination" which is a state of being in which we tap into other realms of very real experience. Some of what we receive is distorted by our own fears and desires, but much of it reveals other states of being. Minus the box-office violence Pandora IS the New Earth Star and thus it is calling people in a powerful way to connect to their New Earth "beings" NOW (for all "future" is merely a limit we place on on cognitive awareness). Those who feel that must leave it behind when the theatre lights come on are experiencing the deep feelings of separation they have from their pure awareness.
The Na'vi /Kuri of Numis'OM
"Na'vi" is an actual name in the Old Language of Earth, meaning to ripen upon the vine. "Kuri" means much the same: to become full in Grace. What then, do the Kuri of Numis'OM do...what sacred path do they hold open in the New Earth? According to my akashic insights they create a living link between the Earth and Humanity. Just as in the motion picture AVATAR they are the extended roots of the Mother Tree. They move through passages between the forming Numis'OM and our current Earth realm...touching into our Nature Elementals and nourishing them into transforming through the New Earth codes and frequencies in their (Kuri's) DNA. They have been with us a long while. They speak to us in rhythms of the sub-conscious where we are ebbing and flowing with the Divine Mother in the Earth.
Some of us - human beings of Earth - are Kuri in our "future"
New Earth bodies (or at least one of our New Earth bodies). Many more resonate
with the Na'vi / Kuri as they hold that bridging element between where we are
now and where we are going, in a very pure and natural energy form. They are
very much AT-ONE with the Lotus Loci (Seeds of the Mother Tree)and literally
dwell among them in Numis'OM.
ThothHorRa Infusion with the "Seeds of the Tree" (as given to those gathered on NESIE in Second Life on 1/17/10)
ThothHorRa Khandr: ANU KA ~|~ Welcome All

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Mt. Kailash and the Crystal Skulls VOLUME 01, 2009 Please use the "Printer Friendly Version" link on right in the menu bar on the front cover page above to make a quality print of this publication. We were guided to name this publication Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron by Thoth, and the Illumined Assembly of the Christos' Merkabah of the Host comprised of 12 souls holding open a portal for the the Christ energies on this planet. The Radiant Ones we are working with encouraged us to bring forth this publication as a continuance of work that was done by Maia Christianne Mallika from 1980 through 1999. During this period Maia produced, first, the periodical entitled The Source (1980-1988), and then later, Temple Doors (1989-1999). In 1994 Simeon Nartoomid joined her in producing the latter periodical. In the nearly 7 year respite between the conclusion of Temple Doors and when the first release of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron began, we both underwent a period of expanded esoteric initiation and deeply personal transformational experiences that have prepeared us for resuming this work at an entirely new octave of experience. Thoth and the IAC Merkabah of the Host have requested that we facilitate a specific Program of Light related to the Aramu Temple of Thoth and Numis'OM to help those who feel resonant with this Station of Light (Spirit Heart Sanctuary) to accelerate their Ascension processes and thus to further help the collective soul of humanity approach the gateway of Ascension which Thoth calls Light-Principle Forty, or LP-40 for short. Ultimately, as we collectively move through this passage we will activate the 44:44 Ascension Stargate and trigger a series of cosmic events destined to alter the DNA of humanity forever. Numis'OM is a causal reference point for the New Earth Star and the 44:44 stargate, and is hosted within the causal body of Venus. The Aramu Temple of Thoth is energetically within the Numis'OM matrix and acts as a way-station for souls building the New Earth Star consciousness from within the Earthen experience. Souls can thus visit Numis'OM and even the New Earth Star if they have proper intent and attunement. It is our goal to facilitate pathways for this to occur within. This publication thus sits at the heart of our efforts to facilitate this greater process for the Masters and Illumined Ones that we are working with and to assist souls on Earth. We hope that you will find it a fruitful and friendly path into the Homeward Light. Please share your experiences with us and others at Maia's Asccension Hologram Network (AHN) site. The front cover art on this issue is entitled "The Lotus Crystal Skull " (a composite artwork) by Maia Christianne Mallika. ANNOUNCEMENT: as of last issue all references to Thoth will now appear as "ThothHorRa" because he has requested of Maia that she use this new vibrational signature for him for the next stage of planetary ascension unfoldment. Journey to Mt. Kailash by Maia Christianne Mallika (a composite artwork) ~ Path of Remembrance ~ I was taken on a journey in one my my "New Earth" forms - that of "Starheart," which I have re-created and thus now embody within the virtual world of Second Life. I saw myself before Mt. Kailash in Tibet1, the pristine whiteness and grey stone sides of her majesty rose like a Goddess of the High Heavens before me. It is here, where four sacred rivers are born that eventually come back together to create the Great Mother Ganga (Ganges). It is in this Mountain, according to ThothHorRa, that an inner-planes retreat - the Gurideva Enclave, has recently been installed to open to the Presence and energies of the 13th Living Crystal Skull - In La'kech and the 12 Crystal Dweller Skulls. I then became aware of being drawn inside the mountain, where a seemingly endless maze of caverns containing immense crystals growing from the walls a ceiling were all about me. They were of a size and quality that even surpassed those discovered in Mexico and Spain. I then felt a tingling energy and saw myself transported inter-dimensionally into a room of polished stone and quartz with several large crystal points in it. This was not natural as was were the caverns... nor were they in the 'real time' world of those crystal caverns, but hovered just beyond it. I felt that the natural crystals triggered a movement in consciousness allowing the voyager to move into another electro-magnetic zone of 'reality.' Here I felt AT PEACE. I knew that beyond this room of beautiful crystals and gentle light emanating from the walls was much more to be seen and felt, but for now, was called to simply be present there in a meditative posture. Meditation by Maia Christianne Mallika (a composite artwork) In this state it was revealed to me that the 11 LOTUS Crystal Skulls in the Blue Star Valley2 of Tibet, having been joined with the 12th Crystal Skull3, were now changing location of their holographic project and being focused as the medial point into the Gurideva Enclave of Mt. Kailash. It is here that the configuration of the 12-13 Crystal Dweller Crystal Skull geometry is now formed. Since Mt. Kailash holds the anchor point for the planet for the SHAMBALLAH GATE of Numis'OM, the actual, physical 12 Dweller Skulls located around are now directly flowing their Light encoding up through the Lotus Stem - the main (but not only) path connecting this world to Numis'OM. and through the Shamballah Gate into Numis'OM. As this is occurring, an acceleration of their Light encodings are coming back down the "stem" as well and circulating a new and powerful New Earth frequency throughout the planet. Meridians of this strengthening Crystal Skull grid - which ThothHorRa is calling the In La'kech grid - are beginning to be formed reaching out to key points upon the Earth. ThothHorRa is referring to this grid as 'Her' (the In La'kech being/geometry/star configuration) Body. this 'Body' can also be seen interposed within the human body, as it connects to our energy body meridians, forming the first stages of the Pure Gem4. The nodes or 'end points' of the planetary meridians forming the In La'kech Grid as thus far revealed to me (the central node being Mt. Kailash) are as follows: 1) A place in the Yucatan, were an ancient Mayan city remains hidden in the jungle growth. 2) A point near Lake Titicaca in Peru. 3) A mountain of the Sangre de Cristo range (actually one of the retreats of ThothHorRa) near Crestone, Colorado.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

4) A three-prong (thus 3 facet node) in the Hawaiian Island: the Mauna Loa volcano of the Big Island of Hawai'i, Haleakala Crater on Mau'i, and Mt. Wai'ale'ale on Kaua'i (the latter is the remnant of a volcano that existed in Mu or Lemuria). Starheart Reliving my "Temple Doors" Past Life by Maia Christianne Mallika (a composite artwork) I was then transported into the past and to the location of the 'hidden city' in the Yucatan, Hu'Habat. There I embodied the female Mayan oracle Temple Doors, who led the People into North America when the 'Bad Times of Sacrifice' began, and her Kind were usurped by the bloodthirsty Chimu Kaba. It was the story of Temple Doors (parts of which have been written about by the current Mayans as part of their history / myth) that inspired me (Maia) to name my former periodical 'Temple Doors.' I believe that I was incarnated as this woman... but of course I cannot know that for certain; yet I have felt for many years that she lives inside me. As 'Starheart' I slipped into the passage of Temple Doors and saw her in me and me in her. I then 'knew' that I, Temple Doors, had undergone years of spiritual preparation by my inner-planes mentor - the one I now as Maia, call 'ThothHorRa' - who was in the past Quezecoatl / Kukuklan. He appeared to Temple Doors as Kukuklan, who was by that time already historical legend among the People. This preparation was to receive the 'mark' or Presence of In La'kech, the 13th Living Crystal Skull. Temple Doors was not the first to received this 'mark' - the Abhu, or 'Touch.' She came from generations of Guardians of the 12 Crystal Skulls (already spread out among many locations of the Earth). Now she would receive the Touch of In La'kech. In my first issue of the publication Temple Doors Volume 01, 1989, I wrote about my akashic visions of the woman by that name: "I did not know her name, yet I saw here clearly as having dwelt as a child in a valley of Tibet, in a beautiful city named La'ti'mayahr. She was a princess, daughter of the king of this hidden valley, into which few travelers found their way. She had two older and two younger sisters and a younger brother.. At the time I intercepted her in my vision-link, she was nine years old. There was an army of men invading her father's palace. Their noses and mouths were concealed beneath a shawl of course, grey weave, but their dark and fearful eyes spoke of death." I continued my vision-story of how she and her two younger sisters were spared, helped by servants... but apparently the rest of her family perished, the palace burned to the ground: "...a porter, a man the young girls knew not, took them on a long journey by foot to a ruin in the mountains where an old shaman dwelt. This kindly savant embraced the princesses and wept with them. He had been their father's teacher and confidant. "From the ruins of this ancient temple the aged wizard brought his precious charges into the Valley of the Blue Star. Here the royal children were presented to an Egyptian priestess who embodied the archetype of Hathor, goddess of women. There the young ones stayed, being nourished and spiritually healed from the dreadful memory of their family's murder. Under the loving guidance of the Priestess of Hathor, the oldest princess blossomed into a beautiful young woman who assumed the mother role for her two younger siblings. When she was fifteen years of age, a starship landed in the valley. She was not unacustomed to these vessels of Light, as she had seen them come and go in her own shining city as well as several times past in the Blue Star Valley. Yet this time she was invited by the Hathor Priestess to come upon the landing platform and enter within the pearl-like womb of the ship. Once inside, the princess saw a familiar figure standing before her, his arms outstretched. To her joyful amazement it was her father, whom she had presumed died in the mayhem of that terrible day when she had seen her brother killed, his blood a scarlet vein of life poured upon the marble floor. Her mother and two older sisters had been killed along with her brother, but her father had managed escape. "It was at this point in my vision-link that I became aware that this royal family was not entirely Tibetan. There is an obvious genetic cross-over between Tibetan-Eastern races and those of ancient South America, including the Mayans... the king of the invaded Tibetan city journeyed in the "sky seed" with his children from the Valley of the Blue Star to the Yucatan, where he was welcomed as a returning Lord among the people of Mayaland. "It was months after this initial vision that I came across the following the the book 'Magical Art' by Heyoehkah Merrifield: "'The woman named Temple doors was the reason for the migration north of a tribe of Mayan people. As the chief of her people she led the way through the wars and the hardships of the long journey. Most of her family had been killed at the sacrifice temples...Temple Doors led five thousand people north to the lands we know as Arizona, Utah and New Mexico. her people raised the first buildings we now see as the ruins in the Southwest. These people were named the Temple Doors people in honor of their Medicine Chief.' "I knew instantly upon reading this paragraph that the woman Temple Doors was my little 'Tibetan' princess." I then continued my akashic narrative of the woman I then knew as 'Temple Doors'... how her father and his second wife and other children were all sacrificed, along with her two full sisters, when the Horrible Ones invaded them and conquered the city and indeed the nation. Yet Temple Doors, along with other leaders under her, were able to lead the Great Migration. Now I see how Temple Doors connects to the Dweller Crystal Skulls of the Valley of the Blue Star, which are now being transferred (the holograph) to the In La'kech Retreat in Mt. Kailash. Temple Doors as the 'Chief' and Medicine Woman of her People was in possession of three of the twelve actual Dweller Crystal Skulls. She was able to take these with her on the Sacred Migration. Two she was guided to place into the hands of two different Medicine Chiefs... one in Chaco Canyon, New Mexico and the other in Zion Canyon, Utah. They remain there to this day, sequestered away until they are to fulfill prophecy. The third skull she gave to a trusted messenger - a Shaman - to take into the Northern region of what is now the state of Michigan, to Manitoulin Island, where it is also still located.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Embrace of the Dragon by Maia Christianne Mallika As Starheart I then traveled to Tibet once again, arriving on a high plateau. There I found myself surrounded by monolithic dragons! Twelve of them to be exact. One I knew was the soul of ThothHorRa in dragon form. It was revealed to me that all these dragons were the original 'donors' of the 12 Dweller Crystal Skulls in their ancient past human embodiments! This included ThothHorRa when he had been another being - not a 'Thoth.' ThothHorRa called me to him and I drew close to his loving warmth. There was nothing fearful about him in this form... nor were the other dragons. They all exuded a LOVE that was like a Foundation - a strong Pillar of Fire. ThothHorRa showed me how these twelve Dwellers served the Earth in Dragon embodiments - holding the Gates open in the primal core of the planet for the 12 Crystal-Fire Pillars - the EL'OR'HIM - to feed back and forth into the central sun 'Hunab Ku' of this galaxy and beyond, to the center of the universe. All 72 Dwellers were Khat'Hor'I El'ohim of the Earth - Creator Lords under the seven Ma'hor EL'ohim Ray-Beings that created the entire solar system and everything within it at a causal level. The Khat'Hor'I El'ohim had taken human form in their process of Creation and were able also to become any creature at will. The Dragon Ones are their primary path for the core energies of the planet - the creational furnace. As the EL'OR'HIM Pillars slowly rotate like a giant wheel connecting into the central sun atoma of the Earth and OUT into space-time, so they BEND space-time in the dimensions in which they appear. The flash in and out of different dimensions in their constant adjusting and calibrating of the Earth as a multi-dimensional field. The Twelve Dragon Lords gathered together then, and I saw that they were creating new Flame Codes for the EL'OR'HIM Wheel - evidenced by changing the colors of their skin and eyes! It was a rainbow language as they "spoke the encoding through their flesh into the planetary core. The Dragon Lords by Maia Christianne Mallika Seeing this gathering of Dragon Lords in their communion with the EL'OR'HIM, brought me to the attention of a gathering we had with ThothHorRa on the New EarthStar Island in Second Life, in which he spoke of the 12-13 of the Dweller Crystal Skulls and related topics: ThothHorRa: Offer every human being the WAY to become In La'kech... I AM ANOTHER YOU... which is another way of saying I AM THAT I AM. Here on NESIE we are reflecting becoming the "Other"... the Mirror of the planet's transformation and in doing so we are aiding that transformation. How can this be? Just such a small community and modest "estate"? But it is not about the number of people. It is about the INTENT and the consistency of that intent. As HE said... "whenever two or more are gathered in my name..." Why not ONE? Because more than one creates a FAMILY. A unit of progression. His "NAME"... the Christ... the PRESENCE of the Universal Christic Consciousness, is that which is COMMANDING the process. It is calling upon the NAME... the WORD... the LOGOS. It is the God Command. It can be any sacred NAME that contains the God Command. And so... by bringing the 12-13 of the Crystal Skulls vibration into NESIE, preparing the way as a MIRROR for SHE who is the 13th - the Grail Herself - so we call upon the sacred GOD NAME... in this instance, IN LA'KECH. Maia: I was back again in the circle of Dragon Lords atop the Tibetan plateau. ThothHorRa Silvercloud (his dragon name given to me in Second Life) spoke to me about the history of the 72 Dwellers and how they came to give their skulls to the Earth; and more upon the purpose for this... Silvercloud: In the time before Time we, as the Khat'Hor'I El'ohim Creator Lords working within the causal field created by the Ma'hor EL'ohim Ray-Beings, created the Earth in stages of evolution on various levels of existence... or what could be called 'magnetic zones' - for 'supra' magnetism bends space-time and creates other dimensional realms. These "realms" can be layered together as one dynamic field and that field can be a planet. the Earth was intended to be a point of access for many universal planes (dimensions) to use as a staging ground for building "new worlds" in the process of Return to Source or what I have referred to in the past as the Attasic Universe5. Yet there was much dissonance it this evolving field, due to the types of processes involved which were in some cases not compatible... yet we intentionally brought them together, as this was part of the Greater Hierarchal Plan, to bring together dissonance and create from it coherency. Thus through many stages of this planet's evolution (on the various levels of it's creation) much took place. It was eons after the original 72 Khat'Hor'I El'ohim Creator Lords moved out of their cycle as such (El'ohim are continually 'passing the flame' from one 'generation' to another) that they began to incarnate in 'human' forms... mostly of very high subtle light bodies. Now it was their time to help the Earth in other ways, and so they did. Some, such as myself, came to Earth and even at certain points incarnated into physical bodies here. We held the Earth grid in place - the original creation grid - through our incarnation into it. Others of the 72 who did not incarnated into the Earth held / hold this grid at universal nodes relative to the Earth's role as a intersection for many creational pathways. At one point in the distant past, these 72 began to transfer their immense creational Light programs (which they still contained in their being) into living bodies which they inhabited for a brief period of time. There are many stories I could relate about this passage... many. But I say here only that as they left these 'bodies' so they turned the skulls to crystal, and that these crystal 'brains' contain the co-axial triggers for the Light programs of creation through the Eschaton6 of Earth and into the New Earth Star. Most of the 72 Dweller Skulls have never come to earth. These are known as the "Metatron Skulls." They will however come to this world during the Last Days. Starheart upon Esmerald by Maia Christianne Mallika Maia: 'Starheart' pondered these things... so many years ago had I receive the original information on the 72 Crystal Skulls and now I was seeing a much larger picture.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Neither had I previously known that the 'Thoth' soul had been one of the original Khat'Hor'I El'ohim of the Earth! As Starheart I felt myself flying away... up into the clouds on the back of my small dragon Esmerald. As I looked down upon the land below I felt the electric and magnetic currents running through it like rivers of LIGHT, with the higher etheric currents riding just above the electric-magnetic waves. My dragon was automatically riding these currents as well, for as a dragon she was part of that field in her nature and being. Yet so was I, as we all have the 'dragon' within us. Starheart and ThothHorRa by Maia Christianne Mallika (a composite artwork) Starheart and ThothHorRa I then found myself on the ground once again, this time holding my Daemon (animal totem) Shesat and in the presence of the 'human' ThothHorRa. I felt connected to the Earth and all it's creatures - including the human ones. I saw how the Dwellers "dwell" in us and for us... for WE are becoming the NEW El'Ohim of the New Earth Star! ThothHorRa as the Great Dragon Silvercloud speaking to our NESIE gathering on the Winter Solstice of 2008: the Dragon energy on the planet is central to the changes now taking place globally in the Hearts of mankind and in the Gaia herself. The climate changes... what is called "global warming," the PERSPECTIVES that are shifting in the mass consciousness. MANY aspects of higher dimensions of Earth play into all of this; but the Dragon energy is the essential ENGINE at the core of the Earth! The 72 Dweller Crystal Skulls are the Skulls of the original Khat'Hor'I El-Ohim who created the Earth with a special purpose and intention. Thus on occasion when I appear as 'Silvercloud' to Dragon-Speak to you I will TRANSMIT this CORE into your being at various levels which you individually and collectively are ready to receive. Silvercloud changes his coloring at this point... The ability of this avatar to change color is very much in sync with the powers of the true Dragon Ones. A 'language' of color transmission to the core of the planet. I simply come to you now at this Sacred Solstice to offer my GIFT to the manger... and to all of you. I give the GIFT of PERFECT PEACE in the MIDST of life and all it brings to you on a daily basis. Remember the DRAGON dwells within you and it is not a warrior of fear but a Bringer of Fire for the New Earth! Footnoted Futher Definition Links: 1) Mt. Kailash 4) Pure Gem 6) Eschaton Links to Related Articles on Spirit Mythos PLEASE NOTE: AN UPDATED VERSION OF THE LIGHT-CODED ACTIVATIONAL SCREENSAVER "THE LOTUS CRYSTAL SKULLS" IS NOW AVAILABLE IN OUR SPIRIT STORE. This now includes the 12th Crystal Skull and the 13th Living Crystal Skull (In La'kech). The 12th Crystal Skull does not have a 'Star Chord' symbol as it acts somewhat like a blank rune, carrying the potential of the previous 11 skulls and opening the way therefore, for the 13th Living Crystal Skull. My 'home' floating magically above my New Earth Island Estate (NESIE) in the virtual world of Second Life has three stories to it. The top two stories I have created as a sacred temple / energy field (as is ThothHorRa's entire house above the Tachyon Pyramid in the sky). I recently installed a 'Shamballah Gate' there... placing an animated lotus stalk crystal in the center of a Tibetan rug which has the Shamballah point at it's center (see image above). From Thoth in Numis'OM volume 1 - 2006: "The Shamballah Gate actually contains the entry point into the Numis'OM. You could see this 'gate' somewhat like a control panel. On the panel there are various buttons / nodes that if pressed / triggered, open specific frequency vectors. One of these vectors is the lotus stalk or streaming into Numis'OM." In installing this Gate within the virtual New EarthStar Island environment, it is my belief that this intentional act in the subtle etheric of Second Life will help to stabilize the actual connection of the Shamballah Gate between the Old and New Earth fields. I also installed a secondary Shamballah Gate in a public area on NESIE - an extension of the one in my private home for everyone in Second Life to access. The image below shows this second installation. Shamballah Installation Accessible to Everyone by Maia Christianne Mallika Maia Christianne Mallika December, 2008 When I write about dragons, unicorns, faeries etc. I am of course speaking about the energies of the Earth and Nature Spirits as they appear on various dimensional planes to US. Sometimes they flash through into our visual sight in the 3D... especially with children, whose energy fields are so much more mutable with the other dimensions of Earth. Further, whatever comes through me from 'ThothHorRa' or the 'Akashic' is put forth by me as my perspective, my interpretation of what I see, feel and am 'receiving' from... somewhere. I relate these things honestly, as they are experienced by me to be 'real.' I cannot KNOW where they come from or IF they really are 'real.' But then what IS the nature of reality? The 'new' quantum physics tells us that we create reality by observing it. In other words, when a smaller than small particle is focused upon it 'becomes' real. This opens up a very expansive realm or rather realms of possibilities! With all the 'channeling' going on now - much of it contradictory - this can cause us to throw out the baby with the bath water. One perhaps need ask of themselves instead... how does this information make me FEEL? Do I feel more enlightened in some way, more connected to who I AM? The details of the information are not as important as how it does or does not open you to Spirit. For more on this topic you can read my article Quantum Physics, Time and the Akashic Records. ThothHorRa and His Dragon Form by Maia Christianne Nartoomid (a composite artwork) Atu Tehuti, Ati Hatu -- "in the rising of the breath I greet you, in the release of the breath I embrace you" From a recent session for one of my (Maia) clients: ThothHorRa: "...the Immutable Universe... all parts at some point coalescing with their Divine Appointment in Oneness. This is understood from the perspective through the dualism becoming ONE. 'Star Gates' are points that give humanity an axitonal moment of alignment to this active principle and thus are a point of ingress into another plane or perception of expanded consciousness. Naturally, accepting the full spectrum of 'axitonal moments' is the foundation of all Ascension dynamics.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Maia: Could you please define your meaning of "axitonal moments." ThothHorRa: direct receipt through the meridians of the body of higher level LIGHT infusion from stellar programs created by the 'songs' (harmonic patterning) of the Angelics for the purpose of drawing the 'body' into transpersonal 'pause' in order to fully receive the Light Doctrine being entoned within that breath of the Universe. Kathleen Millar, B.C, Canada: I have read and re-read the last issue of Numis'OM several times. Very revelatory as always! (As an aside, I'm interested in the Second Life temples, etc. but the computer I have doesn't support the software... so I know you'll keep us all in the loop!) I just happened to catch an old Temple Doors article a few days ago about Noah's Ark and how there were actually THREE arks and how there were bodies on the arks. I can't shake a notion that the DNA that has been preserved in those bodies is somehow linked to how In La'Kech will be acting as a receptor that will allow a Light Program to be entered into the Morphogenetic Field of the DNA. I guess the biggest question I have is how the DNA from those preserved bodies will be accessed and 'used' to 'break the seal of the Nephilim' (from your article in T.D.) and how that would correspond to In La'Kechs' role if it even does. ThothHorRa: there are many 'bodies' in suspension, like the ones of the Arks. These bodies contain a living vibrancy to them even though the souls do not currently inhabit the forms. All such suspended bodies will contribute to the 'DNA Factor' of "breaking the seal of the Nephilim," which is essentially a 'ceiling' humanity has self-installed to keep the consensual reality in place. This 'consensus' will have to be disassembled before world Ascension can take place. Kathleen Millar: will there be a correspondence between when the LOTUS Skulls are activated and when they appear in In La'Kech's temple on NESIE? ThothHorRa: yes, there will be. NESIE is establishing an "Another You" gateway of experience. Kathleen Millar: I've always known that the Runes are much more than an oracular system, that they are a very primal sacred geometry of some persuasion. Through a huge intuitive leap of connecting this strangely shaped tree that had a ninety degree turn in it with the 'turn' our solar system will be taking in 2012, I made some connections. This started with the following from Numis'OM, Volume 04. Simeon wrote: "The Milky way... has much more powerful and complex sets of harmonics and sub harmonics which open up entirely new possibilities for evolutionary experimentation, possibility and potential. It is the master harmonics of the Milky Way galaxy that have the capability of fully activating the Adam Kadmon light encodings within our DNA..." OK, my question, since we are moving fully into the master universe of the Milky Way are the Runes the symbolic representation of the 'new' harmonics we will be accessing? I.E. through the practice of cymatics, one can make a visual representation of sound waves and that's what I see the runes being. Could ThothHorRa comment? ThothHorRa: Indeed the Runes are one such tool... as is the Hebrew Alphabet, Sanskrit and several other of the sacred languages of Earth. These 'root' languages contain the vibrational 'spins' of universal hamonics as they have descended directly from the Aloii Language - the First Language of mankind. Bill Buehler, Crestone, CO: regarding this quote: "The big discovery came on June 3, 2007, when the five probes serendipitously flew through the breach just as it was opening. Onboard sensors recorded a torrent of solar wind particles streaming into the magnetosphere, signaling an event of unexpected size and importance." It seems that there may be a connection between this event and the LOTUS (Legion of the United Stars) flow of expansion. Memory is held in the magnetic field as I understand it. Also there is a "Magnetic (ISIS) Temple" in the Field, shaped as the Great Pyramid, now in the western Atlantic and moving west slowly. The 12th Dweller Skull was possibly installing in this time frame but completing a year later (July 30, 2008)? Somehow it "feels" that they are linked and it would take a year's zodiacal spin to run the program: June 2007 to July 2008. 5 "probes" would grid a HOLOS seeding formation. ThothHorRa: all this is synchronous with the expansion of the Crystal Skull (In La'kech) matrix on the planet and the "new" (or rather re-defined) Earth grid it is creating. Giselle, Mexico: I’ve been reading books regarding the Mayan concepts of Time and Space. In one if these books, researcher Jose Arguelles, based on teachings of Mayan Elders and his own studies, talks about a concept the Maya call “Zuvuya”. According to this book, the Zuvuya is an inter-dimensional highway, similar to the concept of Serpent Rope or Kuxam Suum. The Maya travel through time and space using this “Zuvuya”, this inter-dimensional highway and a mathematical tool called Tzolkin (what we’ve come to know as the Mayan calendar) that allows them to change their vibration according to the dimension they want to go to. They also speak of another concept called “Vertical Time”, by which Past, Present are Future are occurring at the same time, and therefore, a human being can achieve a state of consciousness in which he can change his Past by changing his Present, or he can “see” both the Future and the Past by being fully aware in the present. So, I have questions related to all of these concepts: What is Thoth’s view of the Zuvuya, this “highway” that allows beings to travel in time and space? Is it similar to the so called “wormholes”? ThothHorRa: through the laws of quantum physics, the Zuvuya allows the creation of a specific kind of wormhole to be created by the 'traveler' or rather observer, at the points where the traveler wishes to determine access. It is a very real condition of quantum dynamics. Giselle: I once had a vision in which I saw myself becoming really tiny and getting into a crystal (using it as a spaceship). An energy vortex generated from my solar plexus and from there, a highway full of light formed and I could travel in space and time. Can this truly happen? Is there a way to train oneself to do such thing? Can a person do that in the New Earth Star? ThothHorRa: size is only a matter of re-arranging molecules and atoms. It is easily accomplished once one enters the more expanded conditions of quantum Beingness.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Giselle: is the merkabah related to this kind of travel? Can all beings generate a merkabah? ThothHorRa: yes it is. The solar plexus is the point in the body that acesses the "crosshairs" of the Zuvuya. One must make contact with these "crosshairs" in order to enter the field, or rather REALIZE the field of which they are ONE within. Giselle: I have a question regarding Thoth’s explanation of the 13 crystal skulls (the concepts he talked about on our last gathering at Second Life). He spoke about the passage from 12 to 13 vibration, and a change in consciousness derived from this change. He also talked about DNA. So, my question is: After that session with Thoth, I started thinking that perhaps we can develop 13 DNA strands. I’ve read that there are 12 DNA strands (of which we can only see 2), and somehow the use of our whole DNA potential has been diminished through time. So, basically, I’d like to hear Thoth’s view about this. Can there really be something like 13 DNA strands? What is DNA according to a multi-dimensional view? ThothHorRa: It is encoded LIGHT passing through filaments of a universal membrane composed of muon particles arranged in the helix symmetry of 'DNA.' Maia: not knowing anything about 'muons' other than having heard the word, I googled it to find an article. Unless you are a nuclear scientist it is enough to cross your eyes! So I then asked of ThothHorRa his defintion of a muon as it applies to its role in DNA. ThothHorRa: it creates specific spatial parameters for the encoded light to send it's message into matter. Giselle: I had a dream years ago about myself being in Atlantis (I posted about it on Spirit Mythos, actually). More than a dream, I’m sure it was a vision of one of my incarnations. There was this kind of laboratory in Atlantis, a place where they had some kind of artificial pool and some kind of traveling bubbles. You could travel underwater inside these crystal bubbles, through a tunnel made of water. The tunnel somehow transformed into an inter-dimensional vortex through which you could travel to outer space. So, my question is: Is this “underwater tunnel” related to the black holes and “blue needles” (or “blue holes”, I don’t remember the exact concept) Thoth has spoken about? ThothHorRa: it was a created mechanism that accessed the wormhole dynamic. Giselle: my last question (I promise!!!). Thoth speaks about the Kali Rift and the fact that multiple realities became a single reality for Earth after the fall of Atlantis. Will New Earth Star be a multi-reality system again? And if there are multiple realities, how can civilizations in other dimensions be sure of their true reality and history? Are there many futures, and maybe New Earth Star is just one of those futures? What can Thoth tell us about the “other futures” for humankind? ThothHorRa: there are always multiple realites... wherever there are souls to 'observe' them. After Atlantis very specific major 'zones' came together as one.. not ALL the mulitiples... only specific ones related to the creational flow of the planetary grid. There is no 'absolute' in the universe... this is the stumbling block of scientists and most people on Earth. They cannot seem to accept this, or for most to even grasp the concept. However more and more scientist are now embracing the 'edges' of this truth in their awakening to quantum mechanics. Amanda Baro de Roca, Spain: I'm having the strong feeling that we have come into a stage as we are getting nearer to the Ascension, in which individual projects are to be quickly left behind, taking its place the need for grouping, to find ways of mutual support and cooperation due the falling down of the social systems operating 'till now. What could you comment on this aspect, if you find it accurate? ThothHorRa: yes this is true Amanda... and yet individuality has it's place. It will transform though, into a new paradigm of experience. The 'idividualness' of being will then take on new meaning. Silvia, Kauai, USA: thank You Maia... as I was thinking about the questions yesterday it seemed to me that they were being answered by Thoth himself... like "you know this"... lol. But then I came up with this one which I hope relates to the topics of our New Earth. Since we are in the stages of our awakening, is there a part of God that is still sleeping? And if this is in any way true is he also awakening?... so in relation to this and under the scope of God... "reality" is yet forming?... is all of this related to the 2012 zero time? ThothHorRa: 'God' is a often useful concept to help humanity understand the Totality, the Love, the Perfection of the ALL of which they are a part. This 'All' is constantly revealing new aspects of BEING as the parts of the whole quickening within it. So yes, from this perspective, "God" awakens in increments as we call upon that need to expand in awareness. Fredaricka Yarom, Israel: regarding the article entitled "The Master Builders - Their Legacy" from Numis'OM Volume 01, 2007. You state The Master Builders Legacy on this now "Old Earth" may be coming to a close, but their work here has made it possible for the Earth's ascension into the New Earth Star. As tomorrow December 21st is the activation of the Second Ascension Wave, and due to the many huge energetic shifts of this year I AM wondering if the 33 harmonics of the Master Builders has now changed in resonance, if their task is now completed or will they still be a guiding factor into the New Earth Star? ThothHorRa: the 'Master Builders' role on this Earth is now complete. In the New Earth... ALL who dwell there will be 'Master Builders' of a new dimension and breadth of experience. Fredaricka Yarom: my second question, regarding places of the geodetic cosmic markers of the Master Builders, No. 26 refers to Jerusalem, Israel. Would this be the Temple of Solomon and if not where in Jerusalem if it can be revealed? Also in that connection do I have the encodings which are found in the matrix of that particular geodetic marker, and if the answer is yes, if activating it at that site would it still be of assistance to the overall project of the Master Builders? ThothHorRa: There is a geodetic marker beneath the Dome of the Rock. No 'activation' is necessary, as the geodetic markers are self-commanding. PLEASE NOTE: if you wish to ask questions of ThothHorRa relating to anything you read in this publication, or about planetary and cosmic happenings that you would like more clarity on, please submit your questions to me (Maia).

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

The Hieroaten New Earth Dreamtime Transport New Earth Dreamtime Transport VOLUME 02, 2009 Please use the "Printer Friendly Version" link on right in the menu bar on the front cover page above to make a quality print of this publication. We were guided to name this publication Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron by Thoth, and the Illumined Assembly of the Christos' Merkabah of the Host comprised of 12 souls holding open a portal for the the Christ energies on this planet. The Radiant Ones we are working with encouraged us to bring forth this publication as a continuance of work that was done by Maia Christianne Mallika from 1980 through 1999. During this period Maia produced, first, the periodical entitled The Source (1980-1988), and then later, Temple Doors (1989-1999). In 1994 Simeon Nartoomid joined her in producing the latter periodical. In the nearly 7 year respite between the conclusion of Temple Doors and when the first release of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron began, we both underwent a period of expanded esoteric initiation and deeply personal transformational experiences that have prepeared us for resuming this work at an entirely new octave of experience. Thoth and the IAC Merkabah of the Host have requested that we facilitate a specific Program of Light related to the Aramu Temple of Thoth and Numis'OM to help those who feel resonant with this Station of Light (Spirit Heart Sanctuary) to accelerate their Ascension processes and thus to further help the collective soul of humanity approach the gateway of Ascension which Thoth calls Light-Principle Forty, or LP-40 for short. Ultimately, as we collectively move through this passage we will activate the 44:44 Ascension Stargate and trigger a series of cosmic events destined to alter the DNA of humanity forever. Numis'OM is a causal reference point for the New Earth Star and the 44:44 stargate, and is hosted within the causal body of Venus. The Aramu Temple of Thoth is energetically within the Numis'OM matrix and acts as a way-station for souls building the New Earth Star consciousness from within the Earthen experience. Souls can thus visit Numis'OM and even the New Earth Star if they have proper intent and attunement. It is our goal to facilitate pathways for this to occur within. This publication thus sits at the heart of our efforts to facilitate this greater process for the Masters and Illumined Ones that we are working with and to assist souls on Earth. We hope that you will find it a fruitful and friendly path into the Homeward Light. Please share your experiences with us and others at Maia's Asccension Hologram Network (AHN) site. The front cover art on this issue is entitled "Hierotaten" by Maia Christianne Mallika. The Hieroaten is a manifested portal / complex through which receptive humans in this current Earth time are entering in Dreamtime to receive guidance and preparation for their “next step” into the first stage of the New Earth Star - Numis’OM. The crystalline-plasma sphere in the midst of the pyramid seen in the image above is the entry point. Those in this zone of ‘Earth’ whose DNA is vibrating in a similar range of frequency to the Hieroaten sphere will be drawn into the complex through that portal... or so this is my perception of the dynamic. Within the Hieroaten a level of ‘contact’ with New Earth guides who help the ‘traveler’ to orientate to the essence and consciousness zones present in Numis’OM. Certain instruction is given as well, but this is minimal to the infusion of energy which promotes increased awareness within the individual. ThothHorRa is one of the main facilitators of the Hieroaten, although many guides are involved in the over-all process. Whose DNA vibrates within the range of the Hieroaten sphere? All those who diligently attune themselves to ‘right action’ in their lives and continue to hold as a beacon within them, the Presence of true Spiritual Being in the MOMENT. ‘Perfection’ is not required, rather DESIRE, PURPOSE and PRESENCE (attention in the moment) are. According to my akashic insight and ThothHorRa’s teachings there are seven crystalline frequency streams in the current human DNA. These ‘Seven’ are composed of millions of variations of crystalline strands being woven together. The ‘Seven’ can be equated to actual crystals on our current planet at this time. As the vibration of our Earth becomes more defined within the New Earth Star Hologram, so the highest level of crystal definition will change, as new crystals migrate to the surface of the planet and are ‘discovered,’ and more known crystals become more highly charged with the ‘Phi’ activation. The ‘Seven’ contain for each individual a unique combination of millions of woven strands. EACH human being’s combination is unique... even if they have the same crystals representing the same positions in the seven levels. When there is a specific window of combinations achieved of an individual - as their DNA is constantly changing in subtle ways, and therefore the crystalline strands being re-woven - so more of humanity will fall within the window of receptivity of the Hieroaten sphere, gaining access to this manifesting synapse and thus be called into greater Presence. However much more than just the Hieroaten is involved. That is only one manifesting complex or condition now opening to prepare humanity for Numis’OM. There are many internal processes within the individual as the Lotus Loci1 continue to form and evolve within the human body! They ‘feed’ on the woven (and constantly re-forming) crystalline strands of the DNA. To understand the transformation going on at this time in the geological Earth (of which our human bodies are a part) we need to return to the topic of Phi Crystals2 and the Amaru Crystal Seeding3. Many crystals in the earth now are becoming “Phi” and further being seeded through the Amaru to even greater levels of this Phi frequency. One such crystal is jade. ThothHorRa has revealed to me that the White Jade - mostly especially that from a specific deposit in China which contains amethyst in its matrix - is now one of the most Phi-frequency crystals currently surfacing on the planet. Although ALL jade is now becoming a major Ascension crystal for the planet. Another one registering close to the White Jade on the "ascension" scale is the golden-yellow. White Jade I Recieved as a Gift In the book The Jade Elders4 by Debi Dipperstarlight she writes (below are several excerpts, re-printed here with permission from the author) Jade however was never so prevalent on earth. It came as we have mentioned before in a great rolling meteor, to fall onto earth. We know this Being well. Indeed, he now goes by the name of Thunder, his role is the Thunder God. So you can see his superfluous power. Integrated into the meteor consciousness was great strength of purpose. His purpose was to integrate the concept of Jade or the essence of Jade into mineral form.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

This green life was already unfolding on the earth-ball in plant form, and it too sprung from the Essence of Jade, a consciousness beyond this Universal matrix, much as Gold is existent beyond this Universe. So Thunder Meteor came filled with the mineral expression of Jade to enter your Earth-ball and enrich it with divine Light. Our Sister spoke of the Jade Mountain. This is a monumental being. In a rare and subtle location, the Jade Mountain will not be seen by all, even amongst those who have graduated to the new earthstar. Only those with an affinity for Jade will see her. The mountain is absorbed in the special qi of this select area, behind distant mountains yet beside the sea, existing in a loop of time and space not readily travelled. Yet for those who do visit Her, the Jade Mountain will gift treasures unlike any other. Jade exists in the veins of the earth in lumps of untouched spaces: cold spaces, which prohibit further exploration. Much as a remote radar can connect you with friends across the world by wireless technology and satellite transmission, Jade sends wavelengths down to the Heart of Earth and reaches out to all incarnates, mammals, reptiles, birds, humans, pulling and receiving the spectrum of heartbeats. Its substance and structure is that it can receive these wavelengths and transmute them via jade pathways to the heart of Earth. The place of white jade, being the purest form, was to certainly attune the adept to the High Heavenly Consciousness. It required special skill and awareness to do this, and only the specially trained amidst the specially trained: that is to say amongst all adepts only a few could work with the energies of White Jade. In fact there was a mountain, White Jade Mountain, where adherents of this practice could come to commune. This place does and did not exist in your physical world, but in another dimension where the adepts would fly. To return to the seven crystalline rays... each human having a different combination of crystalline micro-components (although some DO have the same combination, but rare) that interface with the “Seven Rays of Shambhala.” These rays enter the DNA to merge with that individual’s crystalline frequency to create the individualized crystalline frequencies. So in this sense the Seven Shambhala Rays and the seven DNA crystalline frequencies are ONE. I am providing a special feature below for this article where you can listen to a 6 minute MP3 audio of me spontaneously channeling mantras to be used for the further activation of these rays within your being. By listening to me say them you can hear how they are pronounced and feel their unique vibration as it is transmitted through my voice by ThothHorRa. Just use the standard audio controls on the Spirit Mythos Audio Streamer (created by Simeon) that pops up when you click the link below to listen! After you click the play button on the audio streamer it will only take a few seconds for enough data to download so that it can start playing for you. Listen to Shambhala Rays Mantras of the Shambhala Master Rays This powerful image of the Ur'Kabala you see above as an artwork I created is a living symbol of the power of LIGHT as a Seven-Fold Path to Heart Ascension. The cross represents the two planes of "here" (horizontal) and core connection to Source (vertical) the the crossing point the heart itself. The six serpent "S" symbols represent the Shambhala Rays of God-Self or Divinity as they begin to fold and unfold in recursive response to the ONE Flame of Unity. The "U" at the top of the vertical bar is the Seventh Ray. It opens like a flower and becomes receptive (divine feminine) to the in-pouring of the Solar Logos (divine masculine) of universal Star-Suns (Angelic Realms). The eight vertical lines coming off the horizontal bar are the "Pillars of KHEM" - upholding the Foundation of the World as it transcends space and time. I currently offer a fairly new service where I channel a piece of custom artwork for you in the form of a Shambhala Medallion and each one has this Ur'Kabala symbol overlaid upon it. You may wish to order your own personal Shamblala Medallion. Definitions and reference links to material in this article: - 1) Lotus Loci - 2) Phi Crystals - 3) Amaru Crystal Seeding - 4) The Jade Elders Fredaricka Yarom of Israel is making available a few pieces of the Amethyst White Jade and other crystals. You can learn more here. All mountains of this planet or any planet emit massive hyper-electromagnetic (HYPE) charges, creating inter-connecting fields around them. Thus mountains are the generators of HYPE on the exterior Earth (meaning not the “inner Earth”). Hyper-electromagnetic charge / fields are operating at a lower pulse frequency that can be detected by current scientists. It is very slow and deep in it’s sine waves. Such creatures as the Cetaceans (whales, dolphins) can detect it easily, as they can the HYPE pulses created by the oceans moving against the land masses. Yet unlike the interactions between sea and land, the mountain ranges move their HYPE field upward in a spiraling motion. At various levels in this “ascension” different types of HYPE signals are sent out. The size and shape of the mountain and its proximity to other mountains creates an exceptionally unique HYPE print of that mountain, constantly changing through erosion and being pushed up by the tectonic plates and fault lines. The first stage level of the New Earth Star - Numis’OM - is responding to certain more sudden changes in some of our mountains at this time, being caused by confluent HYPE waves coming from the central atoma of our planet. These atoma HYPE waves are being triggered by stellar geometry now reaching us from star systems many Light Years away. This stellar geometry composes the “writing finger” that is creating a new scripting for the ‘animation’ of our planet as it re-programs itself within the New Earth Star Hologram. Thus our mountains, reaching upward into the atmosphere with their moving, spiraling HYPE fields are like dolphins leaping from the oceans to catch a starfish in the heavenly sea above. As our mountains begin to re-calibrate their HYPE fields due to the re-programming in the central sun atoma of the planet, they are being re-created in the New Earth. This is not an exact re-creation, but the energy codes are being transferred so that the new calibrations are in place in Numis’OM as well. This creates a kind of ‘lock’ between the two geologic systems: Old and New Earth for further integration and communion between the two worlds. Not all of our mountains are translating into the New Earth, although eventually many will. I was shown specifically five mountains that are now fully ‘formed’ in Numis’OM. Belowe you see my artistic rendition of the formation of these mountains (their Light codes) as they appear in the Numis’OM stage of the New Earth.
