# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

These ‘simple’ images were some of the most difficult and time-consuming for me to create, as I worked and re-worked them to get the right effect to transmit these codes. Uluru (Ayers Rock in Australia) in Numis'OM Denali (Mt. McKinley in Alaska) in Numis'OM The Canary Islands in Numis'OM as one underwater mass with mountain peaks surfaced Hawaiian Islands in Numis'OM as one underwater mass with mountain peaks surfaced Mt. Kailash (in the Himalaya) in Numis'OM In creating the New Earth Mt. Kailash directly above I was at work trying to get shadows to indicate depth, which is difficult on white. All of a sudden “SHE” appeared on the mountain! I did not intend this. You can see (at least I can) the body profile of a woman in a hooded robe. I say “woman” as the shoulders and stance to me indicate a female. I see her as the WHITE JADE LADY or In'Lakech. As I was concluding with this Numis'OM volume, I kept seeing an interesting building with no doors or windows in a little grove of trees. I received the name "Brigatata." Then I began to get more information on it. As I perceive it, the Brigatata was built by Merlin. This was "Arthur's Merlin" - as like "Thoth," Merlin is also a title and there were several beings who used it. Yet, Merlin built Brigatata in his younger years before the King Arthur period -- Merlin lived 300 years. When I say he "built" it I do mean that, as it was created through his ability to re-form matter, as is accomplished in the New Earth Star realms. The purpose of this structure was to "count" the timeline of Earth, like the Mayan Calendar. Yet the Brigatata was in a way a computer, as each large stone of it's outer wall was inscribed with magnetically charged symbols that responded to the galactic 'Serpent' time wave. So as the serpent undulated, the magnetic symbols responded and sent a charge into the core of the Brigatata structure which was composed of a very dense manganese. While I had heard this word before I did not know anything about it. So in googling it I found that Rhodochrosite is a form of manganese and received that it has powerful Ascension frequencies. However the manganese core of the Brigatata was not Rhodochrosite. It was far denser than any manganese we have been able to obtain on the surface of this planet. Merlin's manganese came from the deeper interior of this planet. As I perceive it from the Akasha, very dense manganese stores more precisely the impressions of the undulating Serpent time wave. All manganese to some extent is a 'time counter'. This means that it records time: what we perceive as past, present and future. The purpose of the Brigatata then was to register TIME, and in doing so, AFFECT time. Merlin was creating a time warping, but why? It was actually a warp to correct a warp! He was attempting to stabilize the pinpoint black holes which had been created with the time tsunami5 generated by the destruction of the Atlantean crystal which was the final blow to the continent of Atlantis. To some extent he was successful. His Time Machine helped to control the expansion of the warping field, although to this day it does slowly bleed into our Earth's magnetic field, evidenced in the Bermuda Triangle and other such time warp locations. The Brigatata is no more. Merlin dismantled it at what he considered to be the appropriate time. It's physical location was in Wales. The little black holes on Earth continue to erode Earth's magnetic field, which at this slower rate, allows humanity time to prepare for the Ascension transfer. The information I have quoted below with the author's permission beautifully expresses what I feel is the core truth of the "New Earth Star" reality and what I have dedicated my life to facilitate in all ways possible for me through my akashic translations and communions with the Illumined One, ThothHorRa. . . .one of the more profound insights from the genius and insight of the Mayans is this: the energies that give rise to our manifested world change along a divine plan with which we can consciously align, and that by doing so, we move into greater perfection with the divine plan. In other words, the world that was is not what informs a new world. What informs a new world and our new lives are powerful forces continually emanating from the inter-dimensional, creative core and Intelligence of the universe. The Big Bang should no longer be perceived as solely a historic event; rather, it is also the ultimate present moment, THE Holy Moment: the perpetual bringing forth of new Light from the Creative Heart and Mind of the living universe. By creating resonance with that Heart-Mind, we cooperate and thus quicken the cosmic plan of creation. This will be the core shared intention of the Rebirth Celebration Concordance: I AM resonating with the Creative Heart-Mind of the Living Universe. I AM the Creative Heart-Mind of the Living Universe. Inhale while looking up through the brow: I AM resonating with the Creative Heart-Mind of the Living Universe. Joseph R. Giove San Francisco, April 14, 2009 (9 Reed) Executive Director CommonPassion.org Intention * Concordance * Harmony Permission is given by the author to disseminate this information. READ THE FULL TEXT Atu Tehuti, Ati Hatu -- "in the rising of the breath I greet you, in the release of the breath I embrace you" Myra Jackson, California, USA: who are the guardians of Lake Titicaca? ThothHorRa: there are many, gathered through the aeons. Most prominent are: the "Solar Shield Mirror of Gutayama", the "Condor Feeding Upon the Sun Atualpa", the "Lake Goddess Umancha Giving Birth to the Moon", and the "Priestess of the Seven Rays of Munchacha". These are not entities, but windows of cosmic power associated to the cycles of guardianship of these "Powers" (Forces) with Lake Titicaca and it's whole plateau. Myra Jackson: from time to time are humans considered to be the axis mundi, as is often said of Yeshua. What is the function of the axis mundi beyond what has already been noted in the writings on Rex Mundi who is an aspect of the axis mundi. This relates to Mt. Kailash, as it is often referred to as an axis mundi. Are the functions in the physical place and person the same or complimentary to place? ThothHorRa: the Axis Mundi or World Axis is any point on the planet that holds the Divine Center of the Four Square Universal Cornerstone for a specific aspect of universal concordance. In other words, Mount Kailash is the Axis Mundi for the Asension Grid which contains various "cross point" references within the Cosmic Field of the planet.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

There are several other major Axis Mundi on Earth and many minor ones (each attendant to a specific dynamic system of the Earth). Only Yeshua has ever held that point in the human body. This after he fully received the Universal Christos at the time of his Baptism. There is a “Prayer Wheel” dynamic which you might see as someone spinning a Tibetan Prayer wheel with strings attached, a small sphere on the end of each string - all being of a different length. If you see the Prayer Wheel as being rotated from Mt. Kailash, the “spheres” would spin out from there, going around and around, a different sphere passing over a specific location as an appointed time. Sometimes the “Wheel” is spun faster, and then the spheres appear over the locations at other times with less pause in-between. If it is spun slower, the reverse occurs. Maia: what places on the planet align with the spheres of the Kailash Prayer Wheel? A topic for a future Volume of Numis’OM. Fredaricka Yarom, Israel: I was wondering what form of light body is needed to reside physically in the 5th dimensional frequency of the New Earth? Will we be taking our physical body with us as some have stated, perhaps not in its current format but a completely re-calibrated physical body. ThothHorRa: the physical body will be ascended but it will transform in the process to a stage of the Pure Gem Body - more rarified in it’s energy and composition. Fredaricka Yarom: also it is stated by some that we are to be brought to full consciousness awareness, will this occur prior to our translating to the New Earth? ThothHorRa: the process is already upon you... upon many now in this current reality. It will continue through the “translation” of the WHOLE BEING into the New Earth. Mary Walton, Indiana, USA: how can you tell when you are experiencing your energy or the collective's energy? I seem to feel okay (ok, not good/happy or sad) most of the time for no clear reason. How can I stay in the energy of Love? ThothHorRa: you are ALWAYS experiencing “collective energy” for it is always in you... your experience is where everything IS for you. You cannot separate anything in your reality from YOU. To remain in the loving state engage it at all times, such with the technique of Self-Identity Through Ho’onoponopono. Simeon: the book "Zero Limits" by Joe Vitale with Dr. Ihaleakala Hew Len is the best information available in print that I am aware of on this technique and what it is about. I speak about this process and technique in my article "The Power of One" as well. Stephanie Faillone, Pennsylvania, USA: I would like to know how we get there... like on a trip do we need directions? Will we consciously be aware of our complete journey from one dimension to the next... (I want map quest directions hehe) ThothHorRa: you will move as the Spirit moves you. The mind is not a major part of the procedure. You will simply flow as the breeze along the water... each ripple upon it’s surface a trigger, a pattern, an imprint of your movement, your passage HOME. Amanda Viola, Spain: might there be different experiences of reality for the humans on Earth when the Ascension time come? ThothHorRa: yes there will be. Amanda Viola: will the experience of dis-integration of this world as we know it - except for the portion that ascends - be just one of the alternatives? ThothHorRa: it will not be so much “dis-integration” as re-assimilation into another world system that can accommodate that evolution; but yes the energies will re-organize for that purpose. The placing of that organization of energies that is not translating into the New Earth Star zone will have multiple alternative realities as possibilties. Amanda Viola: or rather will there be enough mass of humans holding the consciousness to give continuity to our present reality, as to create a parallel stream of existence? ThothHorRa: there will be some fracturing at this point so that some of the mass consciousness will move in one direction, while lesser diffractions off of the “core beam” will disperse into various “holding patterns” as a slow re-organization of energies takes place. Silvia Vance, Kaua’i, USA: I've been going through such a purification lately that it's like I'm dying... this thought does not let go of me so I decided to ask what's really happening within myself? What I also want to ask ThothHorRa is: in allowing the old parts of ourselves to go or heal, are they not becoming also parts of the New Earth and I... and is this part of the great recycling of the Energies? ThothHorRa: an immense clearing and transforming is taking place for many souls incarnated on the Earth at this time... more than since the last days of Atlantis. As individuals “Let Go” of old egoic programs / memories so they make way for the Light codes of the New Earth Star Hologram within them. Simeon: from the article entitled the White Falcon on Spirit Mythos: ...She stood upon a sphere containing within it a cube, the angelic fire-letter ukabar ablaze at its center. Ukabar is the seventh vowel of creation, and as such, denotes the infusion of Light into the membrane of cohesion at the center of the atom. Is their a direct connection between the Ukabar, the seventh vowel of creation, and the Ur'Kabala, the symbol for the Shambhala Master Rays? ThothHorRa: the Ur’Kabala Shambhala Master symbol is a trigger for the Ukabar Seventh Vowel of Creation. Looking upon it and meditating with it can create a chemical transformation in the left lobe of the brain which activates the “vowel” or tonal capacity to “speak” his vowel. Of course one would have to be spiritually ready to truly open entirely to this process. However, even the ‘average’ person could receive benefit from lesser chemical changes due to interacting with the Ur’Kabala. The Seventh Master Ray of Shambhala is the Cup-Mouth - it “speaks the Holy Words - emits the Holy Tones. Maia: this led me to create the MP3 "Shambhala Rays Mantras" of my speaking certain sacred mantrams, which when listened to, will help facilitate the process of transformation in the brain as well, and which accommodates this Seventh Ray / seventh Vowel within the body for an aspect of assimilation of the cells and DNA into the Pure Gem frequency. William Buehler, Crestone, CO, USA: request any added comment and/or a basic description of reproduction and how the (New Earth) Ark supports it. ThothHorRa: there is no “gestation” or “birth” through a body-vessel in the New Earth / Numis’OM.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

All “birth” processes function through a building of energies along specific grid points, manifesting as a whole merkabah. One can then choose a “form” from that energy field via thought-desire. The New Earth Arks are sensitive to Lotus Loci transformations in the Pure Gem Body which as a whole Merkabah manifests the grid for the individual Pure Gem bodies. The Lotus Loci creates the whole patterning necessary for LIFE in the New Earth. The Arks carry out the actual positioning of the nodes with the bio-chemical formations of the Loci. Starheart (lying on the ground facing away from camera) and ThothHorRa in his "Silvercloud" dragon form watch a tender scene unfold as a mother Unicorn tends to her baby on the New Earth Star Island Estate -- a virtual world we have created in Second Life to represent Numis'OM. PLEASE NOTE: if you wish to ask questions of ThothHorRa relating to anything you read in this publication, or about planetary and cosmic happenings that you would like more clarity on, please submit your questions to me (Maia). I will attune to ThothHorRa and will print his responses to those questions he selects to answer in the following issue of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron. I cannot promise that all questions will be answered, but I will do my best to accommodate those with the greatest universal scope and importance. I will give you credit for the questions as well unless you request anonymity.

# Inter-Dimensional Healing by Maia

|
Inter-Dimensional Healing
by Maia Christianne Mallika
When we think of the term “inter-dimensional” we tend to associate it with a
supra-state of being occupied by Angels, Ultra Beings and a few rare human yogis
and sages. Yet WE are inter-dimensional beings - every one of us! Most of
humanity simply is not aware in the moment of that truth... truly aware. Within
our atomic structure and DNA micro-energy streamings are constantly moving in
and out and through other states or dimensions than the one we perceive we
inhabit. What THR (ThothHorRa) calls the “magna-soul” or over-soul projects into
various dimensional zones of Earth and sometimes energetically associated
planets, while we live and breath this incarnation in what we know as the “here
and now.”
So why it is we are not experiencing these things - this “Other” of
our selves? Because the wavelength of our perception does not have enough
bandwidth to support it. The reason for this is that our awareness is not
expanded to the degree of supporting the expanded bandwidth! We have created a
world orientated consensual reality that is like a bubble containing our
awareness and thus bandwidth. It is a membrane that absorbs the bandwidth of
energy levels. Think of a point of energy in the center of a bubble. The energy
point expands, sending out it’s energy in an expanding bandwidth until it
reaches the barrier of the bubble. This energy then spreads out on surface of
the bubble, so that the whole bubble absorbs the energy waves. This stabilizes
the energy and keeps it central to the internal properties of it’s domain (the
world construct we inhabit). Without this stabilization we would all promptly
lose our minds as we simply would not be able to handle an ever-expanding
bandwidth!
The big question is then: why can’t we handle it? Some few humans on
this planet would seem able to, such as yogis and sages. The answer is simple.
They switch the channel. They are able to move into a state of pure awareness
that does not require “bandwidth” or rather a conduit through which their energy
must travel. They instead move into the medium of Zero Point Energy (ZPE), a state of
perpetual STILLNESS where all simply IS - operating outside of polarities.
This is what THR calls the "Attasic Universe." From that stillpoint ALL dimensions are
accessible for truly then, ALL IS ONE. From this place they can still interact
with moving energy, but they are not of that energy.
So let us come back to humanity as inter-dimensional beings. Okay so we ARE but
most are not accessing it. I did not say ‘cannot’ but are not. The secret to
tapping into our inter-dimensional being is to first realize that we do not have
to consume the whole seven-course meal at once. We can sit at the table and eat
just a little of what we need at the time. In other words there are degrees of
access to our on-going state of inter-dimensional being. In fact we already do
this. Our minds and the organism of the brain which the mind uses to “channel”
into the body could not operate in it’s marvelous complexity without
inter-dimensional awareness. We just don’t realize we are thinking
inter-dimensionally...that is on more than one dimension at a time...but indeed
we are.
Now when we train ourselves to feel this, to recognize that our
mind-brain complex and thus our thinking is inter-dimensional, then we begin to
become more aware of our whole inter-dimensional state as it operates within the
human body (which is only a portion of the whole inter-dimensional beings we
are). When we become more connected to the human body’s inter-dimensional
exchange of information - between dimensions of it’s own continuity as a living
organism - then we can truly heal ourselves and open the door to help others
heal themselves in a direct Source-to-Source application of quantum physics.
People in this Age are already developing techniques and means to stimulate our
awareness connection to the inter-dimensional human body... to aid us in
“switching the channel” at least within the human condition. Some are calling it
“re-programming” and to some extent it is... but true re-connection of awareness
to our inter-dimensional being goes beyond “programming’ to embrace a full
spectrum of quantum leaps in consciousness. In the New Earth Star realm of
Numis’OM the AUUM Network Healers are currently aiding this world’s humanity
through what they call “reflectivity.” They reflect their full spectrum
awareness (and thus inter-dimensionality) upon individual human beings who are
receptive to receive it.
Now these receptive humans do not then become fully
aware, but the DO carry a level of that awareness as a reflective aura within
them that they can then use to “see” a true part of their Nature wherein the
path to full spectrum awareness abides within them. This is a form of
inter-dimensional healing...whether it is facilitated by the AUUM, a friend or
practioner or coming from a powerful inner awakening trigger through
circumstance in the individual’s life, such as a near-death experience.
The Master Isho'a (Jesus) had achieved the zenith of inter-dimensional awareness
in a human being. Yet he was able to be and to interact with other humans on a
very simple and intrinsic level. This was because abiding in multiple dimensions
is our natural state. Thus people were drawn to Isho'a as a human being for they
felt that natural state so fully within his awareness and it was calling them to
recognize their natural dimensionality.
Becoming more aware is a natural progression for humanity - just as is our
planet moving through it’s stages of progression as it’s whole body slows down
and eventually ‘dies’ to this current pattern of conformity. Like the Earth and
as part of it, we will then arise Phoenix-Born, into a greater Heaven of our
inter-dimensional experience. Yet in the NOW we have at hand what we need for a
preview of and a movement toward abiding fully in our natural state as an
inter-dimensional being. The ancients of Mu (Lemuria) called it Tanghasangii,
meaning abiding in the sacred nature.
All of my
personalized energy art (Merkabah Logos, Healing Mandalas and Ark Name
template) is attuned to aiding one in moving into the Zero Point Energy zone
within their being...on some level of their experience.
The
memunite
crystals are the actual transducers of inter-dimensional energy.

# The Mem-Star Merkabah

|
The Mem-Star Merkabah
Memunite Crystals, and Universal Membranes
Before reading this article I suggest you
read Memunite Crystals.
The memunite
crystalline particles are the smallest and most "instant" elements of the
universe. By "instant" I mean that they were created the very instant the
universe came into being through what the scientists call the "Big Bang." They
are the pure streaming of the Christos. The word "Christos" is not used in the
context to denote a religious belief, but as a sacred streaming from the HEART
of SOURCE which we all contain in our being to some extent, and the Master
I'shoa (Jesus) incarnated more fully than any other human being on Earth up to
this time.
In the mid
1990's my inner-planes mentor ThothHorRa (THR) began referring to the "universal
membranes." He did not give me information in detail, nor at the time did I seek
it from my akashic insights. Up to that point I had never heard of universal
membranes or "M Theory." I had heard about "String Theory" but never really read
anything definitive on it. THR had told me years before that there were many
universes. It is not my intention with this article to delve into the M Theory
but I will place some reference links at the end for those who wish to pursue it
further. In brief, from Wikipedia:
"In
theoretical physics, M-theory is a new limit of string theory in which 11
dimensions of spacetime may be identified. Because the dimensionality exceeds
the dimensionality of five superstring theories in 10 dimensions, it was
originally believed that the 11-dimensional theory is more fundamental and
unifies all string theories (and supersedes them). However, in a more modern
understanding, it is another, sixth possible description of physics of the full
theory that is still called "string theory." Though a full description of the
theory is not yet known, the low-entropy dynamics are known to be supergravity
interacting with 2- and 5-dimensional membranes."
According to
THR and my akashic insights there are an infinite number of dimensions, but the
"11" fits the pattern of one level of "nesting" mem-star merkabahs (MSM). MSM
are conglomerates of memunite crystalline particles which are drawn together
through a type of gravity as yet undiscovered which I will call here "wave-form
gravity" as it oscillates like a current across the skin of the universal
membranes, causing those membrane skins themselves to move in wave-like
patterns.
Each particle
of the memunite is charged with a specific code that "calls" it to nest with
other memunite particles containing the same code. This code information is
transferred through the wave-form gravity field running along the skin of the
universal membranes. The memunites therefore form in conglomerates on the skin
of the membranes. These conglomerates create mem-stars like marvelous
snowflakes. the mem-stars in turn "nest" with other mem-stars through the
oscillations of the wave-form gravity field.
Now here is the true beauty
of it...
When a certain
"magic number" sequence of mem-stars (each carry DNA-like string patterns, ie
numeric bandings) come together in a nest they "light up" like a Christmas Tree
and send a burst of radiant LOVE-LIGHT throughout the entire skin of the
membrane! So these little mem-stars are bursting forth from their nestings this
sacred LIGHT here, there and everywhere.
EVERYTHING is
composed of membranes with the mem-stars lighting up in burst patterns upon it.
WE are composed of this starry stuff! Our auras emanate from these bursts of mem-light. We do not see them in bursts because the time between the "burstings"
is too minute for our senses, but auras do pulse from the micro-bursts of the
mem-stars.
The MSMs
respond also to our thoughts and feelings...the energy information we send to
them...of which we are a part. We ARE the MSMs and they are US. When we have
negative thoughts and feelings we slow the "burstings" of light in our mem-star
merkabahs. When we attune to the MSMs through being in touch with out CORE -
that is, becoming more heart-coherent - then we allow the MEM's full range of
their pulse-potential along the membranes of our composition. Remember there is
no separation from "our" membranes and those of the most distant star! So what
signals we send out through membranes within us, OF us are received throughout
the universe!
The next time
you "meditate" FEEL that connectiveness and visualize the mem-star merkabahs
firing off their light on the surface of the membranes composing your energy
bodies. This will help keep the pathways clear to allow full potential of the
MSMs to fill your Being.
There is a
vocalization you can use also to help clear the pathways of the MSM connection:
AUUM-AHHH-UUU.
Wikipedia on M Theory

# Dragon Star

|
|
DRAGON STAR
ThothHorRa (THR) calls a "moment" within a specific cycle of the center of the universe, center of the galaxy, center (sun) of the solar system, center of the earth (central atoma) and center of the human being (heart atoma) the "Dragon Star." It is not a "thing" but an alignment of movement of energies. In the "snapshot" as these energies cycle around to it each time, is formed a primal First Matter or Prima Matra instant, when the universe / galaxy / solar system / planet / "human" being is aligned to it's First Nature. The dragon energy is very much OF the First Nature and so THR has chosen to use this analogy. The energy cycle I am referring to here is the original motion coming out of what scientists call the "Big Bang." I plan to write an article on Big Bang in the future, but for now mention it only in reference to the Dragon Star. This "original motion" is still with us. It has never ceased. It is circulating through the entire universe in a cyclic dance of majesty -- a "dragon dance." When it comes into a specific alignment with the center of Creation (that which was centralized in the First Universal Moment), so it creates the pattern THR is calling the Dragon Star.
Before a gathering on our New Earth Star Island Estate in Second Life, THR in his dragon form relayed the following:
And now...I wish to ask you all to take some moments with the music and FEEL
the connection to the FIRE of the HEART. The burning PRESENCE. of the HEART as
it focuses and ANCHORS into the Golden Rose or Dragon Star of the Earth -- the
central atoma, which is the SEED ATOM at the center of the EARTH. It beocomes
the "Dragon Star" at a certain stage of its cycle as the inner SUN of the
planet.
* * * * * *
THR has revealed that the Dragon Star moment can be created by focusing on it and moving into "no-time" to find the "moment" of it's alignment, thereby stimulating that alignment in you! this Dragon Star alignment acts as a "re-boot" you might say, of your entire system, bringing it back to "First Moment" and therefore cleansing the whole being.
However there is more....
There is a cosmic release from the center of the universe when the Dragon Star moment is triggered around the entire "ring" of matter circling the central EYE of the universe -- a mega-black hole. When this EYE is triggering dragon star moments en mass this way, it sends out bursts of supra-energy along cosmic meridians in the particular rotational alignment. This energy travels inter-dimensionally through spontaneously created wormhole "flashes" (not long-lasting holes but "flashes" of the EYE). It in turn "fires" all star-suns along that path. These sun then send out energy bursts of this inter-dimensional type, and a chain reaction develops. This brings us back to my messages in part one and part two of A Cosmic Event - July 23rd, 2012. The novas of the two stars mentioned in this discourse occur due to the "firing" coming from the Dragon Star chain around the central EYE of the universe. Not all stars nova when the supra-energy wave hits them, but some do, depending upon where they are in their life cycle. The two whose nova sound paths have now crossed and are sending their combined sound wave toward our planet, were triggered by a Dragon Star episode of our universe.
Returning to our personal, human Dragon Star moments...
By continually "re-booting" our systems with our Dragon Star moments, so we
are preparing ourselves to receive the benefits of the Cosmic Event of July 23rd,
2012 by re-calibrating our bio-systems to bring them to "zero point." When the
Cosmic Event strikes this planet the "clock" of the Earth will time-out and be
re-set to zero. By this is meant that all cycles will be re-set and new patterns
will develop as a consequence -- even within our DNA. If our system is not
"cleaned" and waiting, a lot of cleaning and re-setting in our bio-systems is
going to happen very quickly and may be overwhelming for those of us not already
"re-set" and ready to receive!
related material:
Prima Matra / Cosmic Event Part 1 & Part 2

# The Metatron Crystal Skulls

| The Metatron Crystal Skulls Our Future? by Maia Alaula Kamala MULUC - Metatron man Before reading this article it will be helpful to read about the Dweller Crystal Skulls. In 1989-1990 I was guided into the Akasha by ThothHorRa (THR) to study the Dweller Crystals Skulls, which I then wrote about in several issues of Temple Doors, my hard copy publication at the time. As I wrote in issue 1-1992 of Temple Doors: "We can clearly see these three mysteries contained within the mission of the Dweller Crystal Skulls: the zodiac in the twelve stars revolving around the head–the evolution of the higher centers, and the Science of Light being the full spectrum of divinity penetrating flesh, blood and bone (through the DNA) to resurrect the Eternal Light Race (new Adam Kadmon template)." The Dweller Crystal Skulls were skulls of once-living being who upon transitioning from this realm left their skulls to by crystallized with the Light-brary of encoding of the codes they carried still intact within the crystallized particles. The Dweller Crystal Skulls are divided into groups, one being what THR calls the "Metatron." There are 23 of the Metatron Dwellers which are all within other worlds, yet will be returned to Earth at the appropriate seeding time not long before the planetary Ascension. The beings whose souls once inhabited these skulls with they were bone and living flesh are of a human race out of the celestial realm of Sirius. It is interesting that some recently carved, small crystal skulls bear the slightly pointed skull top and a few other features of the Metatrons! I have recently been sent two of these, and along with the purely "human" crystal skull (contemporary as well) I work with these three together. THR has given me the understanding that once I received them, the two little (lemon sized) Metatron-like skulls were 'charged' with a vibrational aspect of two of the actual Metatron Dweller Crystal Skulls. the moss agate skull however reflects a mixture of Metatron and Earth human. I was shown on the inner-planes geometries of star patterns, one nested within another. At the point-nodes of each star is positioned on of the 72 Dweller Crystal Skull. The Metatron Skulls formed the out most circle, ringing the entire pattern. Altogether they Dweller Crystal Skull geometry connects with various planetary grids...feeding them the Light Codes of the Origin Pulse...the original Creation Matrix of the Earth and inter-facing with the Creation Matrix of the universe. The Metatron Skulls then in the outer ring, both contain and direct the current of the full geometry into that universal interface...with other wheels (geometries) within wheels. Let us us focus our attention now on the actual Beings which THR is calling the "Metatrons." They are from the inter-dimensional worlds of Sirius and are thus related to the Lion-Headed Ones, as THR calls them, who are the guardians of the Telos.Aarkhara. Yet the Metatron are far closer to our side of the uni-manity (universal humanity) genetic strain. They are the primary ones who will assist us at the time of Great Preparation for the planetary Ascension -- not only through the returning of the Metatron Dweller Crystal Skulls, but through their return to Earth as living beings. They dwelt among us before in the ancient days - and will again in the New Earth Star. THR refers to them as "Metatron" Beings as they contain the high-frequency creation signals from the WAVE of the Metatronic field coming out the the EYE OF RA: The point where all this universe's ley lines converge. It is a pin-point of "leakage" into and from the next universe. From the Eye of Ra (also called the "Heliomar" by Thoth) is emitted the pristine, creation-substance into this universe. The double-dynamic of the "Eye" is a blinking effect that is a "flashing double-diamond," responding to the quasar-like pulsing of the touching of the two universes. We here on Earth now are experiencing more activity from this "wave" and having to process it at a more expanded rate. This causes many of us to become more and more disoriented with the linear sequencing of what is rapidly becoming the "Old Earth." When the two realms of earth separated - the Lotus (advanced) and Kali (primeval) some of the genetics of the Lotus were transferred into the Kali. A main "link" of the Lotus came out of the Metatron beings. They in fact "seeded" the Neanderthal, who anthropologists are just now claiming to have been far more intelligent than previously assumed! (see article Thoth on Evolution of Earth within Multiple Realites) So what is in OUR brains? Any Light codes worth crystallizing for future generations? Not necessary. We are living in a generation in which the whole paradigm is becoming obsolete, to be replaced by New Earth FLOW...free, pure and without the mechanisms of the past. My Crystal Skulls: right is Metatron, center earth human and left a mix of Metatron and Earth human MULUC: The name ThothHorRa gave me to represent one of the Metatron beings (not his true name). I was aware that MULUC was a Mayan glyph but did not remember the interpretation of it. After having been given the name for this Metatron being I sought Ariel Spilsbury's marvelous Mayan Oracle and found: I am Muluc, the lotus of remembrance that carries the seed of the Great Central Sun! The precious starseeds within you have remained poised within my protective embrace like a pulsating whisper of reunion's song unsung; Waiting, cradled within the arms of the one moment, empowered to release their splendor back to you now! I am the realm of awareness, the nourishment that quickens the sacred seed. I am the harmonious passage through which you flow to bask within the lambent glow, that full remembrance may be yours. As awakening stirs within your earthen form, the cosmic seed expands, releasing its elixir. Like an exhilarating fountain, it flows through the translator beacon of self, arousing its whisper into a voice empowered to extend its communication into the waiting galactic network. I am Muluc! Bathe in the waters of remembrance, shed your veil of self-forgetting, keeping your awareness poised in the moment. I will give you loving confirmation of the divine, sacred fruit through sensings, signs, and signals. I will assist you in finding balance in the shifts of perception that emerge from the activation of these sacred seeds. I will support you in assimilating new energies and frequencies within the sacred monolith, the beacon of self. I will help you build the confidence to stand in the fullness of your light. Together we will plant a beautiful garden, nourished by your desire for reunion. I will hold you close within my protective robes of light until I see the strength of the rainbow warrior emerging.

# The Golden City

Recently ThothHorRa brought to my attention what he is
calling the "Golden City." He opened the scroll for me on beautiful mountains
which I knew contained a valley nestled with it protective folds. In that valley
was the Golden City. I understood that what I was seeing was in Numis'OM of the
New Earth Star. I have since glimpsed portions of this "City." While some people
appear and disappear there...as the seem called into that energy field for
periods of time, it is not a continually inhabited place.
This Golden City is an energy field which projects images
that are sustainable in the consciousness of certain Numis'OM inhabitants for
the purpose of imbuing them with the energies they are seeking for next stage
transformation. Because time is loosely held in the New Earth, we here in the
current world reality may find ourselves experiencing this City in our New Earth
bodies....perhaps in Dreamtime or in visions or momentary flashes.
Beyond the projected imagery the Golden City in a neural hub
in the center of newly forming pathways in the brain. We are only just beginning
to form this new neural hub, but those in the New Earth Star will/do have it far
more developed. It's purpose? To supply the Pure Gem body with the gate to the
next stage of universal continuum, which we are calling "World System II." This
is the state in which Numis'OM is the threshold.
So if you find yourself during Dreamtime or in a flash of
perception within a marvelous city of light and unusual things, you may well be
opening yourself to the building of your Golden City within!

# Golden City Templates

These templates are energy art which allows you
to connect to specific frequencies of the "Golden City" nexus
forming within the human brain and it's counterpart in the New
Earth Star. Read more
about this here.
The purpose of meditating with these templates
is to strengthen the neuro-impulses in the brain within the
region that is forming this micro but powerful nexus.
How to meditate with the energy symbols:
Focus on the center of the symbol and move
your vision outward to the edge of it.... and then back to the
center again. Hold that focus for about 10-15 seconds and then
bring it out to the rim again, and then back to the center and
hold the focus for another 10-15 seconds. Repeat this process
several times.... hopefully until you begin to feel a tingling
somewhere in your head (probably the top or third eye). You
could also begin to see some colored "sparks" during this
process, especially if you repeat it as least once a day
for over a period of time.
Work with one template for a week or two or as guided. Then progress to the next one in the order they are listed below. Once you have gone through all three
templates you can simply then attune to the one you wish to work
with each day in a random fashion.
If you are starting out with me as I am creating these, simply work with the current template for a week or two (or longer if guided). When you feel it is time to stop working with it wait for the release of the next symbol and repeat.
RHIGA is the 1st template... more will be
added with time. There will be three templates in all when this project is complete.

# Alternate Realities

|
|
Maia's Musings.....
Alternate Realites, Jules Verne and the Ultimate Tea Party!
Prologue: This article mentions the virtual reality of "Second Life" (SL) in which I am actively engaged. We have our New EarthStar Island Estate (NESIE) in SL and I hold weekly spiritual gatherings there with people from around the world.
ThothHorRa (THR) has often brought to my attention the existence of "alternate realities" existing in "electro-magnetic zones" of the Earth. I have thus explored it more fully in my Akashic travels. Recently at one of our NESIE Gatherings in SL, THR discussed this topic with us. Below are portions of this transcript.
ThothHorRa Khandr: NAMASTE. I discuss with you this gathering the existence of various alternate realities within Earth's electro-magnetic zones
These "alternate realities are related to but not the same as the more diffuse "astral planes" to which most souls move after their incarnation the alternate realities of the electro-magnetic zones are actual ALTS shall we say of your own current incarnation. (note: "ALTS" referred to here are "alternative avatars" as many people in Second Life have more than one avatar which they can choose to "embody.")
These are "alternate" choices" your being is making of "existence" formats within the electro-magnetic zones of Earth.
The EM zones I speak of are beyond the lesser wave forms. They are of a supra-nature and are the commanding forces of the lesser electro-magnetic fields. The supra-EMs operate as whole systemic functions...that is they effect the WHOLE planet and not just specific locations. they do create pathways or zones within their wholistic field. [12:19] These pathways are "bends" in space-time.
One EM zone which is mis-functioning shall we say, is the Bermuda Triangle. It is like a dying star, imploding at it's center and becoming very unstable.
Now we discuss the system itself and how your ALTS (alternate reality personas) are operating within them as aspects of your incarnating nature Truthfully, SOULS are Pure Essence. They do not enter a body They stream into it like this SL music. They do not think, choose, accept or deny. SOULS are pure essence. Yet individual living beings are "streaming" their souls - and in that stream so the identity forms from the particles of elements it encounters. The Elemental Body intelligence then forms within the elemental vehicle of the physical body. While I use the word "intelligence" here, the Elemental Body is largely instinctual and very basic.
Also this streaming is getting caught in the EM and is then creating whorls - patterns like a magnet causes when influencing particles These whorls then begin to migrate into various EM zones which align to their unique composition of particles and thus the "personality" and "character" which is being created through the DNA guides the "life" of the particles These particles then find themselves forming another EM "being" out of the first. This then is how the EM ALTS are created.
In the NEW EARTH there will be / are more fluid zones which form instantly out of THOUGHT and there will be / are no astral planes, for that layer will be absorbed by the intense radiance of the New Earth Star.
Yet now in your current embodiments you are all in the process of collecting the ALTS and experiencing them more vividly as a part of YOU and then integrating them. For this integration is necessary in what we are calling the "Ascension" into the New Earth."
--- end of THR transmission
I (Maia) had my own bit of "alternate awareness" experience lately. I have always had a strong draw toward Jules Verne and his visions of the future (from the time perspective in which he lived). The stories themselves I have not found all that interesting, but rather the backgrounds to them. In exploring this further within the Akasha it was revealed to me that indeed Verne was drawing from the Akasha as well...upon an alternate reality similar to our own and yet with distinct differences as well. I feel that I am drawn to it because one of my "alternates" is within that reality.
Not knowing my feelings about the Jules Verne sagas, a friend in Second Life gave me two "Verne-Like" ships! A large one and then a little one which was already named "Nessie." Virtual realities such as Second Life allow you to experience in a more up close and personal manner your deeper longings, dreams and fantasies. This can be healthy or unhealthy depending on your choices. For me, SL offers me the opportunity to explore in animated 3D what I could only see inside my head before.
So now as I stepped into my large skyship
which I named Nautilus II, I felt a powerful surge...as if I was consciously
connecting to and living one of my alternate realities. I can only say
here...and with deep gravity...WOW!
Maia as
"Starheart" aboard the Naulitus II, ready to start all engines and FLY!
As
sound of the engines ignited under my control the feeling was eerie. A time
warp in my brain. How many of us have felt that unicorn beneath us or known
that just around the bend our crystal cave awaited? Not a child's fantasy
(really there is no such thing, is there? Children know) but a very
real and palatable feeling racing through us.
Flying
around NESIE in Nessie
So the question remains...how do we integrate these realites? Or are we really meant to just yet? THR states: "... in your current embodiments you are all in the process of collecting the ALTS and experiencing them more vividly as a part of YOU and then integrating them." This would indicate that at least for most of us, we are still in the stage of experiencing more fully our alternate expressions in the many EM zones of Earth. Yet integration is soon upon us. We need to be prepared to bring all these wonderful selves together into one shining being. Of course they already ARE together...it is a matter of opening the gate within so we can truly feel that; and right now we are still getting to know at least some of the parts of us, in various ways.
So let us have one fantastic tea party with all of our "selves"...yes, invite the whole crew even though perhaps only a handful show up. The others are just shy, hanging around the door somewhere. Sitting down at the table with Self is a good way to begin your day.

# QSSR - Quantum Starlight Streaming Re-calibration

|
|
QUANTUM STARLIGHT STREAMING RE-CALIBRATION
Recently in a gathering with Second Life on our New Earth Star Island Estate (NESIE), ThothHorRa elaborated on something he is calling "Quantum Starlight Streaming" or QSS. From the transcript of this gathering I quote below.
Starheart (Maia): A few days ago as I was doing my morning healing on
myself all of a sudden I felt /saw these laser streams coming down through my
body. They were LIGHT but kind of liquid light and they were linear like a line
of them...and they were many-colored. Some were red, others green, then blue,
purple, etc and some were pure white light. They had number sequences pouring
out of them (this has since changed to flame letters of Light Language). I felt
the difference in my body and a charge of energy moving through me.
The DNA is connected to a universal grid of quantum light calibration that is
neither "here" nor "there" and yet everywhere. DNA manifests directly from that
grid and it can change in an INSTANT. So why is it not doing so? It
IS...on subtle yet important levels. These subtle levels contain major triggers
for future changes of far more consequence as Earth moves forever deeper into
creating it's New Earth Hologram. The "streaming" of quantum star light is
becoming a greater definition, enhancing more quickly the entire human body
landscape beginning with the smallest crystalline structure in the DNA.
(a period of time lapses)
Starheart-Maia: I am going to briefly talk about the Quantum Starlight
Streaming or QSS. These are starlight codes...YOUR codes which come from the
starlight of your bodies that was created when the "Big Bag" banged. When your
bodies are created in ANY life time on ANY planet or dimension it has the same
star codes. This of keeps track of ALL of you, so to speak. When in the QSS
re-calibration mode your being calls upon this streaming to bring ALL into
re-calibration...to CENTER...to the zero point. Everything that is of the
elements has the QSS streaming and can thus be re-calibrated in this manner -
including your garden, and even the energies in your home.
Our starlight drifts with the decay of atoms, moving through the time line like dandelion fluff on the breeze. Re-calibration brings it back to zero point...as least in that moment. Of course it will immediately start to drift again, but it gives you a moment to reference your zero point, which sends a tone or signal out to your entire body that is reminding all your cells exactly WHO and WHAT you are and where you are intended to go!
(end of transcript excerpts)
There are many ways you can activate QSS Re-calibration (QSSR). One is as given above, calling upon it with a cue of some kind, such as "QSS Re-calibrate now." You can also add a "target" which would be a template of some kind - a grid to help focus the energy. this could be a crystal which you program with intention to be your target, or several crystals in a particular pattern (as you feel so guided) to cue you into the QSSR. It can also be an energy-art, such as a mandala, etc.
You can do QSSR on water, food and even your garden. With food and water QSSR it just before eating or drinking. For a garden, set some QSSR programmed crystals within it and then call upon re-calibration for it several times a day. You don't have to be AT the location for this to work.
QSSR for another person
You can send QSSR to another person but...there is a specific difference in doing this. First you ask the BEING of that person for permission to aid them in QSSR. This request can be made silently through the inner planes or verbally to them. You then proceed with their QSSR with the intention that ONLY if the BEING of this other person is engaged in the process is it viable. In other words it can be silently sent to someone who would not consciously co-operate but their greater BEING would!
In Groups
QSSR can be especially powerful in groups of people all intending and focusing re-calibration together. What occurs then is that not only is the individual in the group re-calibrating but the group is as well! As a unit of ENERGY. This group process can be done in person or in a conference call, in a virtual reality set-up, etc.
How Far?
How far could we take this? THR has said that we can even send it to whole nations! To do that one would need to "ask permission" to assist the mass consciousness of that nation - not each individual within it. I am seriously considering facilitating some QSSR conference calls for groups and nations.
In Conclusion
To capsule what QSSR does....it re-calibrates the star fields within the body - the entire body, all energy bodies included. This brings the whole elemental and energy being back to zero point, to that contact zone where you are free of "static" and have a blessed moment to re-connect to Source. This re-connection though brief, will send a signal through your entire system. this signal will charge the cells, DNA etc with renewal of system memory. This is basically a wake up call..."oh yes I remember now what I AM and what my program IS!"

# Glo'Rii'A - New Ark of the Mother

|
home | about | contact | donate | what's new | store | timely transmissions | sm transformation | templum mysterium | holy of holies | cosmos | earth | ancient memories | services | forums | universal child | mandalas | fractals | enchantments | misc | links | my other websites
|
The GLO'RII'A - New Earth Ark of the Mother
In the early morning hours of November 8th, 2009 - which was the beginning of
the 6th Day or 12 Heaven in the Mayan Calendar - I awoke to see in my mind an
incredible sight. It was a series of circular platforms rotating with a “Seat”
on the top platform. Light was moving through it from below and above. The whole
platform system was made of gold, with marvelous golden lotus buds beaming rays
of light upward. The seat was crafted of golden lotus petals. It was far grander
than the one you see here, but this one which I have created in the virtual
world of Second Life has the basic structure and movement of the object I
witnessed. In my waking dream I heard the incredible tone coming from it: MAAAAA.
It was like the chorus of a thousand angelic voices all blending together in
perfection.
I felt compelled to re-create at least the basic system visually in some way. Since the whole devise was rotating at two different levels I decided to build it in the virtual world of Second Life and then have a friend there video it for me. We will now have monthly "Glo'Rii'A Encantations" there.
The video is very short but I feel it is effective energetically to bring the Presence forth. Unfortunately the disks do not appear to be moving in this film, although they are actually slowly rotating. The incredible music was composed and performed by Bruce Mitchell. I asked her to attune to what I had heard on the inner-planes and she did! It is amazingly similar.
The video for download into your default player
The music for meditation and activation
~~~~~~~~

# The Academy of ON

|
The Academy of ON
(Semik Ra'Hanok)
Maia's rendition of the Logo of Semik Ra'Hanok
Some 10,000 plus years ago when
Thoth Raismes of Aphra abided
in Egyptos he had constructed according to sacred pattern, the Semik Ra'Hanok
which we will call here the Academy of On, for it was often generalized as the
great learning center of the city of On (An / Divine Light), much later to be
named Heliopolis (City of the Sun) by the Greeks.
This "academy" was much more than simply a place of learning.
Yes, Thoth and certain initiate teachers under him did hold discourses and
discussion on various topics. Semik Ra'Hanok means "the becoming of the Pillar
of Light (or fire)." Thus on entered this place to become that vessel or pillar
of LIGHT. Some only were able to attend the discourses and achieve a measure of
learned understanding. Many other went on to higher stages of receipt which on
the outer was evidenced by being able to change the body vessel through
molecular re-organzation...this for transporting it to other locations and even
other dimensions. Yet these were not parlor tricks but a result of deep inner
spiritualization of all aspects of the Being.
Semik Ra'Hanok was not just one structure but a complex
containing various buildings, open plazas and large sculptures which one could
enter and receive energy for different levels of awakening.
At the center of the complex was the Temple of Transformation.
This was a large pyramid-shaped building. It was not a "pyramid" in the sense of
the ones with which we are familiar on Giza and other areas of Egypt which we
now find there. It was a building with rooms, stairs and hallways, but in the
shape of a pyramid. However some of the chambers were quite transendental in
nature and purpose. Others were rooms for high-level instruction and initiation.
Thoth Raismes came to the Academy periodically, but for the
most part it was operated by a council of master teachers under him. His
guidance was of course paramount.
Thoth designed the logo for the Academy, which is pictured in
my own rendition above. A triangle rests on a T-square. These much later will
become masonic symbols, but Thoth first initiated them in esoteric symbology.
The triangle representing unification and further delineation of the Three-Fold
Creatrix of the universe, which in a later era would be seen as "Father, Son and
Holy Ghost, but cosmically as the Three-Fold Creatix is three white light holes
(not black holes) which pour out the divine light for creating and organizing
universes. The feather in the center of the triangle was the symbol for
inscription of Light Language into the Greater Akashic.
The T-Square for Thoth was the foundation or leveling place
where all came together as a foundational formation in the Earth. It is
the anchor. The interlocking serpents within this symbol were to represent the
creative power itself...found in all things and in Earth's nature as a dual
couplet of continual perpetuation. As one plays against the tension of the
other, so the it takes on the tension and the "other" relaxes. Then this process
is reversed.
Altogether this symbol was the defining synergy of universal
continuity and unification.
It has been shown to me that Semik Ra'Hanok
now exists in Numis'OM of the New Earth Star. It is not identical to the ancient
version, as transformation occurs in the passage into New Earth vibration. It is
now even more into the greater levels of harmonic than it was in Egyptos.
I feel I was guided by ThothHorRa (Thoth in
his New Earth embodiment) to establish a "New Earth Academy of ON" on a sky
platform above the New Earth Star Island Estate (NESIE) in the virtual world of
Second Life. While it is not to be compared with THE Academy of ON of the
ancient or New Earth versions, this one is under that umbrella of Light and for
our current and mortal purposes allows those of us in the NESIE Community to
experience some of the energetic connections. In January of 2010 we will
officially begin holding instruction on various spiritual topics, not only given
by myself but other members of the community as well.
On another note: in December of 2009 I gave a class discourse on
Symbology at the Moon Temple of Moon Valley Sanctuary (another spiritual
organization in Second Life) and recorded it.
This first discourse is available to everyone . In the future I plan
to record many more classes in the NESIE Academy and these will be
available here as part of your 44:44 Ascension Portal subscription. They may possibly also be placed for sale in the Spirit Store for non-subscribers.
Click here to see photographs I have taken of the New Earth Academy of
ON above NESIE.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Seeds for a New Earth VOLUME 01, 2008 Please use the "Printer Friendly Version" link on right in the menu bar on the front cover page above to make a quality print of this publication. We were guided to name this publication Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron by Thoth, and the Illumined Assembly of the Christos' Merkabah of the Host comprised of 12 souls holding open a portal for the the Christ energies on this planet. The Radiant Ones we are working with encouraged us to bring forth this publication as a continuance of work that was done by Maia Christianne Nartoomid from 1980 through 1999. During this period Maia produced, first, the periodical entitled The Source (1980-1988), and then later, Temple Doors (1989-1999). In 1994 her partner Simeon Nartoomid joined her in producing the latter periodical. In the nearly 7 year respite between the conclusion of Temple Doors and when the first release of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron began, we both underwent a period of expanded esoteric initiation and deeply personal transformational experiences that have prepeared us for resuming this work at an entirely new octave of experience. Thoth and the IAC Merkabah of the Host have requested that we facilitate a specific Program of Light related to the Aramu Temple of Thoth and Numis'OM to help those who feel resonant with this Station of Light (Spirit Heart Sanctuary) to accelerate their Ascension processes and thus to further help the collective soul of humanity approach the gateway of Ascension which Thoth calls Light-Principle Forty, or LP-40 for short. Ultimately, as we collectively move through this passage we will activate the 44:44 Ascension Stargate and trigger a series of cosmic events destined to alter the DNA of humanity forever. Numis'OM is a causal reference point for the New Earth Star and the 44:44 stargate, and is hosted within the causal body of Venus. The Aramu Temple of Thoth is energetically within the Numis'OM matrix and acts as a way-station for souls building the New Earth Star consciousness from within the earthen experience. Souls can thus visit Numis'OM and even the New Earth Star if they have proper intent and attunement. It is our goal to facilitate pathways for this to occur within. This publication thus sits at the heart of our efforts to facilitate this greater process for the Masters and Illumined Ones that we are working with and to assist souls on Earth. We hope that you will find it a fruitful and friendly path into the Homeward Light. Please share your experiences with us and the other subscribers in the Spirit Mythos Forums (you are safe, its private for subscribers only). The front cover art on this issue is entitled "Initiation" by Maia Christianne Nartoomid. Some of the art that appears on the front cover and in the various articles in this issue as well as any of our own publications which are herein referenced are available on the Subscriber's Freebies page while this issue is current. After this volume becomes a back issue the art that appears in it will then only be available through our Spirit Store IF it has an associated item number listed under it. Click the item number of the art piece to find it there if it no longer appears on the Subscriber's Freebies page. by Maia Christianne Nartoomid In the symbolic representation of Thoth presenting the Isis Eye or Aeriopax dynamic, he wears it as a breastplate. This is to qualify the dynamic as heart-centered and relevant to the Pure Gem future body of humanity within the New Earth Star vibration. Thoth forms an inverted triangle with the center (and thus heart) of the “Eye” and the chakras in the palms of the hands. These palm-chakras will become more energetically prominent as we develop our Pure Gem bodies (as well as the chakras in the bottom of the feet). The inverted triangle of electric energy is coming from universal SOURCE through the star geometry of the Eye. Yet Thoth’s vast universal NOW Moment encompasses such a large field of reference that he is able to literally hold the Aeriopax within his Pure Gem energy field as a portal for humanity to access more easily (pre-digested, so to speak) through the Pymander and the new Seraphi Program Thoth has “installed” within it. Please understand that the terminology I am using here only gives a very narrow slice of the true picture, since that picture is so vast, so far beyond our linear comprehension that an inter-face language has been developed and used for the purpose of giving us a reference of some kind, no matter how small; for once we have even the smallest tag for some universal truth or law, we have the potential of going further and further within it until we are able to apprehend the larger perspective through ESSENCE. Can we put into words the feelings, the energy, the qualification of a scent of essential oil that enchants us? Yet it permeates our entire being with a soul-quantum of depth and substance deep within us. As shown in this Google Earth shot, one may take note that the basic shape of the Isis Eye / Aeriopax is similar to the constellation of Orion, the home of the Blue Star Rigel, to which the Earth energetically will return through it’s Ascension process. Cruxus Venus Temple by Maia Christianne Nartoomid OR-0033STD Building of the Templaric Grid by Maia Christianne Nartoomid In a Thoth transmission released directly after the January 7th, 2008 date of the re-activation of the 7th and last Venus Temple node of the current Earth: the Atlantean Venus Temple in the Canary Islands, Thoth revealed that there is now an 8th Venus Temple - in Numis’OM (not in our current Earth reality), which is the central hub of all the Venus Temples in both realms: current and Numis’OM. He calls this Temple the Cruxus Venus Temple. The above art work I have created of the Cruxus Venus Temple was expressly guided by Thoth and is an energy template of the streaming of Light codes coming from the Cruxus Venus Temple node and through the Cruxus Venus Pillar of Light, into our current Earth reality. When creating this image I used the textures and designs at my disposal, so one could say that this is a “symbolic” view and not a literal one. Yet as I worked to create this image I felt that the textures and designs I chose were being woven into the “real” temple format. It is difficult to explain, but comes straight out of quantum physics. As I “observed” the “temple” so it modified itself to accommodate my observation and thus art depiction. According to the Sufis, the word “akasha” means “accommodation.” This could be seen as a universal law. If so, then everyone’s view, work of art, vision, etc. would be accommodated in the same manner, as their view shifted the reality of what they saw.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Yet I wish to take this a step further within the context of the Pymander Seraphi Program specifically. This is just a narrow SLICE, but if true, has profound universal “quantum” implications. As I viewed and artistically created the “8th Temple” and thus it shifted to accommodate my process, I felt that this specific “accommodation” was being guided to conform to a Seraphic dynamic within the Pymander - coming from the Seraphim Angelic Light Language creational matrix of the El’ohim. A mouthful, I know! Simplified (somewhat), it would seem that the Seraphi program of the Pymander was controlling the outcome of my interaction with the Cruxus Venus Temple node, and thus it’s “shifting” of modality and visual presentation. What all this really means, I honestly do not know at this point. I am simply sharing with you my on-going revelation concerning it. I do not imagine that I have some special “in” with this universal property. I do believe however that the whole Earth paradigm is transforming to accommodate the New Earth Hologramic quantum creational matrices in a manner that is far more user friendly to humanity that it was before. Before WHAT, I’m not exactly certain, as so many watermarks are being reached almost daily in the New Earth transformational process. See also: Venus Temples A recent related “blurb” from Thoth: The Cetacean population of the planet is currently undergoing a metamorphosis of their energy fields and how they connect to and integrate with Earth grid systems. This is under the direct guidance of the HESPARA SIGNA operating through a sub–channel, the “Master Earth Grid Coalition.” This Coalition is newly formed, but the Hespara Signa is ancient: a regulator of the “Venus Mandate” (of guardianship of Earth). Signa defined by Thoth: specific distinguishing action or form, desire command: incites to action or movement... shifting of whole Earth grid systems into alignment with new star vector commands coming out of Ascension dynamics which are now accessing the current Earth matrices - and will accelerate in access as new channels open, such as the “CRUXUS VENUS PILLAR OF LIGHT” activation, which took place on 1/07/08. Scientific validation of stargates and ascension dynamics claimed! William Henry claims that there is scientific validation of stargates and ascension dynamics. If this is true it will further ground the planetary consciousness into accepting the coming dramatic events and changes in reality that such dynamics as the Cruxus Venus Pillar of Light and the Areiopax are creating within a very real and escalating inter-dimensional and inter-facing Great Matrix: the all-encompassing Matrix containing the many matrices and grids of the Earth. Thoth addressing this topic: Indeed, for some time certain “select” groups of scientists have been observing aspects of the Great Matrix. However, as the “phenomena” increases, increasingly we find scientists outside the “box” of the “Architects” (Thoth’s term for those who design and are in control of what is often called the “One World Order” on the planet). These “rogue” scientists are dedicated to eventually revealing to the world what they are experiencing and learning from the developing New Hologram of Earth. In order to maintain credibility and keep panic at a minimum among the masses, this “revealing” must be accomplished in stages, which is being carefully orchestrated by the ILN or Inner Light Network. William Henry on Stargates and Ascension (a 5 minute video) Charging the Ark by Maia Christianne Nartoomid I included an eagle in the art above instead of a falcon, as I did not have a falcon model. Yet both are appropriate for this symbology. by Maia Christianne Nartoomid What follows is somewhat unusual for my articles. It is taken from an intense session with Thoth for William Buehler, concerning grid systems he and his synergy group works with. These particular excerpts were so filled with Numis’OM info, I requested of Bill if I could include them here. Bill Buehler: 77 spells “Az: strength” and is the Boaz pillar where “bo” describes “going and coming: two way flow.” Thoth: 77 is also the number of the opening of the Shamballah Gate (read this article in Numis’OM, Volume 01 - 2006), as well as 777 - depending on certain aspects of the whole interactive dynamic. See the number 7 as a yod flame and more will be revealed. Maia: Last night on television I watched The Lost Book of Nostradamus in which it reveals that Nostradamus used the 13 sign zodiac system, with its 13th sign of Ophiuchus, the Serpent-Bearer. According to Thoth, this is the system connected to entry into the Mazaloth cosmic grid, beyond the Mazzarothic 12 sign Zodiac. However, Thoth points to the constellation of Delphinus as the other “end” of the 13th signs “flash-point.” In other words, the 13th sign's doorway “flashes” dimensionally in alternating current between Ophiuchus and Delphinus; but that is another story we won’t be discussing in this article. The documentary showed how, between Sagittarius and Scorpio, Ophiuchus touched the “Dark Rift” or “horizon” (Thoth’s word here) running through the center of the Milky Way. Thoth: the “Vault of the Unknown” is energetically representative of the Orion Vault - but also the corridor, vault or path of the “Dark Rift” of the Milky Way, since the Orion Vault holds the light codes for the translation of the Milky Way into the “UNFOLDING LOTUS.” Once the Earth and Venus move through LP-40, these planets (or rather the Light codes they contain) will be inserted into the Milky Way to release the Fruit from the Tree at it’s galactic center. This in turn (over a period of time) will unfold the Flower / Lotus of the Milky Way galaxy into a new form of Universal Being, which will “feed” the “chicks” (star intelligences or Living Lights within the Milky Way) from the breast / heart of the Bird. Even though Earth and Venus will be “ascended” into Orion-Rigel by then, as a result of the unfolding Lotus of the Milky Way, there will be a burst of transformed light codes moving up the stem of the “Lotus” and into the New Earth Star. Older Quote from Thoth: the worm will bore into the center of the Tree of Life and light will pour out as if from a golden wound into the center of every heart. SINCLAIR TOMB STONE (a key Templar focus) - view Buehler’s grid work on this. Thoth: Two major tele-planes coming together with these two “Ls.” When they actually lock into place, so the path is open through the Shamballah Gate.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Maia: Again, I am astounded at the synchronicity here. In “The Lost Book of Nostradamus” (which are color drawing made in his day, based on his prophecies) is depicted the “Cup-Grail” almost exactly (to my memory) as seen on the Sinclair grave stone. The interpretation given in this documentary was that it depicted the Milky Way, with its alignment to “center.” At the end of the text, the same symbol is “empty” - no “bars” meeting in the center. The conclusion given was that the End Times of the Earth had been completed - according to Nostradamus, between 1992 and 2012. However, Thoth sees this more in a universal way... Thoth: when the unfolding of the Lotus is accomplished, galatic center will have L-shifted as the two tele-planes meet. The Lotus will then unfold. Of course the galatic Lotus cannot unfold until LP-40 has taken place and the Earth / Venus release their codes into the galatic center of the Milky Way. View Buehler’s grid work on the Falcon of Andora Bill Buehler: the group total field created by Metatron and a “Crow’s Foot” organization of special beings with an added being in the SE. The Crow’s Foot symbol was burned into the Ark Cover by lightning bolts, the design appearing in gold. The design is called THE FALCON OF ANDORA. I think that it relates to a hawk design received by mail when in Hawaii, was told that it was a symbol marking the DECALOGUE scrolls at Alexandria, intened for priority burning. (Decalouge “Book of 10" believed to be the last written description of the Reshel and related systems.) There it was called the “Order of the Phoenix.” I noted that the design uses the Pyramid angle in the wings, also, now, that its resonant with the Reshel grid. Request description of this “Crow Foot” system: function, special applications, what we should know. Thoth: It is the “Mark of the Choosing” - NOT the Mark of the Chosen. When the Mark of the Choosing is given, it has been called, summoned with a true intent for spiritual reunion. Once given or “burned” into the soul matrix, that soul may then reach a greater level of awareness as to the choices offered by Spirit. It is a powerful Moment - a Moment of complete designation for the soul as to it’s own authority and design - moving beyond the mold or containment field and into the richness of the Lilies of the Valley. Bill Buehler: is this another Metatronic Breastplate? Thoth: no, it is much more than that. It moves beyond the need (or perceived need) for a “breastplate”, ie, containment field. Bill Buehler: what is the Falcon of Andora and does it connect with the hawk design as shown (fig 2)? Request corrections and improvements. Thoth: the “Falcon of Andora” is the Bird that awakens - it tears open the containment field with it’s talons and then reaches into the “ark” with it’s beak to extract the beating heart, which it eats. While this may seem a violent symbology - it is all an act of LOVE. Once the Heart of the Sacred is taken from the vault / ark and consumed by the Great Bird of Light, it can never be the same again - it is TRANSFORMED into the vehicle or merkabah of PURE BEING. Yes, the Falcon and “hawk design” are the same dynamic. When creating the Aeriopax, the Falcon is fully engaged in “consuming the heart.” Maia: Thoth brings to my attention that the crow's foot symbol is the same as the rune for "Protection", which is "ALGIZ." He sends me to my Vancover Island friends' (Kathleen Millar and Amanda Delisle) little rune book. It is handmade and was sent to me along with some Isle of Man Stone runes. Kathleen and Amanda's interpretations of the runes are the best I have ever read... apparently Thoth digs them too. (RUNES - SOLAR LANGUAGE OF AWAKENING - if you are interested in purchasing the booklet and some runes from them, you will need to contac Kathleen or Amanda directly. The art on the cover of this little Rune book is by Amanda Delisle. Anyway, so I read what she has written on Algiz, and I nearly fall out of my chair! I quote the following excerpts: Like Algiz, you are fully protected when you fling both arms open and expose your big shining heart. Safety comes from creating a Mer-Ka-Ba of love that can carry you through the depths of fear untouched... This powerful Light code has appeared to assist you in the awakening of your DNA. You are being called to rise up, to take another step along your spiral path of ascension... self-reflection will invoke the Christ-Light within your cellular structure. Protection in it’s true form arises from accepting the reality that we are unbounded, multi-dimensional beings of light. When we embrace and activate our individual Christ Consciousness we are protected without drawing ourselves into a spiritual, emotional or physical cage... Remember, the physical is the last sphere of evidence; our wishes are granted first in the higher spheres before they are grounded in the third dimension. From Bill Buehler: GROUP PROCESS USING THE CROW FOOT ~ REGARDING THE SPECIAL BEINGS CONTAINING THE GROUP IN THE CROW’S FOOT. Poles and beings (shown in Ref 1): NORTH: Metatron in outer ring enveloping the whole Field. Next a blonde female Knight in silver armor, white horse, cape purple outside and blue inside. She later intered the group into the critical pole in the Cup between Resh and Shin poles. She extended arms E-W with NEPHESH to the East and SERIPHIM to the West. NORTHEAST: a lion on a throne with name “Beth-Sidhee-Ba”; to the Lion’s right: a Lamb with name “Beth-Sidhee”: to the Lion’s left: a Goat with name “Beth-Shidhee Beth” (appears to coincide with the Beth pole: creation of the Forms involving the Sidhe.) NORTHWEST: a Camel with sign “Kaph” (appears to coincide with the Yud pole: L gates as Hebrew letter Gamel) SOUTH: a White Annubis with sign “Shem.” Special pole in SOUTHEAST: a being of blazing gold light too bright to view, was cloaked in a black cape. An infinity loop over the head. Bill Buehler: this configuration seems to be especially important setting a foundational grid in what appeared to be a major initiating process. In view of this, request an explanation of the poles and what’s happening. A golden fish resulted in the lower Ark with the group spanned by huge E-W wings as part of a continuing action line. Maia: Thoth is relaying that there is so much to this configuration an entire book could be written about it. Instead, you are getting a very short summary here.
