# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Thoth: main dynamic path / function of the LP-40 “Opening of the Lotus.” NOT the galaxy “unfolding Lotus” - but instead the New Earth Lotus dynamic which of course, leads to the galaxy-lotus. The Falcon of Andora is a HORUS dynamic - an aspect of the whole “HOR’RA” (Tree of Life sephirothic lightning path transformed into a whirling torus). The configuration of the CROW FOOT given above is the “STAR BIRD BELT.” This is the Metatron circle and the “bird-foot” within it. It is really not a “crow” in symbolic instance here. Calling it a “Falcon Foot” would be more appropriate (although any bird of prey would work here - including an eagle). The Lion, Lamb and Goat are all aspects of the ONE; yet the Lion is the Visible Being on the throne - UNTIL the full Ascension is complete (both Earth and galaxy). Then the THREE shall be seen as ONE - and that ONE will be the “being of blazing gold light” unsheathed in all it’s BRILLIANCE. Until then, the White Anubis both shields the full Metatronic LIGHT of the Being and sheds a reflective light of it (Moon aspect). The female Knight carries the “charge” of the poles - the message of it’s delivery across the tele-planes - the bridges of synapses between dimensions. The Camel stores the knowledge for the whole dynamic - it is a “vault” of sorts - a containment field - that will give up it’s codes to the dynamic at the moment of it’s Metatronic inception. The Dragon's Den by Maia Christianne Nartoomid OR-0034STD by Maia Christianne Nartoomid Like Unicorns, Dragons are pure energy forms which take on genetic properties at will, aligning to human consciousness and thus mythic design. While Unicorns contain the “Christic” presence in the nature kingdom, Dragons were created from the primordial center of planets as they form and thus carry the patterns of the Creatrix and a guardian of that creative power. In more ancient times when the veil between human and nature realms was more mutable than it is today, both of these magical creatures --the Unicorn and Dragon -- were seen and interacted with by a percentage of humanity. Those humans who did find themselves in the presence of these beasts were either at the right place and the right time (an energy ley line on a full moon, for example) or were seers and sensitives. Of course, some among us still do see and interact with them - but usually in a less physical way than in the past. In this article we will leave the Unicorn behind for now and focus on the Dragons - the Dragons of Numis’OM, and their gifts of the “Dragon Pearls.” The Dragons of the New Earth (Numis’OM) are far more attuned to their pure energy forms, and thus less influenced by chaotic forces. In the Old Earth humans could morph Dragons into less than lovable beings at times. That does not happen in Numis’OM. While there is an interactive morphogenetic field which forms between Dragon and human, both entities in the New Earth dwell within a harmonic wave-length that is LONG and EVEN, like an undulating serpent creating large sine-waves through the crystalline sand. It cannot be violated. The harmonic sine wave of Numis’OM does change in increments , but until Numis’OM develops into another full stage of the New Earth, the sine wave will basically remain stable as it is now. Thoth refers to this particular New Earth Star sine wave as the “Tetzakal.” It is present in only slight variation in ALL System II worlds. Thoth has chosen “Tetzakal” for the word definition, as he tells me that this was the ancient Maya name for it - what he calls the “High Maya” who came from the Pleiades and mixed with certain elements of the indigenous Mayan culture of that time. Thoth (who was also incarnated as Quetzalcoatl) states that Tetzakal means to wrap around, loop, circle, enfold in a way that sustains a creation or manifestation. The Dragons of Numis’OM personify the Tetzakal in their primal, pulsing, enfolding presence. They interact with Numis’OM humanity to aid that humanity in maintaining balance within the Tetzakal. Note: the Tetzakal is the sine-wave within the “Path of Azuma.” From my article on the Earth matrix of Templa Mar: The Taychon Vault radiates blue sapphire, amethystine violet and diamond white Light. Through these 'gem fires,' it creates a field of overlay between the three polarity universes (positive-neutral-negative) and the three millenniums. The latter is a term for the divisions of all time which exists outside of the RANNA Time Wave. The overall format--which is formed by the composite dynamics of the sapphire-amethystine-diamond Light, the three polarity universes, and the three millenniums--develops a composite positioning of stellar influences which forms the Path of Azuma. Azuma is the Quetzalcoatl archetype in an earlier High Mayan cosmology. The Path of Azuma is a specific 'Zuvuya,' which is defined in The Mayan Oracle, by Ariel Spilsbury & Michael Bryner, as: "The galactic memory circuit by which all things return to themselves. The return path to the stars. The grammar of harmony. The thirteenth or highest heaven of the Maya." This memory circuit links our universe with the other two universes, thereby allowing access between all dimensions and millenniums of being. There are two main types of Dragons in Numis’OM. Basically large and small. They are all winged. The large ones range from the size of a horse to a Blue Whale, while the small ones are the sizes of a mouse to a cat! The smaller ones are the “Tinka” (errr- like Tinkerbell?). For the large variety I receive the name “Khiir.” While the Tinka are definitely more fairy-like and flitting, the Khiir are more impressive and stable. There are no developing cycles in Numis’OM. That is, things are not born, develop and leave the form as a result of entropy. There is no entropy in the New Earth. Yet beings are able to express themselves as children - even infants, if they wish. Thus, there seems to be a desire on the part of humans in Numis’OM to experience “young” Dragons, Unicorns and other creatures - even flora in various stages of budding and flowering. So these stages are seen at various times by some human inhabitants of the New Earth. The Dragons form “eggs” that contain their pure energy essence. When the eggs “hatch” this essence is released into the New Earth as a more refined creational energy which can be seen as a “baby” Dragon by those who wish to experience it in that way. Most depictions of Dragons seem to miss the mark of revealing the sacred nature of their being.

The version that comes the closest to Numis’OM dragons for me are the “Windstone” creations. The same goes for their Unicorns and Griffins. Then there are the “Dragon Pearls.” This glitter version is in the “freebies” section while this issue is current for use on your website and pages like My Space. while this issue is current for use on your website and pages like My Space. These are spherical crystalline drops of Dragon essence which is secreted from the sides of the eyes (not the eyes themselves) of the Dragon - both males and females. This occurrence takes place when a Dragon is thrumming (beating) it’s wings in a heart-song. It is a form of unity expression among themselves and all of the creational flow of their world - in this instance, Numis’OM. When the essence drops to the ground, in a short period of “time” (time is a dodgy word to use about anything in the New Earth realms) it becomes a crystal sphere. Each sphere is unique. It radiates the creation dynamics of the “rushing” of the universe within the matrix of it’s creation - like a snapshot of divine beauty in the Eye of God in that “Moment” of being Present, as the “Pearl” was formed. While the Dragon eggs contain the essence of greater refinement of the New Earth creational fields, the Dragon Pearls contain the very heart-tears of the Dragon Song: the love of Creation for which it’s created. The term “Dragon Pearl” came into my experience just prior to Thoth’s opening of the akashic scroll to me about the Numis’OM Dragon Pearls. I was gifted a spherical conglomerate created from crystals and other ingredients, which is called a “dragon pearl.” The ingredients includes something that causes them to glow in the dark. Mine glows green, but I understand that some glow blue and some gold, as well. I can only say that they do (to my satisfaction) contain an essence, a quality of true Dragon Pearls. It is slight by comparison, but nonetheless potent to me - here in this current world reality. my Dragon Pearl both in light and glowing in the dark both in light and glowing in the dark I have found a strong connection between Dragon Pearls (of both kinds) and the Kuan Yin archetype with her “dragon” energy. I see her pour from her essence vial the green glowing light essence as a healing elixir into my body and the food I eat. WE MAY CALL UPON THE DRAGONS OF NUMIS’OM AND THEIR PRECIOUS DRAGON PEARLS FOR HEALING OF SELF, OTHERS AND PLANET THROUGH THE SONG OF LOVE-CREATION THEY HAVE CRYSTALIZED (please see announcement at end for essences to assist this process). There is a matrix forming between our current Earth and the New Earth of Numis’OM, within the New Earth Hologram, which Thoth is calling the “Dragon Star.” symbolic depiction of the Dragon Star, available in the “freebies” section while this issue is current It is the connecting of two “star wheels” of the Dragon Essence in it’s pure creational PRESENCE. As the two star wheels move together, so they form new geometries within the New Earth Hologram for new creation vectors and thus creations, to take place. By attuning to the Dragon Star, one may hold these creation fields in their being with greater awareness and synchronicity to the whole and constantly evolving dynamic of Ascension. View a "YouTube" Dragon Tribute I am VERY SOON going to be offering a new set of tools for facilitating personal and planetary spiritual transformation. I am being guided to call this new set of tools the Seraphi New Earth Star Essences. These will be available in the Spirit Store for purchase and download as PDF files with images (a visual vibrational imprint of the particular essence) and attunement information including a special Seraphi radionics number for interfacing that particular essence to the human bio-field. I feel that these are an excellent addition to the original Seraphi Profile program. I am making this announcement here because these first vibrational essences are Dragon Pearl Essences, of which there are currently seven as follows: - Lily of the Lake - Amber Flame - Ice Maiden - Milk of the Goddess - Terra Firma - Blue Mar - Tolkin Black Pearl These are vibrational virtual essences, not liquid essences as is usally the case. I hope many of you will resonate with them as well as the Dragons that created them! I will make an announcement through our email list when these are ready for you to use! - Maia Christianne Nartoomid+ by Maia Christianne Nartoomid In order to investigate the “Sapphire Throne” first we need to understand what Thoth calls the Saf-fire Mount. It is to be found within planets - in their “hollow” dimension; and also in World System II planets, as they support an outer crystalline energy shell. The Inner Earth Saf-Fire Mount is described thus in Volume 03, 1980 of “The Source”: As the solar wind of the Earth atoma moves through the vibrational plane of Earth, via the planet's chakras (which line up inside the Earth and not at points on the surface) it must pass through a receiving station within the center of the Earth that is analogous to the aorta of the heart. All the lands and seas of Earth are channeled through this subterranean point, located within the hollow of the planet. It is known to the inner inhabitants as the "Mount of the Saf-Fire" or "Mount of Assembling." The actual location of the Saf-Fire Mount, or rather the point where it densifies to attach itself to the inner planet from the streaming aorta of the heart-atoma/center sun) is in the center field or 'travex' of the inner planetary terrain. The travex is the point which is geo-cosmically the center of the interior terra firma (not to be confused with the center of the planet, which is the central sun atoma). The Saf-Fire Mount or 'heap' is the cosmic surveyors' golden mark of the travex. In the upper reaches of the inner sky, the Saf-Fire is seen as refracted light. Haloing, arching, cascading in the hollow heaven it is a glory of color and light, as it pirouettes in sun dances with the changing Earth tides. The middle point of the Saf-Fire is denser and less reflective. The lower region of the Mount becomes more and more solid as the ice crystal lattices bind into closer formations to create the glacial heap attached to the Earth. This assemblage of ice crystals is focused through a strong magnetic spiral, with the central sun using the crystal Mount like a conductive coil. This same phenomena is present in the New Earth Star of Numis’OM. It is somewhat differently formulated, as the ice crystal canopy and magnetic fields which form it are less contained than within a World System I - even in a slightly removed dimension, such as the Inner Earth. Yet relatively speaking, these are only slight differences.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

In my art depiction of the more solid portion of the Numis’OM Saf-Fire Mount I have placed a small boat that would hold about 4 persons, to give you an idea of the size of the Mount at that level. In the book “Jesus the Master Builder - Druid Mysteries and the Dawn of Christianity” by Gordon Strachan, he devotes an entire chapter to the “Sapphire Throne.” While I do not agree (nor does Thoth) will all the hypothesis developed by Mr. Strachan concerning the Sapphire Throne, I do find some powerful corollaries with the true Sapphire Throne, which on at least one level is essentially one and the same as the Saf-Fire Mount. Gordon Strachan quotes Thomas Gray, in “The Progress of Poesy” as speaking of the “living throne, the sapphire blaze.” He also writes of Wordsworth in “The Excursion” as seeing “a great throne appearing out of the swirling mountain mist.” Wordsworth: Right in the midst, where interspace appeared of open court, an object like a throne under a shining canopy (ice canopy?) of state stood fixed... vast in size, it’s substance glorified... In cross-referencing the Old Testament Strachan quotes Exodus 24:9-10 where upon Mt. Sinai the Elders of Israel saw God “and there under his feet as it were a pavement of sapphire stone, like the very heaven for clearness.” Strachan compares the Sapphire Thone with the Northern Lights, and this is a good comparison, as the ice crystal canopy of the Inner Earth (and once upon the Outer Earth) and within Numis’OM share similar qualities. The actual Sapphire Mount / Throne however, must have an outer sphere of crystalline-magnetic properties of just the right value in order to “ground a bolt” to the terrestrial, as would a lightning strike, as elemental conditions of the ground reach up to meet that electric charge in the sky. Yet there is more to the Sapphire / Saf-Fire as a Living Stone or Crystal of Light. It manifests in terrestrial spheres of varying densities, but it is also a RAYSHIP, a quality of what Thoth calls the “fire that does not burn.” This is a vast topic which we cannot possibly cover adequately in this article, so I am focusing most specifically on how this “Sapphire” Ray effects the New Earth Star, and our developing Hologram of the New Earth. The Saf-Fire Ray in some aspects is emitted from certain crystals we currently have on this planet - mainly of the blue, rose-pink, violet-purple and green varieties, such as blue or green sapphire (most prominently), turquoise, lorimar, lapis lazuli, and some purple-violet crystals such as amethyst other crystals of that color hue. Also included are the opals and the rare Ajoite. Then there is the Blue Hemimorphite and a very rare variation of it called “Ocean Sky.” Thoth relates to me that the Ocean Sky is one of the most light-engendered crystals on the planet at this time. The regular Blue Hemimorphite is certainly high on this list as well, and the Ajoite being one of the most vibrationally pure “ascension” crystals now present on the Earth. It is especially precious as it is no longer being mined. Ajoite Crystals Chinese Ocean Sky from my personal collection from my personal collection The Saf-Fire Mount of the Inner Earth and Numis’OM have numerous crystalline properties in the denser terrestrial part of it’s assembly. Since the Saf-Fire Mount or throne is, in its least solid element composed of water vapor and ice crystals, the denser crystalline portion is filled with a myriad of opaline varieties. Interestingly, if some of the crystals are “mined” from the Saf-Fire Mount, they will re-form rather quickly. It is carefully mined in the Inner Earth for various healing and energy uses, but not in Numis’OM, as there is no need for that there. If one wishes to have a “piece of the rock” in the New Earth, they can simply manifest it. Our Inner Earth is to some degree, a manifestional realm as well - but much still has to be accomplished there through physical efforts. As a Ray of the highest order, the Saf-Fire is the transporting vehicle or merkabah for Master Intelligences to transfer their Pure Gem forms from one dimensional wave-form state to another. As I received this information, I was instructed by Thoth to go to The Keys of Enoch by J.J. Hurtak and open the book, where I would find Hurtak’s corollary term for the Saf-Fire Ray/Stone/Throne. I opened it on Key 319 which tells of the “Eben Shettiyah.” I looked in the glossary of the book for it’s definition and found that it is indeed one and the same. Hurtak refers to it as the “Foundation Stone” as well as a transportation modality for Master Beings, and that it’s codes are to be found in the stone of the Great Pyramid, which he states represents the “altar of Jehovah.” I find it interesting that Thoth Raismes has referred to himself as “Thoth Raimes of Aphra” - “Aphra” meaning the “Altar Place.” He revealed to me in 1977 that he was born with a lapis lazuli in one hand and an emerald in the other... both “Saf-Fire” stones! The book he requested I write in 1977 and asked me to title The Blue Stone - Healing Science of Thoth Hermes (the Greek name for Thoth). Thoth has often referred to the stone tablets given to Moses as the sapphire talis. This is yet another aspect of the SAF-FIRE RAYSHIP embodied in crystals or crystalline-based stone. The Tuatha de Dannan of the ancient British Isles were a mixture of star genetics and human, through the Tribe of Dan. It is a long and complex story, told for my part in Temple Doors Volumes 03/04, 1993 (not yet available in our Spirit Store) and Temple Doors Volume 01, 1999. The “Stone of Destiny,” also with a varied history, was involved with the “Dannan.” It also contained the SAF-FIRE RAYSHIP. There is quite an interesting website with equally interesting links covering the topic of various “blue stones” which I believe for the most part to be either true SAF-FIRE RAYSHIP stones or aspects of that vibration in some form. Thoth and my akashic insights do not agree with all the material presented, although much of it does seem to connect to the “Thoth Record” on the topic. The website is entitled The Blue Stones of Atlantis. In conclusion, working with the Saf-Fire Rayship in one’s own Light Body is a way to facilitate the actualization of your Pure Gem Body in this electro-magnetic zone (reality) of the Earth.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Thoth with his Deva Guardians by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AB-0042STD by Maia Christianne Nartoomid In the art depiction above is seen Thoth and his white tigers Pasha (male) and Jigata (female) with their cub, Tikka. Also the white falcon “Go Forth.” They appear for their portrait here in the realm of Numis’OM, although they also exist with Thoth in the dimension of the Inner Earth. As I mention in the Dragon article of this volume, there are no actual infants / children in Numis’OM, other than as the choose to be seen and experience that state of being. Thus while the “cub” Tikka is a cub in the Inner Earth, he is choosing to be seen as such in Numis’OM as well. Thoth’s relationship with a linage of white tigers began in his life as Thoth Rasimes (actually as the child named Tiirna) on the surface Earth with his birth in Tibet, having been suckled by a white tiger. It continues now, even in Numis’OM. I asked him why this strong connection and why he wished me to create this portrait of them for all of you. Thoth’s reply to my question: the lineage of white tigers I have continuously had at my side through my surface, inner Earth and now New Earth experiences contain the devic (nature realm) energy of my connection to Earth as a Living Being. They give me that path, that golden thread to Her (Gaia’s) Heart of Hearts. Understand that when my soul is never “karmically” (to use a mis-understood term loosely) bonded with the Earth. It carries instead the greater vibration of the Blue Star Rigel and the Orion RAY as a pure energy-wave. This is why I say that I am not an “Ascended” Master, as I have never “descended” into Earth (despite my earthly incarnations). My merkabah of Chariot of the Sun helps to anchor and support me in the Earth realm of humanity, but I also have host of devic beings or “Daemons” who perform the same service for me in the Nature Realms of Earth. The white tigers of Alabasalm are a specific linage which are especially prominent for me as my Daemons. They are animals who carry my energy forth through the conductive frequencies of the natural Earth being. There are others in my Devic Company such as the White Falcon “Go Forth,” who is more Spirit than flesh, and Kaabaru (black male) and Sukal (white female) horses. I gave to you recently the classifications of Daemons which Earth’s human may use to understand their Daemon’s roles with them. A greater understanding of how one’s Daemons are part of the creational field of their own Being is an important awareness in the unfolding of soul expression in the planetary Flower of Life. Note from Maia: I share with Thoth my “Temple Guardian” as being the White Tiger. Maia: Thoth, you mention that all your white tigers (of many eras in time and different dimensions) are of the lineage of Alabasalm. What is “Alabasalm?” Thoth: their original seed came from the planet that has been called Sapaku within the Blue Star Rigel, in Orion. This “seed” was re-generated and perpetuated in a sacred oasis valley known as Alabasalm in the Nubian Desert during the time of Atlantis and a period thereafter. This sacred valley and temple complex with it’s numerous gardens now abides in Numis’OM, and it is here in one of the garden areas, that is shown in your art portrait of me with my tigers and Go Forth. Talakachitza - One of the Children of Abrahim by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AB-0043STD by Maia Christianne Nartoomid Thoth rarely addresses publically the topic of “ETs” -- e.g. extra-terrestrial presence on this planet in it’s myriad species and agendas. However, he requested that I write this particular article at this time. Before reading it, however, please read my article on Spirit Mythos, Friends in Other Dimensions. Thoth: There are many “ETs” and “UTs” (ultra-terrestrial) inter-acting with Earth; and some of them with select groups of the Earth’s inhabitants. Many of the ETs - especially of the “Greys” variety - have very specific agendas involving their own survival and development (as outlined briefly in the article “Friends in other Dimensions.”) A core group of Greys have an agreed upon “arrangement” with elite sections of certain governments on this planet. Such arrangements were not designed by either side to be in the best interest of the mass population of Earth. However, the Master Intelligences of this universal continuum are orchestrating a far larger overview in which even the intrusive actions of the “Greys” and the “OWL" (One World Legion) of Earth governments will, in the long-run serve the Divine Plan. The Greys, in working so diligently to create genetic by-pass systems for their DNA by incorporating human “Metatronic Seed” genetics, created a humanoid race that is actually a form of “Ultra” and are now beginning to work with the Ultra Uni-manity councils for the greater purpose of the Universal Hologram, of which the New Earth Hologram is a part. This was no accident, but rather was accomplished through a co-operation between a more spiritually evolved group of Grey ETs we shall call the “Jerash” working with the Ultra-Terrestrials (UTs). The resultant strain of ET- Earth human genetic hybrids who are vibrationally “Ultra-Terrestrials,” we will call the “Children of Abrahim.” They are now fully engaged with the over-lighting Ultra councils of Earth’s Merkabah Star Races. This will (in stages) significantly tip the scales of power away from the OWL’s control of Earth, which they have been maintaining through their alliance with the Greys and certain other ETs. We will not go into anymore detail here concerning “conspiracies,” as this topic has become so convoluted and filled with mis-information it is not a path we feel beneficial or appropriate to focus upon at any length through this merkabic field (Thoth / Chariot of the Sun). Yet you will be hearing more from us concerning the “Children of Abrahim” and their developing role with the New Earth Hologram. Maia’s footnote: I was somewhat puzzled by Thoth’s choosing of Biblical names for these two ET groups: “Jerash” (an ancient city near what is now Amman, Jordan) and “Abrahim” (an ancient version of “Abraham”). Yet it was time to discontinue the transmission for the day and begin again tomorrow, so my questioning on this choice would have to wait. That evening, I turned on the television and began to watch a documentary on Biblical archeology.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

It began with a quote from the Bible - one I was not familiar with, but then I am hardly a Biblical scholar. I was struck by it’s reference to Abraham and the “stars.” I later looked it up in George M. Lamasa’s” Holy Bible from the Ancient Eastern Text.” In this case, the verse was not substantially different from the version quoted in the documentary (probably from the King James Bible). It reads as follows: “And he (the Lord) brought him (Abraham) outside, and said to him, Look now toward heaven and number the stars. If you are able to number them; and he said to him, so shall your descendants be.” - Genesis 15:5 It would seem that Thoth was striking a metaphoric stance in naming this new hybrid race the “Children of Abrahim.” Yet perhaps there was more to it than that. The next morning I resumed my session with Thoth. Maia: Thoth can you please share with us as to why you are choosing to call the hybrid ET-human race of Ultras the “Children of Abrahim.” Thoth: aside from the biblical metaphoric corollary of the Genesis 15:5, this Ultra race is the key transition tribe for the New Earth Star races of the future; just as Abraham was the “Father” of a whole new racial-genetic context of humanity in the Old Earth. We could see the “Children of Abrahim” as simply a new cyclic movement on the spiral of human evolution that was brought into motion through Abraham’s first “children,” for there was star seed inclusions into Abraham’s tribe as well. The “Greys” are not insectoids as some hypothesize. They have developed from the same “root” as humanity, but have become “stuck” in a dead-ended Oritronic branch, as they lack a Metatronic heart-seed. One is not “human” until they contain the Metatronic heart-seed; even if it is barely functional - as is the case with most of Earth’s humanity at this time. In the creation of the Children of Abrahim, the heart-seed was not only established, but attuned to the Ultra universal bandwidth. This would not have been possible without the cooperative efforts of the Jerash ETs and the Ultras. Maia: why do you call this particular group of “more spiritually aware” Greys the “Jerash?” Thoth: The ancient Aloii root meaning of “Jerash” is to “wash clean.” Also, to “take off the garment,” or “make known” or “reveal anew.” Maia: the Child of Abrahim you showed me, so that I could create his portrait (see above art work), who is named Talakachitza - why did you choose this particular being? Thoth: He is the “Abrahim” of this newly developed race-tribe; the “Master template” so to speak of the genetic family. With the creation of the Children of Abrahim, a new template of the Adam Kadmon is being developed for the New Earth Star. The “Abrahim” are the first step in crossing that threshold. Maia: where do the Children of Abrahim live? Thoth: in three locations at present. Some are within the Inner Earth, others in an Ultra complex within a deep rift beneath the Atlantic Ocean and a few have been introduced into Numis’OM. There are at present a total of only 561 of these hybrids now in existence, yet this number is steadily increasing at a rate that is in synergy with their rapidly developing spiritual awareness. Maia’s footnote: At the time I was being given the basic information from Thoth for this article, I “just happened” to view a YouTube documentary, which is the most complete view of the UFO / ET /UT topic I have thus far seen. Worlds Within Worlds by Maia Christianne Nartoomid NOLL-11STD by Simeon Nartoomid Numis'OM as a hyperspace reality is transitionary, yet absolutely vital to the ascension of Earth's humanity. Numis'OM acts like an osmotic "membrane" layer stretched between the current Earth and the New Earth Star. However, with Numis'OM there are actually two membranes: one between Numis'OM and the Old Earth, and one between Numis'OM and the New Earth Star. In the process of osmosis a liquid, usually water, is able to pass across a semi-permeable membrane leaving its solute solids behind on one side. In this way the membrane acts like a filter and this is the basis of reverse osmosis water filters. In the semi-permeable membrane of Numis'OM the liquid passing through the membrane is somewhat synonymous with what is often referred to as the "waters of creation." In other words, this is the etheric fluidium of the planet and all beings who have called her their home. The solute solids that will be left behind on the Old Earth side of the Numis'OM membrane are none other than the denser aspects of awareness, energy and consciousness of the Old Earth. These denser aspects might be referred to as "pollutants" but that would not be entirely correct. On the one hand they have helped to develop the current Earth reality to what it is now from its primal roots in order to prepare us all for the ascension. On the other hand, the denser aspects of this Old Earth reality now are serving as a far-too-limited containment field which is increasingly feeling like a shoe that no longer fits. By learning to pass across the membrane into the Numis'OM reality on the other side we can experience our sense of deeper being with the denser aspects of our Old Earth reality filtered out. It has been my experience that each time this is accomplished we leave the Old Earth material that was filtered out behind even though we "return" because it is instantly transmuted as we pass across the membrane into Numis'OM. How complete this transmutation process is will ultimately be dependent upon many different variables. The important thing to realize is that this is indeed occurring and therefore repeated journeys into Numis'OM result in a lightening of our denser load. Numis'OM is after all what we are calling the "Eye of Metatron." The Isis Eye or Aeriopax is a key dynamic to help you access the Eye of Metatron. The Isis Eye will transport you into a harmonic space wherein the Eye of Metatron's full gaze falls upon you. This is not an externalized gaze from another being as it may sound. Rather, this is an opening of your inner eye so that the Metatronic full-light aspects of your being are brought into more complete "visual" contact with your Oritronic half-light being in such a way that your conscious mind now starts to shift its perspective to view all aspects of being from the Metatronic full-light context. This may sound simple, but in assimilation it is a very powerful challenge that unfolds over time with diligent applications of love, patience, persistence and determination. You yourself are your only obstacle.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

There is nothing outside of you that truly has the power to stop you once you have the goal in your sights and the determination to succeed. The reality of Numis'OM is harmonically available to you 24/7. It is like a channel you tune into. The receiver is your heart, the frequency is love -- the Golden Mean or Phi. The first thing we need to learn to love is everything the Sacred Flow of Life brings into our experience, nothing can be excluded without truncating the process. Where there is resistance, love is constrained. Where there is embrace and acceptance, love is expanded. When love expands, the singular purpose of the universe and everything in it is being fulfilled. Everything the Sacred Flow of Life brings into our experience is intended to serve this one purpose. It is thus a process of learning to be conscious enough to have such expanded awareness present in our minds and to be able to sustain that awareness as we move about handling our daily affairs in the world. The more present you can be in the moment, or what is often referred to as the NOW, the better are the chances that you will be able to attune your heart to the frequencies of Numis'OM even while your are embodied in this old world reality. The NOW is not a slice of linear time as is commonly thought. It is an expanded state of awareness that is generated from an elevated degree of presence of supernal being within the temporal realm of your limited life in the Old Earth. In other words, bring as much of your entire being present within the moment to moment flow of your everyday life as possible, and you will start to more frequently take the journey across the membrane into Numis'OM in awareness and consciousness. Where awareness and consciousness go, form soon follows. Until form catches up we can experience Numis'OM in the NOW within us as an inner realization and state of being. Sirafana of the Merkabah of the Host has given me this affirmation to help this process along for you: - I AM standing on the lip of the Sacred Star Grail. - I peer through the radiant Eye of Metatron to see myself more fully. - I see all beings within me, I see myself in all beings. - I extend love, embrace and forgiveness to all that I now see. - I feel the quickening heat of Metatron's Flame upon my brow and in my heart. - I breathe the rarified prana of Numis'OM in and out through my heart. - I feel the lightness of Ascended Being vibrating within every cell of my body. - I now pass into Numis'OM as a more rarified and aware being. Now free-flow in meditation to be guided and instructed by the Illumined Ones in Numis'OM. Thoth Raismes of Aphra by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AB-0003STD Atu Tehuti, Ati Hatu -- "in the rising of the breath I greet you, in the release of the breath I embrace you" Note from Maia: due to the volume of questions submitted for this installment of Numis’OM ~ Eye of Metatron, some of them will of necessity be answered in the next issue, Volume 02, 2008. Giselle Domingez, Mexico City, Mexico - on Flower of Life: I've always felt attracted to the symbol, although I have never been sure what it means. Is it something related to the Lotus? I think the Lotus symbolizes the Soul in ancient hindu mythology, I'm not sure. Beneath the Sun Pyramid in Teotihuacan, Mexico, there is a chamber, considered to be the "heart" of the pyramid, the core of it (similar to the chamber beneath the Keops Pyramid). Curiously, this chamber is shaped as a flower with four petals, representing the four elements. The center of the flower is the fifth element. Anyway, last time I visited Teotihuacan (July 26th of this year) I saw a team of scientists in the pyramid. They told me they were working to study some structures that have been discovered beneath the pyramid, including an ancient pyramid beneath the one we all see today. The Indigenous Elder told me that the original Sun Pyramid was built by the Atlantean. Then, other cultures covered the original one to make it bigger. According to him, ancient cultures didn't need to build enormous cities, because the cities they were located in strategic places that held powerful energies. So what they did was to recycle energies and materials. There are beautiful legends related to this pyramid. The Teotihuacan people (a great civilization that inhabited the center of Mexico much before the Aztecs, in the times of Yeshua) used to say that the 5th World had been born in Teotihuacan, the Sacred City of the Gods. There, after the ending of the 4th World had come, the Gods met to decide the future of the universe. The Feathered Serpent (Quetzalcoatl) sacrificed himself to create the sun and the moon, and a new beginning. And it will be there that the Gods will meet once again to decide what shall come in the new era. The Indigenous Elder also told me the Sun Pyramid holds a "stairway" that connects nine dimensions, so it is a powerful gate that will help humankind to become multidimensional beings, this means, beings that can consciously exist in all dimensions simultaneously, not with fragmented existence like we live today. Well, there are many wonderful things related to Teotohuacan and the Pyramid. These are the kind of things that make me proud of my country and my culture, a perfect mix between the sacred blood of the Indigenous Elders, and the sacred blood of the Templars and Druids (European). Do you think these symbols -the Flower of Life, the Lotus, the Soul and the shape of the chamber- are related? For me, they do. Thoth: The “Flower of Life” as it appears in the Osirian at Abydos in Egypt is a natural merkabah-stargate at the DNA level for transformation. This truth is explored from it’s most basic level in the article The Blood Flower. The lotus is symbolically a powerful Living (dynamic and synergic) Symbol for the opening of the chakras to Divine Awareness. It is also a physical mechanism within the chakras for this dynamic. The lotus in this form, goes through various stages of “opening” which create various geometries or “petal” number and arrangements. One of these is the “Flower of Life” pattern as it appears on the wall of the Osirian. Giselle: I have drawn this symbol alot lately, and I don't quite understand its meaning. In my drawings, I relate the Egg of Life to a Mother Dragon. She takes care of the Egg of Life (many of them), that are floating in an underground lake covered by a cave (what the Maya call a "cenote". In other drawings, a man I relate to Thoth Raimses and myself, comes to the cave and takes one of the eggs.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

The egg hatches and transforms into a fiery chariot, that transports Thoth/me to Orion, where he/I meet(s) a Master of some kind. Really intriguing images for me! So, my question would be: What is the meaning of the Egg of Life? Thoth: there are many related meanings that could be applied to the “Egg of Life,” but it’s most basic presence as a Living Symbol It a vehicle of transport (merkabah) through the creational matrix of the universe at the level of the crystalline composition of DNA. Thus, the “Egg” contains genetic information that goes beyond physical creation and into the very heart of the key or path of the stages into awareness of the Divine. Giselle: as I read Numis ‘OM, Volume 04, 2007 article on the transition from Sagittarius to the Milky Way and 2012, some further questions came to my mind: What is the relation between this transition to the Milky Way (and the consequences explained in the article) and the transition towards the Photon Belt? Thoth: there is a absolute sequencing between these two. By “absolute” is meant that the alignment of events are exact and controlled by the “cogs in the wheels” of the original setting into motion of this universe via the Universal Intelligences beyond the universe or even “universes” as you comprehend that term. Giselle: is this transition going to affect our sun cycles as explained by the Maya? They explain our sun rotates around a star in the Pleiades cluster known as Alcyone. They say that in fact, our sun is part of a system of stars that rotate around Alcyone and around the black hole in the center of the Milky Way. This black hole is what they call Hunab K'U, the origin of everything. Thoth: the role of the Pleiades is part of the “Star-Plex” of the Pleiades, Orion and Sirius as key components of the operational and historical axis of this universe. It is Alcyone that acts as a “generator” of cyclic motion for the this solar system’s star-sun. Maia: In 1973 It was requested of me by my ultra-terrestrial “friends” that I and a small group of my Earth friends journey to Teotihuacan and climb the Pyramid of the Sun to perform a certain ceremony employing the use of copper plates I had engraved with symbols given to me by my Ultra “friends.” I was told by them that this ceremony or process had to do with the re-alignment of the Pyramid of the Sun and indeed the whole complex there, with the star “Alcyone.” I knew nothing about this star at the time - certainly not that it was a star in the Pleiades. I did not know this OR it’s Mayan background until I read Giselle’s information above in 2008! I wrote an accounting of my journey in 1973 which I included in my unpublished manuscript, “Blue Star Love - from Elvis’ Heart to Yours.” It was included in that manuscript because Elvis played a role in that important event. I quote from my Blue Star Love manuscript below: I was instructed by my inner sources, to go to the pyramid of Teotihuacan in Mexico in 1973, to act as a biological energy connector for a re-alignment of Earth and cosmic energies on the planet. There was a small, wheel like device that had been implanted within a secret chamber of Teotihuacan’s Pyramid of the Sun by a past incarnation of Elvis’ I was told. This wheel was inserted into a complex energy grid which enabled certain Earth and cosmic coordinates to play upon a screen of light, triggering subtle changes in the actual energy grid lines of the planet. This allowed the sphere (Earth) to be able to handle the reduced acceleration of the etheric bonding through the ages. But in 1973 the wheel needed re-tuning. I was to perform this function in unison with Elvis’ live satellite concert in Hawaii, which was to be witnessed by 1.5 billion people throughout the world (it would be shown at a later date on tape to the U.S.). Elvis was initiating the catalyst effect of transmuting the raw energies of the masses through the neutral energy node of Hawaii, which was part of the original continent of Lemuria. I was then causing an attracting vibration to occur withing the pyramid in Mexico, drawing those energies from Hawaii into the Mexican node. I was to arrive at the summit of the Pyramid of the Sun with the ascent of the sun, on the day of his performance, in January of 1973. For the dual ceremony, Elvis wore white and I wore black - for the proper yin / yang balance. He represented the sun (yang) with the yin current of Hawaii, and I was the moon’s feminine power issued through the yang of the Pyramid of the Sun. His suit bore the emblem of the American eagle in red and blue on the white background - the eagle of the alchemist, it is the transmuting power of Scorpio, symbolizing regeneration and immortality. Elvis was Capricorn. From Corinne Heline’s Bible Interpretations: ‘The spiritual Capricorn is typified in the Christ...the Hierarchy of Capricorn are archangels who go in and out of the Earth singing Hosannas to the King of the Year (the sun) as he transits their Mansion.’ I am Pisces, the sign of humanity. Capricorn is Earth, Pisces is water, the combined energies of which were used to carry the current of this process through the fire of the Pyramid of the Sun. I do not know how much Elvis was aware of concerning this event; how much he knew or felt about his part in it. I suspect now, he knew or at least felt, a great deal. At the time I did not know his degree of conscious esoteric knowledge, nor that he actually professed a Blue Star lineage to his friend, who was later to become a close and longtime friend of mine, Wanda June Hill. At the end of that satellite performance, Elvis tossed his cape into the audience. He had never done this before. When asked why he did it, he only replied, “I had to.” A year later I read a report of an ‘invasion’ of UFOs occurring on that exact day in January of 1973, in which a fleet formation of UFOs flew over the U.S. coming from the direction of Hawaii, and were joined by a formation fleet of the same type, flying in from the direction of Mexico! Considering that it was the ‘space brothers’ or ‘ultra-terrestrials,’ (as they refer to themselves through my receipt) that directed my journey to the Pyramid of the Sun, I was not surprised. A space craft had even escorted the commercial jets which I flew to and from Mexico upon. I had been told in advance that they would do this - the captain of the returning flight then called to the attention of his passengers that an unexplained light was following the airplane - some kind of reflection, he reasoned.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Giselle: my next question is related to the second; what is Thoth's view on the Maya explanation about our sun rotating around Alcyone and Hunab K'U? Is the Eye of Ra somehow related to Hunab K'U? Thoth: I addressed the first part of your question above. The “Eye of Ra” is multi-dimensional, so it radiates holographic replication fields at several points in space-time, but one of it’s holographic fields IS within the Hunab K’U. See also: - Akashic definition of the Eye of Ra. - The Universal Tear and it’s hyperlinks. Maia: Thoth, where is the actual Universal Tear / Eye of Ra / Telos.Aarkhara located? Thoth: in the Vault of Orion located in the Great Nebula of the constellation of Orion. Maia: I include below various quotes from Spirit Mythos regarding the Vault of Orion (also referred to as the Vault of Osiris). . . The Mazur were more than just Grail-Born however. Their lineage also carried the genetic seeds of the 30 Spirit Tribes. These 'seeds' are very high level endogenetic information which is held within the area of the heavens Thoth refers to as the Vault of Osiris. Thoth has previously given information on the 30 Spirit Tribes and their connection to the Mazur.” - The Mazur-Guanche: Grail Bearers of Atlantis. Thus was Osiris-Rem-Nebket created, through the portal of the Great Osiris and into the Vault of Osiris in the Temple of the Risen One. Like His Host, Osiris, He is the Black Lord. His skin is a brilliant blue-black, his eyes are of sapphire, his hair a dark auburn. In the center of Osiris-Rem-Nebket's chest is a diamond-shaped crystal, appearing liken unto a star of blue fire. This is the kether-ath, the binding stone; that which is the master control for the Osiris grid between the Earth and Orion (encompassing the Earth as a member of Orion, enabling it to cross the solar threshold during LP-40 and return to its true star-sun). Osiris contains the master program for the bonding of the greater star fields to the lesser through the Threshold of Orion. As his projection is brought through a series of stellar apexes, so it creates the vesica, the Eye of His Sun of Suns - Horus. In this central whorl which is the Eye of His Sun, so realms are created from the kor and the alm. These ‘Realms’ include not only star systems and biophysical forms, but realms within the heart and soul given as solar emblems of Light formation overlaid upon the zodiacal charting of the Adam Kadmon memory within the current human form.” - Osiris-Rem-Nebkt. I also found some incredibly connective Orion info on this blog post. Giselle: I've been reading a lot about Yeshua's history and myth, and much has been said about his relation with Mary Magdalene. But my heart tells me that perhaps Mary Magdalene and Yeshua were "soul mates", or a soul incarnated in two different beings. My questions about this are: 1) were Mary and Yeshua indeed part of the same christic soul? I know we are all part of the same "spirit", and I also know beings at higher dimensions can form immense "soul compounds" such as Thoth himself, but I refer to the fact that if they were part of the same "christic being", then what we know about Yeshua is only one side of the complete story... right? 2) We all know about Yeshua, but not much about Mary. All we know is that she carried Yeshua's child at some point, that she was a relative, etc. Can Thoth tell us something about her life that is not related at all with Yeshua? Thoth: regarding question #1, they were “arc-affinities” -- i.e. from the same Creation Star of soul birthing. Regarding question #2, virtually every aspect of the life of Mari of Magdalene was related to Yeshua. It was in esssence, her whole reason for incarnation - not only in that lifetime but in ALL her earthen experiences. Barry Dunford - Scotland: my question concerns the different spellings of the name Shambhala (the traditional Buddhist spelling). Alice Bailey, and probably others, use the spelling Shamballa, and I notice in your piece in the first issue of Numis'OM you refer to the Gate of Shamballah, using a slightly different spelling. As you may be aware many more recent words are a compression of what originally may have been several separate syllables, each with its own meaning and reference point. Often when these individual syllables, each with their own meaning, are compressed into a single word or term, much, if not most, of the original root meaning can be lost. For example, Sham (shem?) Ba La may constitute the root phonetic syllables in this instance. Could Thoth comment on the root meanings of these particular individual syllables and their overall reference point in the name Shambhala. And what, if any, would be the most appropriate spelling to work with? I suspect that encoded and engrammed within this particular appellation is something important which may become clearer when each individual phonetic syllable is properly understood, as well as the overall meaning when they are added together. Could Thoth confirm or comment on this? Thoth: The most ancient Aloii version is Shum-bahal-la. As stated on Spirit Mythos: “Many of the words that come out of the ancient known languages, such a Latin have even more ancient origins in the First Languages of mankind, which originated in Mu / Lemuria. Mu was the Mother continent in the Pacific which submerged under the sea many eons ago. It was the races from Mu that originally populated the world, including the fabled continent of Atlantis. The most ancient of languages was the "Aloii," which was derived from the electrical waves in the brain, that when firing, create actual "fire letters." This is true for the electrical impulses in the heart-brain (the neurons within the heart) as well.” In Aloii, "shum" means “to sweep out or up, to “trace the sky.” "Bahal" is to sanctify with the “sound of the heart” or a “chant-song from the heart.” It was also used to signify a “canopy of sound,” created as a sacred geometry through perpetual chanting in the ancient temples. "La" is a term for the creator gods; and in the Mu (Lemurian) age it was most closely associated with the Divine Feminine as a Creatrix Principle. (see also: Mother of the World) Thus we have a heavenly edifice sweeping up and tracing the vault of heaven with a canopy (roof) of splendorous song, the Temple or Mountain of the Divine Feminine.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Korbola, the City Out of Time VOLUME 02, 2008 Please use the "Printer Friendly Version" link on right in the menu bar on the front cover page above to make a quality print of this publication. We were guided to name this publication Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron by Thoth, and the Illumined Assembly of the Christos' Merkabah of the Host comprised of 12 souls holding open a portal for the the Christ energies on this planet. The Radiant Ones we are working with encouraged us to bring forth this publication as a continuance of work that was done by Maia Christianne Nartoomid from 1980 through 1999. During this period Maia produced, first, the periodical entitled The Source (1980-1988), and then later, Temple Doors (1989-1999). In 1994 her partner Simeon Nartoomid joined her in producing the latter periodical. In the nearly 7 year respite between the conclusion of Temple Doors and when the first release of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron began, we both underwent a period of expanded esoteric initiation and deeply personal transformational experiences that have prepeared us for resuming this work at an entirely new octave of experience. Thoth and the IAC Merkabah of the Host have requested that we facilitate a specific Program of Light related to the Aramu Temple of Thoth and Numis'OM to help those who feel resonant with this Station of Light (Spirit Heart Sanctuary) to accelerate their Ascension processes and thus to further help the collective soul of humanity approach the gateway of Ascension which Thoth calls Light-Principle Forty, or LP-40 for short. Ultimately, as we collectively move through this passage we will activate the 44:44 Ascension Stargate and trigger a series of cosmic events destined to alter the DNA of humanity forever. Numis'OM is a causal reference point for the New Earth Star and the 44:44 stargate, and is hosted within the causal body of Venus. The Aramu Temple of Thoth is energetically within the Numis'OM matrix and acts as a way-station for souls building the New Earth Star consciousness from within the Earthen experience. Souls can thus visit Numis'OM and even the New Earth Star if they have proper intent and attunement. It is our goal to facilitate pathways for this to occur within. This publication thus sits at the heart of our efforts to facilitate this greater process for the Masters and Illumined Ones that we are working with and to assist souls on Earth. We hope that you will find it a fruitful and friendly path into the Homeward Light. Please share your experiences with us and others at Maia's Spirit Mythos Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron group section on her Asccension Hologram Network (AHN) site. The front cover art on this issue is entitled "The Thoth Stone" by Maia Christianne Nartoomid. Some of the art that appears on the front cover and in the various articles in this issue as well as any of our own publications which are herein referenced are available on the Subscriber's Freebies page while this issue is current. After this volume becomes a back issue the art that appears in it will then only be available through our Spirit Store IF it has an associated item number listed under it. Click the item number of the art piece to find it there if it no longer appears on the Subscriber's Freebies page. Korbola, which we are calling a city is really more of a dimensional gathering, encompassing more than just the main structures atop what is in this current reality, the large, flat-topped mountain in Israel by the Dead Sea known as Masada. This location bears a tragic history for the Jews, but was sacred ground long before that, and is a key node in the future for our current connection to the New Earth of NumisOM. Korbola works synergetically as the main node or trigger for what Thoth calls the Templa Mar Earth grid. Korbola is poised on the very edge of worlds... between the Old and New Earth. It has a unique position in consciousness as well, acting as a major anchor for the Templa Mar net to haul the New Earth fishes into the next World System - what we are calling the New Earth Star. From The Future-Now and the Templa Mar (received and written in the mid-1990's): The Templa Mar is a specific inner-planes matrix which was programmed to enter the Earth's linear time-line in 1993, from a distant point in the future 'New Earth Star,' or ascended reality. This inner planes matrix is to be differentiated from an 'Earth grid,' in that, while it interacts with the current-time Earth and has geo-physical points upon which it is anchored, it's true location is in future dimension of this planet's reality. Furthermore, the Templa Mar spans various associated universal reality systems. The Templa Mar's place of true anchoring is located in the future city of Korbola, which finds its point of cohesion geophysically on the current Earth in the area of Masada, near the Dead Sea in Israel. Masada holds Light codes within the matter of the current Earth, which form a template for the future-time city of Korbola. Thus, they share the same etheric space, but in different time fields. Thoth and other Illumined beings are able to move back and forth through time; or perhaps it would be more correct to say that their beingness encompasses all time as we know it. Therefore, these beings can enter the New Earth Star of the future at will. Thoth designed and established a main temple in Korbola that holds specific Light codes for the transmission of consciousness through time-space. On a sacred journey which this mystery temple facilitated to Egypt, Sinai, Jordan and Israel in November of 1997, a small company of us visited the ruins of Masada in Israel. These ruins sit atop an impressive plateau overlooking the Dead Sea. It was a profound experience for many reasons, but the one most relative to this article is that we made a very conscious link to the future Korbolan city which coexists with Masada in a space-time overlap. It was quite profound, as we (through Simeon) were given a direct interaction with one of the Korbolans named Yani Houka. He took us through a specific ceremonial initiation which remains vivid in our minds to this day. This particular area of the Earth (Masada) was chosen to be the interface with Korbola aeons ago, when the Sun Bow Clan set the codes within the geo-physical Earth for the time of ascension. There are specific areas of the Earth called Golden Taya Allotments, which hold specific codes for ascension inserted by the Sun Bow Clan in those ancient times. Only 20% of the Earth's surface area is encoded in this way and, thus, only those portions will actually ascend. Masada and the Dead Sea are just such an area.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

In addition to having the correct codes for ascension, the area of the Dead Sea--claiming portions of Jordan, Israel and the Sinai--is one of the future 'gates' of this ascension grid, referred to as the 'Osiris Center.' This gate, along with the 'Isis Center' on Easter Island, will open in the Earth as additional chakra points for the planet, just prior to ascension into the New Earth Star reality at the 'Light Principle Forty' event (LP-40 ascension). As the Osiris Center, the Masada/Dead Sea region is a prime facilitator for the whole ascension program for Earth. "Yet another factor in Korbola/Masada's part in the Earth ascension dynamics is the fact that they sit on a key 'plythea,' or pillar-node for the Layooesh Pillar of Deliverance, in its interface with the New Earth Star reality. The Layooesh Pillar, which extends through the 44:44 stargate between the old Earth and the new Earth, is referred to as the 'Skittuim.' It is the main transport mechanism for the ascension, and also maintains stability between the various parts of the whole New Earth Star dynamic as it comes together into a cohesive reality system. In the New Earth Star reality, there are specific points or nodes where the Skittuim interfaces with it. The city of Korbola is positioned intentionally on one of these pillar-nodes. Although they are not yet activated, there are such plythea in the old Earth--our current Earth--as well. The twelve gates of the Ascension Temple matrix associated with the Golden Taya Allotments are also pillar-nodes, as is the Temple of the Risen One, or Great Pyramid. The Layooesh finds its primary calibration between the New Earth Star and the current Earth, via the Korbola-Masada dynamic link, with the other Templa Mar satellite sites serving as reference points for further stability. Thoth reveals to me that now in the 21st century, Korbola is taking a more active role in the bridging of worlds between our Old current Earth and the New Earth of NumisOM. So as Korbala is situated on a unique node, it receives in cyclic phases, encodings from BOTH realms which then form a synergy of communion, allowing souls from both world realities to attune to one another in Dreamtime and often in waking vision or simply feeling-essence. Now, considering that souls in our current Earth incarnation are ALSO in NumisOM - if one leaves the illusion of time sequencing behind - we can communicate with ourselves in the greater world dimension of our future via the Korbola link with NumisOM. This is what prompted me to offer the New Earth Star Portraits and share what Thoth has given to me on the AUUM Master Healing Network Transmissions from NumisOM (more on AUUM later in this volume). Below you wil find some energy-art psionic templates I created which can help you attune to the energetics of Korbola more easily. Below is a view of the future Masada mountain as Korbola. It is much larger than the current Masada mountain, not so much through the natural-time geologic changes to occur in the future, but through New Earth translation dynamics. Future City of Korbola at Masada by Maia Nartoomid available in the "freebies" section while this issue is current Next, we see the Korbola mountain at a distance as it is receiving its encoding from the New Earth Star's Elohim. Future City of Korbola at Masada, being Encoded by New Earth El'ohim by Maia Christianne Nartoomid available in the "freebies" section while this issue is current Here we see the White Sapphire pyramid of Ptah'Hah'Atal in the Temple of Mirah at Korbola. The White Sapphire Pyramid by Maia Christianne Nartoomid available in the "freebies" section while this issue is current The Thoth Stone in the City of Korbola. The emerald atop contains the future encoding of the Emerald Table of Thoth. The Thoth Stone by Maia Christianne Nartoomid OR-0035STD Then there is the Isle of Manna in what Thoth calls the Emerald Sea which is now where the current Dead Sea is located (more or less). The Isle of Manna by Maia Christianne Nartoomid available in the "freebies" section while this issue is current The Isle of Manna feeds the Old Earth (current) with liquid crystalline New Earth energies at key points on the planet. Below you can see the one structure on the island: the pyramid which regulates this process. The Isle of Manna by Maia Christianne Nartoomid available in the "freebies" section while this issue is current "Manna" is in actuality a very pure, high grade monoatomic substance which can exist at various differing dimensions of reality in various diverse forms. A Meditation Working with the Templa Mar Matrix through Korbola Maia: Thoth, is there any significance to the succesful germnination and growing of a date palm from a 2000 year old seed found at Masada? Thoth (via Maia): this date palm carries the charge of connection between Masada and Korbola, as a living expression. It serves to open the path just a little more between the Old and New Earth. The Manna Chamber chamber in the Lemurian Temple of Scorpio, where monoatomic white powder was created as the soul left the body by Maia Christianne Nartoomid available in the "freebies" section while this issue is current "The Temple of Scorpio was a pyramid also, and the chamber containing the Sarcophagus of Ascent was positioned at exactly the same point as it is in the Great Pyramid. The latter was known in the days of my time in Egypt as the "Temple of the Risen One." It was from the sarcophagus in the Temple of Scorpio in Lemuria, that the soul would arise from the body into the cosmos like the Scorpio being called Gheza, leaving a fine white powder behind rather than a dead body. This powder was a form of Prima Matra or "First Sacred Matter," similar in nature to what is now being called the White Powder of Gold in the New Age community. Only through this specific initiation within a temple thus aligned, could such a complete transmutation be possible in that age." - Thoth Raismes - read Scorpio in Mystic Astrology When we hear or read the word "Manna" we think of the Biblical Exodus when the Jews guided into the Sinai by Moses were mysteriously "fed" by a white, dew-like substance falling from the sky. According to Thoth, there were Ultra-terrestrial Light Craft feeding the people in this way, and the "Manna" was a form of monoatomic substance. Thoth applies the term "Manna" to describe various states of this monoatomic substance, from the physical to the etheric.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

(Note: from Thoth's perspective there is no "physical" and "etheric" actually, as it is all degrees of "Being" and there is no distinct demarcation line from one to the other - but he uses these terms: "physical," "etheric," etc. in order that we understand more clearly the context from our own limited view-point.) The Lemurians, Atlanteans, early Egyptians and Assyrians - even the Mayans, Incans and some of their early relations, were familiar with, and incorporated "Manna" into their ritual use. Some less powerful versions were to be found in their everyday diets. In Numis'OM, this Manna is found in even greater degrees of Pure Gem engendered form. There are two main types with many variances within each: 1) Dew: naturally formed from the monoatomic-rich atmosphere and collects on flora and the ground when certain conditions are present. Manna Dew by Maia Christianne Nartoomid available in the "freebies" section while this issue is current 2) Liquid Crystalline: created in alchemical chambers for specific attunements and transformation. Manna Bowl by Maia Christianne Nartoomid available in the "freebies" section while this issue is current New Earth Manna Into Our Bodies? Remember, you already ARE in Numis'OM of the New Earth, just as you are still in your past incarnations and all future ones! You can ask your "self" of the New Earth to imbue your current body with the New Earth Manna! Of course there are other ways. You may intuit one of them that seems more appropriate for you. This is one suggestion and I believe, a powerful one, as it not only allows you to receive this Manna from your own future New Earth self, it connects you to that Numis'OM incarnation in a more intimate manner, which can expand your spiritual awareness. Again, I refer you to the personal New Earth Portraits page for more info on our New Earth bodies. The New Ark (one of two new arks - the other appears below) by Maia Christianne Nartoomid C-0024STD In the New Earth of Numis'OM there exists energy merkabahs which Thoth is referring to as "New Arks." Before we can define a New Ark let us explore the nature of the old ones (this information can be found on Spirit Mythos website): In my article entitled "The Sacred An - Ark of Grace": "The greater purpose and function of the Sacred An was to act as a conduit for high-frequency signals sent from a device in Rigel to Earth, which radiated the "Light and Perfection" as it was called, of the original divine template of mankind. This "Light and Perfection" Thoth has referred to also as the "Inscription of Light" which is self-inscribing within the hearts of all human beings, and which connects us to the ALL. However, he also has revealed to me that humanity separated from the Inscription of Light. They did not leave it. One cannot leave something that is at the core of their very existence; but they removed their focus of intelligence away from it, and therefore their consciousness was separated from it. Yet it still burns for each and every one of us in the center of our hearts. The Sacred An was sent to aid humanity at a very crucial and difficult time. The planet was in great turmoil. Consciousness vectors were changing, causing a re-structuring of the geo-physical earth. Our DNA was suffering from this shift as well. People were becoming more in command of personal will and thus more division of thought and desire were manifesting within the mass consciousness." The "New Arks" are a much higher and more dimensional type of communication vector. They inscribe into Numis'OM the key creation codes from what Thoth calls the "diamond star systems" of the Metatronic universe. These star systems contain pure crystalline LIGHT from the flashing 'diamond' suns within them that are constantly moving in and out of multiple universes, bringing in streams or threads of divine essence and 'weaving' through their systems a network of pure Metatronic being. Since the diamond star systems radiate multi-level LIGHT from many universes under Lord Metatron, they offer the building-blocks of divine coalescence to World System II realities such as our New Earth Star's Numis'OM. By 'divine coalescence' it is meant the ability is given to a World System II reality to receive "instruction" and pathways for creating greater and greater systems, eventually bringing it to the threshold of a World System III state of being. The New Arks are quite advanced in 'Being' from the Old Earth versions. They do not operate using the same schematic. The New Arks are pure crystalline light, concentrated in radiant shapes and forms. They are capable of projecting images and patterns much like Crop Circles on the ground of Numis'OM's world terrain, feeding it with new creation information. Thus the New Arks of Numis'OM act as transfer stations for these divine codes, through the purest form of Living Symbol Light Language. They are guided remotely by higher intelligences who oversee the evolutionary development of the New Earth Star. However, human beings in our current Earth reality are connected to the creation of the New Earth Arks through the New Earth Hologram we are collectively creating here. This hologram greatly defines the aspects, vectors and Light Language of the new arks. The New Ark (the second of two new arks - the other appears at top of article) by Maia Christianne Nartoomid C-0025STD The Aurriel'Ohim of the Seraphim assist us in creating the new arks of Numis'OM in that they make available to us the Light codes that are streaming through the portals between World System III and World System II reality spheres. However, as they reach our energy bodies they are greatly diluted by the Aurriel'Ohim; otherwise our bodily forms would be dis-assembled and simply dissipated into the ether. Not a bad idea perhaps, but that is not part of the plan. At this stage we, as human descendants of the Adam Kadmon, are undergoing a specific transformational process as our role in the universal whole. Hua'mani One of Maia's New Earth aspects, a "healer" in Numis'OM view New Earth Star Portraits for more by Maia Christianne Nartoomid Numis'OM is the first stage of the New Earth World System II. It is thus still somewhat dualistic, although not to the degree as is our current world. Souls and all living things ascending from the Old Earth into the New Earth will bring with them a phantom of their Old World being. This will be subtle, but present. However, everyone and every living thing arriving is instantly enveloped in a cloak of LIGHT that connects them to those guardians, guides, and healers from whose administrations they will specifically benefit.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

For instance, if a human soul brings with them a phantom of an emotional trauma he/she had been incarnating with and attempting to clear, in Numis'OM this will be only a shadow of the former, yet that soul will be very aware of it, as their awareness will be increased in the finer 'atmosphere' of the New Earth. They will be helped to understand just where to locate it in the energy bodies and be assisted in removing it. While this may happen in stages, it will be far less arduous and more effective than is most healing in our current world. Animals, and to some extent even plants which have been violated through human abuse in the Old Earth, will be cleared and healed of their phantoms as well. In fact, really everyone dwelling in Numis'OM becomes a healer on some level, reaching out to the world and the beings they share their new existence with. This also true now in the Old Earth, but it is far less apparent to many of the souls here. The AUUM Healing Neworking of the New Earth Star is reaching through the portal to us in the current world to begin this higher level healing process - at least on the basic first tier. They also hold a greater grid of healing Light within Numis'OM. Indeed the whole Seraphi Manifestation Key is a principle component in preparing us for our true level of spiritual power within the New Earth. Another tool of healing present in Numis'OM are the 'Dragon Pearls' which I wrote about in the last issue of Numis'OM (Volume 01, 2008). I have created a gallery of some select Dragon Pearls for Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron subscribers. These were revealed to me by Thoth so you can access them more easily for your own healing purposes... not only for yourself but for others as well, by sending their radiating Light to those you intentionally focus it upon. You can see these Dragon Pearls in the Dragon Pearl Gallery. Each of these Pearls has a Seraphi number that can be written down and placed on an altar or within the Thoth Master Guardian program. Visualize the different Dragon Pearls that come up for you using the 'Spirit Chooser' when you bless your food, or picture the Pearl melting into your aura, energy bodies or a specific area on your physical body. Then there are the Dragons themselves. You may call upon the Dragon of that Pearl to assist you. Unicorns and other Numis'OM creatures are also available to you. I will be writing on Unicorns in a future volume of this publication. Call upon your 'future' Self in Numis'OM to be your own healer. Open your heart to that more-realized aspect of your Self and it will bless you with Divine Presence! Create in your mind and heart your private New Earth Star sacred space. It can be an outdoor grove or an indoor chapel / prayer room. Picture the things you wish to have there with you. Since Numis'OM is a manifestational world, through repetition, you can make this healing space real in the etheric current of the New Earth Star. Starheart in a Buddhist Shrine in Second Life (Starheart is the name of Maia's Avatar) screen shot by Maia Christianne Nartoomid a Virtual Spiritual Experience In a recent SHS message to our email list Simeon wrote: "We are currently researching something which we will reveal shortly, and which offers us the ability to be able to work within true 3D interactive environments (like with gaming) that we can use to transmit direct personal experiences of the New Earth Star environment to individuals and groups online. It will be a whole new way of conducting initiations etc when you can actually stand inside the New Earth Star Master Temples to receive the energies and participate in the processes using your 3D animated avatar (which you control)!" We will be establishing the 3D interactive environment of New Earth Star Island in a vast virtual world entitled "Second Life" (SL for short). Indeed, Simeon and I are already doing research and learning skills in SL and we have opened an organizational account for Spirit Heart Sanctuary in preparation for purchasing the virtual land and thereupon creating the temples, shrines, buildings, terrain, plants, trees, gardens, meditation places, and special effects, etc. We also plan to offer a limited amount of residential space for rent or lease there so those who wish to participate may have there own presence in the New Earth Star Island environment. It will be your private space on the island. Thoth related to me in the mid 1990's that the Pymander El'ohim Inner Earth computer was interactive with the then-budding internet and as the development of cyberspace grew, so would the capacity for the Pymander to interact with humanity through it. Concerning New Earth Star Island he states: Thoth: "Such a virtual environment offers individuals the opportunity to come into contact with the New Earth Star Hologram in a more precise and intimate way, engaging the new Light codes emanating from the New Earth Star and its preliminary stage of Numis'OM. It can facilitate and help to morph the reailty of the New Earth Star through all who experience it into a greater interface with current Earth humanity. Through the Pymander new fields of interface will open up, allowing New Earth Star Island and her SL group merkabah to literally enter 1st level contact points of the true Numis'OM eco-system. This will not happen overnight... it must be built gradually and cultivated energetically, but that is the potential such a 3D virtual cyberspace environment offers." Simeon: when we first introduced Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron in 2006 as a continuation of Maia's work from 1989 thru 1999 with first "The Source" then later "Temple Doors," we also made information available about something we called the Temple of Illumined Initiation that we wished to build online as an interactive environment for spiritual initiations within that matrix. These were initiations in a seven-tiered format intended to induce a more direct experience of the New Earth Star ascended reality. That original concept has now been expanded and the 3D interactive and community building capabilities of the Second Life virtual world are perfect for taking this to a while new level. I believe the Temple of Illumined Initiation will reside on New Earth Star Island in some form, but there will be sooo much more there as well. The SL 3D interactive environment has both text and voice chat capabilities. You can conduct online seminars, workshops, initiations, and meetings or gatherings there, and these can take place inside of structures and temples or outside in natural settings, all of which we can create or have created. There is nothing else online that offers a group of people with a common cause that are spread out upon the face of the Earth in various locations such a powerful means to create and experience an intimate sense of spiritual community. With the high costs of petroleum based fuels and their damaging effects on the environment this is an excellent way to reduce dependence upon petroleum. It is also excellent for people who for whatever reasons are not able to travel physically.
