# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

This environment also allows us to start on creating this environment with far less financial commitment than what we had originally envisioned for the Temple of Illumined Initiation. It will therefore be far more achievable and we can build it in stages as we go and it will still be viable for use along the way whereas this would not have been the case with our original plan. I am also being guided to mention herein that there will be opportunities for others who feel dedicated to engage this project to more directly participate in what we are doing than ever before. I therefore encourage you to have a look at Maia's article and galleries at the link below and to see if you may be guided to get started learning SL. There are many skills to learn there if you wish to co-create, but you also do not have learn anything but the basics about your avatar and moving from one place to another, chatting etc in order to participate in what we will be offering here in the near future. These basic skills can be learned fairly quickly and we possibly will also be offering some sort of orientation classes to bring people up to speed to be able to effectively participate in workshops, seminars, initiations and gatherings in this incredible virtual world environment. Read more about this project and view Maia's Second Life snapshot galleries. Thoth Raismes of Aphra by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AB-0003STD Atu Tehuti, Ati Hatu -- "in the rising of the breath I greet you, in the release of the breath I embrace you" Kathleen Millar - Vancover Island, B.C, Canada: what are the differences and/or similarities between the energies we've labeled as Anti-Christ, dark/negative, feminine and primal. Thoth: the "Anti-Christ" is an energy presence that operates on the planet through an individual in certain eras as a focal point for the imbalances of all humans on the planet. That individual is a vessel for all the mis-alignments that have come to a "boiling point" and thus need an avenue of release. As the Anti-Christ personage he/she is always in a prominent world role to "stir the pot" and thus humanity MUST deal with these issues instead of blindly ignoring them. Kathleen Millar: is the prophecy about the Archangel Stone and the 'face off' of Christ and Lucifer an actual event that will occur in the physical universe or is it solely a metaphor about the reconciliation of positive and negative within each individuals' DNA? Thoth: It will largely be an energy-shifting as a result of multiple outer "role playing" events. Simeon: what Thoth is saying here is that it is largely metaphorical, yet the metaphor has a very real energetic basis and it will play out on various dimensions of reality and within the experience of many beings. Kathleen Millar: in both instances (as metaphor or physical event) it feels to me as if the Christ energy is more than the representation of positive energy/light. It feels to me that the Christ energy is actually the end result of the reconciliation of the positive and the negative. The 'ascension' beyond duality. If this is correct can you please explain how then Christ and Lucifer are Twin Rays and seemingly opposites in this prophecy? Thoth: Lucifer, meaning "Light Bearer" carries out his role, just as did Judas. He is not the "bad one." He has created a path of return and the Christ will receive the "Light Bearer" in the final stages of eschaton on the planet. Simeon: Kathleen, you are correct in that the Office of the Christ is about "redemption." I do not mean this in a religious context wherein their is a doctrine defining what redemption is or may be. I mean this in a very pragmatic way. In other words it is like when you have a discount coupon to save money at the store on something. That coupon has an intrinsic value, but until you "redeem" it that value is not realized. Therefore, the Christ energy is about bringing everything into a state of balance wherein this intrinsic value of all things can be realized, and then this results in what is being referred to as Christ consciousness. If you look at the most widely used symbol for the Christ, the fish and its unique representation, you can see that it is formed from the overlap of two circles (2D) or spheres (3D). This represents the bringing together of the human and the spirit worlds into a harmonious merging and the shape that is formed is referred to as the vesica pisces. Actually there is an even more involved representation related to the three souls of the Kabbalah (Nephesh, Ruach and Neshemah), but that is an article unto itself. The fatter the fish the better because at some point the fish becomes a single circle when both realities have fully overlapped and thus converged. The usual fish symbol is a snapshot in time of this ongoing process and one that was taken a long time ago. This does not render the power of the sacred geometry of the vesica pisces obsolete, but we have to understand that all sacred geometric symbols are but static representations of living light forms with specific harmonics represented geometrically. I hope that helps flesh out your understanding a bit better. Kathleen Millar: Thoth, in your update about the Seraphi Manifestation Key, I was VERY interested in the section about the future alignment of the Tribe of Judah "geometry" and the Middin Chamber. What astro-physical alignment needs to occur for this to happen? Also, do you have any sense of what the Tribe of Judah looks like? If anything... you say its a function but I'm wondering if there is a symbol to represent that function. Perhaps we are already familiar with it? Thoth: The astro-physical alignment of the 'Judah' geometry with the Great Pyramid will occur when the constellation of Leo has a magnetic event occur within it, sending these waves to earth. Brenda McCann - Idaho, USA: Doesn't everyone have an "Atoma"? And if so, why can't they also be all that is and no thing to their heart's content like I can? Why on Earth don't they want to be? Thoth: yes, everyone has an Atoma which is located in space-time as an energy center just below the heart chakra and several inches out in the aura from the surface of the physical body. Its exact location varies in different individuals, some having it closer to the heart (higher) than others. Each person performs a function of receiving, releasing and realizing the I AM of All Being. They are not intended in this process to be like one another. Judgment of the different roles that souls play in this dynamic has no purpose in the true understanding of life. Simeon: Brenda, it is important to realize that each of us has chosen a very different and unique vehicle for our journey here on Earth. Some have chosen to drive Ferarri's, others Volkswagons, and still others family sedans etc. The potential of those beings that travel within those vehicles is the same, always, yet the vehicles they have chosen for this ride differ greatly.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Each soul has a purpose for being here, different qualities and characterisitics of Divinity that the soul is here to develop within its experience for the benefit of the whole collective of humanity. This is what the Understanding Your Cosmic Code session work I offer explores. Therefore it is important to not think that because you can do something well, that everyone else should be able to so as well, that is not quite fair. You wouldn't expect the driver of a Volkswagon to be able to do on the road what the driver of a Ferrari can do so it is a good practice to lend the same basic understanding and lattitude to other incarnate beings as well. One of the main problems humanity faces in moving to the next phase of the planetary ascension is in being able to move beyond identification with the tools we are using here on Earth. Your personality, your consciousness and your human vehicle are tools you are using, they do not define you as a being. This is much like a healer that uses a crystal. The crystal is only a tool, it is not the source of the healing. Likewise, who you may think you are in this world is not the source of your gifts and abilities, you simply have a vehicle that allows certain Divine attributes to shine forth through it. There is a Divine Purpose in this, others get to witness those attributes being demonstrated and they can then incorporate whatever of that they need, but it will not be expressed the same way as it is for you. Faith Starlight - Canada: in my Eye of Ra Session yesterday the following occurred: Todays session begins with me standing in a place/space of unknowness. I see emerald light all around me the same color as one of my Dragon Pearls. There is a slight shift and now I am holding both of my Dragon Pearls in my hands. The green one is in my right hand and the blue one is in my left hand. Before I can blink, they merge their fields of light together but instead of turquoise appearing I am now surrounded by a field of Silver White. Then I sense movement and looking up I see the Milky Way. It appears sort of fuzzy and unfocused to me. I move into this wonderful place with all of the movement of energies that comprises it. I find myself in its center and as I do everything moves into clarity and the energies, shapes and forms all seem to stand firmer and move freer within their orbits. Then I move out of this wonderfulness and turning I see different patterns but they are all weirdly shaped and out of kilter. As I move up near them each one slowly moves into a balanced form and shape with clarity and grace apparent now. As I watch in astonishment, the thought running through me is balancer of universes. I look to the two pearls I am holding in wonderment for together they bring balance to any universe. As I form this thought within me, this scene fades from my view. Would Thoth comment on this for me? How does one become a "balancer of universes"? I know I was shown this because this is what we each need to understand how to be and to become. Do we become these pearls or are we these pearls already needing only to understand how to move in this flow of energy to become centered in any universe? Thoth: every soul is a "balancer of the universe." They each contain an aspect of the key of the illusion of separation and the unity of the ALL. As they move toward the center of their being through spiritual process and expanded awareness, so this role is more evident to them. Yet as incarnated individuals, each person is unique in just how they choose to out-picture that role. The Dragon Pearls help one (especially those sensitive to them) to connect to this reality. See the Dragon Pearl Gallery) Raha Sovereign - Illinois, USA: I have a question regarding the Numis' OM New Earth Star. I know this has formed. My question: is there going to be a transferring of people TO this New Earth Star, or is this happening in some other way? Thoth: if you remove your perspective from 'time' you are already there. Within the linear time field, it is yet to happen, and when it does the humanity incarnate at the time on this Earth will ascend their physical bodies into the 'New Earth' of Numis'OM... IF THEY CHOOSE TO DO SO. Ref: New Earth Star and Numis'OM Volume 1, 2006, article Numis'OM, The Temple of Aramu and the Shamballah Gate Raha Sovereign: I feel changes happening within myself, but do not understand when I hear people say that there are thousands of ships encircling the Earth now in order to take people who are ready 'off' to a midway station and then to a new Earth, which they call Terra. Thoth: Mass evacuation of Earth via 'spaceship' is wishful thinking and not a reality. Raha Sovereign: so from what you know, is Numis'OM, the New Earth Star going to be heaven on Earth, HERE? Or somewhere else? Thoth: it is not within this dimensional realm, however it's location will be within the Blue Star Rigel in Orion. See this notation. Simeon: Raha, if you think of this in terms of vibration and harmonics it will be helpful. In terms of what actual manifestation, or more accurately what perception of that manifestation we will have, trying to know about that is very problematic. This is because that is all highly dependent upon so many factors. Reality is very plastic in nature and higher dimensions of reality are especially so. In fact there will be certain safeguards held in place by the Masters in the early stages of the New Earth Star like Numis'OM wherein the beings there will not be able to do any accidental harm to themselves or others until they learn how to manage their energies properly. If every energy we emanated from within ourselves resulted in a concrete manifestation instantly, think of what would be happening here right now. The world would be destroyed very quickly, so we actually have this lag called karmic return which is a form of protection. Also, as the info Maia provided a link to above indicates we can have the current Earth, Numis'OM, and the New Earth Star all existing at the same coordinates of space, provided their time and dimensional coordinates differ, and in this case they do. Therefore it is entirely possible that the New Earth Star will be both within the Blue Star Rigel and in the same space coordinates we are at now. Why, because it will have multiple time and dimensional coordinates. Roger Lawson - Swizterland: twice whilst working, when holding the feeling of sacredness in the heart (the high heart), the heart seems to have connected with spiritual realms and expressed that which resonated into being. The heart makes a strange movement, difficult to explain, but it is like it suddenly connects with that which is held in God, encapsulates it and then pushes it out into creation in a strange movement, possibly involving turning inside out.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Or, it reaches out to what is to be created, sort of folds it within the fold of the heart and then, sort of spits it out out into creation. It is all done with the heart. Both times it happened without any forethought other than a general intention to serve the wellbeing of the planet and others. It seems to be an "effulgence" of God working through the human heart. Secondly, in meditating with Thoth's mantram UTU RA HU MATA SULATA, with a focus on the heart, I seem to find myself on a sea similar to that painted in the Amatrix Angels portrait of "The Gate of Venus: we journey home" - the turquoise sea and the orange rock island. Are we also the treasures ships mentioned in Thoth's New Year's message, what we bring with us as we journey home? Maia, you can add this to the questions for Thoth please - is he able to confirm what any relationship is here? Thoth: Roger, you are experiencing the "turning-inside-out" of the heart chakra in response to the VENUS PILLAR OF LIGHT as it now pulses through the Earth grids. This "turning-inside-out" is actually a function of a tetranome. More and more persons will have times of experiencing this sensation as the synergy of Earth souls and the New Earth Star come into being. Faith Starlight - Canada: uniting the two hearts, the High Heart and the Physical Heart, I feel/sense that this becomes "The One Heart" through which we all are striving to reach or to be. Creation then will come through this Heart once the Will Center moves into the Heart too. Most find their Will Center is in their Solar Plexus. I felt mine move into the heart a few months before the session with the High Heart merging with the Physical to become "The One Heart." Maia, would Thoth have any comments on this too? Sometimes what I sense and feel is so different then what I expect that I sometimes find I really have to stretch myself to understand what has happened and why. Thoth: See my answer to Roger on this subject, Faith. Also, the sense of a completely different feeling... beyond the logic-senses you now contain is part of the process of the human element as a whole receiving new sense-forms, those that will open to them their "New Earth" realities. Nurture them and allow them to grow in your Garden of Love! Simeon: Faith, in the Human Design system, or the version that I am working with which I call "Cosmic Design," there are nine centers not seven and this is derived from the Hindu Brahman system. In this system the heart is the center of ego and will and there is another center Human design labels as the "G-Center" which is about love and direction. Much could be discussed about this, but the point I wish to share with you is that all the systems and models we have for understanding things and how they work here are all limited by the plane of awareness that created them. Therefore, we tend to do best when we adopt the attitude that anything we perceive is in fact not necessarily as it seems. So what you describe regarding just going with what you are experiencing directly, and allowing the mind to stretch as far as it will go to TRY to understand it, is a good approach when combined with a clear understanding that no matter what the human mind does it will NEVER see the whole picture at this current time in our evolution. Its just not possible right now, and I felt a great weight lift years ago when I finally accepted that. Now, I am faced with it at other levels, its an ongoing God job it is! LOL Fredaricka Yarom - Israel: what are the 7 scrolls of Babylon, is this a record of the beginning of times, how does it differ to the Lemurian scrolls. Now that the energies of the 7 scrolls of Babylon are activated was this a trigger for the further raising of planetary consciousness as part of our ascension process in that its pattern/matrix is now part of the ethers. Is there any connection with the scrolls of Babylon and the Stargate of Iraq. How does this stargate assist us with planetary ascension. Who looks after this stargate, most precious Lord Metatron and the precious Arcturians? Thoth: The "Babylon Scrolls" are Akashic scrolls which hold the keys and codes for what lies within and below the Chamber of Aph'ta'hak. Read about the Lemurian Scolls of the Aka Terma. These contain different encodings. The Scrolls of Babylon contain the New Earth encodings for not only Iraq, but the Middle East. They are held in guardianship by the Tashsab'va - The Orion Blue Fire Command. Maia: Tom (Sharples), in your blog you say: "The reason why the dodecahedron is chosen is because it corresponds with the 5th element of ether and is sometimes referred to as the Christ Grid." This is interesting, as Thoth has stated to me that the dodecahedron is the MAIN grid of the Earth in the sense that it acts as a "exoskeleton" for the planet. Tom Sharples - Great Brittain: Would you agree that the dodecahedron is corresponding with, or the same as, the "causal body" of the Earth? I note that in Numis'OM you have Venus fulfilling this role. If this is so, I can understand it by using the qabalistic system of Four Worlds (a whole tree of life in each world) in that in the lowest world of Assiah, the Earth's causal body would be surrounding the Earth, as part of its aura. In the next world up, Yetzirah, the Earth's causal body would indeed be of the Solar System and correspond to Venus as Netzach, before moving into the Sun as Tipareth. Can you make head or tail of any of this Maia? Taking it to Thoth: The dodecahedron fulfills the current World System I planetary format of Earth. It receives it's 'coordinates' through it's guardian Venus. Your qabalistic assessment does fit this format, as do some other variations. The New Earth Star as a World System II planet uses multiple geometries as 'main' programming vehicles, depending on the level. Numis'OM is the first level of the New Earth. It's geometric merkabah is the Star Tetatrahedron. This is significant as the Star Tetrahedron is the 'Loci' or generating merkabah for the Roil Point (19.5) of the planet. See also this link. Simeon: Venus is Earth's guardian according to Thoth and both were translated into this Solar system from the Blue Star Rigel in Orion. However, what we are talking about there is in its essence (versus form) that the energy templates of planetary consciousness for these two planetary spheres originated in Orion. These are overlaid upon the aspect of these planets that originates from this solar system.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Venus is intimately interlinked with the harmonic vibrational reality of the Earth and resides at an octave of expression that places it into a clear role of serving, for all intents and purposes, as Earth's causal body. However, the Earth does have its own causal energy body, its just that it is quite integral with the sphere of influence Venus exerts upon the Earth at that level. Chris Bartus - Wisconson, USA: I have question regarding some of our technological advances. As you know I am studying a degree in computers and as such I must stay savvy on the latest innovations. One struck me as almost scary yet exciting. We have begun building computers out of DNA that answer us by forming in different sequences, and as of right now can decode people genes and tell what diseases or illnesses one may have and in future make self replication organic doctors in our bodies that can modify and repair damaged cells. It will also unlock the doors to programming a human brain. I am wondering what role this will play in the genetic evolution of our species and if it has a part in our ascension? Thoth: humans in this current Earth are opening to greater fields of knowledge through the natural process of planetary transformation. However, knowledge is not wisdom, and the latter is also being developed - yet at a slower pace, for one must go deeper to receive wisdom than knowledge. Thus there will be certain convolutions and mal-alignments in the process of wedding knowledge with wisdom within science, as science develops rapidly, being drawn into focus by the urgency of the New Earth field building and connecting within the Old. Nevertheless, such DNA computers are a step toward interacting with DNA in a more personal and direct manner. This will lead scientists to new and surprising realms they have never dreamed existed. This is already beginning to occur in quantum physics, and the dynamics of DNA is at the core of the human quantum factor, and will be essential in the Ascension of the human being into the New Earth Star. Amanda Viola - Spain: what do the souls that gather as a soul family have in common between them, especially those that are actively present in the actual evolutionary process leading to the Ascension of the planet to a higher octave of vibration? Thoth: they share a common thread of purpose and an Alpha and Omega point. See this 'purpose' as a string stretched between the 'Beginning' and the 'End' of a specific process. With Soul Families the 'process' is their creation as 'Souls' (Beginning) and their assimilation back into the ONE (End). Amanda Viola: do all the souls of one family need to be incarnated to develop their function? Thoth: no, they do not. Remember, Soul Families 'nest' in merkabahs, one inside the other; each one on a different vibrational level. Even within that one level there are sub-levels. So all souls in a complete 'Family' are not all needing to incarnate to fulfill their purpose. Amanda Viola: once in Numis'OM, will these soul families go on developing the same kind of function towards the subsequent process of evolution to the New Earth Star? Thoth: yes, they will. It will go on and on in your perception of 'time.' Yet ultimately, ALL souls come from the ONE, so all souls are of the 'Family of One.' When we speak about 'Soul Family Merkabahs' we are simply opening the door to this understanding by relating that the nesting closest to you is what your soul is most identified with, and thus with those souls it contains. Simeon: Soul Families and working with them thus represent a stepping stone, a transition into the greater field of Unity Awareness and Consciousness. They facilitate this movement because they allow beings experiencing individuation and separative states to start experiencing a sense of unity and parity with other beings on a very intrinsic level that goes beyond blood family bonds on the Earth. Faith Starlight: Thoth, you stated previously that: There are souls who have incarnated in genetics which exemplify specific key planetary "soul-races." When these souls are quickened via the Middin Chamber, they will then become a bio-transmitter for the codes of quickening to be broadcast into the Race Spirits of the soul-races on the planet which they embody. This mass quickening will then further release the redemptive codes of many other souls incarnated upon the Earth. However, some of these souls will not respond to this calling, because either their systems will be shut down to the Adam Kadmon vibration within their DNA due to excessive denial of Spirit, or their DNA will have become too contaminated to receive the signal. Can or will those souls unable to perform their agreed upon function be able to pass their codes to others or are the codes so contaminated that it is impossible? Thoth: these "shut down" souls will have made several choices that bring them to that moment. They will then have to move into another World System I reality to continue their awakening. Faith Starlight: if they (the codes) cannot be passed, can others take upon themselves the task, with the agreement of those responsible for seeing these codes are released (Thoth and others like Metatron and Michael) and carry this forward instead. Could not the codes be granted to anyone willing and able to do this as a "back-up" so to speak? Thoth: the whole transformation process of Ascension into Numis'OM creates new codes for the New Earth. These new codes are more cohesive and mutable. Faith Starlight: would other energies, those of trees, mountains, and/or animals be able to assist in this as well because in the Oneness are they not also affected by the releasing of these codes? Could they not step forth, if they so choose to, and ask to do this service? Thoth: all will become ONE in LOVE and PRESENCE, sharing and assisting (Maia: also see the article on healing in this issue). Faith Starlight: thanks Maia and Thoth. Bowing in gratitude. Tom Sharpley: regarding the latest Timely Transmission from Thoth... yesterday I read an online science article called: "Earth's Hum Sounds More Mysterious Than Ever." In the past, the oscillations that researchers found made up this hum were "spheroidal" they basically involved patches of rock moving up and down, albeit near undetectably. Now oscillations have been discovered making up the hum that, oddly, are shaped roughly like rings. Imagine, if you will, rumbles that twist in circles in rock across the upper echelons of the planet, almost like dozens of lazy hurricanes. Scientists had actually expected to find these kinds of oscillations, but these new ring-like waves are surprisingly about as powerful as the spheroidal ones are. The expectation was they would be relatively insignificant. So I was wondering if there is any link here to what you call 'Zeta Rings?' Thoth: they are the same in principle as to how they operate, yet different in purpose.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

The 'ring oscillations' coming from inside the Earth are not created by "patches of rock moving up and down." Yes, the rock does move, but it is doing so in response to the oscillation of the central sun atoma of the Inner Earth (inter-dimensional, but effecting this dimension directly). PLEASE NOTE: if you wish to ask questions of Thoth relating to anything you read in this publication, or about planetary and cosmic happenings that you would like more clarity on, please submit your questions to me (Maia). I will attune to Thoth and will print his responses to those questions he selects to answer in the following issue of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron. I cannot promise that all questions will be answered, but I will do my best to accommodate those with the greatest universal scope and importance. I will give you credit for the questions as well unless you request anonymity.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

New Earth Star Dance VOLUME 03, 2008 Please use the "Printer Friendly Version" link on right in the menu bar on the front cover page above to make a quality print of this publication. We were guided to name this publication Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron by Thoth, and the Illumined Assembly of the Christos' Merkabah of the Host comprised of 12 souls holding open a portal for the the Christ energies on this planet. The Radiant Ones we are working with encouraged us to bring forth this publication as a continuance of work that was done by Maia Christianne Nartoomid from 1980 through 1999. During this period Maia produced, first, the periodical entitled The Source (1980-1988), and then later, Temple Doors (1989-1999). In 1994 her partner Simeon Nartoomid joined her in producing the latter periodical. In the nearly 7 year respite between the conclusion of Temple Doors and when the first release of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron began, we both underwent a period of expanded esoteric initiation and deeply personal transformational experiences that have prepeared us for resuming this work at an entirely new octave of experience. Thoth and the IAC Merkabah of the Host have requested that we facilitate a specific Program of Light related to the Aramu Temple of Thoth and Numis'OM to help those who feel resonant with this Station of Light (Spirit Heart Sanctuary) to accelerate their Ascension processes and thus to further help the collective soul of humanity approach the gateway of Ascension which Thoth calls Light-Principle Forty, or LP-40 for short. Ultimately, as we collectively move through this passage we will activate the 44:44 Ascension Stargate and trigger a series of cosmic events destined to alter the DNA of humanity forever. Numis'OM is a causal reference point for the New Earth Star and the 44:44 stargate, and is hosted within the causal body of Venus. The Aramu Temple of Thoth is energetically within the Numis'OM matrix and acts as a way-station for souls building the New Earth Star consciousness from within the Earthen experience. Souls can thus visit Numis'OM and even the New Earth Star if they have proper intent and attunement. It is our goal to facilitate pathways for this to occur within. This publication thus sits at the heart of our efforts to facilitate this greater process for the Masters and Illumined Ones that we are working with and to assist souls on Earth. We hope that you will find it a fruitful and friendly path into the Homeward Light. Please share your experiences with us and others at Maia's Asccension Hologram Network (AHN) site. The front cover art on this issue is entitled "New Earth Dance" (a composite artwork) by Maia Christianne Nartoomid. ANNOUNCEMENT: as of this issue all references to Thoth will now appear as "ThothHorRa" because he has requested of Maia that she use this new vibrational signature for him for the next stage of planetary ascension unfoldment. and the New Earth Star As many of you know, Simeon and I (and Thoth) have expanded the Spirit Merkabah which we create together into the virtual cyber-world of Second Life. In this world we have begun and will continue to build, the NEW EARTH STAR ISLAND ESTATE (NESIE) for our ever-growing New Earth Star Community in Second Life. Links to more about the New Earth Star's presence in Second Life are to be found at the end of this article. Thoth in his new form-vibration as 'ThothHorRa' has informed me that he now wishes to be referred to as a present entity as 'ThothHorRa' (rather than 'Thoth Raismes') - not just within Second Life. He has now manifested the 'ThothHorRa' form-vibration with the New Earth. You will notice that this volume of Numis-OM is almost entirely ThothHorRa speaking to the reader... or at least that is my perception, which is all one can ever claim in life. - Maia ThothHorRa: as I continue to work in the form of ThothHorRa within the virtual reality of Second Life among the New Earth Star Community, I am able to build Light Language engendered code connections with individuals that was not possible for me previously, since I left the dimension in which you currently dwell. The reason for this is that now 'ThothHorRa' is able to come face-to-face with groups and individuals within the virtual world. I am able to 'touch' them in that world - avatar to avatar. These 'avatars' become as real merkabah vessels for the individuals animating them the more they 'inhabit' them. This is most especially true if the person intends it to be. I stress here that it is not a matter of escaping the real world (RL). Second Life (SL) is a part of the real world... it was conceptualized and created in that world and is therefore an extension of it. One can abuse the privilege of RL anytime one wishes to... and that goes for such virtual realites like SL as well. They can also accept the gift in Grace and Glory, making each moment a precious gem of experience and spiritual expansion of the sacred 'NOW' moment. Each individual in the New Earth Star Community of SL is being given a unique opportunity to create a grass roots bridge into the New Earth, by forming a specific hologram within the greater New Earth Hologram which is preparing this planet for Ascension into the New Earth Star. Yet even those of you who don't wish to become involved directly in this virtual reality, or don't own a computer that can handle the software, are not being left out of this development. The planet and all it's inhabitants are benefiting from what is being created at NESIE and within it's community. Those who are reading this - who resonate with the Numis'OM / New Earth sacred mythos are even more sensitive to the energy geometries and activations taking place on NESIE. Isis Raia Gaia Egg ~ Divine Birther of Worlds This waterfall I call the I'tashai, meaning "Place of Eternal Waters of Life." The rose quartz 'Mother' Egg represents Gaia as the perpetually birthing being. She is Isis Raia - Divine Birther of Worlds. In the SL image above you see this Gaia Egg positioned in the I'tashai waterfall on the main island in NESIE. Grotto of Gaia by Maia Christianne Nartoomid (a composite artwork) OR-0037STD There are several 'Gaia Eggs' in Numis'OM, one of which is depicted in this image above. The virtual Gaia Egg of Nesie is attuned to the Numis'OM network of crystal eggs holding and communicating the planetary frequency of the Divine Earth Mother.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Hu'akhan Indigo Generator Crystal on NESIE Below the Gaia Egg and waterfall is the Indigo Generator Crystal - Hu'akhan - Giver of Light, which connects to the central sun atoma of the Earth, bringing forth the Indigo Ray from the central sun of the planet. In this capacity, the Indigo Ray invokes pure ESSENCE of purpose and higher will, coming together with the original generative Creation codes of the Earth - a very powerful creational matrix for the New Earth! This generator crystal is aligned perfectly with the Gaia Egg and above that, the Tachyon Pyramid platform. The Indigo Generator Crystal can be seen in the picture above within its sacred cave. 11th Heaven Tachyon Pyramid at Night (so you can see the tachyon column) Way above the the waterfall and Gaia Egg at the 1,111 meter altitude is a sky platform containing a pyramid which houses a tachyon column of energy, moving up into 'infinity.' I call this tachyon pyramid Hor'Aton - Rising of the Golden Disc as a soaring being. While I (ThothHorRa) do not entirely agree with the standard scientific definition of tachyons, it is a starting point in understanding their nature. Tachyons are in actuality 'shed' from the activity of of what I call tetratryons. While they do travel faster than the speed of light they are inter-dimensional in nature and therefore an essential energy in the whole process of the transformation of matter from one dimensional to another, ie, what is being called 'Ascension.' Thus on NESIE has been installed a trans-dimensional merkabah, operating from the pure Essence of the Earth's central sun Indigo Ray, becoming the unfolding lotus of the Gaia Egg - an offering to the living things of the Earth, then ascending that collection of life frequencies into the inter-dimensional field of the Tachyon Pyramid - and beyond. We shall call this complete dynamic format (Indigo Generator Crystal, Gaia Egg and Tachyon Pyramid-Column) the 'Yushuda Pillar.' Yeshuda Mandala by Maia Christianne Nartoomid MAN-0026STD The 'Krystos Whirlind' dynamic or Yushuda is being engaged and re-programmed by the Yushuda Pillar on NESIE and the major co-ordinating factors now on-going on planet Earth. NOTHING in the Ascension programming of the Earth and it's Kind takes precedence over the Yushuda dynamics of the planet. Tachyon Pyramid in Numis'OM There are several tachyon pyramids in Numis'OM. The one depicted above is connecting to the NESIE tachyon column. As the cyber-space version becomes more 'real' in the ethers of Earth, so I, as ThothHorRa, am able to make adjustments to the NESIE version in order to keep nudging this virtual version into the 'beam' of the tachyon column building from the true core of the Earth into Numis'OM (within the 'real' world). ThothHorRa in 11th Heaven Tachyon Pyramid Yet to be built on NESIE (as of October, 2008) is the In La'kech Temple. In La'kech, meaning "I am another you," the Mayans adopted from the Pleiadean Star Lords who came among them and inter-married selectively with them to create what I call the 'High Mayans.' This temple is dedicated to the In La'kech Being - more about Her further on in this writing. In La'kech Future Temple Site on NESIE The In La'kech Temple will contain three main chambers: 1) Chamber of the Akasha - This chamber is a virtual field connecting to the process of the earth's creating a new akashic record of a Higher Order within the New Earth Star Hologram of the planet, as the old, lower Akasha breaks up. Just sitting and meditating in this chamber will help one attune to the new akashic field. The Akasha Chamber will contain artworks which represent select stages of New Earth imagery, triggering greater sensitivity to the new Akasha. Primary Color: pale green, gemstone: emerald 2) Chamber of Metatron - Here will be virtually represented the 12 Crystal Skulls and the one LIVING skull or illumined consciousness, a capstone of the '12' - now on / within the earth which radiate the full compliment of the 72 Metatronic Crystal Skulls. More on these Crystal Skulls in another article within this volume. In this chamber one may attune to the PURE GEM BODY of the New Earth and the illumined consciousness guiding that process. In addition to some representation of the 12 Crystal Skulls, a burning flame will be at the center of the chamber, repesenting the 13th as an illumined consciousness of the 12. Primary Color: pale yellow, gemstone: diamond 3) Chamber of the Lotus Flame - Herein lies the virtual path to the Transcendent Being, or Pure Being of LIGHT, beyond physical form or mind. This state of illumination is achieved in the higher levels of Numis'OM and beyond - into more refined states of the New Earth. Yet even in the lowest levels of Numis'OM one will be able to frequently 'touch' this state of being for limited periods of time. A lotus and Tibetan "singing" bowls (that can be played) will be found in this chamber. Primary Color: pale pink, gemstone: rose quartz "Luminessence" Lotus Loci created as an animated living life form on NESIE by Simeon/Chiron Simeon/Chiron is creating animated Lotus Loci New Earth Living Light forms on NESIE. These creations indeed contain the frequency to some degree of the actual beings, as they embrace you in their moving kelidescope. He is using a special adaptation of the art images Maia created of the Lotus Loci placed upon specifically shaped objects which are then animated. Note from Simeon/Chiron: you have to experience these to truly understand their potential. They are like being immersed in a living kaleidoscope of New Earth Star colors and frequencies. Everyone that has experienced the one you see in the picture above has come away totally amazed. Looking up at Full Moon from within "Luminessence" Lotus Loci on NESIE Starheart immersed in the living substance of the "Luminessence" Lotus Loci on NESIE ThothHorRa in his abode "Atharana" above NESIE ThothHorRa: I have created my abode on the New Earth Star Island Estate. It is a place where I commune with individuals (sessions and initations), but it is much more than that. It holds the octave-frequency of the Crown Chakra of the Tachyon beam from the Generator Crystal in the cavern, through the Gaia Egg and the Tachyon Pyramid. I give this abode the name of Atharana - Place of the Bodi Lotus of Compassion. This is the flowering of the bodhisattva essence in all souls as they reach deeply into the divine chalice of compassion.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

This personifies the offering I make here on NESIE and to the NES Community of SL, but it also reaches out to all of you, for now whenever you work with me, whether directly in Spirit or through sessions with Maia (in or out of SL), so you will be received into Atharana. Maia: See slideshow of Atharana ThothHorRa: I chose the name 'ThothHorRa' to repesent the Three-Fold path I work within and thus radiate forth: Thoth - the Sacred Breath, Communion, Speaking. Hor - the Horus or Divine Logos delivered into form (an archetypal version of the Christ Incarnate). Ra - the Solar Logos of Inscription that is upon the "face of the waters" or Creation - all things created thereof. Futher reading: ThothHorRa: the archetype of Nuut is the Living Symbol I give for the New Earth Star Creation Matrix. It is more than just a Creatrix for the 'New Earth,' but certainly incorporates that dynamic in Her Divine Radiance. The original Nuut represented the Lemurian principle of "going forth to heal, restore, create and resolve" and also "to expand generative radiance." She is the Creatrix of the 'Dwelling Place' of the gods - that is, this archetype represents the universal laws which consign actions to basic creational forces. Nuut sends rays of Her Creation through the 'Whirling Pillar' of Yushuda (see previous article). It is her cosmic rays which compose the El'ohim or Creation. Menhir by Maia Chistianne Nartoomid (a composite image) OR-0038STD The monolithic stones of the ancients - the menhirs - were placed in position on the planet by the Master Builders, who were also known as the 'Sun Bow Klan." They were filled with the light encoding of the future. When certain stellar alignments take place, some of which are already happening, so these codes will send signals deep into the core of the Earth. This will awaken Gaia's programming for her natural realm, so that it responds down to the smallest seed pod to the great cosmic influences of transfiguration - of 'Ascension.' In the great Ascension some of the elemental Earth will become light-plasma ready to create worlds anew at primal stages of evolution. Other elemental portions of this planet will 'ascend' it's frequency to match that of the New Earth and therefore become absorbed into it. The Menhir's are the Old Guard who pass the torch to the New. ThothHorRa, Taka'Khan and EL'Chavar ThothHorRa: in Numis'OM Volume 01 - 2008 it is written in the article "White Tigers of Thoth" in my (ThothHorRa) words: "...the lineage of white tigers I have continuously had at my side through my surface, inner Earth and now New Earth experiences contain the devic (nature realm) energy of my connection to Earth as a Living Being. They give me that path, that golden thread to Her (Gaia’s) Heart of Hearts." Now, as ThothHorRa I am creating in the New Earth of Numis'OM a further bridging into the Nature Kingdom as a means of deep CORE communication between Earth's current-reality nature beings and those of the New Earth Star. As this occurs, the Lotus Loci respond forming new and more expanded DNA paths in the current animal species that lead to a more advanced nature being... preparing our current nature beings to 'become' orientated to their New Earth counterparts. This is true on another level of the flora as well, and of course humanity; but I speak in this instance of the animal species. In the virtual world of Second Life we are creating a "natural" world within NESIE that bridges the two realms. Starheart and Moonstar What are known in this current world as creatures of myth, such as the dragons, unicorns, mer folke, faires, etc. are true Nature Beings who dwell among you unseen. They have to some extent been shaped (in form) by human lore, building through the ages. Their existence and functions are at the core of nature, while their forms are more mutable to human perception. ThothHorRa and his Iguana In the New Earth of Numis'OM there is no veil between the human and animal kingdoms. They are inter-related and communing with one another in a heart-speak openness of understanding and mutual respect. It is important to realize that communing with these supreme 'mythic' creatures is only a breath away from your current awareness. Open to their song and you will find it to be yours as well! Starheart and Chiron Ride Alicorns in 11th Heaven In La'kech the feminine 13th Living Dweller Crystal Skull by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AB-0046STD Maia: if you are not familiar with the info I have originally transcribed on the 12 Dweller Crystal Skulls please READ THIS first... also please read my more recent article on the 12th Crystal Skull. This will help you make better sense of what is being said below. ThothHorRa: I reveal the symbolic and sacred name of 'In La'kech' (same as the future Temple to be built on NESIE) for the Living 13th Bearer of the Crystal Skull. In this instance we can see the 'Crystal Skull' as a Grail Cup filled with the nectar of Holy Compassion and Transfiguration. The Living Bearer will be female. She will be born into the human race but her lineage will contain very specific DNA from ALL the Grail Tribes (and thus Star Tribes) of the planet. Her purpose? To unite the Grail/Star Tribes and further, the entire human race, who all carry some factions of those tribes in their genetic code. In La'kech's symbol is a white dove carrying a golden bough of the acacia tree, symbolizing the Transfiguration / Ascension of the World Soul, ie all souls coming together in Spiritual Presence and Transfiguration into the New Earth Star. (ref: Wikipedia on symbolism of Acacia ) In La'kech will come to the attention of several indigenous people through their Shamans simultaneously, but she herself will not be of any one tribe or race, but a mixture of many. She will call upon many to join her in a Sacred Walk beginning in Peru and ending in Alaska. That will only be the beginning of her mission among Earth's kind. The soul of La'kech will have had only one other incarnation on this planet - that of Shush'Al'Mundra. In La'kech is now present in the New Earth of Numis'OM, preparing for her incarnation into your Realm. You may assist this preparation by attuning to her consciously while repeating the mantram: A'SULA ETCHI MAGUA IN LA'KETCH As you call upon her, know that she bears the HOPE FOR THE WORLD and is the WOMAN CLOTHED WITH THE SUN within the Book of Revelations.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Yet the standard interpretation of this 'vision' is not the true understanding. Maia: In 1990 I had the following vision which I wrote about in Volume 01, 1990 of Temple Doors. It is somewhat dualistic in nature... perhaps I would view it differently now and see the "beast" as the unaware nature of humanity. "As Merkrael (Archangel) opened the Membine through the emerald fire, I beheld myself as Witness to the Woman Clothed with the Sun - the Mother of the Pearl, as She first came to the Earth. I was in mid-air with Her and there were other Witnesses also, and we all hid our eyes from the mighty light which shone about Her; but we dared to look again and She was in our midst as a burnishing Tree of Life. her arms were outstretched and Her hair flowing through space. " I looked upon Her with awe as a great sounding was heard, and from her body was issued forth a Child of transparent beauty who was so fine as to be of spun gold, and yet with a strength beyond wonder, profound in His message of Truth. "As the Child opened his eyes to the Day so a darkness descended and the Beast laid his hand upon Him and marked his right thigh. I cried out 'No Lord, let not this be! I will witness for Him that you shall deliver Him to Thee!' I knew then that it must be the Child would be delivered, yet would retain the mark upon his thigh until all who witness for Him were to become a Living Testament bearing Witness to the Whole Truth." Maia: ThothHorRa could you please comment on this vision I experienced in 1990? ThothHorRa: the Child is not a living being but an aspect of humanity which will be quickened - awakened through the cosmic and human being, In La'kech. It will at first attempt to be 'claimed' by those in worldly control, whose power comes from the 'Beast' - the unaware nature of darkness. Yet this will not stand and the LIGHT of higher awareness will claim it's own. Starheart as an In La'kech Psalmer (a composite artwork) In Her temple the priestesses and priests morph their forms when they slip into the Sacred Psalming of Her Tone, Her Inscription of Light, Her Mantras and Her Speaking. The Being, In La'kech, carries within her the encoding or 'Inscription of Light' for the 144,000 Infinity Points within this galaxy. These 'Infinity Points' are the organizing 'white holes' which are specialized to emit Intelligent Commands directed by the 'black hole' of the Hunab Ku or center of the galaxy. The Infinity Point white holes operate within the condition of what scientists are currently calling 'dark matter.' When the dots are connected, that is a path of coherency is opened through the heart centers of 144,000 incarnated souls on our planet, so the Yushuda is activated to open like a lotus and transport the Earth to the next stage in it's cosmic journey... what we are calling the 'New Earth Star.' In the In La'kech Temples of Numis'OM the priestesses and priests transform their bodies to become the 'Psalmers' so that they can enter 'Her Body' or rather the cosmic code of the New Earth Star's In La'kech Cosmic Being, which leads to the next stage of the New Earth Star formation. Understand that the 'Being' I speak of here is foremost a cosmic pattern of unfolding, which is also carried in the incarnated Being of the woman, In La'kech. When the Pleadieans came among the Mayans they presented them with this pattern as a scientific understanding, which the High Mayans incorporated into the Hunab Ku teachings to the inner-most Initiates of In La'kech. It is present in their glyphs, but unless you have the codex key that unlocks this cosmic program for you to see and understand, it is invisible to you. The codex key was passed down verbally, only once was it placed as a symbol in stone. The temple where this symbol is carved is yet to be unearthed to the modern world. Maia: you may wish to also read this interesting article on the Hunab Ku. ThothHorRa and Mt. Kailash (a composite artwork) by Maia Christianne Nartoomid Maia: Mt. Kailash is known as a sacred place of Pilgrimage. It has a rich and long history in esoteric and religious beliefs. Many Masters 'dwell' in the etheric enclaves they have created inter-dimensionally at Mt. Kailash. Yet now, ThothHorRa speaks to us of another enclave now establishing itself within the ethers of this Holy Mountain. ThothHorRa: I call this enclave within the etheric regions of the Holy Mountain of Kailash, Gurideva ~ Throne of the New Earth. If you will recall, it is Mt. Kailash which unites the Earth's 'Temples of Venus' through the strong Ray-Power of the Golden Star of Mazuriel (ref: Temples of Venus ). Now, the Gurideva Enclave is an etheric place of receiving the Earth's incarnate souls into an inner-plane experience of direct receipt with the energies and Presence of the New Earth Masters - those like myself who are specifically preparing the Way at this time for the planetary Ascension into the New Earth Star. Through the Divine Rayship of Mazuriel so the Gurideva Enclave receives the Ascension Code on all 12 levels of the zodiacal infusion into the Earth, creating a Vessel for the 13th Mazalothic fulfillment with the incarnation of In La'kech and her cosmic appearance in the sky. For as She comes among you in the flesh, so a presentation in the sky will come forth, ushering in the new 13 stellar constellation system of Mazaloth. Thisappearance will be in the form of the visible SIGHT of the 'Blue Star' as a Child of the true Blue Star Rigel in Orion - home of the New Earth Star. I, ThothHorRa am preparing the Gurideva Enclave for In La'kech - both in body and cosmos. In this sense you might view me as Her 'consort.' ThothHorRa Ushering in the Dawn of a New World (a composite artwork) In conclusion know that the New World dawns each day for you now... in your present Earth. What is spoken of as the "New Earth Star" is a state BEING. Open to that 'being' in increments as you are ready to accept them and the 'Heart Ascension' will be received unto you. This must occur before the Earth's Planetary Ascension can take place. You are in essence all the El'ohim of this New Earth Creation, you all co-participate with that level of creative power as you offer yourselves fully into the cosmic Grail Cup of universal love.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Atu Tehuti, Ati Hatu -- "in the rising of the breath I greet you, in the release of the breath I embrace you" Cindy O'Connell - New Mexico, USA: is there a relationship with the Christ Consciousness Grid and the New Earth Star Streaming? ThothHorRa: the 'Christ Consciousness Grid' (CCG) as a true Earth grid acts as a channel and networking for the streaming patterns coming from the 'New Earth.' As the awareness of humanity shifts (to more awarness of Spirit), so the CCG changes form, direction and scope. Amanda Baro de Roca, Barcelona, Spain: which is the best way to give support to the souls that are arriving into this life time incarnating right now in our entourage, that of our family and friends? These babies are being born at a time of an apparent quickening of the dynamics of the Ascension process and they may be finding most probably stressed situations in their own homes. ThothHorRa: it is an eternal answer... give them unconditional LOVE. This was true in the First Land (Lemuria) and so it is true now. Love never changes, only the individual perception and response to it changes. True, universal love allows one to SEE, to be AWARE of the OTHER as the SELF: In La'kech - "I AM ANOTHER YOU." Amanda: does the fact that we, the members of the NESIE group at SL, are working directly under your guidance at the present time mean that we shall be attracted by affinity to your Numis'OM Temple right after the culmination of the Ascension process? Or does it mean that we ALREADY are under your guidance (there) and thus we have been attracted to work with you at Second Life? ThothHorRa: the latter... you are called because you choose yourselves from the ancient connections, the present alignments and the future expansion, all coming together in your NOW moment. Amanda: am I right in my appreciation of a quickening in the dynamics of the Ascension process? ThothHorRa: most certainly. That 'quickening' is more a presence in some than others. You can become distracted or uncaring and block out the sound of a distant bell, or you can be waiting for it to ring and thereby hear it clearly when struck. Sandy Lewallen, North Carolina, USA: I have a question regarding balance in these chaotic times as we are shifting from the old energy to the new. I read something recently on what is called The Wands of Horus. These were cylinder like objects carried by Pharoahs in Ancient Egypt while in a stance called "Master Position." Russia has conducted studies of these cylinders showing them to contain various substances used to maintain balance. The cylinders are attuned to the core of the Earth and and when used can harmonize the left and right side of the brain. The Russians consider them an evolutionary tool. They simulated the cylinders and have used them on patients with cancer and cardiovascular disease. The wands seem to restore the balance to the body for faster healing. I am wondering if you can give us any further information on what seems to be a valuable tool especially since it is attuned to the core of the Earth. ThothHorRa: Yes, these are the 'Horrah Kephii.' They were originally employed in Mu (Lemuria) and Atalantan (Atlantis), when the Earth's electromagentic field began to change drastically due to the Kali Rift. They were kept in sliver and gold lined boxes, in-between which was a layer of what they called 'ossiphira.' This was an alchemically made element which kept the outer magnetic influences (even the very subtle) from entering the box and thus the wand. The wands themselves varied, but the most powerful ones were made of alchemical gold and other alchemical elements. Some contained stones used much like the Urim and Thumim of Moses's age. The Urim and Thumim were oracle tools only because they aligned the two halves of the brain, as did the 'Wands of Horus.' The later wands (those now 'artifacts') were not as true to the design, nor were they made with any of the original alchemical elements. The current energy instruments now being sold as "Wands of Horus" have some elements of those wands present... but much is missing and the complete technique is unknown. Therefore I caution individuals about using these contemporary devices. They can help balance one's energy field, but in many instances could either be non-effective or harmful. Tricia Buffandeau, Hawaii, USA: I have a question regarding "Do" and "Be". We are a "doing" oriented world and we have to come to that state of "BEing present Now. Living in the present moment. When discussing this with others I am presented with this question: "How Do I Do that?". This question leaves me speechless since I don't know how to explain a state of Being in terms of Doing. ThothHorRa: you cannot truly explain "Being" in terms of "Doing." Being is communicated through example. The more you living in true "Being" the more people around you will react to it by either turning away from you, as they do not wish change and their reality feels threatened, or moving more into that vibration and state along with you. PLEASE NOTE: if you wish to ask questions of ThothHorRa relating to anything you read in this publication, or about planetary and cosmic happenings that you would like more clarity on, please submit your questions to me (Maia). I will attune to ThothHorRa and will print his responses to those questions he selects to answer in the following issue of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron. I cannot promise that all questions will be answered, but I will do my best to accommodate those with the greatest universal scope and importance. I will give you credit for the questions as well unless you request anonymity.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

and Solar Sheaths VOLUME 01, 2007 Please use the "Printer Friendly Version" link in the menu bar on the front cover page above to make a quality print of this publication. We were guided to name this publication Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron by Thoth, and the Illumined Assembly of the Christos' Merkabah of the Host comprised of 12 souls holding open a portal for the the Christ energies on this planet. The Radiant Ones we are working with encouraged us to bring forth this publication as a continuance of work that was done by Maia Christianne Nartoomid from 1980 through 1999. During this period Maia produced, first, the periodical entitled The Source (1980-1988), and then later, Temple Doors (1989-1999). In 1994 her partner Simeon Nartoomid joined her in producing the latter periodical. In the nearly 7 year respite between the conclusion of Temple Doors and when the first release of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron began, we both underwent a period of expanded esoteric initiation and deeply personal transformational experiences that have prepeared us for resuming this work at an entirely new octave of experience. Thoth and the IAC Merkabah of the Host have requested that we facilitate a specific Program of Light related to the Aramu Temple of Thoth and Numis'OM to help those who feel resonant with this Station of Light (Spirit Heart Sanctuary) to accelerate their Ascension processes and thus to further help the collective soul of humanity approach the gateway of Ascension which Thoth calls Light-Principle Forty, or LP-40 for short. Ultimately, as we collectively move through this passage we will activate the 44:44 Ascension Stargate and trigger a series of cosmic events destined to alter the DNA of humanity forever. Numis'OM is a causal reference point for the New Earth Star and the 44:44 stargate, and is hosted within the causal body of Venus. The Aramu Temple of Thoth is energetically within the Numis'OM matrix and acts as a way-station for souls building the New Earth Star consciousness from within the earthen experience. Souls can thus visit Numis'OM and even the New Earth Star if they have proper intent and attunement. It is our goal to provide pathways for this to occur within. This publication thus sits at the heart of our efforts to facilitate this greater process for the Masters and Illumined Ones that we are working with and to assist souls on earth. We hope that you will find it a fruitful and friendly path into the Homeward Light. The front cover art on this issue is entitled "12th Solar Sheath Portal " (available in Subscriber Freebies and Goodies section - see below) by Maia Christianne Nartoomid. Most of the art that appears on the front cover and in the various articles in this issue as well as any of our own publications which are herein referenced are available on the Subscriber's Freebies and Discounts page while this issue is current. After this volume becomes a back issue the art that appears in it will then only be available through our Spirit Store IF it has an associated item number listed under it. Click the item number of the art piece to find it there if it no longer appears on the Subscriber's Freebies and Discounts page. New Solar Sheaths Psionic Template Flash Presentation by Maia Christianne Nartoomid see info below before viewing for best results turn speakers on and click "play movie" when ready In my article Venus Nodes and Temple Activation Thoth states: As the conjunction of Mars, Mercury and Jupiter occurs on December 10th, 2006 and Venus rises "from the underworld on the opposite horizon" a signal deep within the "inner chamber" of Venus (that seed core of it's Living Light - the atoma) will flame outward into the heart of the solar sun, as the conjunction of the other three planets hold the matrix through the Sagittarian star Graffias. Thus, again there is a "flash" being sent similar to that which occurred upon our entry into the Fifth Day of the Galactic Underworld, but this time from Venus, Guardian of earth - the initiator of earth's flowering New Earth Star. At that moment, the solar sun of our galaxy will receive the "kiss" of Venus and release nine sheaths from it's "new" constitution into the etheric envelopes of both Venus and Earth. As earth receives these sheaths, the [link url= http://www.spiritmythos.org/holy/light/zohar_mages.htm] Zohar Mages [/link] will begin to "spin" them into "Garments of Light" for the energy bodies of the human being. Eventually these nine new sheaths will create a tenth sheath: a solar mantle that will be the first stage of receiving the Pure Gem body or garment of Light of the New Earth Star creation. I have received through Thoth nine Light Language symbols and mantrams that contain the energy codes of the nine solar sheaths as they are entering the matrix of the Zohar Mages and being "spun" as sheaths for the energy bodies of the human being. The mantrams of solar sheaths are: - Solar Sheath 1: U'EH'AVGAH - Solar Sheath 2: EMASHA'HU - Solar Sheath 3: NE'TAK'TEH'MU - Solar Sheath 4: SEE-MENU'SIPAPU - Solar Sheath 5: WE'WU'HANTUM - Solar Sheath 6: KA'NEESH'HAPA - Solar Sheath 7: TUS'TUM'TEPEH - Solar Sheath 8: NESA'WAH - Solar Sheath 9: PU'POI'PAH The tenth Solar Sheath will be a culmination - a Garment of Light, weaving the nine together. At the head of this article is a flash presentation I have created with Simeon's assistance presenting the nine Solar Sheath Light Language symbols on backgrounds of digital fractals to aid in embedding them in your brain-mind complex. Interspersed between these Solar Sheath psionic templates are what Thoth is calling "Solar Sheath Portals" -- fractals without symbols, numbering twelve in all -- one for accessing each Solar Sheath and three final portals which serve as a capstone dynamic to the whole matrix at the end. I am chanting the mantrams given above for each of the nine Solar Sheath templates, and there is a final capstone chant not listed above -- it was a spontaneous transmission not translatable into words. This activational flash presentation is carefully designed to bring your senses into a full harmonic cycle with the nine Solar Sheaths. Thoth suggests that you NOT attempt to chant the above mantrams yourself while watching the flash presentation, but rather first watch the presentation allowing it to just carry you along with it and then you can work with the mantrams using the procedure given below to further embody the superliminal Light encoding held within the nine Solar Sheaths: Visualize nine concentric envelopes of light surrounding your body.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

They need not be specific colors, but if you see them as such, just go with it. Do some deep heart breathing for a few moments and then slowly chant the mantrams - repeating each nine times, sending the sound vibrations and energy down into your solar plexus. As we accept that we are being spun new Solar Sheaths, so we also accept that we ARE the New Sun. It is first inside us and then projects outside us into our universal perception. How may we see these sheaths as actual Garments of Light? They do not circle our bodies as do our auras, but wrap about us in a braided fashion, as a DNA strand of life-giving power and glory. The solar sheaths of our bodies we are born with. Now they are transforming into newer more refined sheaths. The children born during or after the Time of the Fifth Day of the Galactic Underworld will already bear these newly refined Solar Sheaths at birth. The Solar Sheaths create "tones" as they send messages to each other. These tones Thoth calls "chordrosomes." The messages are specific signatures of light sequencing (light codes) that "talk" to one another and then send the complete messages or stanzas to the DNA. The DNA then modifes its crystalline structure accordingly, just as blessed water changes it's crystal form. As the DNA crystals re-form, so they are fine-tuning to receive "New Earth" awareness. Further study material for this article: http://www.spiritheart.org/members/messages/06_11-13_fifth_day_galactic.htm http://www.spiritheart.org/members/messages/06_11-23_fifth_day.htm Temple-Node on Kaua'i The Mu / Kaua'i temple-node Venusian template for the whole unfolding of the "Lotus" reality into the primal earth (ie "evolution of species"). The Venus temple-node is the touch-point for that original unfolding. It does not contain the whole property - just the original trigger. As these two realities blended, for a period of time there was a balance between the two. The Venus node on Kaua'i holds the "memory" of that balance. Many cosmic earth triggers are taking place and have been taking place to bring the earth to the point of triggering the activation of the Lemurian and then (later) the Atlantean nodes. The most major of these being the nine new sheaths of the sun. This, and other key events in the last several years, have brought the earth to the place where it is now "giving birth" to the New Earth Hologram in an outward pattern. . . a visible pattern in the earth and in the body, if one is looking for it. By this Thoth means it can be scientifically detected if scientists look in the right place and with the correct mind set. The DNA crystalline composition is changing. . . the elemental crystals of the planet are changing. They still appear the same on the surface, but energetically and micro-microscopically they are transforming into a more subtle and complete state of being. When all the Venus "temples" become active, then the Venusian portal will be fully opened once again. . . this is the same portal that allowed the Lord Melchizedek to come to earth eons ago from Venus. With the "memory" of the unfolding of the Lotus once again unsealed for those ready to receive it, the New Earth Lotus unfoldment through the creation of the New Earth Hologram can truly begin. Keep in mind that these Venus temple-nodes are self-activating as they interact with the cosmic frequencies in our systemic energetic environment. That means we do not have to go and activate them. However, we can interact with them if we are so guided and thus benefit ourselves from those interactions. We can act as planetary surrogates in this capacity as well, opening our being to receive of these divine frequencies for the benefit of all beings on this planet. Cross of Quetzalcoatl by Maia Christianne Nartoomid always available for free to all Thoth from 11/23/06 Global Link article: "When we say that the burst of light on 11/23/06 'carries the birthing power of the Cross of Quetzalcoatl' we mean that individual souls incarnate now on earth will have the opportunity to activate the 'cross'in their own Divine light body. This activation does not mean instant godhood, but it does open a creative channel to the Cross at the center of the galaxy. Through this channel one may become 'reborn' to the deeper pulse of the galactic wave-form Serpent." Thoth, how may we really understand what we are calling here the "Cross of Quetzalcoatl"? Thoth: Visualize a PRESENCE beyond what you understand as "energy" - yet the organizer, the divining rod of all energy within it's field of resonance as it radiates its immaculate being from the center of the galaxy and into the waiting vessels of spirit that open to it's effulgent pulse. All galaxies contain this PRESENCE, thus they are all One in the ultimate sense, moving in rapture together from the center of the universe. . . yet the universe has no "center" in space or time. We use the term here metaphorically. As the "Cross" of the galaxy streams forth its pulsing wave into the depth of a planet it begins to connect to other planets and stellar systems that resonate within the scheme of perfect balance. It is a "connect the dots" type of function. I stated previously that: The ‘Serpent Path of Quetzalcoatl' is a wave-form that naturally extends from the central sun atoma of this earth, connecting to the sun of our solar system, and from there into the Blue Star of Rigel in Orion. This wave-form moves constantly, flowing outward and inward from the earth's atoma, moving here and there like an electrical current in a sphere following an attracting current outside the sphere. The 'attracting current' in this case is the fluctuations of the geo-magnetic energy of the planet. . . most especially at it's poles. There is now a circuit in motion which defines the way the earth traces this galaxy's "Cross" into its eco-system through it's electrical and magnetic currents which is not the same as it was before the date of 11/23/06. Whereas before the earth reacted to the "Cross" as a ping-pong ball bouncing off a paddle, now it is responding to the deep, inner codes of the "Cross" as the Christic phases of the Yushuda passes it's rotational movement across the planet. Previously, the Yeshuda could not reach the depth of the atoma - the "black hole" at it's center. Now, with the new "responding" signal of earth to "galactic central" (cross and black hole at the center of the galaxy) the Yushuda can penetrate and expand the creation codes to match the universal rhythms that it would not "see / feel" before.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Maia: Thoth, What does this mean for us, as individual human beings and as the human race of planet earth? Thoth: It opens a path that was not there before. It allows matter to transcend it's previous "limits" with the phase of reality you as a species dwell within. Yet you must come to recognize that this barrier (if we may loosely call it that) has been taken away from the mass consciousness. It is still a phantom and the phantom will fade, but as it fades some incarnated souls will become so fearful of the new paradigm in it's place (the New Earth Hologram) that they will attempt to re-create the flesh and bones of the "ghost." This they cannot do, but they will try, and in trying so they will erupt so violently from their own illusions that they will reveal the monster within. Once exposed, the monster melts in the sunlight, for monsters are only undefined emotions which have been hidden so long they devour themselves when finally they are unveiled and exposed to truth. Humanity must release it's mass paradigm that they are impaled upon the cross, and see that they instead, are united through it. The Galactic / Universal Cross is the impelling force to unite – to create a point of gathering for the purpose of expansion and thus creation of new universes of being. Yephyra by Maia Christianne Nartoomid available in subscriber freebies and goodies while this issue is current only In the 1990's Thoth revealed to me a symbolic Foundation Stone which he called the Yephyra. At that time, we were to incorporate it into our Mystery School. He now reveals to me that the Yephyra was actually a "Living Symbol" (an activational template) brought to earth by Lord Melchilzedek from Venus. It was set into the foundation stone of his first earthly temple as a pathway back through the Venus gate into the Blue Star. . . what is now (in our sense of "now") becoming the New Earth Star. Based on what Thoth imparted to me in the 1990's I wrote the following at that time: Description of the YEPHYRA Logos: A cube with a triangle containing an eye in the center. The triangle is circumscribed by three energy lines moving from three spheres. Surrounding the cube are twelve yod flames. In the ancient aloii, or First Language of Mankind, 'Yephyra' meant 'to set aflame;' 'to burn from within;' 'to impassion with Spirit;' 'to Perfect;' and the 'Perfected Work.' In choosing this Logos, Thoth has also given us the accompanying words: 'The Perfected Work We Shall Attain.' Within the Mur-Atlan (Lemurian and Atlantean) cultures, the Foundation Stone of the temple was called the Yephyra. In mystical Christianity, the Foundation Stone is a metaphor for the anchoring of the Spiritual Hierarchy in the Earth, and was exemplified in the service of the Apostle Peter, who was the 'Petra,' 'Cephas,' or Rock of the Cosmic Church in the Earth. In the New Age Bible Interpretation -- Old Testament, Volume II., Corinne Heline expands upon the deeper esoteric meaning of the 'Foundation Stone,' when she writes: In the majestic symbolism of Masonry there is none of greater mystic significance than the Foundation Stone, or Corner Stone. This is representative of the spiritual perfection of the true indwelling Self, the Virgin Spirit, which is one with God. . . .the 'fiery Stone,' inscribed upon with the Great Name of God, which is the Foundation of the created world. Note that the cube, when projected upon a plane, forms the Latin cross, or 'measure of a man.' The cube then, is a version of the cross. Thoth shows me now, how the Foundation Stone and the Galactic Cross are energetically one and the same! It was Noah that was given the Pre-deluge Inner Mysteries, or 'Foundation Stone,' through which to reconstitute humanity upon the True Path to God. Ms. Heline tells us that: Abraham and Moses promulgated its truth in their inner schools. Upon this knowledge Enoch constructed his Arch and Solomon his Temple. . . Every Mystery School in the world is and has been centered in this esoteric thesis. The triangle containing the Mystic Eye is well-known from the US dollar bill. It is the All-seeing Eye of Truth. Below is a passage from a medieval text now lost from this world, but still registered with the Akashic Record and visible to my inner eye regarding this eye. None can escape its gaze, for it is Absolute and Uncompromising. About the triangle are three spheres, which represent the three aspects of alchemical integration for Spirit with Matter: Mutable, Immutable and Coherent; the latter meaning 'to be,' rather than to involve or engage in order to become. Like with Jonathan Livingstone Seagull, alchemical coherency erases the time component and creates the instant 'being.' Ancient master hierophants often wore a tattoo of the three spheres upon their forehead. Thoth Hermes was born with birthmarks of the three spheres on his brow. One who wore the tetchet or three spheres, was a master of the three forms of Spirit-Matter integration. The 'energy' lines connecting the three spheres in the Logos symbol, are intended to represent the higher-form energy universe, existing beyond the third dimension, yet impressing upon it. Encompassing the cube are twelves yod flames, which symbolize the twelve command stations or thresholds of the Mazzaroth. When the Galactic / Universal Cross becomes the Foundation Stone it dimensionalizes it's space -- that is, it incorporates the entire potential of spins of the cross into a four-square field from which the 'Temple' or condition of a spectrum of realities arises. It short, the cross becoming the square is a world-builder mechanism. That of course, is only the beginning -- the foundation of the marvelous geometries to come, leading the world created through it's geometric formations into a frequency of limitless potential. Mount Mahamun, in Numis'OM by Maia Christianne Nartoomid NOLL-01STD Thoth showed to me souls of this earth plane going in "Dreamtime" into Numis'OM - being escorted by souls now abiding in Numis'Om and sometimes angelic beings. These "old earth" souls were being directed into etheric portals of that realm where they experienced the "nectar of the gods" -- the frequencies, light, colors and sounds that are fine-tuning these souls for orientation into the New Earth Hologram and beyond. . . into the New Earth Star. These portals and places vary in what they contain, and each individual soul will experience that portal somewhat differently. One may find it to be like a "temple" with an altar, marbled floors. . . perhaps a library of scrolls. . . tangible objects. Another might experience dazzling colors of unimaginable beauty, the tonal harmonics of "angelic choirs" or perhaps just a profound PEACE.
