# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Symbols may appear or the beauty of nature unfold before one's etheric eyes beyond what we see in this world. Master beings, angelic ones, guides and guardians would be with the individual Dreamtime traveler - seen or unseen - helping them to absorb and experience the necessary frequencies for the movement in awareness they are ready to experience. Souls already on the "Other Side" – in this case, Numis'OM - are also undergoing such journeys and experience, but their's is of a deeper, more full and intrinsic nature, as they do not have to "awaken" back in this world and integrate it all here. Some may re-incarnate from Numis'OM up until the actual Ascension of this base world-form occurs, but this is not the same as coming and going the way incarnate souls do, who are still tied to a specific body and thus dense energy system. It is difficult to write about any one portal or place in Numis'OM, as they are so open to interpretation by the individual soul. However, there is an underlying essence of each one, and that is what I attempt to impart. In this issue of Numis'OM I will be giving you a "peek" at some of these portals and places. Understand that there are as many portals and places in Numis'OM as can be configured by the souls focusing upon them! Nevertheless, the ones I am depicting in this issue and further in the Numis'OM Light and Life gallery and oracle, is a beginning - a place through which to start the journey. Thoth encouraged me to create a section in the subscriber's pages where individuals can choose, either specifically or at "random," a portal, place or being and their reflective keynotes to contemplate and / or meditate upon and thus was born the Numis'OM - Light and Life gallery and oracle. Please visit the Numis'OM - Light and Life gallery and oracle, I believe you will truly get a lot out f it. This feature is available online to Numis'OM subscribers ONLY, and is a bonus to you for supporting me in being able to bring forth this energy, consciousness and awareness into the current earth, mahalo nui loa (thank you very much). Below are some examples of what you can expect in the Numis'OM - Light and Life gallery and oracle. There are twenty-seven representations from Numis'OM in all in the gallery-oracle. Mount Mahamun: here we see souls being led by an angelic being (the golden light) into the mountain portal. Mahamun contains the light codes of the Archangels. It is filled with their presence. Those incarnated souls who are ready to connect to the higher frequencies of the angelic realms and integrate these frequencies to some degree, into their "Old Earth" bodies, may move into this portal. E'nu Star Portal: as you can see, it is a small entrance, yet there is no "physical" body as we know it which must have an appropriately sized passageway. E'nu calls upon the star fields in our bodies to integrate us more deeply with the stardust of which all matter is composed. The Zan Stones: these stones "ring" when souls awaiting entrance to the portal approach. The sound opens the path into this particular portal. Incarnated "Old Earth" souls who are bringing tone and music into their lives often are drawn here. They are able to open a path into the more subtle energies through music. Takhim Pyramid: a pyramid portal through which one may experience primal energy as not something to be feared or transformed, but understood as the basic and intrinsic force of the universe. Takhim offers getting into touch with "primal being". It helps us to see that all "primal" aspects of life are the foundation of the subtler planes. I'iko Crystal ~ Leki: these crystals change depending on who is seeing them. Sometimes a group of souls arriving together will see it the same, often they will not - several among them will see it differently. The I'iko crystals put us in touch with the Beauty of creation! Leki offers souls a peaceful haven - a sanctuary where they may simply "Be" in the hum of their own creation. Developing Planosphere: Thoth describes a "planosphere" as a world being created within Numis'OM/the New Earth Star. Intelligences in merkabic vehicles start the process, but only when the souls of Numis'OM have reached a certain level to create the "ingredients" for a new world within the New Earth energy field. Planospheres form almost like a fetus in the womb, once the initial charge has been given to jump-start their living substance and it begins to organize within it's protective bubble-sack. Master Builder's Medallion by Maia Christianne Nartoomid ARSY-0029STD In the 1970's Thoth gave me information on the ‘Master Builders' of most of the original major ancient structures on this planet. I say "original" as most have been repaired or added to in later years. . . some completely re-placed where some of the originals were destroyed. Below, I have incorporated what I wrote in the 1970's with my current akashic perspective on the topic. The Order of the Master Builders was first established long before the Adamic generations on earth. They came from the Blue Star Rigel through the portal of Venus, earth's guardian planet. The Master Builders are from the genetic clan of the 'Sun Bow,' their symbol being a lion, a creature of their world, later to be genetically re-produced in Atlantis. The Master Builders lived upon the surface of earth for many thousands of years. After this time they withdrew into the subterranean reaches of the planet - Inner Earth - where a remnant of that Order remains to this day. Their original landing site was in the area of the earth we now know as New Mexico, USA. It was here where they established their first complex of structures and began from that base to begin their surveying of earth and mapping it's stellar co-ordinates around the globe. For what purpose? The Master Builders had been sent to this world to prepare it for it's future in the universal scheme of things. . . as a point in the heavens through which stellar patterns could be used to re-generate whole world systems. Earth was not unique in this sense, as it was one of millions of such "sites." Each one, however, is important in the whole of the "Return." The plan of the Master Builders on earth was the embedding of stellar patterns and cosmic law within elemental structures which aligned in space-time to the frequencies of the earth's grids and the greater universal grids. . . to the stargates and, most importantly, to the specific Metatronic path this planet was intended to take to become a World System II -- see Volume 3, 2006 of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron. So that they might sustain the singularity of their mission on earth throughout the centuries, they willed their cycles of incarnations to be paced in measured units of time, creating a specific rhythm of re-birth.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

As a child of the Sun Bow was conceived, one of the Elders released him/herself from life to re-enter within the child. Thus, the same souls were contained within the clan. When the first "earth human" came into being through the Adamic procession (see Earth Genesis), the Sun Bow clan began to mix with the Adamics, and thus the pure clan was eventually absorbed into the Adamic Race, as had been intended. The last of the Sun Bow, such as Thoth Raismes, were known as "Sun Lords" when they walked upon the earth and guided humanity for a period of time. The Sun Bow Master Builders not only built the " Living Law" structures on the earth, they maintained them and re-built them when necessary. They also mapped and handed down to the Adamic generations, the natural grids and ley lines of the planet and they created the first "man-made" grids on earth. These are grids which are created through intentional programming with the mind and energy bodies of a unified group of people. It is not as simple as it may sound, as it requires a great deal of clarity and knowledge to accomplish. The Master Builders main task was to create thirty-three geodetic markers on the planet. These "markers" were buried fairly deep in the ground and are a form of advanced psionic device. Altogether as a matrix they continue to collect data on the many natural and man-made earth grids and the energy temple structures. This data is then transmitted to a receiving station within the Inner Earth. In the 1970's I received the following information on these geo-markers. Most of the places given as locations for the markers are not specific, but a general area. In some cases, the nearest city in our current time frame may be given to denote the location: Places of the Tah - geodetic cosmic markers of the Master Builders: 1) Alpha Node (TIK): Mesa Verde Plateau, Colorado, USA 2) Golden Circle (LA): Zion's National Park, Utah, USA 3) Golden Circle (RE): Teton Mountain Range, Wyoming, USA 4) Golden Circle (ME): Mount Shasta, California, USA 5) Golden Section (RESHA): Big Sur, California, USA 6) Golden Section (MESO): Baja, California, USA 7) Descending Golden Plateau (HAMAN): Titicaca, Peru 8) Ascending Golden Pleateau (RHAMA): Lhasa, Tibet 9) Golden Meta (TU'RA): Giza Plateau, Egypt 10) Greater Rezon (MU): Yucatan 11) Lesser Rezon (TAMEN) Stonehenge, England 12) Greater Meridian (MU'KHAMA) Pacific Ocean, near Marquieses 13) Lesser Meridian (ATLA'KHAMA): Atlantic Ocean, near Bermuda 14) Rue Mark (RAS): Sahara Desert 15) Rue Mark (TAMEN): Gobi Desert 16) Northern Triangle (TUBA): Maui, Hawai'i, USA 17) Northern Triangle (TUKHAMAN): Atlantic Ocean, near Azores 18) Northern Triangle (TUSOI): Iceland 19) Southern Triangle (MOLA): Angel Falls Plateau, Venezuela 20) Southern Triangle (MOSEH): Mount Kilimanjaro region, Africa 21) Southern Triangle (MOPAH): Great Siberian Plain 22) North Polar Convex (HANUM): North Pole region 23) South Polar Convex (HAVA): South Pole region 24) Trigate (YANA): Salt Lake City, Utah, USA 25) Triazimuth (NIMH): Teotihuacan pyramid complex near Mexico City, Mexico 26) Optic Star Union (TREGA): Jerusalem, Israel 27) Solar Rod (MECH): between Springfield and Peoria, Illinois, USA 28) Solar Rod (TALOS): Memphis, Tennessee, USA 29) Solar Rod (EMPRE) Cypress Gardens, Florida, USA 30) Guardian Passage (TAS): South Island, New Zealand 31) Guardian Passage (NADA): Tierra del Fuego, Argentina 32) Guardian Passage (LAO): Denali region of Alaska 33) Omega Node (NU): Grand Canyon, Arizona, USA The Master Builders Legacy on this now "Old Earth" may be coming to a close, but their work here has made it possible for the Earth's ascension into the New Earth Star. You find that you have found resonance with some of these locations. If so, you have encodings which are found in the matrix for that particular geodetic marker. You could also work with these geodetic markers at distance, bringing yourself into attunement with them in order to stabilize the portion of your being that has journeyed through the old earth so that it may more easefully make the transition into the New Earth Star. You could think of these somelike like the 33 degrees of the Masonic Lodge, except that they are the 33 harmonics of the Master Builders and the etheric Living Temple of Light they left as their legacy on earth. Thoth Raismes of Aphra by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AB-0003STD Atu Tehuti, Ati Hatu -- "in the rising of the breath I greet you, in the release of the breath I embrace you" Amanda: Archangel Michael said he is working with the crystal skulls. That he is here to assist us in turning the wheels and we have trusted him to keep the codes for us. I am thinking that the codes are contained within the skulls. Do you have extra information around the skulls part with codes of transformation and/or Michael's mandate. . . he says always that we are his people and he comes when our hearts call him. He also said that it takes real human hearts and human feet to turn the wheels. . . are humans originated anywhere else, or was it a construct of this particular mission on earth? Thoth: The domain or register of Archangel Mikael is liken unto the capstone of the pyramid of Ascension. He is the "one" -- we could also say the "many" -- who holds the capstone in place until the Days of Eschaton -- the End Days or more literally "the last things". Yes, humanity IS the key in the lock or the cogwheels of heart-centric being that will move this world into the next frequency domain of the New Earth Star. The Dweller Crystal Skulls contain encodings of human and human ancestors who give humanity a link through the narrow passage of light threads into the New Earth, via the holograms they project through the Dweller Skulls into the New Earth Hologram. Amanda: I have been told that a call was put out and we answered it and came to earth. That we are from the temples of color/light/and sound. . . that we go to planets as system busters. . . bringing in the new way. Also that we call to the angels and masters and they come as part of an ancient contract. What exactly is this call?

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

I know it is working with the new/ancient communication system of vibration. . . but something deep within feels there is a reason they say "c-a-l-l" Like it is a coded language to be unfolded like a lotus bloom? How could this work consciously? Thoth: The "call" is in the DNA. It is what Gregg Braden is calling the "God Code," which he interprets as "GOD ETERNAL WITHIN THE BODY." The ancient name for this code is "Aba'Ra." This could be translated as "Father Sun," but more aptly it is the Foundation of the Sun of Suns- the Creational Being sending and receiving the clarion call within the DNA. As humanity accepts its Aba'Ra frequency more and more, the codons will unfold lotus style in the DNA to open the "holy of holies" and the Aba'Ra code will develop beyond it's current encoding. This will happen in it's last stage of development with the Ascension of earth and it's life force translation from World System I to World System II -- see Volume 3, 2006 of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron. Amanda: Are you a part of the Grand Council of Light - working with a major part of the universe - do you have people too like Archangel Michael that you work specifically with? Thoth: I AM under the principality of Lord Mikael, who is descended in Light Quantum through Metatron. As such, my soul works with and through many Light Registers concerning the "earth" system and beyond. Two such registers or orders of Light are The Merkabah of the Host and The Physicians of the Blue Pharaoh. I also have my own merkabic host, Chariot of the Sun. Amanda: My Mom had a question too. . .do we achieve full abundance in ALL from living from our heart in Love. . . and believing in abundance. Or is there something more to it? Thoth: Truly LIVING FROM THE HEART is the answer to every question. Marieah: A number of us are experiencing energies that come in colours of violet and gold, sometimes with white. Is this part of the Merlin archetype energy? What is its meaning? Thoth: violet, gold and white are high-vibrational emanations for transmutation and transformation. Merlin employs these vibrations, but so do many others. Violet: the transmuting flame of Lord Mikael and the angelic hosts serving under him. Gold: the Ray of sovereignty. Owning that which you ARE. Living your Breath through all experience. White: the Pureness of complete surrender to the HEART. Marieah: I have experienced myself as a beautiful female golden seal, with flippers. Is this a Lemurian, group consciousness, creational energy? Thoth: The seal is a creature who loves the Being of Freedom and the Freedom of Being. The same could be said of cetaceans. Yet the seal also plays the "joker." He offers the world a form that is non-threatening and comical - but inside he is regal and knows his purpose in life. (See "gold" above.) The appearance of a seal-self is more a personal experience for you at this time. Marieah: myself and others have many experiences of the energy of the spider and web. Is this about the mending/weaving of the multi-dimensional self? Thoth: Yes, it is. Spider Woman says "Weave or Die!" This means that you cannot hold back the pattern until you can come up with one which your mind believes suits you. The pattern must always be woven and as an incarnated soul, so you must move through the pattern with good grace and TRUST in the outcome of it's design. Marieah: Is the Golden Hive a group consciousness, accessed through a hexagonal portal? Thoth: This would be a powerful geometric through which to access it, but not the only one. PLEASE NOTE: if you wish to ask questions of Thoth relating to anything you read in this publication, or about planetary and cosmic happenings that you would like more clarity on, please submit your questions to me (Maia). I will attune to Thoth and will print his responses to those questions he selects to answer in the following issue of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron. I cannot promise that all questions will be answered, but I will do my best to accommodate those with the greatest universal scope and importance. I will give you credit for the questions as well unless you request anonymity.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Lotus Loki New Life Forms in Numis'OM New Life Forms in Numis'OM VOLUME 02, 2007 Please use the "Printer Friendly Version" link on right in the menu bar on the front cover page above to make a quality print of this publication. We were guided to name this publication Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron by Thoth, and the Illumined Assembly of the Christos' Merkabah of the Host comprised of 12 souls holding open a portal for the the Christ energies on this planet. The Radiant Ones we are working with encouraged us to bring forth this publication as a continuance of work that was done by Maia Christianne Nartoomid from 1980 through 1999. During this period Maia produced, first, the periodical entitled The Source (1980-1988), and then later, Temple Doors (1989-1999). In 1994 her partner Simeon Nartoomid joined her in producing the latter periodical. In the nearly 7 year respite between the conclusion of Temple Doors and when the first release of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron began, we both underwent a period of expanded esoteric initiation and deeply personal transformational experiences that have prepeared us for resuming this work at an entirely new octave of experience. Thoth and the IAC Merkabah of the Host have requested that we facilitate a specific Program of Light related to the Aramu Temple of Thoth and Numis'OM to help those who feel resonant with this Station of Light (Spirit Heart Sanctuary) to accelerate their Ascension processes and thus to further help the collective soul of humanity approach the gateway of Ascension which Thoth calls Light-Principle Forty, or LP-40 for short. Ultimately, as we collectively move through this passage we will activate the 44:44 Ascension Stargate and trigger a series of cosmic events destined to alter the DNA of humanity forever. Numis'OM is a causal reference point for the New Earth Star and the 44:44 stargate, and is hosted within the causal body of Venus. The Aramu Temple of Thoth is energetically within the Numis'OM matrix and acts as a way-station for souls building the New Earth Star consciousness from within the earthen experience. Souls can thus visit Numis'OM and even the New Earth Star if they have proper intent and attunement. It is our goal to facilitate pathways for this to occur within. This publication thus sits at the heart of our efforts to facilitate this greater process for the Masters and Illumined Ones that we are working with and to assist souls on earth. We hope that you will find it a fruitful and friendly path into the Homeward Light. Please share your experiences with us and the other subscribers in the Spirit Mythos Forums (you are safe, its private for subscribers only). The front cover art on this issue is entitled "Amaru Muru " (available in Subscriber Freebies and Goodies section ONLY - see below) by Maia Christianne Nartoomid. Most of the art that appears on the front cover and in the various articles in this issue as well as any of our own publications which are herein referenced are available on the Subscriber's Freebies and Discounts page while this issue is current. After this volume becomes a back issue the art that appears in it will then only be available through our Spirit Store IF it has an associated item number listed under it. Click the item number of the art piece to find it there if it no longer appears on the Subscriber's Freebies and Discounts page. Re-orientation to New Earth As we create our New Earth Hologram on this planet, bringing us ever-closer to the New Earth Star first-stage of Numis'OM, certain Old Earth (our current world) portals will begin to re-orientate to the Numis'OM. This means that the "wormholes" they create will take the sojourner into the New Earth state of Numis'OM. THOTH IS CALLING THESE PORTALS WHICH ARE RE-ORIENTATING TOWARD NUMIS'OM THE AN'KII PORTALS (see photo above). The KEY portal to this whole process has begun with the ancient portal of Amaru Muru (also known as "Amaru Meru") at Lake Titicaca in Peru. I find it interesting the "Amaru" is very similar to the name Thoth gave me years ago (before I ever heard of Amaru Muru) to his "temple" in Numis'OM: ARAMU, which, according to Thoth means "Divine Fire Bird". Whereas Thoth states that one of the interpretations for Amaru (also Amah'ra) is "King of the Sun." - also "Serpent of the Sun." Since "bird" and "serpent" are also interchangable in the ancient Lemurian aloii language (as in feathered serpent), we see that "Aramu" and "Amaru" are really two different ways to spell the same word. It is beneath Lake Titicaca where Thoth has one of his two Retreats (more on this later this issue). Also, the new crystalline "Amaru" grid is forming here (link to this info available at the end of this article). The art work to the left is Amaru Muru as it appears in Numis'OM. This is how I see the portal of Amaru Muru opening into Numis'OM. There are many perspectives, but this one comes through very strong for me. The ancient Atlantean-Incans and before them the People of MU (Lemurians) used the Amaru Muru portal to access the Inner Earth realm as well as worlds of other star systems. It can still be "opened" to these realms, but a new gateway is being formed within it, and that is directly into Numis'OM through the Aramu Temple of Thoth. To quote Aine (ph. "anya") of Celtic Fire and Faerie (with her permission): Many are being called to Peru, especially to the Sacred Sites of Lake Titicaca and Machu Picchu, to Cusco and to Tiwanaku in Bolivia. Within the body of the land of Peru are the living codes of Lemuria and the Age of Light. Many of us carry similar codes and by visiting these sites consciously, and asking to be of service to the Greater Plan we open to a quickening of Spirit through us and through the Land. The Portal of Amaru Meru is of especial significance at this time. Amaru Meru, sometimes called AraMu Meru, is a Divine Being who resides in Cosmic Consciousness. When the continent of Lemuria was falling away AraMu Meru carried the highest encodements of that civilization to South America. This Being entered through Hayu Marca. This is an inter-dimensional doorway or portal. It is also what is known as a Spinner Field where two or more dimensions interface.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Thoth reveals to me (Maia) that the People of MU who first came to Amaru Muru were able to create an etheric field within the portal that allowed them to transform their flesh and blood into highly refined crystalline particles for limited periods of time. This helped them to stave off the speeding-up of the life cycle for them after the most recent pole shift had drastically changed the magnetic field of the planet. Atlantean-Incan Initiation by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AB-0036STD There was once a secondary pathway to the Amaru Portal on the Isle of the Sun in the midst of Lake Titicaca, but it has now shifted - at least for the time-being. It was on the Isle of the Sun that the Atlantean-Incans performed their initiation ritual, tapping the other-dimensional flow from the Amaru Muru portal. SOME OF THE OTHER AN'KII PORTALS ARE: - in the Becugi Mountains of Romania - on the grounds of the Rosslyn Chapel and castle ruins near Edinburgh, Scotland - Hill of Tara, Ireland - on Mount Shasta, California, USA - on Mount St. Helens, Washington State, USA The re-orientation of many earth portals toward Numis'OM is a work in progress. Yet it is the Amaru Muru portal that is the anchor point for the rest. It now carries the new crystalline vein in the earth which will eventually spread around the globe, blazing a path for the phi crystalline energies to transform the entire crystalline grid of the planet. First, a definition of what is meant by "Etheric Retreat" in this context: a place where portals exist into inter-dimensional fields which are guided by a Master Being - in this case, Thoth. Thoth has informed me through the years that he has two Retreats in the earth. The first was established by him over 10,000 years ago. This is the one in the caverns under Lake Titicaca, Peru. The second is within Crestone Peak, aka Challenger Peak (re-named in honor of the space shuttle crew aboard the Challenger) which Thoth calls "Crest in the Stone" of the Sangre de Cristo Mountain range at Crestone, in the San Luis Valley of Colorado (where we lived for seven years.) This latter Retreat was established by him in 1994. At that time, he distinguished the two Retreats by saying that the one at Titicaca was more for inner earth inhabitants and the one in Mount Crestone was for the surface earth. The Crestone Retreat is a portal for persons to pass through in astral or guided meditation. It has no physical structure on this plane of reality other than the mountain itself. The Titicaca Retreat is quite different. There are several physical entrances to it - coming both from the inner earth and the surface of the planet at Titicaca. While you might say it "caters" to the Interior Dwellers, it is not exclusive to them, and in the ancient past was entered by surface dwellers far more frequently than it is today. The catacomb of caverns are partly natural and partly man-made. Most of the complex existed long before it became Thoth's Retreat. It was originally used and added to by the aformentioned being, "AraMu Meru." This "cosmic being" Thoth informs me, created the incredible Titicaca complex was called "Asuala" by the People of MU who came with AraMu Meru to this region, and later by the priests and priestesses of the Atlantean-Inca. It was transferred to the being we call "Thoth" by the Hierarchy when he was in his "Thoth Raismes" embodiment (prior to that he had been Toth-Mus-Zurud). However, the "Cosmic Being" of Thoth Raismes / Toth-Mus-Zurud was also one of the seven "layered" souls of AraMu Meru! When I say that there are several physical entrances to Asuala, I do not mean that one can simply walk right into it. Firstly, they are well-concealed, not only physically, but through energy fields. Once a person were to actually see the portal (meaning he/she was vibrationally attuned to that protective energy field), they would then walk down a cavern tunnel a short way before encountering the first "signal". These signals are devices in the wall - like signs in stone with symbols upon them (see image on left). If the traveller is vibrationally attuned to the first "sign", he/she will know which tunnel to take from there, as there are several at each signal station. If he/she is not attuned, then that individual will simply feel strongly urged to retrace their steps or simply have no idea where to proceed from there. Once a person passes through all the signal stations they come to "the" true entrance to Asuala. All doorways and passages to Thoth's Titicaca Retreat lead to this one entrance. In front of the entrance is an object difficult to describe, you see more-or-less what it looks like in the image to the right. It is a living "plant" created by throught energy, not unlike certain new life forms of Numis'OM. However, this one was "designed" to emit an elixir-like substance, that when brreathed and tasted (very heavy ether, so it is absorbed into all senses), prepares the individual for entry into a higher vibrational space - a kind of pre-dimensional shifting space. Once past the entrance into Asula, there are guardians and guides to greet you and take you to various parts of the Retreat. Each "chamber" is of a slightly different vibrational state. On the left we see the Asula Meditation Crystal, you can use it for attunement. Some visitors are ready at a certain stage in their time at the Retreat to go into the Aramu Temple of Thoth in Numis'OM for a period of time - a direct portal is now open in both Retreats to Aramu. One may visit both in the astral Dreamtime, but Crest in the Stone is more easily accessible to that mode of experience. Thoth makes "appearances" in both Retreats at times. It is difficult to explain his role there. These Retreats are encompassed within his energy field, which is enormus, compared to a normal person's. Thoth may appear in his "Thoth Raismes" form, which he maintains still in the Inner Earth, or he may appear in his surface-earth embodiment as Thoth Amii - a being who walks the earth much as does Babaji. Thoth and the Emerald Table by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AB-0037STD The Enochian - Emerald Table is both a holograph within the DNA of the being "Thoth" (originally as Toth-Mus-Zurud) and a physical counterpart he crafted as Thoth Raismes of Aphra. You can read about the higher dynamics of the Enochian hologram in my previous article on this topic. In this article I wrote: The Emerald Table lies beneath the Giza plateau in a hidden chamber.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Yet it is missing one of it's tablets...the 13th of 13. Without this tablet, it cannot be operated. Thoth Raismes took the 13th tablet of emerald with him when he went into a vault which enabled his body to transform so that he could move into and dwell within the inner earth. The 13th tablet remains in that vault for a future age. I have now received from Thoth that the physical Enochian - Emerald Table has been brought to his Sanctuary beneath Lake Titicaca and the 13th "tablet" as been replaced within it. Understand that these "tablets" are holographic sets of Light Language. How was the 13th tablet or holographic set added to the table? Thoth inserted it using a "stylus" that is an uploading device - between his DNA and the actual physical Emerald Table or crystal slab. When the holographic mode is active (not seen here), above the emerald slab, third dimensional images will appear which trigger DNA responses within the viewer of these hologram "tablets." In my latest art work above, you see Thoth Raismes standing in front of the Enochian - Emerald Table with the stylus in his hand. The Table was easily transported from underneath the Great Pyramid to his Asula Retreat at Titicaca. First the actual crystal slab was automatically (mechanically) lowered into it's casing made of very strong yet light-weight alchemical gold. Then two panels came from the upper sides of the golden box and closed (without any evidence of an opening) over the crystal. Then, a device in the ceiling over the golden box was activated and a-la Star Trek, the whole box and crystal slab within was transported to the place you see it in within the image above - in a chamber at Thoth's Lake Titicaca Retreat. I inquired of Thoth why the Emerald Table had been re-located. He responded that it was now time for the mechanism of the Great Pyramid at Giza to re-align with new stellar frequencies, and that should the Emerald Table remain within that mechanism it would transform as well. The Light Language codes within the Emerald Table are not intended to do this. They instead, were to be completed with the 13th tablet and connect into the Amaru Crystal Grid at that very point (Lake Titicaca) on the planet. What of the re-alignment to "new stellar frequencies" of the Great Pyramid mechanism? This, Thoth told me, is a topic for a later time. However, he did say that this re-alignment had to do with the Mayan 5th Day which the planet entered on November 23rd, 2006, and that the re-alignment would occur in the year 2008. 13th Sun Disc in Thoth's Retreat by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AP-0019STD In her book "The Eagle and the Condor" by Jonette Crowley of the Center for Creative Consciousness in Colorado writes of 12 Sun Discs “on Earth that awaken our twelve-stranded DNA.” She futher states that these Discs were brought to earth from the “Great Central Sun. Through my Higher Self uniting with Thoth's Streaming I have seen that the following sacred objects are all inter-related: 1) The Twelve Solar Discs: Jonette Crowley writes about the twelve Sun Discs in "The Eagle and the Condor." 2) The Arks: two major ones, which Thoth refers to as the "Ark of Grace" or "Sacred An" and the "Ark of Karma," and the fiver lesser arks - all with their gemstone scrolls (see also: The Sacred An and The Gemstone Scrolls). 3) The Emerald Table of Thoth 4) the Seventy-Two Dweller Crystal Skulls: (see also: Crystal Skulls - Messengers of Light) 5) The Twelve Lemurian Scrolls of the Aka Terma: (see reference info) The are other sacred objects that could be included here, but these are the main ones of which I am currently aware which are "communicating" among themselves. On a pure-energy level: 1) The Seven Solar Luminescent Rays 2) The Nine Solar Sheaths (Numis'OM VOL. 01, 2007) 3) The 72-Petaled Rose Mystica and many more.... Now Thoth opens the scroll for me so that I may see the 13th Sun Disc. A NEW creation which has been crafted to contain the highest level thus far of the etheric Solar Disc. This 13th Power was released as a result of the opening of the Lotus of the Nine Solar Sheaths, followed by the uniting once again of the 13th "tablet" with the Enochian Emerald Table of Thoth. Like the Emerald Table, the 13th Disc resides within the Asula Sanctary of Thoth beneath Lake Titicaca. Twelve is the number or power matrix of the zodical universe, the Mazzaroth. Thirteen is the number of the Mazaloth, the greater worlds of light residing in a system of thirteen "heavens." Thirteen is also the culmination of the "Grail Mystery" it the completion of the Christic Consciousness into the full blown Rose Mystica. It is therefore feminine in nature (from the perspective of our duality), while the 12-Foldness of the Zodiacal Heavens is masculine in this perspective. One must always be careful in polarity assignments, as these change as such patterns undulate through different universal zones. In "The Eagle and the Condor," Jonette Crowley states that the twelve Sun Discs awaken the 12 strands of our DNA. If this is so, then what is the energetic role of the 13th Sun Disc? Thoth: The 13th Solar Disc - it's energy component - is the culmination of the DNA cycle in this current earth experience. It is also the doorway into the crystalline patterns of the New Earth Star DNA in a World System II formation. at the Asula Sanctuary of Thoth There are 18 emeralds positioned between 18 cogs of a wheel. In the center is a serpent-spiral, and at it's center is the golden Serpent Egg - the Amaru'Cotzal, from whence a green light is radiating. The whole of the disc is suspended upon a 12-pointed star. The 18 emeralds represent the 18 El'ohim of the New Earth Star. They direct the creational flow and hierarchal expansion of the New Earth. The Emerald is the crystalline gem fire of the Crucible of the El'ohim - the forgers of the New Worlds. The working of this forge is represented by the cogged wheel, aligning itself to the El'ohim, and moving in accordance with the rhythms of the universe, as the 18 El'ohim draw the "wheel" into synchronization with their Command.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

The 12-pointed star is the symbol (in this instance) of the Mazzaroth - the 12th Heaven, birthing, upholding and moving forward the template of the 13th Heaven, the Mazaloth. The serpent-spiral is the creational system as it uncoils and sets the elementation for life-forms. The Aamaru'Cotzal or Serpent Egg at it's center is the Divine Seed emanating the GREEN FIRE of Creation. The Serpent Masters who are also Solar Lords, such as Thoth, AmuRu Meru, Quetzalcoatl and Merlin, to name a few, guardian the power of the Serpent/Dragon energy on the earth. You can read more about this universal wave in my article "The Cross of Quetzalcoatl in VOL. 01, 2006 of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron. Jonette Crowley sees the Amaru Muru portal as a "Venus Gate." In her book "The Eagle and the Condor" she also writes that "According to one author, the (Great White) Brotherhood first came from Venus by Beings known as Kumaras." This would certianly align to what I received concerning Lord Melchizedek arriving on the earth at MU from Venus, bringing the Archangel Stone with him and establishing Mystery Schools in MU (Lemuria). Thoth states that his soul was also layered with this first "Melchizedek." According to my more recent insights, the Venus Temple-nodes on earth open the pathways of the energetic grid lines of Venus into the earth - Venus being the "guardian planet" of earth, and the only planet besides earth in this solar system whose essence was transported here from Rigel in the constellation of Orion (see also: Venus Temples). In conclusion, all these energy systems and physical objects carrying the Light codes of these systems (such as the Sun Discs, Dweller Crystal Skulls, Emerald Table, etc) are merely manifestations of the explorations of the soul through "Being" and are not in themselves overly important to the bigger picture. In fact, they are like grains of sand; but are useful to us in the here and now, as we come to expand our awareness to the point where we understand that we do not need any of this to access our Infinite Spiritual Being! New Life Forms in Numis'OM by Maia Christianne Nartoomid OR-0027STD of the New Earth Star As you have read and seen in the Light and Life Gallery and Oracle Tool (introduced in the last issue of this publication), the first staging ground of the New Earth Star, which we are calling Numis'OM, can appear very similar to our current earth environment. There are major differences: things can change in the blink of an eye, different souls may see different things in the same space, the colors are more intense and everything seems so much more alive with spirit. But there are grass, trees, flowers, etc, and for those who wish them, buildings and homes as well. Yet there are also other zones within Numis'OM that are not so familiar to our current world. The most exotic of these is what Thoth calls the Hespara, which translates to the "edge" or "fine point." In the Hespara life resembles the early "LOTUS" earth, before it merged with the more physical evolutionary matter-planet; although there are differences, for it is a NEW Earth that is being created here, and not a return to the ancient one. As in the ancient earth, Hespara is a creational zone for new species of flora and fauna, but it is more than that. These new life-forms are creation-builders in themselves, in that their very existence is so transformative that they radiate out into the whole of the New Earth matrix and into the full spectrum of Numis'OM. This "radiation" is illuminating in scope. As a result, Numis'OM inhabitants and visitors (old earth souls visiting in Dreamtime or other altered states) are experiencing radiant evolution within their DNA. The creational life forms of Hespara are not a "finished product." Well, no aspect of life ever is - but their transmutations are constant. These "Loci" (a focus of intent) are sentient yet the higher forms contain encoded "God Commands" (kind of Biblical, but seems to fit) that ordain high degrees of PURE SOURCE RADIANCE, streaming into the entire New Earth Star grid. By seeing some of these beings - touching them in Spirit, we here in the Old Earth can quicken not only our own Ascension Codes but those of the entire Old Earth domain. This brings us to my greatly prized (by me) project of the "Ascension Lotus Loci." In the Numis'OM - Eye of Metatron subscription introduction written at the inception of this publication I state: "The Ascension Lotus Loci" Spirit Tool. This tool will offer a means of harmonically infusing your DNA with the key vibrational reference points or "loci" held within Thoth's Temple of Aramu located energetically in the Numis'OM portal for the New Earth Star. This will thus be a serious tool for working with higher level Ascension energetics via the streaming of consciousness offered by my Illumined Mentor, Thoth. The Hespara Loci contain these "vibrational reference points" to all of Numis'OM and certainly to Thoth's Temple of Aramu, which is positioned energetically upon the Gateway to the Hespara. For some time, I searched in vain for a software program that would allow me to create close facsimiles of the Hespara Loci life-forms for my Ascension Lotus Loci project. I was unable to find anything at all satisfactory until I recently came across a fractal software that has enabled me to do so. In fact it is extraordinary, in that the beings seem to simply flow into the fractal calculations being automatically created as I am guided to work the "mutations" buttons. So now I have the Hespara Loci appearing in art form! Since the Hespara life-forms are constantly in the process of mutation themselves, it was difficult for me to classify them, but with Thoth's help I have managed to divide them more-or-less into the following categories (ordered from highest in spirit presence to the lowest). Understand, that these life-forms are morphing through a specific sequence of "evolution." I use this word loosely, as Thoth has told us that in the larger picture, there is not such thing as evolution, but within our parameters of consciousness it is perceivable as such, so that is what we shall call it. Thus, there is no precise dividing line where for instance, an "EL" becomes a "Gatekeeper." Yet for the purposes of my Lotus Loci presentation, I have placed them where they are most suited. The Hespara Loci often make appearances outside of the Hespara zone - or maybe you could stay they take it with them.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

In any case, in Numis'OM one could be walking (or floating) through a forest of redwood trees and suddenly see one of these luminous forms before them. This is kind of a bleed-through between zones in Numis-OM. Like "Wonderland," nothing in Numis'OM stays the way you think it should! What does all this have to do with us here and now? These Hespara Loci are living, "evolving" nutrients - building blocks of where we are going. Ingesting them visually energetically prepares our DNA for transition into the New Earth Star; and in an more immediate sense, it is a viable balancing and healing experience for our energy bodies to "take them in" and let them flow through our meridians. They not only exist in Numis'OM, but on the micro-level in our current Old Earth and bodies. As they evolve on Numis'OM, so they "appear" on the micro-level in our current world matter. As they grow stronger, we and our earth become more wedded to them. As WE become more heart-coherent, so they grow stronger! The driving force of the Lotus Loci nutrients (that are also the new life forms of Numis'OM) is the unified field, or more aptly the morphogenetic field. The two are not the same, but morphogenetic fields nest inside the unified field. The unified field holds the entire BEING as a seamless flow. The morphogenetic fields are like distinct crucibles of "unified" BEING within the greater unified field. The morphogenetic fields translate the BEING into developmental association, which we might call the turn key of "evolution" (again, "evolution" being only a means for us to understand an aspect of universal process). So these "nutrients" that are in US and in Numis'OM in a constantly morphing state are creating through the electrical synapses of our nervous system, pathways for new "System II" worlds to form. According to Dr John Hagland, a quantum physics scientist, you access the unified field "by using the human nervous system, by inwardly directing the mind so that it identifies itself with the unified field." That's close, but according to Thoth not quite to the point. Thoth shows me how the nervous system is the key to the brain's identification with reality - what it considers "real" in and around it. Notice I say "brain" and not "mind", for the mind simply uses the brain as a tool for a tiny bit of it's purpose. However, what I am calling the Lotus Loci nutrients use the nervous system like a petri dish to germinate their light-encoded bodies. When we feed our nervous systems with the pure light of LOVE, so the Loci nutrients BLOOM and develop our whole human systems to greater awareness and capacity. Each category of Loci is within it's own Frequency Matrix Gallery/Oracle (EL, Sea Foam, etc) where you can interact with them. Each image is also accompanied by a mantra (to help you attune to that form's specific frequency), but there is no insight given as a personal divination. However, you do have a "random select" Spirit Chooser button available, so you can select at "random" which Loci wishes to interact with you at that time in true Oracle fashion. The Hespara / Lotus Loci forms are PURE in their LIGHT RADIANCE, and therefore the visual contact of your sight upon them, is quickening to the being you are - to your holistic system of energy bodies and soul depth in your being. You may utilize this tool any way you feel so guided, but it is suggested by Thoth that for the most part, you not stop with just one selection per visit, but continue until you feel guided to stop. This way, you are receiving a series of light encoding nutrients. You may linger for as long or as short a time as you wish on each image. Write down the mantras for each to be used in meditation later. It would be especially helpful to keep a journal or record of some kind as to which types (categories) you are most drawn to and what specific images come up for you when using the random Spirit Chooser button so you are using the Gallery as an Oracle. This will allow you substance for your own contemplation as to how these energies in your own field may be playing upon the instrument of your entire being. To use these tools you will need access to my Kyi'Ra Member Portal on CosmicConsciousnessOnline.com. You can join my Kyi'Ra Member Portal by clicking here. There are 27 images in each gallery/oracle for a total of 189 "nutrients" in all. I have chosen one image as an example of each category in my summary below: 1) EL: These beings appear as radiant flashes in auric envelopes of light. These "flashes" are determined by the movement of the electro-magnetic cycles in the planet. While the New Earth Star / Numis'OM is not as physical as is our old earth, according to Thoth there is no real cut-off between "spirit" and "matter." There is simply finer matter or denser spirit, whichever way you wish to view it. Thus, the evolving electro-magnetic field of the New Earth Star is far more subtle and with different parameter of universal law support it, but it does exist. The EL move along the convoluting currents of RADIANT LIGHT as they strike the "shore" of the electro-magnetic field of Numis'OM. In the Hespara level, this field is demonstrated in stronger peaks and valley - less what we would call "stable," for it is at the "Edge" the evolving New Earth that the tendrils of the planet's energy are reaching out through the peaking energy to create new territory. The EL supply the "manna" or life force for the entire New Earth and it's forming terra-planes. Gazing upon an EL - or an image of one, the individual soul may experience that resonate WAVE of LIGHT rise up in them - the peak of their own Edge in a light-bearing being. Join my Kyi'Ra Member Portal and View the EL Matrix Oracle 2) Gate Keepers: Gate Keepers are the Guards of the Realm. They keep in balance the delicate flow of energies and see to it that invasive or discordant "radioactivity" is kept to a minimum. As RADIANT LIGHT strikes the Waves of the electro-magnetic field, certain chaotic "spillovers" occur. The Gate Keepers gather it up and "digest" it into more subtle coherent energy. Souls looking upon or viewing images of the Gate Keepers are given a path into becoming more coherent with their own energy fields. Join my Kyi'Ra Member Portal and View the Gate Keepers Matrix Oracle 3) Light Plasmas: These are the collectors of the RADIANT LIGHT pulsed into the electro-magnetic waves by the EL. The Light Plasmas feed off that moment of "contact" and form themselves as cells of very specific properties, utilizing the RADIANT LIGHT to create the codes and paths of the planetary systemic condition.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

They move through the vaporous ethers of the Hespara zone like jellyfish, pumping the shimmering light-charged particles of vapor through their amorphous forms. Light Plasmas are kind of like "blood banks," in that the flora and fauna of the realm can draw sustenance of specific light molecules from these plasmas. Souls looking upon or viewing images of the Light Plasmas may experience infusions of similar energies as well. Join my Kyi'Ra Member Portal and View the Light Plasmas Matrix Oracle 4) Air Sylphs: These are creatures of the ether-air. They capture stray particles on their "feathers" and transmute them into coherent patterns to then be utilized by the Crystallines. The Air Sylphs are also very attuned to the Music of the Spheres - the constant harmonics of the universe and beauteous song can often be heard emitting from their forms. They have no mouths or vocal chords, but their whole being can quiver with the harmonies and then the vibrating "feathers" sing as they shiver against one another. Souls looking upon or viewing images of the Air Sylphs - or hearing their marvelous tones, may feel ecstatic and full of healing light and joy, creating a true sense of oneness with the Universe. Join my Kyi'Ra Member Portal and View the Air Sylphs Matrix Oracle 5) Crystallines: These crystal beings are the first level of "elementals" in the Hespara, and thus in the New Earth / Numis'OM. They are the purest template for all the elemental building-blocks of the New Earth Star. They appear upon the ground - not usually singly, but rather fitting together in the appearance of an "ice palace" grandeur. In my depiction of them, however, you will see them singly presented. They can singly or enamsse, disappear from one location and appear in another, for they are collective in their strong morphogenetic field. Souls looking upon or viewing images of the Crystallines may tap and commune with the God-seed of all crystalline structures in the Old and the New Earth. Join my Kyi'Ra Member Portal and View the Crystallines Matrix Oracle 6) Sea Foams: The denser vapors of the Hespara form pools, lakes and seas. The Sea Foams dwell in these waters - either riding just above them, trailing tendrils or parts of their form in the liquid solution, or moving beneath the surface. The Sea Foams open the energy current of all liquid substance in the New Earth system. They keep it pure and revitalized. They also seed it with nutrition for those who would partake of it's nourishment, not in drinking it, but absorbing it directly into their forms. Souls looking upon or viewing images of the Sea Foams may experience a cleansing of the liquids in their body. Join my Kyi'Ra Member Portal and View the Sea Foams Matrix Oracle 7) Terra Forms: These are the "mammals" of the New Earth design. They contain all the genetic material necessary to build the new life forms the souls of the New Earth will eventually inhabit. We will not look like them! They are simply generators of the DNA "start kit." The human form as we know it is very much along the same symmetry as future human structure. There will be difference of course, but even to our current view of beauty, we would respond in awe and wonder to these future PURE GEM bodies. In the meantime, the Terra Forms do their job of generating the proper codes and keeping them "fertile" for the future age. These codes are not only for "humans," but other species as well. In the future New Earth (beyond Numis'OM) the lines will not be so specifically drawn between "human" and "animal" - for the DNA will develop into a much less species-specific content. Even Numis'OM's animals are closer to the humans of that realm in that they are able to freely communicate between one another. Some are a combination of the two (human-animal), such as the Lion-Headed Ones of Sirius, who freely enter Numis'OM, since the forming New Earth and the realm of Sirius -- of the Sun Lords of Sirius (Lion-Headed Ones) -- are both System II type worlds. Souls looking upon or viewing images of the Terra Forms may experience glimpses of the new genetic potentials of their future incarnations in Numis'OM and beyond. Join my Kyi'Ra Member Portal and View the Terra Forms Matrix Oracle These celestial NUTRIENTS are becoming active now - in our DNA which will FEED the transformation - as the new life forms (Lotus Loci) in Numis'OM replicate... these "new life forms" ARE the nutrients - they are the FOOD for the new building blocks of a WORLD SYSTEM II that we will be entering as we "become" the NEW EARTH STAR." Please share your experiences while interacting with the Lotus Loki Frequency Matrix Galleries with me, I spent many, many hours creating all of this and your feedback and shared experiences mean a lot to me! Thoth Raismes of Aphra by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AB-0003STD Atu Tehuti, Ati Hatu -- "in the rising of the breath I greet you, in the release of the breath I embrace you" Faith Starlight: (on the Master Builder's geodetic markers) in working with the 33 integration points of the Master Builders, I am aware that there are some areas that do not have any points listed. These are large land mass areas: Australia, although New Zealand does have one, Europe and Canada. Would you be aware of a reason why these continents and a country would not have at least one? Thoth: When these "markers" were established the surface of the earth was much different than it is today. The markers are ENERGY and not objects, so they shift and move with the tectonic plates and the axis reversals (pole shifts). Their distribution is determined by these shifting actions, which are not chaotic or by chance, but follow a specific program of LIGHT. At times they may be bunched more together and in other eras more evenly distributed, according to the movements of the earth. Such distribution changes of the markers take place over eons of time. Faith Starlight: in the material on the Mazur, Thoth mentions a stone which he refers to as "The Stone of God." Is this an actual stone or can it also refer to a cornerstone within us that we need to anchor? I have been contemplating on his words for sometime and I am wondering if this "Stone of God" could also be a "Cornerstone" or a "Keystone." Maia: "The Stone of God" in the Mazur article was not coined by Thoth, but written about previously by Elizabeth Van Buren and I believe she was quoting someone else. However, Thoth elaborated on it in Temple Doors Issue 03 - 1996.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

It is in the article "The Vault of Orion." The whole article really needs to be read to fit it all together cohesively, but briefly: "The Stone of God... is one of the pieces of the Lapis Exlis, known as the crown jewel of Lucifer, a sacred meteor which crashed to earth... Thoth has said that the cup from which Jesus drank at the Last Supper was created from one such shard of the meteor..." and another piece was the Spear of Longinus thrust into Jesus’ side as he was suspended upon the cross. (Note: although I wrote "crashed" in the quote above, I have now been informed by Thoth that this meteor did not "crash" but "landed," as it was intelligently directed.) The Stone of God mentioned in “The Island of Thirty Circles” is one half of the largest single pieces of the Lapis Exlis. The other half would become known as the Emerald Table of Thoth. It was once a larger piece that was split in two. The Emerald Tablets were created alchemically by Thoth to contain the whole Enochian hologram he brought to earth in his Being and was therefore within his DNA. The tablets were then injected into the meteor "table." I personally find it of interest that when I was guided by Thoth last month (April, 2007) to create the image of him standing before the Emerald Table, and to include it and further information on the Emerald Table in this issue of Numis’OM, I did not realize that this question was related to the Emerald Table! I simply can’t remember everything I have channeled or written in the last 40 years. It was only when I went back and read what I wrote on the Stone of God in Temple Doors Issue 03 -1996, did I realize that both the Stone of God and the Emerald Table were halves of one large piece - the Lapis Exlis. If you are interested in pursuing this topic, I suggest you read "The Vault of Orion" in Temple Doors Issue 03 - 1996. The Lapis Exlis is also called by Thoth The Midnight Sun Stone. The half of the meteor fragment transmuted by Thoth into the physical Emerald Table looks like "emerald," as does the "Stone of God" (although not identical in coloration to Thoth's Emerald Table). However, this is due to the fact that these pieces were transmuted into "finer stuff" so to speak. Most of the meteor fragments are of a dark appearance and do not appear emerald green in color. Faith Starlight: I recently came upon the following as I read a book called "The Children of MU" by James Churchward and I am wondering if this figures into some of this in some way. The "Keystone of MU" is as follows: God created One; One became Two; Two produced all that comes after. Is this the Principle the Mazur carried out of Lemuria and into Atlantis and then carried out of Atlantis? Is this what we each must know and understand to bring ourselves into the fullness of our own knowing of the One and the All? Thoth: James Churchward’s work focused intently on his interpretations of true ancients books of MU which he saw and some which he heard about. However, Churchward’s interpretations are very limited to the era in which he lived and to his stout Christian upbringing. He therefore used the ancient texts as a means to further his own belief system. This does not render his interpretations invalid, but they must be viewed within that context of thought and intention on his part. Therefore the "Keystone of MU" is more Churchward’s view on some basic translations that are not entirely applicable to association with the “Principle” of the Mazur. The essence IS there, however, as applied to the constant organization of universal principle. Faith Starlight: I was reading this article again The Pyriethum and the Suna (Grail) Apis and I am wondering what we need to do to prepare ourselves for this event. There are the four chambers or temple complexes and I imagine they are not all housed together. If over time the denseness of Earth has impacted on these temples of light, then what is it we need to do in order to clear these energies to allow the keys and codes these 48 lords are holding to come forth when they are needed. I want to begin preparing myself to activate these 9 energy bodies and begin working with these 48 Enochian Masters but I know that there is clearing work that we must all do first to prepare ourselves for this to occur. I don’t want to wait too long to begin this clearing. Thoth: OPEN to the STREAMING of DIVINE MANNA-LIGHT-LOVE INTO THE ENERGY BODIES. Call upon this daily, hourly if necessary - whenever the thought approaches seize upon it and act. As the Master said, "Ask and ye shall receive." Faith: you state "without the 'Hall of Records' the conduit for the earth’s moving into the next crystalline matrix zone cannot be achieved." From Thoth's perspective what is needed to bring this forward so that when everything is in alignment these 48 Enochian Master can come forth and release their keys and codes? Thoth: Natural cycles in the earth will take place, in accordance with the awakening beings of the planet. As these cycles progress, with the aid and guidance of the Hierarchy and Illumined Ones, so the Hall of Records will be activated. This is true also of the 48 Enochian Masters quickening to bring forth the keys and codes to the earth. Energies of the "Gods" (Powers) turn the planet in their hands. As it turns and moves through the currents of infinite possibilities, so the desires of the souls of earth fill the sacred cup and the planet drinks deeply from the chalice of the world. If the desires are coming from a place of dis-empowered ignorance, they liquid in the cup is bitter, causing the seas to churn. The earth boils and then freezes into a deathly sleep. When the desires are uplifting, hopeful and full of LOVING PRESENCE, the cup turns golden and the liquid becomes the elixir of Eternal Life. The earth warms, blushing in the New Day, and the larks sing upon the highest flowering branches beneath a New Sun. ******* Marieah: I have experienced the red, the blue and the violet serpents you spoke of in the last issue. Then they all became dragons. Finally, there came a turquoise sea serpent/dragon who retrieved the sphinx from the bottom of the ocean. What is the meaning of the turquoise sea serpent/dragon? Thoth: The symbology of your vision of the turquoise sea serpent/dragon retrieving the sphinx from the bottom of the ocean... The energy seals on the sphinx will be released when there is a specific super nova in the constellation of the Serpent (Hydra), coming from the eye of the serpent (scroll down to "Ghost of Jupiter" on this Hydra web page). Also, a better image of the nebula.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Maia: note the turquoise color of the nebula! ******** Debbie: I had assumed (perhaps wrongly) that the "second sun" when we move to the Rigel solar system was either great central sun or golden star Mazuriel... can you comment on that? Thoth: The "second sun" in this regard is an energy plasma sphere generated within the New Earth Star realm. Understand that the Earth and Venus will then be part of a new planetary system INSIDE the star-sun of Rigel. It will be on a dimension that does not experience the star-suns as we do now (as super-heated gases). Debbie: Also, are you, Thoth, able to comment on the physical location of golden star Mazuriel in/or out of our universe? Thoth: Mazuriel is within the Attasic Universe (the supernal universe which spawned the universe we are now in), the portal of which is to be found through Denebola, in the constellation of Leo. Debbie: what did the series of earthquakes (March, 2007 - Fiji Islands, Japan and Hawaii) have to do with the New Earth, and what connection does it have to the ancient land mass of MU lying under the blue Pacific? Thoth: This was the result of activity of the roil point of the planet in Hawai'i, as it is awakening to the changes in the earth's frequency and the magnetic shifting, moving the earth ever-closer to it's next polar shift. *************** Kathleen Millar: It's recently been revealed that a piece of the earth's crust has just disappeared (editor: actually they do not know how long it has been missing) and they (whoever they is) have no idea where it's gone to. The result is that the mantle of the earth has been exposed. This seems very symbolic to me but I'm not sure why? (see original article). 1a) Can Thoth comment any further on Ram-Set and it's connection to the City of the Lords on Mars which was written about in Temple Doors 1&2 1995? Thoth: The RAM-SET is much like the Lotus Loci, the new life forms of Numis’OM, also found developing in the DNA. 1b) Can Thoth explain in more detail what he meant when he called Ram-Set an antibody? Thoth: as a crystalline living organism it is an antibody in that it cancels out certain astral configurations which would eventually produce changes in the DNA patterning that would not be beneficial to the planet. 2) Can Thoth add anything at this time to the following paragraph from Source Edition 02 - 1984 (bottom of page 20): "The illustration on the cover of this issue shows the door to the subterranean levels of the City of the Red Star. It has been sealed away since the kachina left it, although it has been visited by one since that day. The Christed Man, Jesus, when He walked the Americas after His resurrection, went into the underground portion of the ceremonial level to receive a crystal waiting for him there...yet he walked through the sealed door. The man Jesus had a purposeful link to the Hopi. Before His incarnation into the body of Jesus, who was to merge with the Christ in that lifetime, one of His incarnation had been among the Hopi. Thus He returned to be among them briefly during His time with the peoples of the Americas. As to the crystal left for him in the deserted city, that is a story of which all the parts cannot yet be told. It can be said that it was brought down into elementation. It is the Archangel Stone. In the future, this crystal will play an essential role in the struggle of good and evil above and on the Earth, for it will be desired by Lucifer's Fallen, as a means to "capture the Light of the World." Yet it is the very crowning gem (in essence) forsaken by Lucifer that is integrated with the Supreme Archangel, known to us as the Christ." I'm particularly interested in anything further about The Archangel Stone. Thoth: The Archangel "crystal-stone," while being out-pictured in a physical crystal, is in actuality a crystalline DNA KEY or CODE that opens the pathways in the human energy bodies to the development of the CHRISTIC BODY or PURE GEM. The Archangel Stone which was brought to earth by the Lord Melchizedek, has been embodied in various crystal forms in the Ancient Days on earth. PLEASE NOTE: if you wish to ask questions of Thoth relating to anything you read in this publication, or about planetary and cosmic happenings that you would like more clarity on, please submit your questions to me (Maia). I will attune to Thoth and will print his responses to those questions he selects to answer in the following issue of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron. I cannot promise that all questions will be answered, but I will do my best to accommodate those with the greatest universal scope and importance. I will give you credit for the questions as well unless you request anonymity.

# Ascension Lotus Loci Galleries

The Lotus Loci are creational life forms that are
evolving in the New Earth Star's Numis'OM - and also in the crystalline
structure of our current DNA on micro-levels. These “Loci” (a focus of
intent) are sentient yet the higher forms contain encoded “God Commands”
that ordain high degrees of PURE SOURCE RADIANCE, streaming into the entire
New Earth Star grid. The Lotus Loci life forms are "cosmic nutrients" with which to
feed our evolving New Earth planet and bodies.
As you embrace the images of some of these creations, so
you will become "fed" by their light-encoded properties. Each category is
within it’s own special gallery or frequency matrix and each image is accompanied by a mantra (to help
you attune to that form’s specific frequency), but there is no information given
as a personal divination. However, in these galleries there is a “random” select Spirit Chooser button available,
so you can allow Spirit to choose which Lotus Loci wishes to interact with you
from that specific galleries frequency matrix at that time.
You may utilize these tools any way you feel so guided,
but it is suggested by Thoth that for the most part, you not stop with working with just
one selection per visit, but continue until you feel guided to stop. This
way, you are receiving a series of light encoding nutrients. You may linger
for as long or as short a time as you wish on each image. Write down the
mantras for each to be used in meditation later. It would be especially
helpful to keep a journal or record of some kind as to which types
(categories) you are most drawn to and what specific images come up for you when you use the
random select "Spirit Chooser" button. This will allow you substance for your own contemplation as
to how these energies in your own field may be playing upon the instrument
of your entire being.
For much more in-depth information on the Lotus Loci I suggest you first read the article "Creational Life Forms
of the New Earth" in VOL. 02, 2007 of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron
I have provided you with a peek at 5 of
the images from each of the Lotus Loki frequency matrix galleries. These
images will allow you to experience some of what these energies are about.
For a complete experience of the entire energy matrix of the 189 Lotus Loci
(27 x 7) please visit the gallery frequency matrixes for each below. In each of these galleries you will be able to experience all 27 of the images for each of the frequency matrixes (189 images in all) and you will also be able to view them in a much larger size to get the full energy impact of their respective matrixes. There is also the "random" Spirit Chooser feature as well that you can utilize as desired, you will see the link for that in each gallery.
The Seven Lotus Loci Frequency Matrixes
EL: These beings appear as radiant flashes in auric
envelopes of light. These “flashes” are determined by the movement of the
electro-magnetic cycles in the planet. While the New Earth Star / Numis’OM
is not as physical as is our old earth, according to Thoth there is no real
cut-off between “spirit” and “matter.” There is simply finer matter or
denser spirit, whichever way you wish to view it. Thus, the evolving
electro-magnetic field. . . (continued in VOL. 02, 2007 Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron).
Gate Keepers: Gate Keepers are the Guards of the Realm. They keep in balance
the delicate flow of energies and see to it that invasive or discordant
“radioactivity” is kept to a minimum. As RADIANT LIGHT strikes the Waves of
the electro-magnetic field, certain. . . (continued in VOL. 02, 2007 Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron).
Light Plasmas: These are the collectors of the RADIANT LIGHT pulsed into the
electro-magnetic waves by the EL. The Light Plasmas feed off that moment of
‘contact’ and form themselves as cells of very specific properties,
utilizing the RADIANT LIGHT to create the codes and paths of the planetary. . . (continued in VOL. 02, 2007 Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron).
Air Sylphs: These are creatures of the ether-air. They capture stray
particles on their “feathers” and transmute them into coherent patterns to
then be utilized by the Crystallines. The Air Sylphs are also very attuned
to the Music of the Spheres - the constant harmonics of the universe and
beauteous song can often be. . . (continued in VOL. 02, 2007 Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron).
Crystallines: These crystal beings are the first level of “elementals” in
the Hespara, and thus in the New Earth / Numis’OM. They are the purest
template for all the elemental building-blocks of the New Earth Star. They
appear upon the ground - usually not singly, but. . . (continued in VOL. 02, 2007 Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron).
Sea Foams: The denser vapors of the Hespara form pools, lakes and seas. The
Sea Foams dwell in these waters - either riding just above them, trailing
tendrils or parts of their form in the liquid solution, or moving beneath
the surface. The Sea Foams open the energy current of. . . (continued in VOL. 02, 2007 Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron).
Terra Forms: These are the “mammals” of the New Earth design. They contain
all the genetic material necessary to build the new life forms the souls of
the New Earth will eventually inhabit. We will not look like them! They are
simply generators of the DNA. . . (continued in VOL. 02, 2007 Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron).

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

A New Earth Harmonic Attunement Harmonic Attunement VOLUME 03, 2007 Please use the "Printer Friendly Version" link on right in the menu bar on the front cover page above to make a quality print of this publication. We were guided to name this publication Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron by Thoth, and the Illumined Assembly of the Christos' Merkabah of the Host comprised of 12 souls holding open a portal for the the Christ energies on this planet. The Radiant Ones we are working with encouraged us to bring forth this publication as a continuance of work that was done by Maia Christianne Nartoomid from 1980 through 1999. During this period Maia produced, first, the periodical entitled The Source (1980-1988), and then later, Temple Doors (1989-1999). In 1994 her partner Simeon Nartoomid joined her in producing the latter periodical. In the nearly 7 year respite between the conclusion of Temple Doors and when the first release of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron began, we both underwent a period of expanded esoteric initiation and deeply personal transformational experiences that have prepeared us for resuming this work at an entirely new octave of experience. Thoth and the IAC Merkabah of the Host have requested that we facilitate a specific Program of Light related to the Aramu Temple of Thoth and Numis'OM to help those who feel resonant with this Station of Light (Spirit Heart Sanctuary) to accelerate their Ascension processes and thus to further help the collective soul of humanity approach the gateway of Ascension which Thoth calls Light-Principle Forty, or LP-40 for short. Ultimately, as we collectively move through this passage we will activate the 44:44 Ascension Stargate and trigger a series of cosmic events destined to alter the DNA of humanity forever. Numis'OM is a causal reference point for the New Earth Star and the 44:44 stargate, and is hosted within the causal body of Venus. The Aramu Temple of Thoth is energetically within the Numis'OM matrix and acts as a way-station for souls building the New Earth Star consciousness from within the earthen experience. Souls can thus visit Numis'OM and even the New Earth Star if they have proper intent and attunement. It is our goal to facilitate pathways for this to occur within. This publication thus sits at the heart of our efforts to facilitate this greater process for the Masters and Illumined Ones that we are working with and to assist souls on earth. We hope that you will find it a fruitful and friendly path into the Homeward Light. Please share your experiences with us and the other subscribers in the Spirit Mythos Forums (you are safe, its private for subscribers only). The front cover art on this issue is entitled "New Earth World Tree " (available in Subscriber Freebies and Goodies section - see below) by Maia Christianne Nartoomid. Most of the art that appears on the front cover and in the various articles in this issue as well as any of our own publications which are herein referenced are available on the Subscriber's Freebies and Discounts page while this issue is current. After this volume becomes a back issue the art that appears in it will then only be available through our Spirit Store IF it has an associated item number listed under it. Click the item number of the art piece to find it there if it no longer appears on the Subscriber's Freebies and Discounts page. New Earth World Tree by Maia Christianne Nartoomid OR-0028STD The artwork above e is my symbolic artistic representation of the New Earth World Tree. The New Earth Star is a World System II (our current “Old Earth” is in the last stages of a World System I). World Systems II are still in duality, but in a much more balanced movement than are the World Systems I. As the New Earth Star continues to developed. In Numis’OM we will find that the duality is like a vibrational DANCE in which each “partner” easily integrates and sustains the other. In my New Earth World Tree art, you can see that the male is in a supine position, integrated with the earth - passive and receptive - what we identify as a feminine quality. Yet he is also foundational - the “ground beneath our feet.” The ability to manifest so much more easily in Numis’OM will allow the masculine energy to become more supple and less demanding, since demands on it’s own sheer strength of survival will be almost non-existent. The female is floating above him, receiving from the energy ethers and stellar geometries. She sends these signals down into his ever-present “earth body.” She is the TREE rooted in the male-earth-foundation. When the masculine is released from his current role of supplying, protecting and building sustainable environments, he will adapt to the role of a more supple, what we identify as “feminine” receptivity. Yet he will still be the foundation, as the female draws the etheric power into and out of the “form” through his “earth body.” Her ROOTS grow in his fertile soil and his ability to re-vitalize and sustain come from the power surging through her, filtering what is needed for the New Earth. This is a greatly simplified picture, but that portion of which I was guided to express in my New Earth World Tree. The Mermaid Cove art by Maia Christianne Nartoomid water animation by Simeon Nartoomid OR-0029STD What I am calling “New Avalon” is a reality world of Numis’OM which has been duplicated from the “Old Avalon” dimension here in this world. Yet, it is not exact. It’s primary difference (and this is an important one) is that it is not caught in the past - in holding ancient keys and codes, as is our Old Earth Avalon. It is taking the “base line” of the Old Avalon and upgrading it as the Numis’OM worlds move forward. Like the Old, the New Avalon has unicorns, dragons, mermaids (and mermen), griffins, etc... all energy forms which have assumed the “roles” our planetary mythos assigned to them. BUT the New Avalon is changing these attributes, slowly but surely, and allowing them to become more advanced in free-flowing imagery. The “avalonic” astral realms of the Old Earth (our current earth), in which some souls venture after leaving their bodies behind (what we tend to call “death”) also contains the Old Avalon energy imaging. In Yogananda’s “Autobiography of a Yogi” he writes of his encounter with his guru, Sri Yukteswar, after the latter’s “death.” He appeared to Yogananda at that time in the flesh, and told him of his experiences on many different astral planes of earth he had visited. In one instance, he spoke of mermaids in one of these realms. Yet earth’s astral planes are all part of the Old Earth.
