# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

In the New Avalon, these mythic energy forms will work new wonders, and as they do they will change us and themselves. Old or New, what is meant by “Avalon” in this context? Thoth defines it as an etheric dimension (within a specific electro-magnetic zone of earth) that is saturated with the Higher Nature elements or “devas.” It is that state of being in which the “High Devas” or organizers of Nature reside and extend themselves into other dimensions of earth through commands of life (via DNA) to the species. Further, Avalon became infused with the human element when the veils between Avalon and this realm were more loosely defined. When the gates closed between the realms (except for a very few), some humans chose to stay on the other side. These were the ones who had mixed their blood with the faerie beings - the devas who took form more closely resembling us (in DNA). From this “mix” there came the Sidhe and some other faerie-human races. Much mythos comes to life in Avalon due to the thought forms of the human injection into that realm. The energy beings such as unicorns, dragons and mer-people are REAL, but the forms they choose to take are morphed from the human mythic design. In the New Avalon this mythos is opening like a flower to new dimensions of being, and thus the beings and creatures of New Avalon are eternally engaged in an evolving process. an Intentional Community of Numis’OM In this volume of Numis’OM I decided to spotlight what we might call an “intentional community” of Numis’OM - one that is already forming, composed of souls who have left the body on this side and are now dwelling in Numis’OM. Before I continue concerning Ophar... Souls that are currently inhabiting Numis’OM after the “death” of their physical bodies here, in the Old Earth, will receive an infusion of the energy particles from the planetary ascension when that time comes. Until then, they create their subtle-physical from the rich ethers of the forming Numis’OM itself. Now returning to the subject of the intentional communities in the New Earth Star... Souls of Numis’OM are drawn together by certain commonalities as they are here in the Old Earth. Yet, in the New Earth these commonalities are far more of essence, of purpose in Spirit, and not so caught up in the dross of personalities and lower wants and needs. In Numis’OM the “gathering” is instinctive. Souls just find themselves where they need to be. There is no logical decision-making or even emotional process involved. So what are these commonalities which gather the souls in the collective? The major impetus is the coming together of souls for specific spiritual directives their soul is seeking, under the guidance of Master Intelligences. Usually, these souls have been together many times in various levels of experience. The community is a place to expand consciousness by being in the presence of radiant energy fields perpetuated therein... some from crystals and sacred geometry and other from Master Illuminaries. Of course, ultimately none of these “things” are necessary to the truly awakened soul, but there are many, many levels of “awakening.” Numis’OM is a first stage arena for souls of the Old Earth, and then there are sub-stages within it. Thus, intentional communities such as Ophar are there for souls who find that quickening of Spirit in this manner of gathering. Ophar is a community within the Temple (energy field) of Thoth, but it also radiates the Light of the Masters and Angelics with whom Thoth aligns his presence: the Archangels Mikael (Michael) and Metatron, among them. Each wall, building and fountain - every symbol upon them and the placement of the structures in these “temple-cities” are perfectly aligned to the spiritual intent therein. So are the substances of stone, crystal and vegetation. Animals are present that assist individuals and groups. These animals, including birds, are devas of exceptional spiritual presence and sensitivity to what is needed by that individual and group and how they may support them in the process. Ray Child by Maia Nartoomid NOLL-03STD Sometimes Masters come among those gathered in the form of children - for their purity is so exceptional that they radiate the glow and appearance of a child. Sometimes they appear with wizened age, as humans associate wisdom with age. Mostly, however, they appear in their early 30's and in what humans associate with the “prime of youth, power and beauty.” Such associations among the souls of the New Earth Star will eventually fall away, and then there will be no need to “see” beings a certain way, or to appear one’s self in a specific form. But that comes upon the soul much later than Numis’OM; although the last phases of Numis’OM come much closer to the experience of pure essence unadorned. In the “Doma” the souls sing together as a pure energy from the higher throat chakra, joining their voices with great celestial harmonics. Individual singers sometimes perform. These songs / chants are filled with creative, flowing SPIRIT... lifting, swirling, clearing and re-ordering the consciousness of not only the singers, but the world in which they abide. Light Languages permeate the experience shining brightly and vividly in holograms before the gathering. From these Symbols stream forth the angelic verses of Creation. Ophar is especially keen for this type of energy generation. It also contains a vast holographic version of the akashic records, through which individuals may find deeper understanding of the “Higher Akashic,” for the lower akashic is no more for them. The crystal capstone atop the Doma of Ophar is suuvya or what Thoth has referred to in the past to me as “Golden Jasmine,” as this crystal gives off a fragrance similar to that of the flower by the same name. In the days of the current or Old Earth, when Thoth and the other Solar Lords were among us, the Golden Jasmine crystal was brought up from the Interior Earth (inner earth) having been formed of the original creative fire of the planet. Later, when certain devic beings became “unicorns” of the inner earth and of Avalon, they often produced the Golden Jasmine as a “sap” from their horns, to crystallize in time. In Numis’OM the Golden Jasmine is created in this way - given forth from the unicornic devas – not usually in tiny drops from horns, but in a larger manifested quantity. Golden Jasmine Crystal by Maia Nartoomid C-0020STD There is also a specially faceted Golden Jasmine crystal in the Temple of Mira, within Ophar. It is a Moon Temple, where souls may come to receive the deep liquid elixir of the New Earth planet. Various symbols will appear inside this crystal - here I have depicted one in Sanskrit, as it is one of the Light Languages familiar to us here, in the Old Earth.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

The Attasic Universe is the Unified Field of full Christ Awareness - it is beyond all duality, the true “Holy Home” of all souls. The New Earth Star is not developing in the Attasic, as World II Systems are still in some form of duality. However, the last stage of the New Earth Star will be like the top star of the Christmas Tree, just touching the ripples of the Attasic! Through that gate souls will gather into the Attasic, in the no-time of complete Oneness. The welcoming “Golden Star” of Mazuriel is the home star of all souls in World II Systems. What Thoth calls the "Lion’s Gate" is in our constellation of Leo. It is composed of three of it’s stars” Denebola, Regulus (the lion’s heart) and Algieba (a binary system consisting of two stars). The actual portal to Mazuriel in the Attasic is Denebola, yet Regulus is the “engine” the powers the field which links Denebola in this universe with Mazuriel in the Attasic. The binary system of Algieba is the “third eye” - the point where the akashic of Mazuriel flows into this universe, to guide and inspire Souls onward into Mazuriel’s embrace. As a binary, it also gives balance to the three-fold Star Gate. Reference links: - Zodiacal Initiation of Leo - Leo the Constellation (Wikipedia) - Regulus the Star (Wikipedia) - Leo's Bright Star Regulus - Denebola the Star (Wikipedia) - Gamma Leonis the Star (Wikipedia) - The Sphinx and the Nefer’Ratem In Numis’OM (and throughout the evolving stages of the New Earth Star) the Lion’s Gate is present as a “companion.” Through it, the Hierarchies of Mazuriel guide the process of all higher World System I and all World System II evolution. Yet, it need be understood that in Mazuriel - an Attasic non-dualistic star, there are no hierarchies! So why the seeming contradiction? Because the “Hierarchies of Mazuriel” do not abide within Mazuriel, and thus not within the Attasic. They dwell in the “ripples” to be found just between these two universal states. The “ripples” Thoth calls the zuvuya. I thought this word seemed familiar, so I googled it and came up with the book “Surfers of the Zuvuya” by Jose Arguelles (which I have not read). Carl Elkins, Ph.D states that the Zuvuya is a Mayan word which is “a cosmic wave of energy that both defines and connects us all.” Here is a rather extensive article entitled "Zuvuya: a Study of Aeonics" that I also found. However, getting back to Thoth’s view, the Zuvuya is a ripple or wave-effect caused by the two planes of duality and non-duality touching and yet not able (or intended) to merge at that point, thus creating the ripples of inter-connectivity with the ESSENCE of RETURN. A few specifics to fill in the complete Thothian Cosmology: The place in this universe where it began - or rather burst through from the Attasic, is in the Vault of Orion within the constellation of Orion. It is here that we find the Eye of Ra, exposed by the Universal Tear. The Eye of Ra is the point where all this universe's ley lines converge. It is a pin-point of "leakage" into and from the next universe. From the Eye of Ra (also called the "Heliomar" by Thoth) is emitted the pristine, creation-substance into this universe. The double-dynamic of the "Eye" is a blinking effect that is a "flashing double-diamond," responding to the quasar-like pulsing of the touching of the two universes. The Eye of Ra is inter-dimensional, so our most powerful telescopes cannot see it. Yet it is visible on certain dimensional levels. The Eye of Ra in Orion and the Lion’s Gate in Leo are intimately linked on the inner-planes. Their point of linkage is yet in another space-place: the star of Sirius in Canis Majoris - the Great Dog. The Lion-Headed Sun Lords guardian the Eye of Ra through the temple-capstone of Telos.Aarkhara. The Lion’s Gate is the pointing of “feeding” the light codes between our universe and the Attasic, through it’s Golden Star of Mazuriel. The Gate/Vault of Orion is where we return-connect to the Metatronic Spiral or full Light spectrum. Yet beyond the Metatron is the Attasic, where the ONE is beyond “Light” as we understand it. For more info on all these dynamics, see my article on Earth Genesis. Seal of the Scarab by Maia Christianne Nartoomid ARSY-0030STD The Scarab began by that name in Egypt, but are more ancient in time, taking much of their sacred knowledge from The Atahula Book of Mu. Yet, let us begin in Egypt, where this wisdom was organized into a specific series of “initiations,” based on the nine energy bodies, relating to the body of the scarab. The basis for these initiations was ultimately ascension of the vehicle, the body, the hosting merkabah of the soul. This form of “ascending” was not intended to transport one permanently to another realm, but for the intention of traveling through the dimensions to eventually return to share the gained enlightenment with others. Once enough people had been through the Scarab Initiations, they would become Immortals and the whole earth and its souls would begin the process of ascension into the New Earth Star. The Scarab Initiations were composed (in that form) by Thoth Rasimes, yet he had no illusions that these initiations would process in an orderly fashion through the ages. Able to see through the veil into the future, he knew the road would be a long and arduous one, and that the Scarab Initiations would become lost in time. So why did he put them into motion? Because Thoth, as an Illumined “Solar Lord” and Immortal himself could see, know, and understand all the intricate connections this “motion” would create throughout time and space - one action setting off a series of small “quakes” through time - responses so small they may seem inconsequential, yet they result in powerful human and planetary changes by the time they reach ages way into the future. The Scarab Initiations continued in Egypt for centuries, but were eventually withdrawn as the Amun Priesthood came into power. They were revived again with Akhenaten, who had access to many of Thoth’s books (Thoth never wrote a book - his akashic scribes “read” and then wrote down his fire-inscriptions which he had placed into Amenti - Thoth’s Hall of Records). After the death of Akhenaten, the sacred text of the Scarab was sequestered once again, but it also traveled.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

It was sent into hiding in distant lands, according to Thoth's original plan, which the secret Order of the Scarab continued to fulfill. The Scarab Initiations were kept in the secret catacombs of the Library of Alexandria (which still exist) and were taught by Hypatia to her inner initiates. The Order of the Scarab placed copies of these sacred scrolls into the hands of the Grand Masters of Constantinople, the Moorish scholars of Spain and the Temples of India and Druid universities of the British Isles, among other far-reaching lands. The Scarab Initiations are sealed in the akashic and available through that means only to those ready to receive them (which regrettably, I am not). However, Thoth guided me to create the “Seal of the Scarab” (image above). You can use this to get in touch with the nine energy bodies and the scarab ritual (the center scarab being the 9th) by seeing yourself as the center scarab in the geometric of the Seal and then visualizing, and if possible physically posturing to some extent (if only symbolic) the positions of the scarab for each of those energy bodies, as described in our Spirit Mythos article, The Nine Energy Bodies. As an example: “The Ren, or vibrational name identifying the DNA codes of the individual’s physical body, which is located symbolically at the mouth of the scarab.” You may wish to place your hands crossed, in front of your mouth about three inches from the face and tone REN however many times you feel guided. Feel the sound coming from your throat, formed by your mouth and going through into your hands and into your body - into the DNA. Be creative and let Spirit guide you with each energy body / scarab co-ordinate / sacred name. After completing all nine “scarabs” you become the KUHU, adorned in the radiant garment of the Christed Self. Even though you are enacting the ritual on only the first level of perception, it can still be as powerful as you accept it to be - for yourself and for the offering you make of yourself to the Spiritual Soul of earth. In the Electrikum Alchemical Templates, the world keynote of Scarab Rising is: Souls move beyond the "world order" of consensual reality to create open-ended soul harmonics. Consensual realities are created by many souls agreeing on a basic reality and then existing within those agreed upon parameters, despite the dis-harmony among them. Soul harmonics are souls vibrating in harmonic resonance, with each soul experiencing multiple-level realities of its own choosing. Yeshua in the New Earth by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AB-0040STD In The Second Coming of Christ Paramahansa Yogananda writes of Jesus’ time in India, Nepal and Tibet. He reveals that ancient texts in the Himis monastery of Tibet tell of “Issa” (Jesus / Yeshua / I’shoa), the enlightened one who spent several years among them. He writes of the various persons who saw this record of Issa having lived and studied in their country. Among them was Nicholas Notovitch in 1887. In 1922 Swami Abhedananda visited the Himis monastery and confirmed the details that Notovitch had written about in his book "The Unknown Life of Jesus Christ." Also in the 1920s, Nicholas Roerich saw as well as copied verses that were the same in content as those published by Notovitch. Col. James Churchward, who wrote the “Mu” books in the 1930's was also privileged to be shown ancient texts in India and Tibet. In these texts were symbols and fragmented histories of the continent of Mu (Lemuria), and also an accounting of Issa having read and studied the Mu history there in Tibet. An “old Rishi” told the Colonel that the words spoken by Jesus / Issa on the cross that have been handed down to us in biblical literature as “Eli, Eli, lama sabactha ni” was actually pure “Mu” language and should be “Hele, hele, lamat zabac ta ni.” (Hele--I faint. Hele--I faint; lamat zabac ta ni–darkness is coming over my face.) Churchward continues saying that a Don Antonio Batres Jaurequi, a prominent Maya scholar of Guatamala in his book, History of Central America says that the last words of Jesus on the cross were in Maya and should be read “Hele, Hele, lamah sabac ta ni”. The translation in English, according to Jaurequi, is “Now I am fainting; the darkness covers my face.” I find all this quite interesting as around 1980 I was making a tape recording of something I had written about Yeshua on the cross (The Mission). In it, there was a dramatic pause after the words, “and the head bowed”. When I played the tape back, in that space I heard a male voice speaking in an unknown (to me) language. The inflection sounded as if he were speaking something sacred, as if you were listening to a Rumi reading. While it only lasted about 6 seconds, I was able to catch some of the words. One was “Christu”, but other words seemed quite different – and different from each other – like words from several languages put together. At least one or two of the words sounded very Mayan. At least that was my impression. From the akashic record of Thoth I have had insights of Yeshua’s stay in Tibet, India and Egypt... as well as China and Great Britain. I have asked of Thoth how Yeshua could have possibly traveled to all those places from the age of around 14 to 30, when travel was so arduous, dangerous and took so long. He explained to me that after Yeshua had spent several years in Tibet, he then went to Egypt to receive his Solar Initiation at Heliopolis (the ancient city of On). From there, he returned to Tibet / India / Nepal for some more years. However, by that time he was able to transport his body vehicle at will instantly to other locations on the earth. Thus he “journeyed” to China, Great Britain and some other locations in this manner. From my unpublished manuscript Christ in the Earth: Into the burning twilight of the universe, from the golden ebbing of one horizon, there shall come the single moment of comprehension that abides with the truth of all things, that rises above the sun in exaltation, alive in the glories of it’s own manifestation, infinite in beauty. Within this holiness of thought the plan of ages will uncover from the depths of darkness into the dwelling of the light, the resounding brightness that shall ring out through the lands, singing in silent music with eyes of the new day. This brightness shall take form and substance through the consummation of power and glory, drawing from all ages that have fallen away and all time that has not yet seen birth.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Through the strength of all that is or ever shall be there shall become a star born of all things that hold to God, yet not one point of light shall be dimmed to glorify it, for it shall be the servant of the night and the heralder of the new day. The star will bring the restoration of life for those who lift their eyes to see it, for it will shine on the living God of Truth, he that calls the earth his own and the heaven his father. There will be those that shall bear witness of the child that lies in the light, his heart one with the pulsing source. There shall be those who witness for all mankind...the Krystu’atu (vehicle - body of Christ) shall birth under the star and shall birth under the witness of mankind; and shall die also under their witness... All this shall come into being as surely as souls gather themselves together in darkness. The star will fade from the sight of mankind, and the voice of what has happened will echo through their words, which will be shaped in the style of men; and mankind will bury the Krystu as they bury their dead, for they had seen him die. They shall glorify his name yet cast his raiments aside and say “It is finished”. Yet the universe shall still burn with the Krystu’anat (Christ Glory) and there shall continue to be moments that draw from all things and listen to truths; and as these things shall not cease, despite the dusk of mankind’s own choosing, the horizon of Krystu’aton (the Christ Sun King - the Logos sealed into the earth) awaits. ~ Kalhaba, scribe to the Emperor of Mu Maia: What of the “Krystu” in the New Earth? Thoth: When we speak of the “Christ” we do not seek this power within a religion. It is a universal frequency that was embodied to it’s fullest in the Earth within the incarnation of I’shoa / Yeshua or by his Greek name, Jesus. This power is part of a whole which includes the Buddhic frequency. These two together - the Christic and the Buddhic - form a Serpent of Light, the tail being the Buddah, who sends the charge of the sacred earth up through into the head of the serpent - the Christ, which is embodied in the World of the Greater Cosmos. The body of the Serpent of Light undulate with these two harmonious wave-forms, which are present in the DNA of all humanity - indeed, to some degree in all LIFE on earth. (note: Thoth is not addressing realities beyond “earth” in this answer, but that is not to imply that the “Christ” and the “Buddah” powers do not extend beyond this planet in other forms and identities.) Maia: Will I’shoa appear to those who resonate with the “Christ” in the I’shoa embodiment in the New Earth - most specifically, in Numis’OM? Thoth: He will, as will the Buddha, Mohammed and other spiritual icons of Mastery. However, those finding themselves in Numis’OM will have released the bonds of the more superficial “religion” associated with the historical figures and will see and understand them in a more expanded light. Thus, in Numis’OM - that first stage of souls accepting the New Earth Star, so these beings will infuse their “followers” with the true “doctrine” which is not a doctrine at all, but a truth of the life on the Old Earth of these beings: why it was, and how it was, and the greater purpose of that life incarnation. Once this enlightenment is received, these Masters will then reveal the pure essence they extend to the inhabitants of the New Earth Star. See also my short story entitled The Mission. Thoth Raismes of Aphra by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AB-0003STD Atu Tehuti, Ati Hatu -- "in the rising of the breath I greet you, in the release of the breath I embrace you" Debbie Penny (Australia / China): Thoth mentioned that both Earth and Venus will exist inside the new planetary system inside the star... will we be able to see Venus from new earth (presumably so)? Will there be more planets accompanying Earth and Venus inside the new star? If so how many? Or is that to be yet determined? Can others come and go (planets)? Thoth: Venus will appear in the New Earth when one moves into it’s vibration. Understand that in the New Earth / Numis’OM objects seem to appear and disappear, according to the observer’s fluctuation in vibration and focus. There will be 14 planets, including Earth and Venus with the star-sun Rigel, however, in the frequency of the New Earth Star, one at times would be able to see stars, planets and certain other celestial events beyond the celestial horizon when stargates open for a period of time. Bill Buehler (USA): I am referencing your article on the Sacred AN. The graphic shows the Sacred An (Ark of Grace). Between the angels is a sphere of light. In the Ark of Karma this place is the MERCY SEAT (Ex 25:17-22) or place of communication between human and Divine (specifically YHVH) (25:22). The Mercy "Seat" seems to be a flat plane (22:17), which I'd prefer to view as a "teleplane" generating a complex communications system and controlled by the wings. The area could use a "seat/throne" as a mechanism created by the teleplane. But my question is: "What does the light sphere on the Sacred An do, the same thing, but perhaps more expanded than just YHVH?" Thoth: It is the point of generation, where the “white hole” exists for the mechanism. A “white hole” moveS the highest vibrational matter-essence into the Attasic Universe - that which is the universe of all universes of non-duality. Thus, for the Sacred An, this white hole is constantly moving into the Attasic (in the human sense of expansion toward a higher state) the combined highest matter-essence being created within the ark. Juergen (Germany): Last weekend I visited a gathering named IKA (crystal skulls) here at Worms/Germany. There was shown some pictures on the discovered "pyramid complex" in Bosnia and of an activation with a crystal skull with the name "Corazon de Luz", which "Karin Tag" got from an arms dealer in South America - view the documentation video. The photos were done with a special camera which works like that for the aura photographs and it remembered me on an activated merkabah (pink, golden, white color). As a young man stated in the gathering, the complex seems to look like that on Mars, but in a spinned degree (rotation - Editor) of 180 ̊. They are calling it a sun pyramid, my own feeling says it is not a sun pyramid.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

However now, it’s causing my attention, because of the history of Mars and because of the war that took place there between Christians and Muslims (Jerusalem and Mecca) like in middle east. I thought to contact you Dear Ones to ask if you perhaps do have some further information on it. Please read the complete article. Maia: I presume you are asking the true nature of the Bosnia Pyramid, so that is the question I asked of Thoth. Thoth: It was originally built by the Master Builders of the Sun Bow Clan, but then re-constructed in a later epoch, after the last Great Flood. It is a point on the planet that can access the central atoma of the planet for energy exchange and balancing of the planetary sphere of earth as a whole. Giselle (Mexico): Some time ago, I read May 29th Timely Transmission concerning electromagnetic zones and simultaneous incarnations of a Soul in one or multiple zones of the same continuum. The basic idea of this text was that there are 48 electromagnetic zones in this planet, and that an average Soul can exist simultaneously in different bodies, in 1 to 3 of these electromagnetic zones. I have a few questions: Giselle Q1: Are these electromagnetic zones related to specific geographical zones (countries or cities) in the physical reality, or can they also be in other dimensions within planet Earth (for example, Inner Earth)? Thoth: The electro-magnetic “zones” are vibrational in nature and not associated with specific physical places. The Inner Earth has several different electro-magnetic zones, due to the vibrational essence of it’s inhabitants. There are areas on and in the planet that have “doorways” through which one may access specific zones more easily. Giselle Q2: In the "New Earth Star" section, that is inside the "Earth" link in Spirit Mythos' "Esoterica", I remember your wrote that at some point of Earth's ascension, many Souls that exist in multiple lives in this planet would be given the opportunity to chose what life or "reality" do they want to exist in. Does this relate to the electromagenetic zones topic? Does this mean some Souls will have to "choose" one of those embodiments in the future? Thoth: Souls moving through into Numis’OM will be able to choose their beginning point in that reality, this will include their appearance - to be whatever they choose. In the New Earth / Numis’OM, electro-magnetic zones are not as fractured as they are here - they “blend” more in a dancing continuum, rather than being so distinctly separate as the are in the current or “Old Earth.” In Numis’OM one will not have distinctly separate “places” where they are this way or that way (different incarnational appearances and lives). They can change right where they “are” if they wish, for they will be everywhere as ONE. For instance, upon arriving in Numis’OM you may be greeted first my your grandmother (from the Old Earth), who appears as you feel most comfortable with her. Then, as you become more open, she will begin to change in appearance and reveal herself to you as she currently wishes to be seen. With the New Earth electro-magnetic zones, for instance, Hespara is one where the Lotus Loci are most visible, so you might wish to experience that for some time. If so, you would just shift your attention there. In the Old Earth, it is not that simple, for the electric and magnetic fields of the Old Earth are more stable - set in grids. Of course, beings such as the “Immortals” like Baba Ji can instantly move into other electro-magnetic zones in the current or Old Earth, by shifting attention. This is due to the fact that such beings are really not contained in “bodies” - but manifest them at will. They exist in the New Earth, but can project physically into the Old Earth. Giselle Q3: You also have spoken of alternate realities for humankind, and how incarnate souls in this planet gradually diminished perception of their multiple "presents" until they/we finally lost access to many realities. Does this mean that before the "Kali Rift" a person who lived in 3 electromagnetic zones would have percieved this three lives at the same time? Or are these topics not related? Thoth: Before the Kali Rift humanity was able to “shift attention” more easily from one zone to another and to certainly be aware that they existed in these other zones. Fredaricka Yarom Q1 (Israel): New Mushaba/Hawaii grid and new Mushaba/Alcyone/Africa grid does these two grids have any connection with the Umim and Thummim crystal grids, and how are these grids assisting the all with the ascension of Mother Earth and her life streams? Thoth: What you are referring to as the Mushaba/Hawaii and the Mushuba/Alcyone/Africa grids as sub-grid systems, are created through human activity with the crystalline field of the earth. All sub-grids systems of this nature, when installed with loving intent, co-sign the document of Ascension Declaration for the planet earth. Fredaricka Yarom Q2: The Ark of the Covenant was moved from the Great Pyramid and brought to Israel, would this Ark be the one holding the Sirian Ascension program for all lifestreams and is it our current program? Thoth: The “Sacred An” or ark from Orion came to earth in Tibet and was moved to Atlantis, then to Egypt. It is now within Mount Sinai. The secondary ark Moses had built (since the Sacred An was too vibrationally powerful for the People of the Exodus) went into Israel with the Exodus, but is now in the Andes of South America. There are four other arks which work directly with the Sacred An - two of which are in Israel at this time. The Sacred An and it’s four “satellite” arks hold the ascension program for the earth - through the tri-plex of Orion, the Pleiades and Sirius. Maia: you can also read my article on the Sacred An for further reference. Fredaricka Yarom Q3: I was told that I have parts of me, presuming my essence in Mount Ararat, also told that a number of people have part of themselves (their essence?) as part of some of the mountains around mother earth, is it now time for us to remove that part of ourselves from the different mountains? Also what is so special about Mount Ararat in Turkey besides the opinion of some that there is an Ark of the Covenant buried there and if this is the case what does this Ark of the Covenant hold, what is its part in the bigger picture of our ascension? Thoth: Mt. Ararat does contain one of several remains of the ships of Noech (Noah) of Atlantis. It is also a sacred entry portal to other dimensions. There is no sacred ark devise there, but the remains of one of the “ark” ships. Maia: you may also wish to obtain and read a copy of my article “Rainbow’s End” in Volume 03, 1996 of Temple Doors.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Amanda Baro de Roca (Spain): If each current incarnated human being may "dwell" in 1-3 different electro-magnetic zones in the same Time line, how does it manifest at the moment of the Ascension to the New Star Earth? Thoth: They come together as one soul essence and the “body” that appears on the Other Side (Numis’OM) will be in whatever form they choose it to be as a “starting point.” It could be completely different from any of the previous Old Earth bodies. Roger Lawson Intro (Switzerland): These are some questions for Thoth and refers to his comments in Volume 03- 2006 Numis’OM ~ Eye of Metatron regarding living in the torus. Roger Lawson Q1: He (Thoth) said that when consciousness reaches a certain point, the spiral of evolution becomes a torus... and that whilst there are those on Earth now and the past, who have/had a larger grasp of living in the torus than the many, they have not perfected it. As we enter into an age of conscious creation in the New Earth and embark upon a journey of Self-fulfilment - of eventually perfecting living in the torus - has living in the torus been perfected anywhere else in our universe or in the Cosmos ? Thoth: World System II planets live within the torus - thus do their inhabitants. There are some individuals who have incarnated in World System I planets (like the current Earth) who are able to exist in the torus, due to the fact that they have such ONENESS with their Magna or Over-Soul that their main “center of gravity” so to speak (using the term metaphorically) is in a torian world system. Roger Lawson Q2: What is "new" about the New Earth and is it new to creation as a whole - a new expansion of the heaven worlds? Thoth: It is “new” to the Earth and it’s incarnated inhabitants - to the Earth as a Living Vessel, a sentient BEING, which contains the crucible for incarnated souls and all it’s living things. Yet it is not new in the sense that World System I planets in the heavens are continually moving through their cycles to become World System II planets - and beyond, to be embraced back into the Attasic Universe of total ONENESS. The scientists refer to the “Big Bang” - they are partly right in their understanding of it, yet it is far beyond their spiritual scope of understanding in general. This is a large topic for future issues of Numis’OM, but briefly, “beingness” (stars, planets, life and the spirit within it) are all in the process of re-uniting with that already IS. On the ultimate level of “being” none of it ever left the singular point, in another aspect of being it expanded out and now is coming back together - but as scientists have discovered, it is not coming back together physically. It is continuing to expand. It is the very expansion itself, that is uniting ALL, for as matter expands, it becomes more singular (eventually) - it becomes the ONE. Roger Lawson Q3: I wonder also if Thoth is able to share with us any his own aims for the New Earth and for living there - (that we might understand)? Thoth: I have no personal agendas. My experience of realities is far different from the souls incarnated now on the current earth. The greater Plan is not a “plan” but a natural process of flow, according to universal law. Hierarchies (angelics, illumined ones, etc) assist this flow and at times insert specific quickening inspiration, but they do not control it, or even direct it in the complete sense of the word. The souls gathering in Numis’Om / New Earth Star are the ones to “plan” their paths and how things will look and feel to them. They also do this in the current earth. The difference in a World System II, such as Numis’OM is that they will do so with greater awareness, attunement to their higher spiritual selves and harmony among one another. They will not choose to cut themselves off from the ability to manifest out of the ether, opting instead for the hard, physical labor and time required in the current earth. They will have the “common sense” awareness necessary to manifest in a way that is not only beneficial to themselves but to the Whole. They will not do these things perfectly, but they will be open to receive assistance and greater understanding from Master Intelligences and their Illumined emissaries. These Illumined Ones and Angelics will be readily available to them in a tangible way, with no veil having to be parted to experience and commune with them. Roger Lawson Q4: I suppose I am really asking is Thoth able to share with us a view of the purpose of the New Earth? Thoth: To expand the universal flow, according to Divine Law; eventually bringing ALL back to the point of singularity or Souce/God. Maia: Did the series of quakes on July 16th, the day before Fire the Grid, have anything to do with the Fire the Grid event? Thoth: The stellar confluences for both were in alignment. These synchronous activities, both geologic and through human activation will escalate with continued frequency. PLEASE NOTE: if you wish to ask questions of Thoth relating to anything you read in this publication, or about planetary and cosmic happenings that you would like more clarity on, please submit your questions to me (Maia). I will attune to Thoth and will print his responses to those questions he selects to answer in the following issue of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron. I cannot promise that all questions will be answered, but I will do my best to accommodate those with the greatest universal scope and importance. I will give you credit for the questions as well unless you request anonymity.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Pure Gem Body New Earth Hologram New Earth Hologram VOLUME 04, 2007 - in this issue - ¤ About This Publication - ¤ Pure Gem Universal Heart Crystal - ¤ The Unwinding Spiral - ¤ Venus and the Heaven Houses - ¤ The Isis Eye or Aeriopax - ¤ The Emerald Eye of Horus - ¤ Dynamics of the 44:44 Stargate - ¤ Astrology and New Earth Hologram - ¤ Golden Star of Mazuriel - ¤ Fire / Water Mysteries - ¤ Heart-Speak from Thoth Please use the "Printer Friendly Version" link on right in the menu bar on the front cover page above to make a quality print of this publication. We were guided to name this publication Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron by Thoth, and the Illumined Assembly of the Christos' Merkabah of the Host comprised of 12 souls holding open a portal for the the Christ energies on this planet. The Radiant Ones we are working with encouraged us to bring forth this publication as a continuance of work that was done by Maia Christianne Nartoomid from 1980 through 1999. During this period Maia produced, first, the periodical entitled The Source (1980-1988), and then later, Temple Doors (1989-1999). In 1994 her partner Simeon Nartoomid joined her in producing the latter periodical. In the nearly 7 year respite between the conclusion of Temple Doors and when the first release of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron began, we both underwent a period of expanded esoteric initiation and deeply personal transformational experiences that have prepeared us for resuming this work at an entirely new octave of experience. Thoth and the IAC Merkabah of the Host have requested that we facilitate a specific Program of Light related to the Aramu Temple of Thoth and Numis'OM to help those who feel resonant with this Station of Light (Spirit Heart Sanctuary) to accelerate their Ascension processes and thus to further help the collective soul of humanity approach the gateway of Ascension which Thoth calls Light-Principle Forty, or LP-40 for short. Ultimately, as we collectively move through this passage we will activate the 44:44 Ascension Stargate and trigger a series of cosmic events destined to alter the DNA of humanity forever. Numis'OM is a causal reference point for the New Earth Star and the 44:44 stargate, and is hosted within the causal body of Venus. The Aramu Temple of Thoth is energetically within the Numis'OM matrix and acts as a way-station for souls building the New Earth Star consciousness from within the earthen experience. Souls can thus visit Numis'OM and even the New Earth Star if they have proper intent and attunement. It is our goal to facilitate pathways for this to occur within. This publication thus sits at the heart of our efforts to facilitate this greater process for the Masters and Illumined Ones that we are working with and to assist souls on earth. We hope that you will find it a fruitful and friendly path into the Homeward Light. Please share your experiences with us and the other subscribers in the Spirit Mythos Forums (you are safe, its private for subscribers only). The front cover art on this issue is entitled "Pure Gem Heart Crystal" by Maia Christianne Nartoomid. Corrections: In Numis'OM Volume 03, 2007 (last isue) in the article "The Lion's Gate" I stated that the star Sirius is in Ursa Major - the Great Bear. It is not. It is in Canis Majoris - the constellation of the dog. I knew that (honest), but apparently when typing it out I was having a "Senior Moment." Many thanks to Roger Lawson for pointing that out to me! Some of the art that appears on the front cover and in the various articles in this issue as well as any of our own publications which are herein referenced are available on the Subscriber's Freebies page while this issue is current. After this volume becomes a back issue the art that appears in it will then only be available through our Spirit Store IF it has an associated item number listed under it. Click the item number of the art piece to find it there if it no longer appears on the Subscriber's Freebies page. Pure Gem Heart Crystal by Maia Christianne Nartoomid C-0023STD The cover image is my symbolic depiction of what I am calling the "Pure Gem Universal Heart Crystal." It was inspired by my Understanding Your Cosmic Code session, done by my partner Simeon. In the personal written session he recently did for me, he writes about the Universal Heart Crystal - the Heart of God. My Pure Gem version incorporates one aspect of this concept. Thoth speaks of the Pure Gem as all the energy bodies (including the physical) becoming a pulsing gem-like quality once ascended into the New Earth Star. This Pure Gem state isn't something that is simply non-existent one minute, then we ascend and it is there. It will still be a matter of receiving it in stages, but in the New Earth Star (beginning with Numis’OM, the stages will not require eons of "time" - as time is quite different in the New Earth Star. Even now, in this current world experience, we have the opportunity to begin to become Pure Gem beings, even if on micro-levels of the total transformation. These micro-levels are vital phases of the whole process. It is my hope that the energy-art I have created of the Pure Gem Universal Heart Crystal will inspire deep connection the Pure Gem vehicle in the Heart of God within each individual who sees this art and feels the flow of it’s expression throughout the All. In the 1970's I received from the Akasha, a text called the Pure Gem Codex (this is in the Subscriber's Special Content section). It is a highly symbolic writing on the various stages Earth will go through to receive the Pure Gem. It was written down by me long before I had any inkling about Ascension or the New Earth Star so I honestly do not know how much of it takes places in this current Earth realm and how much may be referring to events in the New Earth. Upon reading it, you might have your own insights on this codex. Islands in the Stream ~ Early Earth by Maia Christianne Nartoomid OR-0009STD Sagittarius and the Milky Way Using the latest state-of-the-art technology, scientist have discovered that out solar system is not from the Milky Way, but is instead was born in the Sagittarius Dwarf galaxy!

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

By looking at the cosmos through infrared light, scientist can see how the "decaying and dying spiral of the Sagittarius Dwarf wraps around and passes through our Milky Way." Virginia and Massachusetts university teams are creating a "NEW STAR MAP showing our Solar System to be at the exact nexus crossroads were two galaxies are actually joining." If our solar system originated in the Milky Way, we should be "oriented to the galaxy’s ecliptic, with the planets aligned around our Sun in much the same angle as our Sun aligns with the Milky Way." However, this is not the case. We are positioned at an odd angle from the rest of the Milky Way - something that has been puzzling scientists for a long time. Our solar system has become captured by the Milky Way out of the unwinding spiral of the Sagittarius Dwarf Galaxy! It is suggested in this article, Scientists Now Know: We're Not From Here, that this new discovery is "possibly the root cause for the discontinuation of the Mayan calendar (the most accurate on the planet) because the read-point of the Pleiades star cluster, which many believe the calendar was based upon, can no longer be a constant as we begin to steer away from the earlier predictable movements." The powerful energies Earth and it’s solar system are now experiencing are becoming more and more enhanced as the spiral arm of the Sagittarius Dwarf are drawn into the far more powerful embrace of the electro-magnetic presence of the Milky Way. Thoth, can you please address this information for us. . . 1) Does the dynamic between the Milky Way and the Sagittarius Dwarf galaxies have a bearing on your statement to me that both the energy-presence of Earth and Venus do not originate in this solar system, but instead come from the star-sun Rigel, in the constellation of Orion? Further References: Thoth: The multi-dimensional composite of the creation harmonics of the two galaxies touching - and at that crucial nexus point where your solar system is found, caused the wormhole “flash point” for Earth and Venus to jump into their current solar system from Orion. This "choice" was not random, however, but part of a greater plan of the Divine Intelligence, through the Laws of Celestial Harmonics for these two specific planets from a specific star-sun (Rigel in Orion) to trans-locate into the touching point of the Sagittarius Dwarf and Milky Way galaxies. Maia: I recently heard on a Science Channel documentary that in a global sense, Venus is virtually Earth’s twin. It is almost the same size and is in a similar orbit around the sun. I know that according to what I received from the Akasha in the early 1970's, all planets are within their own dimensional fields, and thus another planet will likely be in another stage of development from their own. However, if humans were to take an inter-dimensional light ship and travel to Venus at it’s point of physical zenith (habitability by flesh or light-embodied souls) it would be a world of incredible lushness and beauty! The same would hold true for Mars, Jupiter, Uranus and Saturn. The rest of the spheres in the solar system we call "planets" are not true planets, according to Thoth - thus other dynamics are involved which we won’t go into with this article. My next question to Thoth: is the reverse spin of Venus significant in regard to Venus’ role as a "guardian" to Earth, and secondly, what does Venus do as guardian to Earth? Thoth: The reverse spin of Venus creates an opposite dimensional pull on earth that helps to balance it on the hyper-magnetic "ridge." This allows earth to receive the full Presence of the celestial harmonics intended through the hyper-magnetic node upon which it’s solar system is positioned. Earth is so chosen in this respect as a "quickening cell" - like in the flesh body. The flesh bodies of all living things have quickening cells that keep higher light codes flowing through the whole system, quickening the other cells of the system-body to respond, harmonize and keep healthy. When these quickening cells become less active due to various imbalances in the environment in which the body exists, disease results. Thus, Venus is present to keep Earth in a quickening state by creating certain pulls upon it - correctional triggers, so to speak. At it’s zenith point (dimensionally) Venus is also a threshold - a pathway of higher light functions to enter into Earth. It contains "Kindred" beings who help to guide and seed the Earth’s kind from time-to-time in it’s evolutionary process. Simeon intuited some insights on this topic and wrote about them to a friend. He has given permission for me to incorporate them here into some further comment opportunities for Thoth. Simeon: We recently came across some information that indicates our solar system may not in fact be native to the Milky Way galaxy, but rather that is it part of a much smaller galaxy known as the Sagittarius Dwarf galaxy whose galactic plane is rotated between 60-90 degrees from that of the Milky Way. . . With the advent of this discovery the entire cosmology of the Mayan Calendar can now be understood in a new context, and its ramifications are quite powerful. Additionally, dynamics like the Kali Rift, Eye of Ra, Ranna Time Flow etc, can also now be seen as being intimately linked with this dual galactic plane scenario and the harmonic interactions between these two galactic planes. Maia: Thoth has stated in the past, concerning the Kali Rift: . . .the Kali Rift is the gap that exists between our true time flow and where we currently reside in the continuum. Thoth: The point in the Sagittarius Dwarf galaxy and Milky Way convergence where our solar system is located is exactly upon the dimensional warp where the pull of two hyper-magnetic waves ("hyper" defining a science of magnetism beyond the 3 dimensions as the current Earth populace and scientists understands them) are moving in opposite directions, like the two Piscean fish swimming past each other. These hyper-waves are not crossing, but parallel. Yet the strong current of one runs interference with the other. Ironically, the strongest current is coming from the hyper-magnetic field of the Sagittarius Dwarf and weakest is generated by the Milky Way. Earth is the node within our solar system that "rides" the strongest interference "ridge" between the two hyper-waves. This position for Earth makes it a beacon to other worlds in the Universe, for it registers on their sensors as a place where certain energies can be "mined" through the interference ridge. This causes many different ET types to come here - to experiment with certain aspects of the energy of the Earth AND the DNA of it’s living things - for the DNA contains the channel to these rare energies from other dimensions of the universe coming through the interference ridges of such hyper-waves. Of course there are billions of merging galaxies and thus billions of hyper-wave ridges. Yet Earth has other components to it that makes it attractive to such ET interference, but this is not within the range of this particular discussion (article).

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

UT or Ultra-terrestrials of the Earth’s DNA relations - their Kindred - come to heal and to enlighten in an non-intrusive manner, yet they too are working with the hyper-magnetic interference ridge upon which Earth is positioned, for in doing so, they help us to heal the Kali Rift and our own DNA impulses which are at odds with our true "Pure Gem" Being. The hyper-wave ridge will then become the Earth’s "launching pad" back HOME. Simeon: . . .the harmonics generated within a galaxy control the evolutionary dynamics taking place within it on all dimensions of reality within its stellar envelope. This is what Calleman of Mayan Calendar fame calls the World Tree. We call it the Galactic Tree, the World Tree is a subset of harmonics within that. However, the Earth and her solar system are now being snatched by the Milky Way, we are in transition and some believe that 2012 and the end of the Mayan Calendar demarks the point where we actually technically belong to the Milky Way and not the Sagittarius Dwarf galaxy. . . Thoth: Yes, the year 2012 is that demarcation point. It is then that our solar system will "belong" to the Milky Way. Yet this does not imply that it will not still be under the influence of the Sagittarius Dwarf galaxy. Yet at that point, the hyper-magnetic wave of the Milky Way will become stronger (for this solar system) than the Sagittarius Dwarf galaxy. The hyper-magnetic waves then, will reverse their pull on this solar system and the interference ridge upon which Earth is positioned will also reverse - meaning that it will change it’s point of interference from a positive (+) to a minus (-) in magnetism. This will give birth to a new set of stargate interfaces on Earth, and thus a new set of Earth grids. Many of the old ones will either disappear or change dramatically. All living things, especially humans and higher animal species like cetaceans, elephants and primates will be especially affected. They will experience dis-orientation with their old predictable formats, and yet, most will not really know "where to go" to become aligned to the New Earth Hologram. It is then that old man-made systems will begin to rapidly break down and there will be a human rush to find new order amidst the seeming chaos. A much larger percentage of the populace (than at this time) will begin to almost frantically seek out the means to greater spiritual awareness. They will come knocking at the door - the many doors, some paths less viable than others. This has already been happening to a degree for some time, but what we speak of here is more along the lines of a grand department store sale versus business as usual! At this point it will bring out the worst and the best in all concerned and the wheat will be separated from the chaff more clearly than ever before on this planet. The changing of the Earth grids will also increase the planetary changes in weather and tectonic activity. Unusual types of natural electrical phenomena and lightning will occur - some of this is already beginning to happen with the Earth so close to reversal of the ridge effect. Simeon: . . .both Maia and I have also received very strong indications that this is indeed the case. Therefore a lot of what we call Ascension or LP-40 is directly related to this 90 degree turn into the Milky Way that our solar system has been in the process of making for some time. It was shown to me by the Merkabah of the Host that the L-Shift that had been revealed via Maia/Thoth much earlier is in fact the shift in consciousness necessary to make the roughly 90 degree turn or re-alignment to the harmonics containing the evolutionary programs of light for the Milky Way galaxy. So the Ranna, Kali Rift and Eye of Ra are high level energetics that are relative to the massive forces that are playing out between these two galactic magnetic fields as one is being consumed, assimilated and re-orientated by the other. This creates an energetic/magnetic "tearing" in places and that in turn directly affects the parameters of consciousness operating on either side of that tear or dissonance zone. . . Thoth: Simeon is correct here. All galaxies contain black holes (in various stages). These black holes are all moving through the Eye of Ra - all of them in this dimension of the universe. Thus all the many billions of galaxies that are merging are in a sense sharing this experience via their connection through the Eye of Ra. It follows then, that not only the solar systems in the Milky Way and the Sagittarius Dwarf galaxies are "tearing" (or pre-disposed to such tearing via the consciousness directives of the collective souls within the hyper-magnetic and magnetic fields they create), but this is true also of these other billions of merging galaxies in this dimensional aspect of the universe - all sharing on various levels the "cosmic moment." Simeon: . . .The Milky Way in this scenario is the "master galaxy" relative to the Sagittarius Dwarf galaxy. It has much more powerful and complex sets of harmonics and sub-harmonics which open up entirely new possibilities for evolutionary experimentation, possibility and potential. It is the master harmonics of the Milky Way galaxy that have the capability of fully activating the Adam Kadmon light encodings within our DNA. . . Thoth: True. When Simeon wrote: "It is the master harmonics of the Milky Way galaxy that have the capability of fully activating the Adam Kadmon light encodings within our DNA." This is at the very crux of the creation of the New Earth Hologram and the Pure Gem Body. The Supreme Temple in Lemuria by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AP-0020STD In the double issue of The Source, VOL. 02-03, 1985 I wrote about the Lemurian Heaven Houses. To quote from this previous material (I have re-worded it a bit so that the sentence structure is more understandable): In the early ages of Lemuria ". . .the Lemurians raised their Supreme Temple . . . From Venus, Earth’s guardian planet, the Lemurians established a means of a specific spiritual receipt in the Supreme Temple. . . The Hierarchies of the Living Lights (star-suns) then sent the emissary Melchizedek to Earth through the portal of Venus. It was in the Supreme Temple that he established the Order of Melchizedek. Surrounding the Supreme Temple was an outer circle of chambers, the whole composing the "Hall of the Heaven Houses," representing the celestial zodiac. Within each Heaven House was established one Venusian oracle priestess seven Earth priests, who carried out the revelations of the oracle priestess. Lord Melchizedek by Maia Nartoomid AB-0018STD The article continues the story as to how a number of the priests became dissatisfied with their roles and overthrew the oracle priestesses (long after Melchizedek’s departure). Melchizedek was sent to restore balance between the male and female, that was already eroding in that early age.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

With the corruption of the Supreme Temple that held the Eternal Flame of Venus, the planet of balanced LOVE, so the decline in the separation of the sexes continued. It was ironically repeated in another Melchizedek Temple complex in Atlantis centuries later - this one was defiled as well. Neither complex was brought down by males alone. Certain female Earth priestesses (not Venusian oracles) played their role as well. Indeed, it was a "role," as such seeming corruption has it’s place in the awakening and strengthening of the human Spirit. Supreme Temple and Heaven Houses by Maia Nartoomid The 12 Heaven Houses represented the 12 signs of the zodiac, and thus the Mazzaroth. The Supreme Temple and it’s Eternal Flame contained the vibration of 13 Heavens - the Mazaloth . Melchizedek also brought to Earth the Archangel Crystal, which contains the Light codes for releasing and transforming the "trapped energies" of Earth within Sirius. However, this crystal is only an outer sign of the crystalline Holy Light of our own DNA. The Hierarchy that sent Melchizedek to Earth to establish the Order of Melchizedek, holds the vibration in their Being of the star-sun Sirius, which contains the node of healing for the Earth. It is the balance point between Orion and the Pleiades - creating a three-fold Creation matrix for Earth. In order for LP-40 (Light Principle 40 - the Ascension of Earth) to take place, Sirius must releas the trapped energy that bled from the Earth’s formation when it originally formed on the node of the two merging galaxies: the Sagittarius Dwarf and the Milky Way. As the first stage of the New Earth is now forming in the form of Numis’OM, there are those souls both now in Numis’OM and here in the current Earth, who are combining energies to help this action of release take place. The Isis Eye or Aeriopax by Maia Christianne Nartoomid ARSY-0037STD and the New Earth In Temple Doors, VOL. 02, 1997 Simeon wrote an article entitled The Isis Eye / Aeriopax in which he compiled my source translated / Thoth material on the Aeriopax accumulated since 1994 and additional information through me based on his questions and as well through his own direct receipt of information. This finely-tuned composite article was the result. I now wish to quote a little from this 1997 article and further add commentary concerning the Aeriopax from my current akashic-Thoth perspective in it’s relationship to the New Earth Star. Simeon began his 1997 article by writing: The Isis Eye or Aeriopax is becoming an ever more important geometric dynamic in both the planetary and personal aspects of the ascension. The geometric was first given to Maia in 1994 by Thoth as a means to open an ‘omni-gate’ into the Attasic Universe. Since that time it has been spoken of or referred to numerous times in Temple Doors, and we have even had verification from a current day Mayan Priest that it is the same as what the Mayans use on the inner planes as their ‘time gate’. As a matter of fact this individual was quite surprised to see the piece of jewelry Maia had crafted in the form of this geometric sitting on our altar, as he wasn’t aware anyone else outside of the ‘inner circle’ of the current Mayan priesthood knew about it. Thoth: (the Aeriopax) . . .is a geometric for bringing together the Attasic Universe as a point of mind. Not in a physical sense, but as a hologram in the mind, enabling that sentience to sustain passage through conflicting time gates. . . the Aeriopax harmonic. . . is a grid of time reality exchange. Once activated, the grid allows the passage between multi-layered time fields without distortion. There are 16 reference nodes: those points of synapse which create a referral of information through the grid. There are 6 matrices in which to create virtual reality fields and the rhombic spinning field in the center. This spinning field is the ‘time tunnel’ or vehicle for movement within the entire process. The parallel bar is the ‘core accelerator’ charging, discharging and maintaining the energy separation between realities. Without the core accelerator all interacting realities would become enmeshed in one another - something like wadding bundles of chewing gum together and then trying to separate them. When the Isis Eye / Aeriopax is activated through human intelligence and spiritual rapport with it’s dynamic (focused through the EARTH, according to Thoth) those participating . . .form a spinning wheel of Emerald Light around us. From this wheel we see the Aeriopax arise, each of the 16 points fiery Yods form the ‘Book of Life.’ the 6 fields within the boundaries of the points are quickened as windows of crystal containing the libraries of all Earth dimension. We set this Living Merkabah of the Aeriopax upon the land. . . In another passage from Thoth on the Ascension of Earth, he states that: Once the planet is fully within the Conversion Zone, it’s central sun atoma in the very center of the Earth, also known as the Holy of Holies, will lock onto the greater Isis Eye coordinates emanating from the 44:44 Stargate, placing this sphere we currently inhabit into the center diamond of the geometric. Once the planet and the souls who choose to ascend into the New Earth Star’s Numis’OM, move through the 44:44 Stargate and then (at a stage of this process) full integration of the Old Earth and Numis’OM occurs, the Earth’s Isis Eye becomes the "Iris Eye" in a brilliant FLASH and the base line of planet Earth becomes Numis’OM - a World System II planet. The "booster rocket" of the Old Earth falling away and re-cycling into another World System I - no longer a part of the package we call Earth. As I wrote in in Temple Doors, VOL. 02, 1991 and repeated in VOL. 01, 2006 of this publication: The planet’s KA is no longer Altheria, for it has progressed into a more defined and rarefied state, known now as 'Numis'OM'. When the Blue Ray of our Earth is fully integrated with the Violet Ray of Numis'OM, there will burst forth into a glorious Blue-Violet Flame, the ‘Iris Eye’. This is the bonding flame of the New Earth Star, when our world and its supernal form will join at the apex of the Metatronic Spiral, through the ‘eye of the needle’ - the Iris Eye. Through what Solara of Star-Borne refers to as the "Healing of Orion", we as an inspirited world, will be able to de-polarize our consciousness so that we can enter the Iris-Eye, where all polarities are ONE. . .

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

This “de-polarization” with not complete in the New Earth Star - only when we go beyond a World System II will we enter into the Attasic Universe through the Golden Star of Mazuriel. However, once the Iris Eye flash occurs, we will experience an acute BALANCE of polarities within our New Earth Star journey. Returning to the Aeriopax and the here and now, this sacred geometric can be utilized singly and especially powerfully in groups, to create fully Metatronic merkabic fields for temporal periods of time in which germinations of New Earth light codes can become engendered and multiply on their own - beyond the temporal Aeriopax dynamic engendered. This then, takes our humanity a giant step further in becoming the El’ohim for our own created New Earth. Once we get in touch with this reality through various forms of being and expression - all relating what is here being called the Aeriopax dynamic -we need no assistance from Angels or Ascended Beings to accomplish our own re-genesis, for we will know, indeed EXPERIENCE, that THEY and US are ONE! Several years ago, in a session with Thoth (through me, Maia) for William Buehler (long-time friend and one who devotes his life work to sacred geometry, Earth grids and synergy groups). Thoth gave information on: 1) RUUTHI: elemental | systemic | functional | sentient 2) JAEOBHIM: connective | options/choices | communicative | path to macrocosm 3) HAFARHA: merging streams of reality | finding unity in dualistic systems 4) APTEHOS: primary activation in heart-coherency to all points of Intelligence 5) TATS'SHIA: transcending dualism, hierarchy | transfiguring primary elements 6) AUHUM: embracing all powers, portents and principles as a living and vibrating wave of the Fearless Flame Thoth: The Temple of the Risen One (Great Pyramid) has pyramidal programs of Light embedded within it in accordance to the Flower of Life pattern, called by several names in the ancient past, which we choose to call here the SAPHA (also "Saphra," "Sepha," and "Sephira") which means "the way to Divinity or Sacred Unity." Trace the pattern and there you shall open the gateway to the Chamber of the Son.An akashic translation from the Book of the Queen - Sapha was known as the Queen: My love arises with the night. She penetrates all experience with her Beauty and reigns over the day. She is the desire of the soul completed in the unity of spirit. Thoth: Understand that the TRUE meaning of the Flower of Life or the Sapha is not a series of lines to be traced on a grid, but the pattern in the HEART that leads through the Mother (Queen) to the Son (King) in the body, mind and soul. There IS a corollary in the Chamber of the Risen One that allows the true initiate to become awakened and activated to the necessary Light codes within his/her being for this Ascensional Moment. It is not necessary for a person to BE physically in the Pyramid for this to occur. The Temple of the Risen One is merely identifying this awakening process in the Being and facilitating it, if called upon by the initiate do so. Thoth has shared with me that the Great Pyramid of Giza is a living dynamic of the Aeriopax. He further states that should 16 or more persons come together there in synergic process with the Areiopax dynamic, a further level of entry would be achieved for the Earth into the New Earth Hologram. Such a process would be greatly facilitated if the image of the Aeriopax were employed, perhaps as a print on canvas that could be placed on the floor with the group around it. Also, it would add considerably to the power of the procedure if each individual were wearing an Aeriopax crafted in gold and sliver, with the gemstone in the center (aquamarine, tanzanite, blue topaz, herkimer or diamond). The next best alternative would be to wear the image on your chest in the form of a tee-shirt. If anyone reading this decides to gather a group of 16 or more for such an Aeriopax process at the Great Pyramid or other sacred sites, you may use the process Thoth gave: We form a spinning wheel of Emerald Light around us. From this wheel we see the Isis Eye - Aeriopax arise, each of the 16 points as fiery Yods together form the Book of Life, the 6 fields within the boundaries of the points are quickened as windows of crystal containing the libraries of all Earth dimension. We set this Living Merkabah of the Aeriopax upon the land. . . At this point follow your own intuitive guidance - allow the current to move through you individually and as a group to "set the Living Merkabah of the Aeriopax upon (and into) the land." If any person works with the Aeriopax process at a sacred site conductive to it’s frequency, it will have a positive effect. If they are in a group of five or more - even if the other persons present are not aware of the Aeriopax or it’s process, but are there nonetheless for spiritual connection, there will be an even stronger activation of this channel, than one person alone. Yet "16" or more is the magic quotient. To maximize potential these should be persons aware of the process and employing the geometric symbol is some way. You can also use the Aeriopax as an individual, for personal healing and balance on all levels. If you decide to work with the Aeriopax sacred geometry as a group, I would appreciate it you would contact me. I first received information the sacred geometric Thoth called the Aeriopax in around 1993. Shortly thereafter a man who was an adventurer of sorts and a client of mine had two of them crafted in silver and gold (according to Thoth’s description). He kept one for himself and gave the other to me. At a later time, my friend William Buehler had one made by the same jeweler. In 2001, when Simeon and I had recently moved to Santa Fe, NM, our dear friends Rami from Jordan and his partner Ludmilla from Russia came to visit us. At that time, Thoth guided me to give Rami the treasured Aeriopax pendant. I must admit I was not anxious to let it go at first, but then released all attachment and gave it to Rami. In September of 2007 Thoth began to urge me to request that Rami send it back to me! I was not feeling very good about this. It was a GIFT and I did not wish to ask him to return it. Finally I reluctantly wrote Rami an e-mail telling him about Thoth’s request. I had no sooner sent the e-mail than Thoth informed me that Rami no longer had the Aeriopax pendant in his possession!

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

My reaction was of course, “Why then, did you ask me to write to him for it?” There was no reply. I got the Thoth silence treatment. Rami wrote me back later that day, saying that he had lost the pendant! He then generously offered to have another one made for me - there in Jordan. Thoth smiled. This Master Illuminari then explained to me... The pendant was to be re-crafted in the Middle East at the hands of a Jordanian craftsman and through the participation of Rami, an arabic man who is devoted to Spirit in all it’s forms and to the uniting through the vibration of Love of Christians, Jews and Muslims - all from the same heritage and religious crucible. Just the act of doing this places a transformative energy into the planetary grid. When Rami "lost" the first one it went just where it was supposed to go. This new Aeriopax pendant is now in my hands - upon my altar when I am not wearing it. I wear and work with it for the planet - and for my own healing and the merkabah of Spirit Heart Sanctuary. There are two specific differences in the first pendant and this most recent one. The original one contained a herkimer crystal in the center. Thoth requested a blue stone (aquamarine) for this second version. The blue of the Blue Starl - this planet’s true Home of Rigel in Orion. The other change is the distribution of the silver and gold of the pendant. The former version had the triangles of silver and the diamond-shape in the center with the horizontal cross-bar in gold. This later pendant has the upper triangle in gold, along with the center diamond-shape and the rest in silver. The silver Aeriopax talisman was made by the craftsman of the family Dahna. It was started at 13th of September, the first day of Ramadan, the frame finished within the full moon time of September 27th (the stone set a little later). The craftsman’s family of Dahna used to work with gold and silver for centuries in the Middle East area. This new version of the talisman was encoded by Thoth with the Phi calibrations now registering on this planet that were not present when the first Aeriopax talisman was made. These codes needed a grounding devise (the physical gold and silver with aquamarine), so that they could also be inserted into the crystalline field of the planetary grid as a very real and activational dynamic. If anyone has pertinent astrological information on the September 13 - 27 dates to volunteer, I would appreciate your contacting me. As Thoth explains it, the first version held the energy of balance on the Threshold of the 44:44 Ascension Stargate. This more recent creation reveals in gold, the descending Dove of Light represented by the upper triangle and the "head" of a dove - the diamond-center. It is free now to come down into the Old Earth and touch the crucible of Spirit here, bringing to the planet the Light codes of the New Earth Hologram in full presence via such ascension dynamics as the Amatrix Angels, the Zohar Mages and the Phi Gate. For a deeper understanding of the role of the Great Pyramid in the Earth Ascension Dynamic, read this page on Spirit Mythos. Also suggested reading on Spirit Mythos: You can send non-subscribers whom you think may be interested in the AERIOPAX ASCENSION PROGRAM to the Aeriopax page on Spirit Mythos and the new Spirit Mythos Ascension Hologram Network's Isis Eye (Aeriopax) Ascension Program group. In conclusion, I wish to stress that any sacred geometry, process or Light program is only as effective as it is deeply experienced in the HEART. As Thoth has said to me in the past, without Heart Ascension coming first, we and thus the planet are not going anywhere! We could dispense with ALL such symbols, geometries, processes and programs if everyone simply and truly lived the Divine Heartsong. Emerald Eye of Horus by Maia Christianne Nartoomid ARSY-0036STD & the Eye of Horus Thoth uses the EYE as a point of merkabah (vehicle) transport into or between energy / cosmic systems. We have the Isis / Aeriopax Eye: the main geometric for Earth Ascension; the Iris Eye: New Earth Star FLASH point of integration of Old and New Earth; the Eye of Metatron: same as the Iris Eye, except the "Iris" is the FLASH point and the Metatron is the point of movement from Oritron (half-light) to Metatron (full-light). There is also the Eye of Ra: a convergence point for this and many other universes. It is the ‘Threshold’. The outer membrane is the actual ‘universal grid’ (both half-Light Oritronic and full-Light Metatronic) surrounding the Eye of Ra; containing the ‘worlds’ such as Earth, that exist in the many universes. These "EYES" are a form of pictograph Light Language. In the Book of Enoch by J.J. Hurtak it is explained that through the stages of evolution there are portals of LIGHT that humanity must pass through. These portal are as "pyramids of Light" and are imbued with the God-Eye at the center of the pyramid. This is the Eternal Eye. Thoth concurs. Thus, all the EYES Thoth speaks about are aspects of the ONE - the Eternal God-Eye. Hurtak writes that the Eye of Horus creates specific forms out of the Greater Creation dynamic. Again, Thoth agrees. Thoth sees the Eye of Horus as creating in it’s First Principle the multi-dimensional energy fields of the Being. From these fields are then created the forms of the Adam Kadmon in the subtle and corporeal energy bodies. In Numis’OM, it is the Eye of Horus dynamic through which the forms within that stage of the New Earth Star are being generated. From my old files I present here a process you may wish to engage with the Eye of Horus for the purpose of developing a tactile impression of your own creational matrix and how you manifest and create energy forms within you, spinning them out into your real-time world. You might find it helpful to tape record or burn to CD your own voice speaking this visualization so that you can then play it back as you go through the process. In the context of the inner-planes work we are conducting in this session, the Eye of Horus is a gateway to your multi-dimensional being. All souls exist on several dimensions at once. By connecting consciously to these dimensional parts of your soul-self and integrating them into your field by creating a merkabah or Light transport vehicle, you are then able to receive a direct signal of their oneness in your all-being. To engage the Eye of Horus is to move through it into your multi-lineal star-stream. This is the hierarchal matrix of your soul in its inter-dimensional positioning through time and space. You are now ready to re-connect consciously with several facets of your multi-dimensional Self.
