# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

The first step in this direction is to relax your physical body and move your consciousness through the star-encoded chambers of your cells, and into the crystal spirals of your DNA. (PAUSE AND CONNECT) Now that you are inside your own star-cell being, transfer this consciousness cell into the Temple of the Morning Star. See yourself as pure star-energy, you are within a chamber of the Temple of the Morning Star that is composed entirely of alchemically transformed clear crystal. Laser-inscribed on the stellar floor are the patterns of constellations in the future Capricornian age. Find your star path on the floor and move your energy-body in order to hover above that star configuration. (PAUSE AND CONNECT) Suspended from the ceiling of the chamber is a large Horus Eye laser-carved from an emerald. This Eye beams a ray of Golden Light into your auric field and transforms your energy body into a holograph of your 4th dimensional form. Take a few moments to see this being which you are in the 4th dimension. Move your consciousness into that holograph and experience the thoughts and the knowing of this higher aspect of your soul-self. Accept it into your conscious memory patterning. (PAUSE AND CONNECT) Now the holograph shifts in frequency and your energy body leaves the 4th dimensional projection and moves into a 5th dimensional imaging of your soul. Experience through remote viewing, the 5th dimensional form that is you. Commune with it, enter its perceptions, note which form it chooses to reveal to you. Accept it into your conscious memory patterning. (PAUSE AND CONNECT) See now, a trinity of holograms, all operating in harmony within your energy body. These are the 4th and 5th dimensional forms co-existing with your 3rd dimensional self. It is important to allow these 4th and 5th dimensional beings to integrate within your 3D experience. See them moving in and out of your star-cell field in a rhythmic pattern. Feel the rhythm of that pattern as it moves with greater rapidity through your field. (PAUSE AND CONNECT) Now the pattern and rhythm has reached its maximum vector of inter-dimensional frequency and a flash-point occurs. Experience this brilliant burst of Light in your energy body. This 'flash' is the moment when the merkabah or Light transportation vector has connected with time-space to carry you through the Eye of Horus. Just as you move through the Eye, the Light vector you have created in your energy body disperses in an even flow throughout your entire physical system. Feel the bliss of uni-lateral energy flow in very corpuscle and cell of your body. Take three, slow, deep breaths: into your solar plexus and out your third eye. Simply relax and float for awhile. (END OF PROCESS - RETURN) 44:44 Ascension Stargate by Maia Christianne Nartoomid OR-0022STD The following article is a composite of information that appeared in seceral different articles in Temple Doors VOL. 01, 1997. I was guided to put it together in the manner it appears below and do some editing to bring it up date. It is most apropo for this issue of Numis'OM. 1) Maha Ratri: membrane on this side of the Stargate. Oritron - within the realm of the ‘Dark Star habitation’ or Black Cube of Kabba. 2) Maha Rhim: membrane on the other side of the Stargate. Metatron - within the realm of the ‘White Star habitation’ or the ‘Cube of Stars’. 3) The Golden Pillar of Light: the protective and formulative envelope for passage of matter between the two membranes of the 44:44 Stargate -the Maha Ratri and the Maha Rhim. The Pillar of Light which extends from the Maha-Ratri membrane through the Star Grail (the 44:44 Stargate) and into the Maha-Rhim membrane is called the Skittuim pillar. This pillar is inclusive of both the Maha-Ratri and Maha-Rhim membranes themselves as well. This pillar forms the ‘Field of Deliverance’ from the Oritronic Earth into the New Earth Star of Metatron. The Golden Pillar of individuation which aligns to each bio-system that is in resonance with the dynamic of the Star Grail is called the Avatalkim pillar. This pillar represents the ‘Individual Extension’ of the 44:44 Star Grail dynamic to that individual. 4) Star of David Transfer: Star Tetrahedron merkabah interface with human beings, transferring their complete Light Bodies (inclusive of the physical) into a higher Pure Gem state. 5) The Aramu Temple of Thoth / The Numis'OM: the Temple of Thoth sits in the ‘overlap or ‘Var’ between the Maha-Rhim and the lip of the Star Grail. The Numis'OM is the currently developing plane that is to become the New Earth Star. 6) Aeriopax / Isis Eye: the main geometric for LP-40. It will fit within the ‘Pillar of Light’, that zone of protection and formulation that will keep our matter-bodies inviolate as we pass through the ‘Eye of the Needle’, the 44:44 Ascension stargate. 1) The Earth Moves into the ‘Conversion Zone’: this zone can be seen in sacred geometry as the central diamond-shaped containment field within the Aeriopax that holds the jewel flame. There will be certain astronomical and astrological corollaries to the Earth’s entrance into this region, beginning with our movement spatially into the inner zone of the Photon Belt (we are already in the outer sheath of this belt.). As this begins to occur, we will see greater geologic disturbances in the Earth, especially earthquakes and volcanic action. Once the planet is fully within the Conversion Zone, so it’s central sun atoma (in the center of the Earth) will lock onto the greater Aeriopax coordinates coming from the 44:44 Stargate, placing this sphere we currently inhabit into the center of the Isis Eye. 2) The Opening of the Lotus: the Great Pyramid at Giza becomes the ‘Thresholding Chamber’ for the Ascension fulfillment. Within this ancient structure is contained an etheric temple counterpart Thoth refers to as the ‘Temple of the Morning Star’. i) Adonai Kodesh: inside the Temple of the Morning Star is a golden cube with a sphere inside connected to a ’blue hole’, which differs from a ‘black hole’ in that it is responsive to sentient consciousness control. ii) Projection of ‘blue needles’ into the Great Pyramid’s Vault of Osiris. iii) Activates the Violet Flame. iv) Lotus unfolds, sending golden needles out into the planet, calibrating the vibration of all matter to register above a specific threshold which The Keys of Enoch calls the ‘Sacred Formula Grid’.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

3) Calibration of the Midnight Sun: i) Shield of the Sun: the sun will begin to create an opposite force field, an ‘anti-matter’ or ‘midnight’ sun ii) Ultra-matter rushes through the blue hole as it is drawn upon by the anti-matter solar shield. This ‘ultra-matter’ envelopes the entire planet. iii) Lightning Paths: paths for high transmission of Metatronic overlays within the Oritronic membrane. These electrical passages are created by the anti-matter of the solar shield into the ultra-matter now permeating the Earth. The lightning paths will cause the atmosphere of Earth to become charged with ‘itons’. iv) Itons: particles of supra-atomic substance created by breaking atomic bonding to the Oritronic Spiral. These particles act as ‘seeds’ for the Metatronic consciousness in this reality system. Itons are atoms that have been turned inside out. Once our physical atoms have the proper Light mathematical encodings to itonize we will be able to safely pass through the LP-40 ascension. v) The Golden Taya and Tetratryons: The Golden Taya are the land areas on the planet (a total of 20% of all surface area of the Earth) encoded to move their etheric substance through the Stargate with those humans who are ready to ascend. Tetratryons are hyperspace tetrahedrons with open ends connect to one another to form dimensional transference zones. It is through the tetratryons that energy travels between different dimensions. . . As the tetratryonic activity escalates within the Golden Taya zones, there will be gradient levels of Light interaction at the cellular level for all living things within these energy fields. Tetratryonic activity will NOT be present in land regions of the Earth that are not within the Golden Taya zones. 4) The Sacred Rushing: up-rushing of energy response from the central sun atoma of the planet. Will be transmitted to the center of all bio-physical brains as a humming, like a hive of bees. Will create a state of Euphoria in all animals and most humans. Most humans who have not chosen ascension, and thus are not encoded with the transference fire letters, will physically go thriugh the death transition in this experience. Inner Earth Elohim will awaken and move upon the surface of the Earth, visible to those who bear the Light codes for ascension into the New Earth Star. 5) The Release of the Gaiavatha and the Transference of the Planetary Genius: a wave of golden light, known as the ‘Gaiavatha’, will updwell from the atoma of this sphere and enter all matter resonant with the 44:44 octave of ascension. This golden light, which will be plainly visible to the human eye at that time, contains all the Light codes of the Earth; even those portions that will not go through the Stargate. These codes will be saturated into the ascending matter to be carried as a full hologramic insertion into the New Earth Star. The Planetary Genius will be retrieved from the center of the Earth and transferred into the New Earth Star. The ‘Planetary Genius’ is, according to Thoth: . . .the completed thought-form containing the identity of consciousness for your World Domain from its Alpha through Omega (beginning to end). It is untainted, free of all illusion, and yet it is not omnipotent, as it defines and identifies, therefor it has a distinct polarity, and that polarity is to qualify and preserve the Eschaton of the Earth. Rowena P. Kryder’s ‘Gaia Matrix Oracle’ defines ‘Eschaton’ thus: “The Earth is a wisdom body. Gaia has the perennial tradition at her core. Eshaton means ‘the last things’. All can be consumed except the truth, represented by the New Earth Spiritual World. . . The phase of Eschaton is an illuminative, fiery, spiritual consummation of the earth and all beings within and upon her. 6) The Or-a’him Vehicles of Light Activate and Conduct the Star of David / Star Tetrahedron Merkabahs for Primary Ascension: higher dimensional vehicles of Light from Orion will come into our skies which will now be consumed with swirling diffuse clouds of myriad colors, and begin to create the pathways for primary ascension. i) The Or-a’him will create a unified field in our space-time, allowing all other electromagnetic zones within our Earth’s spectrum to become present in one wave-form. Thus, we will see many beings among us and they will see us. All these ensouled ones will share the ascension experience with us, as there will no longer be the separate zones or compartments to this fractured planetary consciousness as in the past. Included will be the Sidhe races of the Fairy beings, those residents of the Inner Earth and other ‘dwellers’ of our Earthen sphere who have, until now, remained ‘behind the veil’ for us. ii) The Or-a’him Light vehicles will create ‘stability zones’ around the Golden Taya regions, and further codes of Light will be inserted through these fields, allowing greater beings of Light to enter our domain without being of the same Light vibration. These supernal beings will prepare us spiritually and physically for our ascent through the Gate of the Star Grail and into the New Earth Star. They will begin the sequencing of Light code firings in our bodies (already greatly transformed by the LP-40 process thus far) which will register the sacred ‘Star of David’ configuration around our individual forms. This star will then become an eight-pointed star tetrahedron, encompassing the whole body within it. 7) The Division of Souls During LP-40: i) The New Earth Voyagers: those souls who have chosen through their higher self, to move through the 44:44 Stargate and into the New Earth consciousness. They will be euphoric, but alert in the ‘now’ moment with the transformation of LP-40 as it takes place. ii) The Sleepers: those souls who are not ready for the Metatronic path of the New Earth Star, and have chosen to ‘die’ and insert themselves into the incarnating field of another Oritronic world. The ‘Sleepers’ will be in a dreamy euphoric trance during LP-40, and most will blissfully leave their bodies during LP-40, moving away from this realm and into another world presence with the half-Light universe. iii) The Walkers: these are the souls who have so little Light body, whether through physical and emotional damage to it, or due to very dense karma, that they will not experience any of the beauty of LP-40. They will see the world darkly, seeming to exist in a dark cloud. They will not be able to think or reason clearly (due to the breaking up of the lower akashic) and will be fearful and in emotional anguish. Some will experience physical discomfort. Most will perish in the rushing of energies from the center of the planet, which will electrocute most of these persons.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

However, some will survive through sheer personal will, only to die in the final entropic break-down of the planet within a 30 day period after LP-40. The Walkers, like the Sleepers, will then move into another world of the Oritron. 8) The Secondary Ascension: from among the ‘First Wave’ or those who ascended in the ‘Primary’, will be souls who choose to come back through the threshold and aid other souls, who in the ‘Eleventh Hour’ have made the decision to ascend into the New Earth Star. They will assist the ‘Angelics’ in helping these ‘late-comers’ through the portal. Many of the Sleepers will be guided through. Fewer of the Walkers. In the entire count of First and Second Wave, only approximately 40% of the then-currently incarnated humanity will be taken up into the Pillar of Light. 9) Transport of un-embodied Earth Souls Into the New Earth Star: Souls of the Earth who are not embodied during LP-40 will go through their own process of transference into the New Earth Star. The disembodied Voyagers will go through an alignment of their etheric bodies with the Adam Kadmon template, so that they will be able to enter the New Earth physical format. In fact, some Voyager candidates currently within non-corporeal forms, are already working between the two sub-zones on either side of the Star Grail: the Maha Ratri and the Maha Rhim. They will, of course, have to be inscripted during LP-40 in order to actually enter the New Earth Star, but in the meantime, some souls are being allowed entrance into the Numis'OM, the pre-formative New Earth matrix. For imaging of these various stages of LP-40 Ascension see New Earth Star on Spirit Mythos. The Harrum Tal'kii by Maia Christianne Nartoomid The Lemurians had devices called talk’kii which monitored and interacted with the harrum, or holy tone, at the center of the planet emanating from the central sun atoma of the Earth. The image above is my akashic rendering of one such device. and the New Earth Hologram Those of humanity who are moving into the New Earth Hologram and creating it within their own DNA crystals, are doing so out of deep soul intention. They are responding to the Sacred Tone or Word coming from the center of the Earth that has always been there, but is now changing in tone and frequency. Most people cannot hear it with their ears, although some can. This change in tone of the "Harrum", or Holy Tone of the atoma of the Earth, is a call to the "Mecca" of our Divine Center to gather, to form the New Hologram together as individual facets of the ONE. For those who choose this path – to be the First Pilgrims to the capstone of the New Earth Star - they are re-aligning their crystalline lodestones in the DNA to the Harrum, and further, to the oscillations of the stellar configurations of the Metatronic realm and the Mazalothic Universe. This means that they are able to step outside of their Old Earth astrology - of the astrology of the Mazzaroth, and embrace the Cosmic Hologram now being created of the New Earth Star. Now they will not simply leave behind the Old Earth astrology, at least not while their baseline (incarnation) still remains in the Old Earth. Only when the Old Earth is no more, and the baseline of Earth becomes Numis’OM (thus leaving a World System I and entering a World System II), will the Mazzaroth astrology not tug upon Earth’s humanity. Instead, they will more and more be able to make use those astrological Mazzarothic frequencies in their charts that align to their New Earth programs of Light and transform the Mazzarothic influences that do not currently align to their New Earth programs, into ones which do. Yet this "changing of the guards" from Mazzaroth (12 Heaven Houses) to Mazaloth (13 Heaven Houses) astrology is not a simple process. It is very individual at this time and requires great sensitivity as to what your true Mazalothic program IS (in essence, not necessarily in design), rather than what you want it to be. We do not speak of pre-destination here, as the individual’s Mazalothic program is a vibration and not a verse. It does not tell you exactly how something must play out. Instead, it carries a certain vibration, and whatever is not aligned to that vibration is not within your New Hologram Mazalothic Light field. You can choose to fall back on the Mazzarothic system in your incarnative field OR surrender to that New Hologram wave-form and frequency which IS being formed within your DNA, and allow it to create your New Earth Merkabah. Golden Star Mazuriel by Maia Christianne Nartoomid OR-0032STD Galatic centers contain black holes which translate star conciousness into diamond streams of particles that are pure and not subject to gravity. . . gravity being a product of black holes within our micro-universe created by perceptual separation from LOVE ("PERCEPTUAL" separation, not ACTUAL separation). The cosmic heart center for our experience and the universe of our soul experiences is the Golden Star of Mazuriel. As the diamond particles stream through the black holes and enter the Attasic Universe, so they become celestial sperm, penetrating the egg-heart of Mazuriel. However, instead of just one sperm fertilizing the egg, many achieve this purpose simultaneously with each wave of the particle streams. Through this process, new particles are created with codes which know the sturctures to form in carrying the divine imprint into greater revolutions upon the divine spiral. SOME of these re-genesis particles stream BACK into the many dimensions of the Metatronic universe which contain Oritronic whorls within them to re-seed and start re-genesis in these realms. The Crater by Maia Christianne Nartoomid I have been called up from the plane (stretching-out) of the river; yea, I have been summoned to the Place of Lightning, where the mountain meets the stars. My path is forever-more destined to become the crucible where the mist rises. . . and Yahweh spoke to me, I AM the mist that carries you beyond the stars. - an Akashic translation from the 'lost' Book of the Prophet Isaiah Basic Initiations of the New Earth Hologram The Master Yeshua said: "Lest ye be immersed in the Living Water, ye will not be received into the Greater Kingdom." A Thothic Translation: The Water Initiation/Mystery is the mutability of the elemental and subtle Spirit. It illuminates through the unification of all aspects of the being. Yet without the Fire Presence, this illumination cannot perpetuate its Gnosis.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

The Fire Initiation/Mystery comes to humanity through the Sun Spirits of the five-fold SOLAR: 1) the universal central sun, 2) the star-sun of Rigel in Orion, which Thoth reveals is the TRUE solar logos of this planet, 3) our 'adopted' sun in this solar system, 4) the sun or 'atoma' at the center of the Earth, and 5) the solar atoma just outside the solar plexus of our body. The Sun Spirits generate and guardian these five solar 'mansions.' The Sun Spirits of our solar system are six of the nine 'souls' of the Adam Kadmon, the Universal Man as expressed in this world. Thoth, and the two Yeshua souls are the remaining three. The Christed Yeshua taught the Mysteries of Water and Fire. The Earth Mystery came before Him and the Air shall come through the Christic Archangel in the future. To His inner circle of Initiates, both male and female, Yeshua revealed that the blood carries two spirit natures or subtle humors. One is watery and the other fiery. The ancient teachings which flowed through Yeshua, were the same that were taught in the universities of Lemuria, Atlantis, Egypt and Greece (among others). This wisdom incorporated the knowledge that the blood is really a combination of two natures: the 'hemen' or watery and the 'phiro' or fiery. These two terms are Atlantean in origin. In the evolution of the human being (as differentiated from the soul) the watery or hemen nature is that which opens the individual human aspect of our being to direct realization of Divinity. The fiery or phiro nature ignites our humanity to it's immortality and Gnosis of God. Thoth stresses that he specifically uses the words 'Divinity' and 'God' here as separate aspects of the ONE. Divinity in this sense, is an omnipotence within, wherein the Divine is felt in all places of the Self at all times (ideally). 'God' is the central point of the Unmanifest becoming Manifest as a Throne or Powerhood from which all Divinity is the in and out-breath. When the human being brings into alignment the watery and fiery natures in the blood, so it establishes the unity and balance of the POWER/One-hood/Lion (Fire) and the GLORY/All-hood/Lamb (Water) , into the physical experience. Thoth Raismes of Aphra by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AB-0003STD Atu Tehuti, Ati Hatu -- "in the rising of the breath I greet you, in the release of the breath I embrace you" Giselle Dominguez (Mexico) ~ MY CONTEXT: I saw a scientific documentary that spoke about the latest theories concerning the nature of matter in the universe. They talked about the String Theory. It suggests that the atoms are formed by different particles, which are formed by strings that vibrate at different speeds. The faster they vibrate, the higher dimension of matter in the universe. Scientists proved the existence of at least 11 dimensions, from which we can only percieve 3 accurately. The 4th dimension comes to us as a very subtle sensation: time. So, according to this new theory there could be entire universes that we don't perceive. But the most interesting part (related to my question to Thoth) is that they say these strings form "membranes". Each universe is a different membrane, so even when two universes occupy the same space, they don't collide because they are in different membranes, So, we could have a 5th dimension world co-existing within our dimension without us perceiving them. We need to leave our membrane to perceive them. These membranes are not "spheres" or "planes" in space, like common mathematics would assume. Scientists say that if we could see them, they would be like wavy seas or masses floating. Giselle Dominguez ~ MY MEMORIES: when I heard this reference to "waves" and "sea", I remembered two things: 1) Some months ago I posted about a vision I had while being awake. I saw some golden "foldings" in the air, as if the space around me was made of a very thin and soft golden veil that was moving and flowing, like the sea, or like a flag with a soft breeze. Here and there I saw some colored and really bright twinklings within the foldings, like small "rainbow flames". Read this post on Spirit Mythos Forums Maia told me she has seen the same "foldings". That they are "adamantine", the basic substance in the universe. 2) Genesis (in the Bible): In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth. And the earth was without form, and void; and darkness was upon the face of the deep. And the Spirit of God moved upon the face of the waters. And God said, Let there be light: and there was light. And God saw the light, that it was good: and God divided the light from the darkness. Giselle Dominguez Q1: What is Thoth’s perspective on the String Theory and the multiple membranes? Thoth: The membranes are like undulating currents of light-tension. These are ultra-frequency light waves that have an elastic quality, due to their unique particle relationship - how each particle relates to one another. These particles are shall we say, 'coated' with a signal that communicates a 'glue' to bind the light particles in a specific manner. This binding is not static, but in constant pulse. It is turning itself on and off, and thus the communication between the ultra-light particles goes on and off. Each membrane has it’s own on/off code. When one membrane is on the other occupying the same space is off. Thus, they do not collide. There is much more to this topic, but this is the basic understanding. Giselle Dominguez Q2: Are these "waters" in Genesis somehow related to the "wavy seas" they mentioned in the documentary? Thoth: This is one aspect of the translation. The Bible is encoded with more than one level of understanding for each passage. Giselle Dominguez Q3: Are these membranes related to the vision I had (the golden foldings)? Thoth: These are adamantine particles which are within everything, including the membranes. However, what you and Maia were seeing was the basic creational movement of these adamantine particles, which are also called the mem (Thoth-speak). It is very similar to the membrane movement, as one (the mem) is inside the other (the mem-brane). Giselle Dominguez Q4: What is the meaning of the expression: "and God separated the light from the darkness"? Does it have to do with creating the membranes, so one dimension doesn’t perceive the other one? Thoth: The El’ohim (Creator Lords) formed a dualistic realm for Earth and it’s souls to experience. Faith Starlight (BC, Canada) Q1: in Numis'OM VOL.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

03, 2007 Thoth speaks of two Arks located in Israel. In a meditation last year, I was given in meditation an "ark" and in union with Roger from Switzerland and with both the Ascended Masters Yeshua representing Israel and Allah representing Palestine, we placed this Ark in the Gaza Strip. Is this one of the two that you refer to? If this is so, then is the other Ark at Megiddo where both Roger and I were given work to do by the Korbolan Priests or is it at Masada? Thoth: There are many arks of varying types and structures. Some are on your physical plane and others in other dimensions. You and Roger were working with other ark forms (in other dimensions) than the two arks mentioned in VOL. 03, 2007 of Numis'OM. At this time, it is not intended that the location of the two Israel arks mentioned in that article be revealed. Faith Starlight Q2: also in this same issue Thoth speaks of the torus in reply to a question asked of him. Part of his reply was: There are some individuals who have incarnated in World System I planets (like the current Earth) who are able to exist in the torus, due to the fact that they have such ONENESS with their Magna or Over-Soul that their main "center of gravity" so to speak (using the term metaphorically) is in a torian world system. Are there now individuals presently embodied on Earth who are living this way? If so, have they always been able to hold this energy or did Earth's density move into play causing them to "re-remember" this after living more than one life on Earth. In other words, did our density affect these ones until they were able to move into their hearts and begin to live again within the torus? Thoth: Those presently embodied who can dwell within the torus are Master souls. Some were born with the ability, others developed it - usually by early adulthood. Most of these souls tend to incarnate in the East, such as Tibet and India. Martin Vaci (Scotland): will the Earth transformation process look like as a cataclysm for most of Earth surfaces? Thoth: The first stages will, yes. The latter stages will seem more dream-like, as the lower akashic field disintegrates. It is the lower akashic where humanity stores there "this is the way it should be" perceptional references. Jody Kirby (NJ, USA): hello Dear One, I am wondering the extent to which humankind, together in unity, was able to infuse Gaia with our combined energies of love and strength. I prepared well, held one of the calchesite (crystal) family members, and allowed myself to be a conduit from the celestial universe into Gaia's very heart and visa versa - I was aware of millions of other loving beings with me - how did we do? I know that for me personally I spend part of each meditation in its continuation. . . what a wonderful way to unite so many into remembrance and action! Thank you Shelly wherever you are! Thoth: Any time souls gather together in intent and LOVE, so they make a difference. They change aspects within themselves and therefor how they see others and things around them. When it is done en-masse there is an intensification of that perceptual change in the akashic field of the earth, effecting many aspects of the planet. Jane Blonder, Eye of the Sun Sanctuary (Beeston Farm, England): you have talked about the infusion of tetratryons – hyperspace tetrahedrons with open ended connection to one another to form dimensional transference zones. What do you mean by open ended? I suspect I am to include this in one of my geometric mandala’s which is a doorway/gateway. Thoth: In the context of hyperspace tetrahedrons, "open-ended connection to one another" means that they can both send and receive omni-directionally and do not confine their connections and thus communications to narrow pathways. It is less limiting and faster - able to jump hyper-dimensionally in all directions simultaneously. Kathleen Millar (Vancover Island, Canada) Q1: can you please explain, energetically, how John the Baptist was the 'forerunner' of Yeshua? Thoth: John opened a path of light-wave perception into the Earth, so that the incarnating soul of Yeshua (the soul that had never been incarnated before into a physical realm) could be perceived amongst humanity. Even so, there were those who did not see him physically, unless he wished them to. John parted the veil so that Yeshua could take upon him the mantle and be revealed to the World (in the manner which Yeshua chose to be revealed). Kathleen Millar Q2: Could you please explain the true significance of the baptisms he was performing? Thoth: John was witnessing the LIGHT in those who came forth to receive the water. The water was both symbolic of Eternal Life (always flowing from source and life-giving) and it was elementally conductive of higher etheric current coming from John’s body, through his intent and focus. Kathleen Millar Q3: is the recently discovered 'Cave of John the Baptist' in fact that, and if so, what is it's significance? What was it used for? Thoth: This cave was never occupied by John the Baptist, but it was used to call upon his Presence and work with the Mystery he embodied. Amanda Bar Roca (Spain) Q1: are there specific synergies for the different Merkabic Soul Families in relation to the Ascension process in its last stage? Thoth: Certain soul groups will work together for specific Ascension dynamic functions. These "soul groups" will be composed of various soul families that have connections on the ONE "Family Tree" which cause them to align in their focus and directives with the greater Ascension vehicle. For instance, some souls will extract the "Planetary Genius" and transfer it to the waiting souls who will carry it into the New Earth. This is just one of many group efforts. (For further information read "The Planetary Genius" article in issue Temple Doors VOL. 02, 1996) Amanda Bar Roca Q2: if so, does each soul develop awareness of this specificity when the time comes close? Thoth: Yes, it does. There will be souls on Earth at that time who will not carry such specific tasks. They will instead "anchor the mass," so to speak, in order for consciousness to evaporate it’s lower sub-stratum (lower Akasha). Amanda Bar Roca Q3: is it a correct estimation to consider the present planetary energy's activation is having a secondary effect, that of an upheaval of collective emotional fields that, like a tsunami, clash and ignite old emotional patterns/brain circuits – even those already inactive - for individuals all around the world? Thoth: Yes, this is correct. This is a burn-off phase. It ignites to change condition.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Amanda Bar Roca Q4: if it is so, which would be the best way to help the progressive deactivation of that "emotional wave" for those that may be aware of the phenomena and open to aiming their intent in that direction? Thoth: To become among the transparent - like a crystal, allowing the various light rays to move through and separate into specific color rays of higher purpose and direction than the various light beams entering the crystal. Do not become attached to the form of these various beams of often seemingly chaotic light signals, for within them are true conduits for Ascension consciousness. They simply must be allowed to go through their process of separating out the ray components, and not become trapped in the energy fields of others who attempt to judge or manage them. Fredaricka Yarom (Israel): I AM wondering if the ark you speak of (in VOL. 03, 2007 Numis'OM) is not the main ark, the An ark? I too did a task with this one and most precious Lord Melchizedek and three other sisters we were each holding a corner of the ark and we were riding on the backs of a dolphin each, we were taken to Ancient Lemuria and Ancient Atlantis to cleanse the energy there, when the ark was placed at each site an incredible light came out of it and this was also for the healing of those souls who were still there and had not yet gone to the light and there were just so many of them still there in those areas, we were then taken to all the different oceans around mother Earth and seeded this light. From what we were told this main ark, the An, is in actual fact housed in the Great Central Sun and so after our task it was returned there. This task was a few years ago. Then there was another task and this ark, not the An ark, I think as Maia also mentioned there are 5 others or perhaps 5 in total, again with the same three sisters, together with precious Lord Melchizedek, Lord Merlin, Saint Germain and God Thoth this one was brought to Israel, I cannot say where to, this I leave to most precious God Thoth if he wishes to share the whereabouts of it. Thoth: at this time, the location of the 5 other arks are not to be revealed. The ark of An is within Mt. Sinai (Mount Moses) once again. The ark created by the Priest of Egypt at Mt. Sinai (in the Moses period) is now in South America. Amanda Delisle (Vancover Island, Canada): my friend told me that in Egypt "th" was pronounced "tay" meaning your name would be pronounced tay-O-tay. . . just wondering if this is true AND it sounds SOO much better then thhoothhh. . . slurred sort of. Thoth: "Thoth" is a later version of the original title "Tehuti" (tay-hoo-tee), but it has been pronounced many ways through the ages. Maia: from Thoth’s story on Spirit Mythos: 'Thoth', 'Toth', Tat-tet and 'Tehuti' are all forms of the same root, which are titles meaning, 'one who gives breath to', or the 'Grand Communicator'. Simeon: Tay-o-tay is not far off from tay-hoo-tee! Roger Lawson (Switzerland): I found the Lion's Gate article in Numis'OM interesting. You say that there is a link between the stargates of Orion and Denebola through Sirius in Ursa Major. I didn't connect with Sirius being part of Ursa Major until I checked here: A binary, the system is the title member of the Sirius stellar moving group (also know as the Sirius Super Clusteror Ursa Major star stream), which include all five stars of the Great Dipper as well as Gemma and are mostly around 490 million years old and all moving towards the galactic center. So I was wondering if the connection here is with this group of stars moving towards the Galactic Centre? The Sagittarius stargate is also the one that aligns directly with Galactic Centre for instance. It seems that the traditional view of stargates is that the Southern constellations (womb) were revered by the Aztecs and Egyptians as both the underworld and birthing- place of stars (Orion Nebulae); while those Northern Constellations such as Ursa Major & Draco were of the Immortals because they never set beneath the horizon. The vents in the Kings Chamber at Giza had both Northern and Southern stellar alignments. Thoth: Yes, these systems form part of a greater universal "engine" in which the movement toward galactic center is achieved. The Sagittarius "stargate" contains the stellar codes for re-alignment of the Milky Way with the central hub of this universe. It is not at present, in it’s true focal alignment - all part of the process of galaxies as they constantly re-define themselves. PLEASE NOTE: if you wish to ask questions of Thoth relating to anything you read in this publication, or about planetary and cosmic happenings that you would like more clarity on, please submit your questions to me (Maia). I will attune to Thoth and will print his responses to those questions he selects to answer in the following issue of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron. I cannot promise that all questions will be answered, but I will do my best to accommodate those with the greatest universal scope and importance. I will give you credit for the questions as well unless you request anonymity.

# The Pure Gem Codex  A symbologic

| home | about | contact | donate | what's new | store | timely transmissions | sm transformation | templum mysterium | holy of holies | cosmos | earth | ancient memories | services | forums | universal child | mandalas | fractals | enchantments | misc | links | my other websites | The Pure Gem Codex A symbological and energetic representation of the spiritual illumination and physical transformation of the human race to its perfected state. Directed by the Hermeneutical Council of the Lost Tribes of Israel. Cosmic Translation by Christine Hayes [currently Maia Christianne Nartoomid] circa 1976 Current Commentary: This codex has been edited somewhat to correct original errors and various typos. Most of the original sentence structure, syntax and verbiage has been left intact to impart the feeling of the original translation. Only where the translation was overly vague have we made any significant changes. Additionally, we have added numerous "Current Commentary" sections throughout to help augment the readers knowledge and understanding and/or to provide some necessary context for proper understanding to take place within. Preface The pure gem is a vibrational melding of etheric wave and human realization, causing a physical reaction. This gem is to manifest in mineral form in the future and will be known as "Starmist", among other names. The whole of the earth and the physical body of mankind will eventually align their molec1uar atomic rotation to the etheric level of the Pure Gem. As light is reflected in the prismatic form of a gem, so the sequence of atomic structure will form facets in the genetic structure of man, regulating the diffraction of spiritual energies to encompass the total spectrum of etheric rays. In this new era, beginning with 1976, the earth has entered a new range of harmony with the prismatic rays. Current Commentary: the planet is now assimilating these prismatic rays into its phi crystalline geometries. Each gem that is visible to us on earth is only one layer of prismatic rays of that total gem. To clarify the usage of the word "gem" in this context, the definition would be: any hard, natural substance composed of crystals that is designed whether by nature or synthetically, to reflect prismatic light. We must learn to draw upon the total gem and receive from the total seven layers of each gem. In drawing upon gems, healing and various other phases of spiritual illumination can be activated. Different gems contain different alignments. Spiritual life missions are under the direction of a particular gem's prismatic rays. As the mission elevates toward its purpose, a different gem may he drawn upon. Understand that the physical gem is merely an externalization of a sequence of cosmic law that is actualized in geometric structure in its physical counterpart. One need not possess a physical gem in order to activate the prismatic rays of that gem. All that is required is the spiritual receptivity and higher-mind understanding of cosmic law. Introduction The prismatic lines of light conform to the surface levels of the directive flow of cosmic energy. When entering the earth dimension, cosmic energy crystalizes its directive channels. That is not to say that the energy itself is crystalized, for cosmic actions are never frozen in time, but the directive or purpose of that energy in its geometric conformity to universal law is suggested by the crystalized, prismatic state of the Pure Gem. The mind of man is able to fuse his consciousness with these directives, and through the relativity of his needs, release his divine potential through signals of geometric, prismatic lines of thought-energy. A co-existent cosmic structure to this thought-energy is the Temple Light. This is a state of order in the etheric plane of consciousness. It is the indivisible time - the NOW infinity. In the Temple Light all time is NOW, willed by the relativity of the beholder. Souls are expanded continuously through time, all within the same instant, creating multiple realities. We are generally consciously aware of only one "self," and aware of our self existing in one instant at a time. In actuality, our souls are not tied by such finite bonds. To give a clearer picture, the following analogy could be made. We see a man walking down a crowded sidewalk in New York. .It is noon and many people are hurrying for their mid-day break as part of their hectic work pace. The man pauses to buy a paper in an almost unconscious ritual. In the confused congestion of noise and people, he fumbles for a quarter and it slips from his hand, rolling down the sidewalk between the moving ankles and feet of his fellow earth dwellers. Now, to this man in the trying times of today's modern world, a quarter is a representation of a portion of his life, which he industriously earned. It is to him thus consequently equal to time, for it will take a certain amount of time regardless of how small to replace the quarter through his earnings. He furrows his brow in slight agitation and follows the rolling piece of silver with his eyes. Within these few moments his attention is centered on the coin, but his perception is divided thusly: it is registering the space in which the coin is moving, the direction it is headed, and the time that is lapsing during its process of continuance. Those are the his NOW perceptions. The mind of this man is also simultaneously projecting into future perspectives. He is trying to anticipate where the coin will stop, and ultimately how long from the NOW point (which is constantly changing) this final action will occur. In his conscious mind he is unable to truly perceive past the NOW point, but his higher senses have already arrived in this point as well as all future perspectives that are in accord with his soul's existence. While he is acutely focusing his attention on the problem at hand, the re-obtaining of a portion of his time, his conscious self is unaware that this time can never really escape him. Through infinity, his soul will be interacting with those moments of the rolling coin. Although the NOW point, or rather his reality, is changing every instant, his soul is existing in all time continuums within those same moments. The soul could also be compared. with a pencil. As the tip of the pencil is writing the NOW reality the rest of the pencil is in motion with it. The point, or window, of recognition -- the writing -- is the sum expression of the total pencil. The busy New Yorker is so immersed in the denser reality, he is unaware of his multiple selves and most likely, even the possibility of their existence. The Temple Light, therefore, is a mechanism for the gathering of souls into a commitment of flexible realities. It began long before the earth breathed its first creative sigh, but also it could be said that it begins NOW, in the moment you read this. Although such continuity of the soul is a cosmic law applied to all souls, the Order of Temple Light are those souls initiated through recognition, for the purpose of sustaining divine knowledge through all the generations of existence. Through the Temple Light you may receive instruction from your higher self in a past or future character and also the past or future characters of other souls whom you know or have known. Because the Temple Light is an order or group of souls dedicated to a specialized purpose it would seem that it would be selective in its initiates.

# The Pure Gem Codex  A symbologic

Yet the Temple Light is not temporal, but the etheric archetype of all physically manifest sacred orders. Therefore, the initiation process of this higher order is not bound to secular conformity. The Temple Light is timeless - the resultant synthesis of past, present and future. It is then numberless in initiates, excluding no souls as all souls eventually attain the ability of etheric sovereignty, thus opening the "door" of the soul's super-consciousness to the realization of its multiple continuity. Once this is achieved, the soul is fully realized within the Temple Light. It becomes aware of its continuous being through multiple characters of karmic circumstance, each character being the higher presence of the soul during an individual incarnation. The souls of the Temple Light are energy extensions of the Eternal Being. While the soul is projected within a physical system [i.e. incarnate], the higher presence of the soul, while resuming the identity of that physical system, is not bound by temporal relativity, but rather it is free to express the total soul through the gnosis of divine reason. In this timeless forum of thought, it is not the higher presence that is the duplication of the physical system. The higher presence is the divine realization of the soul - the archetypal oversoul who assumes the character of the temporal half in order to communicate its existence to that incarnate form within the denser projections of its being. As the soul is released from one character and assumes another, via reincarnation, the oversoul or higher presence encompasses the new character. As all time is one in the etheric plane, the soul does not discard past identities for newer ones, but instead encompasses new dimensions of experience as an expansion, increasing its design. Each character remains as a golden bead of intelligence upon the string of time while yet another bead is added by the infinite artisan of divine law. Understand, that the Temple Light is a structure of intelligence expressed through the vehicle of experience. A soul resonating within the Temple Light displays the many phases of its karmic experience, expressing each character to the fullest, all the while maintaining the pure gnostic value of its purest essence. This essence always remains true to the PURE value of the soul, despite the myriad expressions of the personality in incarnation. The structure of the Temple Light is built on the foundation of divine and cosmic law. It is this law that is the core of the Pure Gem, the Temple Light being the etheric externalization of this profound principle. The Pure Gem is therefore a synthesis of soul presence and human behavior, which when realized forms a pure structure, a line of action on the physical plane that is in perfect alignment with the energized intelligence of man. Consequently, what is NOW? What in essence is qualitative only, through the realization of the Pure Gem, will become also quantitative in our physical reality. Through incarnation the soul will multiply and grow (evolve) it's 'quality' of presence within specific manifested forms. It will then be able to interact physically with spiritual properties more precisely and effectively. Man will thus find his world in the highest phase of its physical evolution, that point of cosmic chemistry which is the last vestige of atomic gravitation binding the soul. Enveloped in the etheric plane, man and his world will become a finely faceted state of purification before the release of his physical nature. As individual souls evolve into higher stages of existence, so does the earth as a whole. The Pure Gem state is the final collective effort of earth's incarnate souls to achieve physical unity within an etheric perspective. The physical body inhabited by such souls will become ONE with the whole spectrum of the soul's greater being. Through his pure gem state, man will ultimately realize the multiple characters of his soul and utilize the experiences of his past and future selves. By contracting and focusing our energies into one conscious realization, we will explicate the true cosmogony, in turn, releasing ourselves from the need for physical experience. For in the understanding of the creation of the physical cosmogony in the comprehension of physical order, man will cut himself free from his insecurities which place him in doubt of his role in the universal schematic. Not unlike an orphaned child, mankind has ardently longed for its celestial heritage. Through the recognition of the consummation of his seed, man will thirst no more in the regions of physical worlds, but ascend into the fuller domains of heaven. In order to achieve this realization, the human system must connect to its higher presence and the soul within must be absorbed within its oversoul - its True Self. While the accumulation of knowledge to man's conscious senses is essential in his mental development, it is the application of knowledge through his physical reaction to the cosmic principle that constitutes the realization of the soul. In his choice of physical alignment to cosmic reason, man places himself in the flow of nature, building a structured sense analogous to his divine character or spirit. In this decisive action, he conspires with his senses to duplicate the creative acts of Universal Intelligence. While he makes few attempts to declare his absolute allegiance to the Source, or the true basic laws, he creates in pantomime, a definitive logos, in which the codex of all universal law may be found. It is time for man to retrace his own symbology for an accurate disclosure of his relationship to the Universal Mind that recognizes his existence. Within this Pure Gem Codex is to be found a symbolical representation of the prismatic lines that extend from the Universal Reconing and interact with the actions of souls, forming a golden mean of harmony in the higher expression of the soul which is capable of creating atomic synchronization and ultimately, physical reality. Current Commentary: The Universal Reconing is a mechanism for re-calibration of the primal Universal Conic Section for the purpose of converting unqualified universal energy into qualified signals of activation that give rise to specific light-encoding used in the manifestational worlds of existence. It is our intention with this compilation, to leave much unexplained in terms of a step by step analysis, instead extending to the participant the keys of initiation into the higher order of his own perceptive senses. This, hopefully, will bring forth from his interpretive powers a personal recognition of divine principle that is understood from the basis of his own individualized acceptance of truth. In this way, neither the translator or the artist impose their judgement of this etheric work upon the participant. In the final analysis, it is the singular beholder who is the artisan of the Pure Gem Codex. The Pure Gem Revealed Current Commentary: please note that originally there was intended to be a "Pure Gem Graph" as an artwork graphically depicting the various relationships and dynamics within the Pure Gem as revealed herein. This artwork was never actually accomplished on a physical plane level. However, the causal level of this "graph" is very much present and active as an interface with the Pure Gem. We thus recommend using this text as a guided meditation to open a channel for the higher form of the Pure Gem Graph to infuse your Light Body with its divine harmonics and thus to reveal to you upon your own mental screen the symbolic representations needed to bring your conscious mind into parity with the greater design of what we are herein calling the Pure Gem. Because this is a rather involved matrix it may be best that you work with it one section at a time over a longer period for the best results.

# The Pure Gem Codex  A symbologic

Attune to your guidance after reading this in its entirety and follow your guidance implicitly as to the best approach for you to take in working with the Pure Gem. When you are ready to meditate upon the various aspects of the Pure Gem we would suggest that you take a few moments to get into a quiet meditative posture that is comfortable and which allows you to stay conscious with the unfolding process. Then start breathing slowly and rhythmically in and out through the heart chakra. When you a feel the wave of deepening peace come over you it is time to begin. Allow the descriptive words and attunements that follow to reveal the Pure Gen uniquely to you and your own understanding at this time. When you meditate on each of these sections or subsections, take time to allow them to reveal their mysteries to your heart, mind and soul. Breathe each of them in and out through your heart, asking to receive higher knowledge, wisdom and awareness concerning it. Use the names, governing gems and color frequencies to guide you into deeper attunement with each section or subsection so that you may receive from its essence whatever you need to at this time. Most importantly, do not try too hard to think about what it all means, just open to receive higher awareness directly from the Pure Gem Matrix. Beginning from the center of the matrix, and expanding outward, the Pure Gem, the Star-Mist, lies in the palm of the Christ child. This is a symbolic representation of the Divine Christ directive through which the cosmic law of the Pure Gem is activated. Radiating out from this Pure Gem are the prismatic rays through which the new atomic structures will be formed. Allow these rays to form in your mind in whatever way they wish to. Next, are revealed the six cycles or ages into which these Pure Gem actions have been divided. These divisions represent periods or collective "ascension movements" of human consciousness to a greater degree than they do actual ages or time. Each of the six periods are under the directive of a specific gem frequency and is active on its seven prismatic layers and is channeled through a frequency represented by a color. Periods and Cycles of the Pure Gem CYCLE ONE - Menda, Period of the First Light Awareness of wisdom - selflessness, absorbed in the cosmic all Governing Gem: Golden Topaz Color Frequency: Gold Steps of Unfoldment 1) Male Image - encompassed in male/female wisdom. Freedom in knowledge through Divine Law becomes total love. 2) Twin Rays - divine arch of duality. Separation of polarities and union through divine order. The dual vision of male/female projected into prophetic imagery, the future crystallization of atomic structure forming the Pure Gem is brought into present alignment through the perfect balance between the male and female. 3) The High Priestess - the greater consciousness of the male self. Unity of feminine wisdom from generation unto generation, perpetrated through the seed of man and reflected through the initiations of the Temple Light in incarnation. 4) The Youth of Earth's Wisdom - young in spirit yet aged in physical sorrows. The new earth expands into the universe; it is an orb of royal light carrying, in tender embrace, knowledges that shall be made known to future generations. CYCLE TWO - Auhma, a Period of Innocence The spontaneous illumination of children who are the vessels of the Golden Age Governing Gem: Amethyst Color Frequency: Violet Steps of Unfoldment 1) The mother gathers her sons about her. As each presides at her bosom in love so shall he become the son of the universe through the acceptance of the mother of all existence, universal law. These are the children of nature - the abiding of the child-self with nature's kind. 2a) Of visitation, miracles and prophecy. The new surge of souls for the New Age. These are the children who walk with angels. 2b) Man and woman in unconscious harmony, both as Children of God led by the infant of their seed. Their innocence is the "little child that leads them." CYCLE THREE - Emeti, Period of Earth Balance The planet earth's response to the actions of the soul Governing Gem: Emerald Color Frequency: Green Steps of Unfoldment 1) The physical embodiment of man in the earth condition. 2) The convulsive reaction of earth as a result of mental anguish. 3) The beauty of the earth manifest through the beauty within the soul. CYCLE FOUR - Christohama, Period of Salvation The losing of the cosmic self to the point of degradation -- restoration through the Universal Christ in the incarnation of Yeshua Governing Gem: Aquamarine Color Frequency: Blue Steps of Unfoldment 1) The Adamic House divides into the many branches. Through the House of David the Adam and Eve rays descend into the Yeshua-Mary projections, which are eventually sustained through flesh. 2a) The emissary - angelic messenger disclosing prophecy to the virgin as an oracle of the Hierarchy. 2b) The Immaculate Conception and birth of the Christ Child through the phases of etheric presence into the body of Mari - the converging of cosmic action aligned to produce spontaneous life within the virgin womb. 3a) The boy Yeshua in stages of physical growth and spiritual illumination. 3b) The man Yeshua absorbing knowledges through his travels and studies. 4) The Baptism - the reversal of energies, a changing of polarities causing cosmic fusions within the earth as the Christed One re-directs our spiritual alignment with the Universal Consciousness through his body. 5a) Yeshua's communion with the space brothers. 5b) Crucifixion and ascension, the embryonic transfer. The Christed One returns to the purified body once again, into the womb of future births. He is received in physical form into the Mother Planet, Ala'Ru. Current Commentary: "Ala'Ru" is one of MANY ancient names for the Mother Planet and is Lemurian in origin. This same Mother Planet concept was also spoken of by author Taylor Cauldwell wherein he called the planet "Faustia." This name was also given to and written about in "A Search for a Soul" by Cauldwell and Stearn. I was later given my own information on the star-sun Rigel in Orion and told that "Faustia" was a planet of that star-sun. Cauldwell doesn't say anything like that, but just mentions this planet and paints some scenes of activity there as I recall. Thoth tells me that "Faustia" is also the same as the "Kolob" of the Mormon faith. According to Thoth, Ala'Ru / Faustia is the planet upon which Yeshua now resides in embodiment. CYCLE FIVE - Oaxacao, Period of Preparation Preparing the way for the Golden Age Governing Gem: Blue Sapphire Color Frequency: Indigo Steps of Unfoldment 1a) Communion of saints. 1b) The administering to the afflicted through spiritual healing. 1c) Prayer and revelation - the total quiet moment - acquisition of divine wisdom. 2) Cosmic Translation - the opening of the universal memory records and the translation of the knowledges therein.

# The Pure Gem Codex  A symbologic

3a) The guidance and instruction of those elect through the Divine Order. 3b) The oracles of the New Era - collection and regeneration of the masses. CYCLE SIX - Johanna, Period of Enlightenment Receipt of the Golden Age into humanity's fold Governing Gem: Diamond Color Frequency: White-Gold Steps of Unfoldment 1a) The coming of the Illumined Ones as a throng of shining hosts from the heavens. 1b) The manifestation of actual physical contact and communication between worlds. The fear of man for his space brothers dissolves. The experiencing of compassion and love of our brothers of the universe for us, their lost brethren. 2a) The arks of the last days. The fulfilling of this promise through the physical ascension of those who receive the blessings of His love so that the earth may be purified for all humanity. 2b) The dispensing of those of those elect to the inner earth regions and their subsequent adaptation to a more enlightened living. 2c) The instruction of those elect on other planets for the purpose of returning to earth as Masters in the service of the Golden Age. 3a) The return to the surface earth for the human race; the summoning and gathering of the genetic lost tribes of Israel; the establishment of the Holy Cities. Current Commentary: everything past this point occurs once we have collectively entered into the New Earth Star. 3b) Christ coming amongst humanity once again as we knew Him. Many walk again with Him as they once did in the distant past. The reign of the Christed One begins. 3c) The Christed One departs to the Mother Planet Ala'Ru. Mankind and the body of earth are reconciled to be at one with the Mother Planet, Ala'Ru. 3d) The Universal Christ is released from the body and soul of Yeshua into the universal infinity. This release into "universal infinity" is BEYOND what is given in cycle four. It is the Christic Light absorbing the soul of Yeshua and then being dispersed back into the universe in a new form. 4) The body of humanity is fully crystallized into the prismatic harmony of the Pure Gem. Current Commentary: as a planetary baseline Thoth indicates we are currently in the latter stages of cycle five, but the leading edge of the planetary consciousness evolution has entered into the early stages of cycle six. Its also important to realize that these periods are not really unfolding in a strictly linear sequencing either, but rather that all levels are unfolding simultaneously. Its just that our current minds are embedded within the parameters of a three-dimensional space-time continuum that necessitates a certain degree of linearity within our perceptive senses wherein we perceive that we progress from one point to another sequentially. Here we provide a convenient table summary of the six periods of the Pure Gem: The Four Channel Tribes: there are four Channel Tribes and their associated translation gems. These tribes and their gems are as follows: 1) Hebrew: sardius, topaz, carbuncle or garnet 2) Incan: emerald, sapphire and diamond 3) Hopi: ligure, agate and amethyst 4) Egyptian: beryl (golden yellow), onyx and jasper These four Channel Tribes are those genetic lines which currently carry and sustain the genetic memory of the twelve lost tribes. The twelve lost tribes are frequencies that humanity has set aside as part of it's experience of separation, with the goal being to move back toward unity. These tribes or frequencies are also exemplified in actual physical genetic tribes or human genetic strains. Their translation gems are the prismatic ray directives that stimulate the pineal gland to release these tides of memory frequency. These four genetic nations are the "mouthpieces" for the twelve "lost" tribes. They are the sentinels of the knowledge, the ushers of the lost tribes into the period of the Golden Age. The Twelve Lost Tribes: lying outside the natural positive and negative spectrum aligned with perfect earth balance are the frequency bands of the twelve lost tribes of Isa-Ra-El -- meaning in ancient Lemurian, the "points of the star". It was a known law of physics by the Lemurians that when the light of a star was intercepted at the proper angle as to cause the refraction of the image to divide into equal linear rays mathematically balanced so that every ray or point was equal to the inertia power of the atomic drive behind it (in other words causing the reflective image of the star to reveal its hidden atomic line of action), then the energy mass of the star is in total agreement with the optic perception of the participants. And so it is with the uniting of the twelve tribes, each a point of light with a purpose behind it. Accompanying the twelve tribes are their associated governing gems: The Etheric Cities These are ancient cities that no longer exist physically, but their pure vibration is sustained within the etheric and astral planes. They are in a Pure Gem state astrally, but are not in complete "radiance" or accord with the total Pure Gem as they have no physical structure. The total Pure Gem state is an equilibrium between the astral and physical conditions. These astral-etheric cities act as "sacral points," or sustaining levels of conscious actions which draw into alignment physical counterparts on this earth -- in other words related physical directives. These cities do not work through the prismatic action of specific gems, but through the combined actions of the seven etheric gems [see next section], those prismatic rays that cannot at this time penetrate the earth's spectral wave lengths. These are the twelve etheric cities: The Seven Etheric Gems These etheric gems are the direct projections of the Pure Gem. The Lemurian Seals Lastly are the gold and pearl Lemurian seals. These seals represent the sealing or sacred keeping of knowledge and the gradual release of these ancient knowledges through the expanding awareness level of humanity. Current Commentary: I would like to create artworks of these VERY SACRED seals and make them available. Until then, you will have to access them in your own mind's eye! Offices of the Pure Gem These "offices" are really just archetypal signposts that guide the mythic level of mankind's imagination toward our role-identification process within the various cycles. The offices listed for each cycle unfold sequentially in the order they are listed. They do not all govern their associated cycles at the same time. Current Commentary: in order to intellectually understand the meaning of these offices you would need to be well versed in the mythos of each of these archetypes which is not likely to be the case for most people. I thought of taking these out of the Pure Gem Codex before making it publicly available for this reason. However, in the end I decided to leave them in for the vibrational transmission they will offer you, IF you ask for it AND open to receive it. My best advice as always is to not let your mind get in the way, just open to receive if you seek deeper communion with these archetypal energies.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

VOLUME 01, 2006 Please use the NEW "Printer Friendly Version" link in the menu bar on the front cover page above to make a quality print of this publication. We were guided to name this publication Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron by Thoth, and the Illumined Assembly of the Christos' Merkabah of the Host comprised of 12 souls holding open a portal for the the Christ energies on this planet. The Radiant Ones we are working with encouraged us to bring forth this publication as a continuance of work that was done by Maia Christianne Nartoomid from 1980 through 1999. During this period Maia produced, first, the periodical entitled The Source [1980-1988], and then later, Temple Doors [1989-1999]. In 1994 Simeon Nartoomid joined her in producing the latter periodical. In the nearly 7 year respite between the conclusion of Temple Doors and when the first release of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron began, we both underwent a period of expanded esoteric initiation and deeply personal transformational experiences that have prepeared us for resuming this work at an entirely new octave of experience. Thoth and the IAC Merkabah of the Host have requested that we facilitate a specific Program of Light related to the Aramu Temple of Thoth and Numis'OM to help those who feel resonant with this Station of Light [Spirit Heart Sanctuary] to accelerate their Ascension processes and thus to further help the collective soul of humanity approach the gateway of Ascension which Thoth calls Light-Principle Forty, or LP-40 for short. Ultimately, as we collectively move through this passage we will activate the 44:44 Ascension Stargate and trigger a series of cosmic events destined to alter the DNA of humanity forever. Numis'OM is a causal reference point for the New Earth Star and the 44:44 stargate, and is hosted within the causal body of Venus. The Aramu Temple of Thoth is energetically within the Numis'OM matrix and acts as a way-station for souls building the New Earth Star consciousness from within the earthen experience. Souls can thus visit Numis'OM and even the New Earth Star if they have proper intent and attunement. It is our goal to provide pathways for this to occur within. This publication thus sits at the heart of our efforts to facilitate this greater process for the Masters and Illumined Ones that we are working with and to assist souls on earth. We hope that you will find it a fruitful and friendly path into the Homeward Light. The lower front cover art on this issue is entitled "Eye of Metatron" by Maia Christianne Nartoomid. The upper front cover banner art is by Simeon Nartoomid. All of the art that appears on the lower front cover and in the various articles in this issue is available on the Subscriber's Freebies and Discounts page while this issue is current. After this volume becomes a back issue the art that appears in it will then only be available through our Spirit Store IF it has an associated item number. Click the item number of the art piece to find it there if it no longer appears on the Subscriber's Freebies and Discounts page. Articles we know of which will appear in the NEXT issue of Numis'OM include: - Crop Circles - The New Breed - Walking with the Star Lions - a Shamanic Journey [Star Lions of Numis'Om part II] The Golden Lotus by Maia Nartoomid ARSY-0015STD and the Shamballah Gate by Maia Christianne Nartoomid Numis'OM is the name given to me by Thoth to call earth's double of etheric energy that is the staging ground or outer membrane for the developing New Earth Star realm. We are currently building the hologram of the New Earth. As the hologram develops, so it evolves the "membrane" of the Numis'OM, which in turn, transfers these frequencies and sacred geometries into the developing New Earth Star. Numis'OM means: gathering of the many aspects of the holy word or tone in one breath, one movement of being. The merging seed of the blue ray of earth with the violet ray of Numis'OM creates the blue-violet or INDIGO ray/flame of the New Earth Star. The Temple of Aramu (divine fire bird) and the Numis'OM in Volume 1, 1997 of Temple Doors: "Thoth asks us to return to the first information he gave me concerning the ‘New Earth Star’. This appeared in Volume 2, 1991 of Temple Doors. Maia had received some understanding of the planet’s movement toward that evolution previously, but in Temple Doors Volume 2, 1991 he gives the name ‘New Earth Star’ for the first time, and a more detailed description of the actual condition. We reprint that information here for the readers convenience, as it must be read again first to truly understand what Thoth is saying now about that dynamic." The New Earth Star from Volume 2, 1991 of Temple Doors: We are approaching a ‘gate of completion’ when the etheric double of this planet which has been developing on the inner planes for some time, will be ready to receive its first major contact-point with its twin world, our elemental Earth. This first revolution of synchronization will occur on January 11, 1992. In Volume 4, 1985 of The Source (original name of Temple Doors), information was given on what was then called ‘Altheria’, Earth's double of etheric energy which the Egyptians referred to as the ‘KA’. The Egyptians used this term to refer to any etheric double, such as that of humans and animals, not particularly in describing the double of the Earth itself. This etheric image of Earth is growing, like a crystal in a sunlit cave, refracting the light of the planet’s inner harmonics, transforming the pollution and violence as it interacts with the etheric plane, and straining out the bilge of our confused karmic patterns, thus producing the purest elixir of our true Ark of Illumination - the ‘New Earth Star’ (NES). The completion of the New Earth Star will not take place until this elemental earthen sphere merges with its supernal double. The planet’s KA is no longer Altheria, for it has progressed into a more defined and rarefied state, known now as 'Numis'OM'. When the Blue Ray of our Earth is fully integrated with the Violet Ray of Numis'OM, there will burst forth into a glorious Blue-Violet Flame, the ‘Iris Eye’. This is the bonding flame of the New Earth Star, when our world and its supernal form will join at the apex of the Metatronic Spiral, through the ‘eye of the needle’ - the Iris Eye. Through what Solara of Star-Borne refers to as the "Healing of Orion", we as an inspirited world, will be able to de-polarize our consciousness so that we can enter the Iris-Eye, where all polarities are ONE....
