# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Once the individual learns that they are now being opened up to experiencing a greater degree of the planetary dross so they can give it passage to into the Divine Light as a surrogate, they then will also naturally seek Divine Assistance in this endeavor because they will realize that what they are dealing with is much larger than they are. As Thoth related to us years ago it is not our responsibility to transmute all the dross in our space. It IS our responsibility to reveal it -- become aware it is in our space and what its nature and character is -- and then to offer it up to the High Host and God-Spirit-Source to be transmuted. It is VERY important that we become proficient in accomplishing this. It is an extremely effective tool, it is very fast, and its activity operates under the auspices of the Law of Divine Grace. We thus move ourselves more fully under the action of Divine Grace when we use this tool. We are then empowered to experience what I call "Quantum Transformation." I will be writing more on this in the future. I also teach people to become more proficient in its use in the sessions I do. Once we receive Divine Grace, in order to keep the envelope of that energy expanding within our experience, we also must be open and aware enough to allow ourselves to likewise become vessels of Divine Grace for others. The opportunity to do so presents itself to us many, many times each day. Most of these opportunities are seemingly so insignificant that we may miss them. But no act of becoming a vessel of Divine Grace for another being is insignificant. The spiritual power and radiance that you build within your energy bodies and the planetary energy bodies is far greater than you may realize with even the smallest of such acts of love, kindness, caring and compassion that resonate with phi [Divine Love]. David Hawkins in his book "Power vs Force" describes how a couple of loving thoughts, feelings and actions at the end of a very negative day can offset all the negativity that transpired during the day. Along this same line of thinking he then also relates that one person calibrating at the level of 700 on his Map of Consciousness [I highly recommend this book and the map] can offset the negativity of 70 million individuals calibrating at less then 200. His chart on page 234 shows that even one individual calibrating at 300 will offset the negativity of 90,000 persons below 200. The power of love is truly beyond what the human mind can imagine possible. When we extend love and kindness to another being, especially when they may be mistreating us in some way, we invoke the Law of Love AND the Law of Divine Grace and negativity is transmuted for us, the other being, and the planet. THAT is quantum Light-Love work! It is the aggregation of many such acts which ultimately place us into harmonic accord with Numis'OM and the NES. The more often we can elicit this awareness and consciousness in our lives, open ourselves to Divine Grace, and also be a vehicle for it to transmit to others, the more easily and quickly we will find ourselves advancing towards completing the Heart Ascension process. This will in turn expand our experience towards living more completely within the states of reality known as Avalon, para prakriti and ultimately maha prakriti as we enter the New Earth Star as the leading edge of a collective exodus to broader Metatronic horizons. This we are destinined to experience while we are still here in the current earth and we will become living examples for others to see what lies ahead. THAT will initiate a major acceleration for all other beings on the planet as they suddenly realize what they are missing! Circular Passage by Maia Christianne Nartoomid by Maia Christianne Nartoomid In the late 1990's I wrote an article on Crop Circles which is now displayed on Spirit Mythos. Since I wrote that article, there has been an "upgrading" of Crop Circles to really incredible designs, most of which are being created by people right here on earth! Some are out-right forgeries, but most are being crafted by a group who are being guided by the orginal off-planet creators of the crop circles. They are really not that consicously aware of this guidance as a whole, but some within the group are aware of this guidance. This change-over from star-makers to terrestrial-makers of the circles is a part of the intended plan to integrate these living symbols into the mass consciousness. By transfering creation to the inhabitants of this world, so the Star Ones have given us a great gift for re-creating our spiritual portals into Self and beyond. As I wrote in my 1990's article: Thoth tells us that the 'crop circles' are modules of spiritual programming designed to bring us back into the original divine imaging of Earth as a vehicle for the Adam Kadmon, or template of Divine Man, which we as a planetary realm, separated from eons ago. This 'programming' is being set into the cellular firing of our matter-forms through interface with the divine biochemistry. While certain star races facilitate this imprinting with their Mark-Korhas Merkabah craft, the command and institution of this transfer is given forth through the Elohim, or Creational Beings. Now we, earth's humanity, are in the stages of becoming the "New Elohim", so we must make the pattern, sing the song, open the portals and the floodgates of our awareness as to the truth of our divine nature. Crop circles represent our labyrinths of mastery, for as we emerge from the web and the weave of life, we are lifted to a new plane of awareness as to the pattern and design of the path we have taken. . . and it's purpose in relatationship to our present and future. According to Thoth, circles are the most healing of all geometries, for they take us into infinity by revealing to us that we don't have to "get anywhere" to go there. Meditating on, walking around or drawing circles open bio-chemical channels for physical, mental and emotional health and well-being, for a circle is the natural circuit of balance in the bio-chemical components in nature. A sacred excercise in this process can be conducted by drawing your own circles. Simple or complex, or any variation in-between. Then tracing it with your finger, moving your eyes around it, and in to the center and out again, or other interactions you feel guided to embark upon. Mandalas are in circular form and they are some of the most powerful means to integrate the "circle magic" into your life. Using colors and designs with the circle adds to the power of your "Elohim" being as you draw upon those resources to create the balance of life at a new octave in your being. Even without creating your own, working with consciously created mandalas can open new pathways in the energy bodies. If you feel guided to work with mandala circles, you may wish to explore those which I have created that can be found in our Spirit Store. I also do personalized custom Personal Healing Mandalas for the individual. However you wish to approach a closer relationship with the Sacred Circle, you cannot go wrong, for the circle reveals no discrimination in its form.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

It invites all and sustains it through the loving balance of LOVE. Why would a circle be loving? Because a womb is where love begins, or at least one visible stage of it begins anew; and a circle is a womb for many creations in the universe. MAY THE CIRCLE OF ONENESS BLESS, HEAL, AND SUSTAIN YOU! Ascension Ankh by Maia Christianne Nartoomid ARSY-0021STD You can be so filled with gratitude that God’s will is being done, regardless of conditions or appearances, that you, by this very devotion, can transform and completely glorify, any earthly circumstance or condition. As you are thankful in all things, all things in your world that have not seemingly expressed total harmony can be immediately transmuted, transformed or translated into conditions of harmonious self-empowerment for ever and ever. What a wonderful life of glorious synergy! ~ excerpted with permission from The Bible for Translating from Physical to Spirit, by Terry Livingood [highly recommended] I received this Ascension Ankh as a vision I had while Simeon and I were praying for my health, and the health of ALL beings on this planet. Later, I requested more information about it from Thoth. He revealed to me that the Ascension Ankh is a NEW PURE SYMBOL for the ascension of the energy bodies as they are integrated into the New Earth Star vibration of Numis'OM. The Egyptian Ankh represents basically, life. However, it is intended to mean much more than that. In her book, Mystery of the White Lions - Children of the Sun God, author Linda Tucker states categorically that the ankh did not originate in Egypt. She believes it's origin to have come from sub-Saharan Africa where it was known as the "Knot of Life - the symbol of the one-legged sun god Mvelinqangi." My akashic insights reveal that the ankh is in the shape of a device brought to Mu (Lemuria) from Venus by the original Lord Melchezidek. When held and moved just above the body, it regenerated and re-aligned all the energy bodies. It is a symbol of Eternal Life, which encompasses the physica,l but is far more universal and dimensional in scope. The Ascension Ankh has it's loop open to reflect the movement outward and upward of the life waves of creation. The crescent is the womb releasing, giving birth to the egg, depicted here by a fire opal - a fire and water stone (star suns and life-giving fluidium). Over the fire opal is the Seed of Life Symbol, which is the first stage in creating the Flower of Life. The Seed of Life is that beginning strand of BEING that arises from the Azoth, or ether of "First Form," to create the pattern, the expression of life seen in the Flower of Life. Both the Seed of Life and the Flower of Life were engraved by the ancient Egyptians on the walls of the Osiris Temple at Abydos. The Seed of Life symbol was drawn upon the body of initiates in the Temple of the Risen One (Great Pyramid), indicating their readiness in mind, body and heart-light for the ascension process. Understand that in the Egypt of Thoth's day, "ascension" meant to walk the earth as an Illumined One - a Solar Lord, liken unto the Thoth, Raismes of Aphra. Such a being does not have to leave the planet or go to another dimension of it to be "ascended". The Master Yeshua (Jesus) embodied full ascension as he walked the slums and towns in the Holy Land. The light green stone is meant to represent moldavite - the heavenly stone - and is placed at the heart of the universal body. It is the ascended heart being that must be present before any other aspect of self may ascend. I believe that the Ascension Ankh was given to me to share with the Numis'OM subscribers as a symbol to meditate upon for integrating the energy bodies in preparation for ascension. We have therefore made it available for free to Numis'OM subscribers. You may place the Ascension Ankh on your desktop and send it to others if you wish. I request that if you send the Ascension Ankh to anyone, please include this link. The Ascension Ankh is also available through our Spirit Store as item #ARSY-0021STD. Thoth Raismes of Aphra by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AB-0003STD Atu Tehuti, Ati Hatu -- "in the rising of the breath I greet you, in the release of the breath I embrace you" The following are questions which were sent in by readers and put to Thoth through Maia Christianne Nartoomid. 1) Miriam Aharoni: could Thoth enlighten us regarding the latest information concerning the Lemurians? Much is being written about Mount Shasta being their main domain underneath, as well as above in the etheric form, as well as humans being able in the very near future to contact them and so forth? Thoth: The "Mu" People (as the Hawaiians still call them) still have some remnant strains on / in the earth. They are within the interior of the planet (a slighty removed dimension) and in the Valley of the Blue Star in Tibet. There is also a community of Lemurians in the cavern areas of Mount Shasta and beneath the city of Lhasa in Tibet. There are then the Lemurian Timewalkers who come among you from the past. In the future, the barriers of time will become less defined in your current electro-magnetic zone of the planet, and humanity of your realm will then be able to more freely interact with "uni-manity" on all levels of the earth reality and on many cosmic levels. 2a) Anonymous: regarding your Ascension Overview article: is my understanding correct that the new etheric templates are being built, and that they reside etherically in Venus? Thoth: Venus holds the pattern for earth's ascension, but the NES [New Earth Star] is not developing within Venus. Simeon: Numis'OM is, however, non-locally hosted within/by the causal body of Venus as a portal to the NES. This is like Venus' causal body acting like an internet sever for the old-earth and NES, helping them to connect through the intermediary stage of Numis'OM, which is not really a world unto itself as the NES, but rather a set of formative harmonics that will help us bridge into the NES through Divine Grace. Thus Venus is a major gateway or portal energetically for Numis'OM which is subseqiently a gateway or portal to the NES. Its important to think about this in terms of energy and harmonics rather than material realities and geophysical, solar or interstellar space-time locations.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

2b) Anonymous: at the time of ascension, currently timed for "2012", the parts of earth which have become golden -- i.e the Golden Taya -- will vibrate and ascend, protected by the pillars, etc, and humans choosing to go with Gaia will be within this sphere of experience? Thoth: Your understanding of the process is basically correct, but "2012" is only one possible window for this event. Simeon: Please keep in mind that while there are some very specific keys and codes that will be opened for the earth in the passage 2012 represents, it is unknown how long it will take the mass consciousness of humanity to assimilate those new keys and codes that have been made available and which in turn will be the triggers for planetary ascension at some point. The thing we need to focus on at this time according to Thoth is the Heart Ascension process as it is a pre-requisite for everything else. See my article this issue entitled Divine Grace, Avalon, Numis'OM, and Para Prakriti for a bit more on the Heart Ascension. 2c) Anonymous: will the rest of the material body of earth not ascending erupt in earthquakes and finally blow itself up? Thoth: It will become increasingly unstable and self-destruct, yes. 2d) Anonymous: is the new earth star actually made of the same bits and pieces as earth one? Thoth: there will be the essence of certain light-encoded matter transferred from the current earth into the NES, but the NES will not be made of the actual physical matter of the old earth. The NES is at a much higher vibratory rate than Earth One and is not within a physical existence as you now experience. 2e) Anonymous: and the souls who do not go [to the NES], will die and be reborn into another earth-like planet, and won't know the difference? Thoth: Yes, this is the basic understanding. However, understand also that ALL souls in the current earth's experience and those to enter it between now and LP-40 will eventually have to be facilitated into the NES before the whole Ascension process is considered complete. Simeon: please also understand that most of the souls that will perish physically and be re-born into a new world to finish the Program of Light from the old earth so they can then join their bretheren in the NES will physically perish in bliss, not in trauma, and this too is an act of Divine Grace and will help them to erase old programming to make it easier for them to complete. Additionally, we should do all we can NOW to help them because Thoth told us it is easier to do this work now than it will be to do it across a dimensional membrane. To work across a dimensional membrane requires a great deal of energy, this is why Thoth uses the merkabah of Chariot of the Sun [2,197 souls] to help him work within the current earth and to reach us with his awareness and energies. He told us that without Chariot of the Sun he would not be able to accomplish this very effectively. All souls that move into the NES initially will be responsible for working across that dimensional membrane in various ways with the Masters to help those souls who re-incarnated in another world to complete their old Program of Light. Even though some souls may have moved into the NES and others not, WE ARE STILL PART OF A SINGLE COLLECTIVE CONSCIOUSNESS THAT MUST BE UNIFIED COMPLETELY AT SOME POINT. Realizing this helped me understand a LOT many years ago when Thoth related it to me. It brings us clearly into the NOW to do all we can for self and others to facilitate the expansion of spiritual awareness needed. 3a) Anonymous: as I understand it, not all of Earth One will be present on the New Earth Star. Major rivers, landblocks etc will be returned but not in the form we see them today. Thoth: If the human memory (as a collective grouping of souls) is strong enough, the topography of some regions will appear much the same in the NES. Other regions will contain the rarified particles, the essence only, and the perceived appearances of the re-assembled particles will be determined entirely by other factors and new patterns of manifestation. 3b) Anonymous: as I understand it, the "essence" of a particular energy: be it country, religious or spiritual traditions etc will be taken to form the new earth? Thoth: Depending on the strength of soul memory, so these essences will be preserved. . . but new forms of thought and being will begin to emerge as well. Simeon: also, only patterns that truly resonate with phi, or Divine Love which is love at more expanded universal levels of awareness, will transport to the NES. All others will be recycled into the universal grid as they break up. This is kind of like the ice pack [denser consciousness that does not resonate with phi] breaking up in the spring on the polar oceans. For long periods of time sublimation [ascension] takes some of the water in the ice pack directly into the atmosphere through the action of the sun [the spiritual power source]. But that which is not sublimated [ascended] by spring breaks up and is re-absorbed into the sea [the universal grid]. 3c) Anonymous: as I understand it, this process [formation of the NES] is complete to blueprint stage -- .i.e I understand that most of the "mapping" of the physical features of the NES has taken place due to participation of many ascended beings from many traditions, earth devas, and so forth, over the earth and beyond? Thoth: Much of it has been accomplished in this manner, yes. But there is much more to go, and also there is a significant input of design and patterning from realms beyond the solar system. 3d) Anonymous: I would like to ask about the presence of the Andromedans and their role in the transformation of earth one and earth two. Thoth: The Andromedans are one of several key star groups who will assist the process of earth's transformation into the New Earth Star. They have much of the "nuts and bolts" information on stellar-earth grids, alignments etc. . . the "math" needed to build certain foundations for events and activations. 3e) Anonymous: and would also like to ask a bit more about the complex dynamics of ascension. From reading the first newsletter, it would seem so far, something like this: Earth's etheics are being rebuilt for NES. the matrix for this resides in the physical body of beautiful sister Venus. From that point, beings on earth who wish to "go the journey", go in consciousness from here to that place in Venus. Is this the correct understanding? Thoth: Some will go through Venus to the NES. . . some will go directly into the NES. Of course it need be understood that we refer here to another dimension of "Venus" and not the one which resides in your current electro-magnetic field. The dimension of Venus that your space probes visit is uninhabitable.

---

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Simeon: Keep in mind we are speaking here of the causal prototype for Venus, not the physical planet although the physical planet can provide us with an attunement. In truth, the causal prototype of Venus is hosted within the 999 aspect of the Solar Logos, also called the Cube of Stars by Thoth [for more info on Cube of Stars see Issue 04, 1997 Temple Doors, available for free to subscribers on the subscriber freebies and goodies page while this issue is current]. These things are NOT local dynamics, but rather non-local – i.e. they exist in all places at all times simultaneously as per quantum theory. 3f) Anonymous: I read something in the newsletter about plasma being created. Is the body of the NES. . . well, I see it has not been created yet -- is that so? Thoth: The current developmental stage of the NES is what we are referring to as Numis'OM. 3g) Anonymous: if or when in time-space it gets created by force of intent or whatever, will the physical body of earth also reside in Venus? Thoth: No, Venus is only holding the pattern [i.e. hosting] and acting as a guide of energies for earth in it's transformation. 3h) Anonymous: will it be the body of old Earth One which has transformed that will spin out of orbit? Or a new planet created called Earth Two? Thoth: The ascended earth. . . the new domain. . . is [as Numis'OM] being created out of the old earth and will be in Orion. Understand that your concept of space and time is only a small window on the way things are. Orion is HERE, embracing earth NOW, as is earth in Orion NOW. It is only separated out in space and time that has been accepted as reality by general concensus of it's participants. Simeon: again, keep in mind these are non-local realities. So what Thoth is speaking of here is that the NES will be solidly within the resonant harmonics of Orion. Its physical location may follow suit, or we may still be here in this Solar System, it really won't matter. Consider this: ALL of the planets in our Solar System have life on them, just not in the dimension of experience we as a collective consciousness focus our perceptions within currently. Some of those planets have collectively already gone through similar processes that we are engaging with the ascension into the NES. We do not see their reality, but they are associated with the celestial harmonics of the particular planets they are embedded within. A planet is simply a gravitational warp in space-time that allows packets of Light Quantum to aggregate into collective consciousness patterns within its "fold." Those consciousness patterns can be in harmonic with many different stellar patterns simultaneously. 3i) Anonymous: can you clarify a bit more this process. Thoth: It will be a nova or "leap" from one place in space-time to another. Parts of the NES as Numis'OM, are already being prepared there. 3j) Anonymous: one last question, could you clarify if the ascension for children will be different from that of incarnate adults? Thoth: Children who are alive at the time of the mass ascension of earth will become instrumental guides into a world they will naturally perceive with more clarity and understanding than most adults. For example, many children have come who have either not been incarnate on earth before or not since a very long time ago. They hold different codes and matrices than those of us who have been earth-bound for many lifetimes. 3k) Anonymous: will it be easier for them [the children]? Thoth: Yes, for the most part. 3l) Anonymous: are the Blue Star [Rigel in Orion] children connected in someway to this? Thoth: The "Blue Star" children are one grouping of star seeds on earth among many and they are all uniquely connected to this development of consciousness. 3m) Anonymous: are there some groups of children who have incarnated as a soul group to actually manifest the dynamics of keeping human body to form when "ascended' humans and dear Gaia fly off to the blue heavens? Thoth: All human children at the time of mass ascension will contain a strong resonance field with the NES which will aid the entire process for humanity in it's ascension. They will be helping to orient and organize the transmuted atoms to re-materialize in the NES within more refined patterns of energy. 4) Gwen: can you elaborate a little on Golden Tayas and tetratryons? Maia: If you go to any page in my Spirit Mythos website and type "Golden Taya" into the "search" box inside the navagation bar at the top of the page you will come up with several pages containing info on the Golden Taya (also see what I wrote above). You can do the same thing with "tetratryons." The Golden Taya are also featured in Temple Doors Issues 01 & 02, 1995 [available for free to subscribers on the subscriber freebies and goodies page while this issue is current]. Simeon: if you have more specific questions after reading what is already available as outlined by Maia please send them to us to be addressed in a future issue. 5) Marieah: my question concerns the Star Lions and a mystery of experience. I am a deep and regular meditator and for the past six months or so I have been seeing a male lion (with a mane) in my third eye. Deep gutteral purring type sounds emerge from my mouth during meditation, and I am unable to replicate these sounds in a non meditative state. I have merged ecstatically with a round white light spontaneously on a number of occasions. Also, the sounds of a cobra come from me, and a green stone simply manifested and cannot be identified by experts. For the past 16 months I have been receiving between 50 and 200 stong electromagnetic shocks each day, straight into one of the mid chakras, each proceeded by a beam of energy. I would love to know whether this is related to the Star Lions. I work with a Being I know as Merlin, so feel some affinity for the Thoth identity. I apologize for the length of this question, but these experiences are not shared by any that I know, nor are they illuminated (until now) by any of my vast reading. Thoth: The electromagnetic shocks are a result of the quickening of your energy bodies to the new electro-magnetic pulses coming from the solar sun and combining with the central sun atoma of the planet. Like a lightning strike, as the solar charge comes near the earth it draws the inner-planet charge from the atoma up to meet it. That synapse zone where the two charges meet is the akalai zone. It is where the energy bodies of living things. . . those living things who are in a particular electromagnetic resonance with the charge. . . will receive the akali into their energy bodies. This is preparing humanity for the change in electromagnetic frequency as the human element becomes more synergistically in tune with the New Earth Star.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Not all humans will experience the "shocks." Those that do, are within a specific alignment to that as their planetary service to the whole. Other "types" hold other resonances for the whole. Your lion experiences are a part of your Numis'OM integration as well. They are offering you a transformative vehicle for certain light codes you have been carrying through many life experiences. PLEASE NOTE: if you wish to ask questions of Thoth relating to anything you read in this publication, or about planetary and cosmic happenings that you would like more clarity on, please submit your questions to us. We will attune to Thoth and will print his responses to those questions he selects to answer in the following issue of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron. We cannot promise that all questions will be answered, but we will do our best to accommodate those with the greatest universal scope and importance. We will give you credit for the questions as well unless you request anonymity.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

VOLUME 03, 2006 Please use the "Printer Friendly Version" link in the menu bar on the front cover page above to make a quality print of this publication. We were guided to name this publication Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron by Thoth, and the Illumined Assembly of the Christos' Merkabah of the Host comprised of 12 souls holding open a portal for the the Christ energies on this planet. The Radiant Ones we are working with encouraged us to bring forth this publication as a continuance of work that was done by Maia Christianne Nartoomid from 1980 through 1999. During this period Maia produced, first, the periodical entitled The Source (1980-1988), and then later, Temple Doors (1989-1999). In 1994 her partner Simeon Nartoomid joined her in producing the latter periodical. In the nearly 7 year respite between the conclusion of Temple Doors and when the first release of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron began, we both underwent a period of expanded esoteric initiation and deeply personal transformational experiences that have prepeared us for resuming this work at an entirely new octave of experience. Thoth and the IAC Merkabah of the Host have requested that we facilitate a specific Program of Light related to the Aramu Temple of Thoth and Numis'OM to help those who feel resonant with this Station of Light (Spirit Heart Sanctuary) to accelerate their Ascension processes and thus to further help the collective soul of humanity approach the gateway of Ascension which Thoth calls Light-Principle Forty, or LP-40 for short. Ultimately, as we collectively move through this passage we will activate the 44:44 Ascension Stargate and trigger a series of cosmic events destined to alter the DNA of humanity forever. Numis'OM is a causal reference point for the New Earth Star and the 44:44 stargate, and is hosted within the causal body of Venus. The Aramu Temple of Thoth is energetically within the Numis'OM matrix and acts as a way-station for souls building the New Earth Star consciousness from within the earthen experience. Souls can thus visit Numis'OM and even the New Earth Star if they have proper intent and attunement. It is our goal to provide pathways for this to occur within. This publication thus sits at the heart of our efforts to facilitate this greater process for the Masters and Illumined Ones that we are working with and to assist souls on earth. We hope that you will find it a fruitful and friendly path into the Homeward Light. The front cover art on this issue is entitled "Children of the Divine Rayship " (Spirit Store item #ARSY-0025STD) by Maia Christianne Nartoomid. Most of the art that appears on the front cover and in the various articles in this issue as well as any of our own publications which are herein referenced are available on the Subscriber's Freebies and Discounts page while this issue is current. After this volume becomes a back issue the art that appears in it will then only be available through our Spirit Store IF it has an associated item number listed under it. Click the item number of the art piece to find it there if it no longer appears on the Subscriber's Freebies and Discounts page. Children of the Divine Rayship by Maia Christianne Nartoomid ARSY-0025STD by Maia Christianne Nartoomid Please note that the first four articles in this issue are all interconnected subsections of a larger body of information. In my article Numis 'OM, The Temple of Aramu and the Shamballah Gate in Volume 01, 2006 of this periodical, it is stated that Numis'OM and indeed all of the New Earth Star as it forms, is much like any of the astral and higher spiritual worlds - more in the category of the higher spiritual - that one crosses to after having left this earthly level of existence. There are distinct differences though. I will highlight the main ones here: 1) Numis'OM contains specific master temples dedicated to integrating souls into building the "New Earth Star." Other astral and higher spiritual realms certainly have "temples" and integration processes, but those related to Numis'OM are specific to creating a NEW dimensional helix and not an extension of one already in existence. This is really a difficult thing to write or speak about, as saying that the New Earth Star is NOT already in existence is limiting it to a time line, which it is not. Perhaps more accurately, we might say that the New Earth Star is not yet a part of our "consensual reality" as souls, therefore "not in existence fully" for our soul evolution from the perspective of our current point of reference. A mouthful! So best not to dwell on it too much. We might simply just realize that we are definitely on a "New Frontier" with Numis'OM, as the New Earth Star is "becoming" out of it from the spinning of our consciousness as our being accelerates more rapidly into greater PRESENCE. 2) The BIG difference and definitely the most important, between Numis'OM / New Earth Star and other higher spiritual realms of what we call the "non-physical" of this planet can perhaps best be viewed in the following way: World systems such as our current planet's are ones in which a soul is incarnate in a body, lives for awhile and then discards the body to go to a "non-physical" state of that world system. It will then at some point likely return into the same physical state of that world again - what we will call here the "base level" - to learn more, and help the mass consciousness progress through the individual soul's experience there. The soul will then leave that body behind, returning to a non-physical state of the planet. This can go on and on for the soul for some time. If not THAT soul, then other souls from the same world system. However, at some point, the world system of that planet will be ready to absorb it's current base level. Our base level is where we live, grow old or sick, or have accidents which maim or destroy our bodies. Then we must leave that body and state of existence to return to the spirit realm. . . and usually COME BACK AGAIN for more of the same, only with new or more advanced processing to do! But what happens when the world system is ready to absorb it's base level? IF that base level is "physical" - meaning that it can be damaged or "destroyed" in it's physical form, when it is absorbed into the next stage, it will ascend it's matter. The molecules of it's dense physical are translated into LIGHT particles and go WITH the souls then on the physical planet, into the next stage - the first level of non-physical available to it in the "daisy chain" of that world system. So this means that the daisy chain is intentionally BROKEN and that little "link" which was the "physical" is gone! Now the base level of that world system is non-physical.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Not only that, but all the little astral pockets collecting around the physical disappear in a puff of smoke, as they were totally dependant on the base line physical world's lower akashic record to keep it supplied with "reality." A lot of souls in this world are and have been for centuries, crossing over from this "life" into the astral pockets where to some extent, they re-create rather small existences based on the limited thoughts, beliefs and desires they had while in physical embodiment in their last incarnation. Numis'OM still accommodates the soul's need to see and experience individuality, and symbols and pictures of reality that allow it to open more fully to Spirit on the level they are then ready to receive. But it is not an "astral" world. It is a "higher spiritual" plane, so it is open-ended in drawing the soul ever-deeper into pure being a step at a time. One can live in a house, have conversations sitting under giant trees in beautiful gardens with friends. Unicorns, mermaids, "friendly" dragons - all energies waiting to manifest with love and wisdom to offer you are there. More and more you soul will be drawn DEEPER into the New Earth Star, building it as you go - creating less "things" and more pure light gnosis. This process is gentle - there is no rush. There is no time. It is all in accord, balance and beauty. Numis'OM / New Earth Star is the starting point of a NEW WORLD SYSTEM. Our planet as we now know it is the very last pearl on a connecting strand. When it is absorbed into the one above it, this world system of which we are a part will become free from it's anchor in the "physical." Then it enters a whole new category of "world systems" - inside categories of universal systems (but we won't even go there in this article!). To help us with the idea of world systems, Thoth has given us a scale-context to place it in. The Lemurians called a world system a "NA" or a fluid (progressive) cell. There are 29 "NA" in one "ATA" - i.e. a knot or binding unit. To put things into perspective, we are currently at "NA 1." The New Earth Star will eventually take "us" through to the next ATA, where it will then become. . . something else. Again, let's not go there. We have enough on our plate just trying to wrap our minds around the next NA! We could also call this upcoming NA "World System II." Numis'OM as it is "now" (in our now) is the first membrane or staging ground for the New Earth Star. It is what you might say, "betwixt and between" at the moment, as our physical earth is still attached to the strand. It will not become a true base line for a World System II until the physical base line is translated, i.e. ascended into the New Earth Star. But if we go beyond this "time" limitation we set for ourselves with linear consciousness, we can see Numis'OM as already the base line for a World System II! IF we do this - if we imagine this, we create it in OUR reality via what Thoth calls the "New Earth Hologram." The potential for progressing this planet through it's current "bumpy ride" toward the finish gate for NA 1 is potent. IT IS REAL, and it is within our grasp. Semantics don't matter here. They are just fancy handles on doors that can be opened many ways. One does not have to read or believe in terms like "New Earth Star" or "Numis'OM" to "be there" in vibrational intention. There are other ways. . . there are always other ways. Spirit is never, ever limited. However, those of us who may feel aligned to and resonate with this terminology and way of seeing the picture can come together in vibration to create a strong focus toward bringing the "future" world system into the "current" one, via encoding it into the New Earth Hologram. and the Alpha-Omega Metatronic Spiral by Maia Christianne Nartoomid Thoth speaks to me of a New Tree of Life in the New Earth Star. This is not a new cosmic Word Tree or as the Mayan calls it Hunab Ku, coming from the center of the galaxy. However, it does link our World System I to the central cosmic World Tree with new encodings and "turnings" in the helix of the Sephirothic patterns which will form in World System II. This will be further evidenced as a "Serpent Rope" in the sky. We are already seeing evidence of a precursor to the Serpent Rope predicted by the Mayan in the heavens at this time. Yet the true "serpent rope" Thoth points me to is the actual helix of Sephirothic Trees which will manifest in our DNA and in our relationship to the "Heavens" or Universal Systems. Once we "drop the frame" of the physical base line earth stage, the New Tree of Life is THERE, ready to receive and to send universal codings of an entirely new order (World System II). In 1995 Thoth brought to my attention something he calls the "Metatronic Alpha-Omega Spiral." This drawing was created by William Buehler using the information I had received from Thoth. More information on this dynamic can be found in Temple Doors Issue 1/2 - 1995 (free in subscriber goodies area while this issue is current) which goes into great detail about this spiral and related dynamics of planet earth. This spiral geometric is the engine for all natural grid formats on our earth. Formats such as ley lines which connect to create energetic patterns on the planet. Sacred structures such as the pyramids of Giza and the stone structure at Stonehenge were purposely positioned on power points or nodes of the earth to link together, enhancing these nodes for the benefit of accelerating spiritual PRESENCE on and in the earth. The Metatronic Alpha-Omega Spiral Thoth also refers to as a "Temple." To quote from Temple Doors Issue 1/2 - 1995: The Metatronic Temple conjoins with the Attasic Universe, which is the unified field of consciousness where no separation exists. The Attasic light grid contains the organizational patterning to bring the separated realities back into their original state of unification. We must bear in mind that when we talk about "separation" and "unification" it is all relative to our CONSCIOUSNESS. In a state of PURE AWARENESS nothing has ever been separate. I return to this topic of the Metatronic Spiral/Temple as the New Tree of Life will be entirely resonate with this dynamic. We might see the Metatronic Spiral with it's central core beam as the spine and spinal cord of a body. In our current time line, our Tree of Life and thus DNA helix is a bad fit for this body. It is pulling in opposition on the vertebrae! The new Tree of Life will support and be supported by the Metatronic Spiral.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

The KEY to the transformation of the Old Tree of Life into the New Tree of Life are the infusion of tetratryons - hyperspace tetrahedrons with open ended connection to one another to form dimensional transference zones. It is through the tetratryons that energy travels between different dimensions. Once the Tree of Life is superimposed, or, in resonance with, the Metatronic Alpha-Omega Spiral, these tetratryons take formation in the tree, like power-packed little Enterprise starships within the Tree, transforming it's capability from closed to opened in circuitry. The Metatronic Alpha-Omega Spiral has two main undulating currents or "serpents": the Atmic Red Serpent and the Sushumic Blue Serpent. The Red Serpent contains the vital energy of the higher egoic that will empress upon us the necessary light codes to bridge us into the full Metatronic. The Blue Serpent is the messenger of the non-egoic state of being. The Shushumic Blue Serpent is constantly interfacing with and seeding the reality zones of the Atmic Red Serpent in order to eventually transcend ego based realities altogether. Until that state is achieved for our New Earth Star, the soul within it will experience a vast landscape of reality zones in which to "play" - but they will always inspire forward-motion perspectives for the participants. Unlike our current earth environment, souls of the New Earth Star will not deal themselves any "Wild Cards" in the deck. Souls dwelling in the New Earth will be drawn to finer and finer gradients of reality in a direct manner, no matter what hand they play. Temple Doors Issue 1/2 - 1995 (free in subscriber goodies area while this issue is current) is a power-packed double issue containing several articles focusing in some detail on the Ascension dynamic from Thoth's perspective as given to me (Maia). Simeon was instrumental in organizing and clarifying the material. I highly recommend this issue for a more in-depth study of Ascension cosmology. 7th Flame Medallion by Maia Christianne Nartoomid ARSY-0026STD and the Duat Path by Maia Christianne Nartoomid Thoth speaks to me of the "Council of the Seventh Flame," which are the Intelligences that hold the core matrix of Numis'OM. So he explains it to me, these beings exist in pure light forms or Living Flames. There are six of them in the matrix configuration, coming together in a central focus as the SEVENTH FLAME. The Alpha-Omega Metatronic Spiral moves through the Seventh Flame "eye" or central point of Oneness, which allows the whole harmonic of Numis'OM to move up the core beam or pillar of light - of the Metatronic Spiral - into the "Duat." This "Duat Path" spins off New Earth Star seed-zones that will unfold, like packed DNA to create the new worlds within the zones. The "unfolding" is orchestrated as a manifold cooperation between the Council of the Seventh Flame and the souls of Numis'OM. A'tet, A'hu, A'mnen, A'sba, A'mu, A'kten The Seventh Flame is in CENTER - combined from all six souls. The term "Duat" that Thoth is choosing to use here, is interpreted by Egyptologists to mean the "ancient Egyptian Underworld," however according to Clesson H. Harvey, Duat meaning "dawning eye." After Thoth informed me about the Duat Path (in regard to Numis'OM) I was guided to a DUAT website, which contains a capsule version of "The Mystery of the Calendar" by Vladimir Pakhomov. Vladimir places the Duat in the heavens between the constellations of Orion, Gemini and Taurus. Thoth concurs. Further, Thoth states that the Duat is the Great Reconciler of the Universe, holding the balance of energies through a streaming field or "path" of supra-particles. These supra-particles are tetatryons. I have created a medallion art work (at top of this article) which you may use to attune to the SEVENTH FLAME. Why? This "Flame" is essentially the HOLY TONE, WORD or LOGOS of the New Earth Star. By mediating on an image that is resonate with it's field as I believe this medallion to be, you have a point of resonance with the "unfolding" of the New Earth Hologram within you. Horus Star Hawk by Maia Christianne Nartoomid and the Children of the Divine Rayship by Maia Christianne Nartoomid The Star "Eagles" and Hawks" are non-physical beings who choose the appearance of humans, or sometimes they appear as eagle or hawk-headed, but they are relations to our genetic vine. When Thoth speaks to me of "physical" and "non-physical" he make it clear that he is using "our" associations with those terms, so as not to be confusing to us. He relates emphatically, that there is only "denser" and more "subtle" energy states. When you leave the denser "body" behind you then find yourself in the next layer of your "onion-skin," which is far more subtle. Thus, DNA exists in the "subtle" or what we would call non-physical. It simply is more diverse on that level. The Eagle and Hawk Star Beings are in very subtle states of particlulation. The particles that form their outer shell energy are very tiny and fast-moving. Ours, by comparison are large and slow-moving. There is another aspect we need to address at this point about these beings. At a point in our distant past, some of them entered the physical birth into this planet. So many of "us" have this "cousin" DNA within us at a very subtle level. Thoth refers to these persons or rather "tribe" as the "Star Eagles" and "Star Hawks". The Star Eagles guardian and orchestrate the Divine Rays as they come forth from the Duat, through the Metatronic Pillar of Light. On higher spiritual states of being, such as Numis'OM and the New Earth Star, the colors are far more vibrant than in our earth zone here. There are also more primary colors. In Numis'OM there are two more, which Thoth is suggesting I call "SAF" and "PARAMA." Thoth describes these colors as saf being warm and parama being cool. Together they form "AJANU" - a vibrant color which penetrates the heart so completely that we, as humans in our current dense bodies would simply "die" to see! Our physical heart-organ would quantum into such a high frequency it's current physical exterior would explode. In fact, even in Numis'OM, AJANU is seen only by the Illumined Ones and Angelics. The colors of Numis'OM form new Divine Ray associations.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

Thus their "Indigo" Ray is a far different frequency and much more vibrant color than the Indigo Ray which penetrates our current earth zone. The Nine Divine Rays of Numis'OM: - RA'NU'RIS (red-orange-gold) - LA'NEPH'SHIS (blue-green-silver) - YA'V (yellow-saf) - NA'TI'UM (blue-silver) - CHISHEH'NI (indigo-gold) - MU'APT'HIS (violet-blue-green) - HIGH (gold-saf) - TASK (silver-parama) - AJANU (sat-parama) While the Star Eagles hold the BALANCE of the Rays as they penetrate our earth zone, they also hold the BALANCE of the Nine Divine Rays of Numis'OM. The Star Hawks weave the two strands - 7 Divine Rays of our earth and 9 Divine Rays of Numis'OM - into our developing New Earth Star Hologram. The Star Hawks were more often seen on earth in ancient days, for as consummate time travelers, they must locate all the "strands" of the Rays - that is, their embedded positions in DNA and atomic structure - throughout our time line. Where the current Divine Rays embed, so they become distorted or rather subjected to the lenses we create in our sub-atomic world through our thought, intention and action in this world. This is what brings us now, to the topic of the "Children of the Divine Rayship." Certain human incarnate souls from the Star Eagle and Star Hawk tribes of genetics place themselves into dense pockets of karmic warping on the planet, like the conflicts of the Middle East and other continually oppositional tribes, races and religions. The "hawks" are especially in the thick of it, while the "eagles" are more effective in overview positions. For instance, one Star Hawk is Nelson Mandela, while Mother Teresa was a Star Eagle. The Star Hawks make the changes through difficult and exacting means yet usually with a high degree of grace, while the Star Eagles supply the healing and to some degree, enlightment concerning the interior plight - not the external battle. Ghandi was a Star Hawk, while the current Dali Lama is a Star Eagle. Certainly both had their share of oppositional struggle and both radiated enlightenment, but Ghandi remained in the thick of it, while the Dali Lama was destined to be at the apex of the overview. Since the main threshold of the Eagle and Hawk Star Beings is Rigel in Orion, we see then that what Thoth is calling the "Children of the Divine Rayship" have been since the beginning of earth, Blue Star Rigel souls. Yet not all Rigelian souls are "Children of the Divine Rayship." At some point in their soul journey they can choose this position, but once chosen, they are in until the "finish" - meaning until World Ascension. Yet now, in the 21st century, some souls from other star thresholds are being born among the Children of the Divine Rayship. They are not of the Star Eagle or Star Hawk tribes. They are nevertheless entering this ancient matrix of Ray re-balancing and weaving. The gate is widening for more star families to enter this task, for it is great and the "time" as we perceive it, is near at hand. Grail Round Table by Maia Christianne Nartoomid MAN-0027STD by Simeon Nartoomid Have you ever contemplated the difference between human beingness and pure beingness? I have and it is a very interesting investigation to have engaged! In fact I still engage in this exploration regularly. One reason I enjoy this so much is because subtle-planes observation, investigation, and study is very harmonic with who I AM and what I AM here to do. The other reason I do this is because it always seems to lead to a feeling of expansiveness and liberation from the confines of the limited vehicle in which I AM traveling while here on earth. I have worked with quite a few people over the years that have difficulty with embracing the aspect of their being which resides in Pure Being. I have learned that what often times happens is once an individual gets in touch with that level of their being they then find their limited human self intolerable and that leads them into deeper engagements with self-judgement which in turn obstructs their path. There also seems to be a programmed mechanism built into many of us human beings that makes us believe judgment of ourselves is somehow better than judging others. From a social standpoint that is largely true, you won't have many friends if you go around judging others all the time. From a higher perspective though it is energetically the same. You cannot judge your self without also judging others and vice versa. We are all part of One Being after all. Pure Being is our most natural state of being. Humanity has largely come to believe that their mind is their subtle self, the part of them that they cannot experience with any of the five senses but only through their thoughts. This leads people to believe that their mind is all powerful. Yet leading edge science being conducted at places like the Institute of HeartMath tells us that the heart as an organ in the body has an electromagnetic energy field that is 5,000 times greater than that of the brain in our head and an electrical energy field that is 40-60 times greater than that produced by our head brain. Hmmm. Our physiology thus does not support the concept that the mind is all powerful. Given that I AM naturally resonant with many of the basic perspectives found in Maha Buddhism (many previous incarnations there) this posed a bit of paradox for me. The point I AM getting to here is that Pure Being is also not the mind. So how the heck are we going to connect with this place called Pure Being if we cannot sense it with the five senses and it cannot be located in the mind? The answer is through expanding our awareness. Many people feel that awareness is also a function of the mind. There is some truth to this if we are considering the type of temporal awareness that we use to function in the dance of human life. This would be awareness of material objects and concepts related to skills we acquire or need and so forth. However, the type of awareness that I AM speaking of here is not that type of awareness. It is an awareness of being and comes from your total being. It is an awareness of the nature of love in its most rarified form BEFORE it takes motion and moves from being noun to verb. Its first motion? Acceptance of all things and beings and their right to exist. I have had profound insights that this type of awareness is actually rooted in a memory of states of Pure Being which existed prior to what is being called the Big Bang. We all share in this memory, it is holographic and exists within every aspect of the Universe. It is that original state of awareness that preceded everything that currently exists in the Universe; both energy and matter, which are but different expressions of the same primal substance. Now this makes total sense to my mind as well because the Big Bang represents the first moment of differentiation. In a sense the Big Bang is really not over yet.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

We are still in it as things continue to differentiate; continually changing, dividing, subdividing and also mutating into entirely new forms that never existed before. So by now you may be thinking that if this is where Pure Being lies it may be impossible to access for most people. Its not. In fact this makes it even easier. Space and time have no bearing on this level of reality. If an experience of the state of Pure Being was somehow to be granted by the complexity of the differentiated Universe then we would truly have a very difficult time locating this state of awareness within the labyrinthine mosaic of interwoven strands we generally experience as reality. Contemplate this for a bit. To access this state of Pure Being does not even require consciousness! In fact consciousness can get in the way. The Big Bang preceded the development of consciousness, and thus that state of being cannot be accessed using consciousness either. Experiencing ourselves as pure consciousness is a great primer for the real show, but we have deluded ourselves into believing that everything is consciousness. Rather, everything is energy and that is very different indeed. In terms of beingness relative to the temporal human experience there is sentient beingness, there is intellectual beingness, and there is consciousness beingness. Rudolph Steiner skirted upon this concept with his revolutionary revelations about the three levels of collective soul evolution that humanity is going to traverse in the earth Alpha through Omega. These were the Sentient Soul evolution, the Intellectual Soul evolution, and the Consciousness Soul evolution. We have recently entered into the latter. So what is the difference between these three types of beingness? Sentience is awareness moving from a point outward, in other words awareness of the other. Intellectual awareness is but a transitory state of beingness that is meant to develop consciousness out of sentience. Consciousness states of beingness are what happens when a ray of awareness is bent back upon itself closing the circle so to speak. When this happens you then have a self-aware system and that is consciousness. It is the development of the intellectual capacities that allows us to become self-aware, to bend that ray of sentient awareness back upon itself. The faculty of intellect has so many other intriguing capabilities that we have been merrily experimenting with the creative potential of those possibilities as we travel the road of soul experience through the realm of earth. It is now time to recognize that we have become over-enamored with our intellectual faculty and to see what its true purpose in our design really is. We each need to understand how we best can bend that ray of our sentient awareness back upon itself. This will be different for each of us, but it is happening all the time. You do something in the world without awareness of what may really be going in you (i.e. unconsciously), then the flow of life gives you feedback about it so you can become more self-aware. Its not a punishment, really. It is the way the Universe works and this mechanism is born of Infinite Love calling everything home. When I use the term love herein I AM not referring to the human version of it. I AM referring to a powerful energy, a monopole if you will, a TRUE UNIVERSAL POWER, that not only holds all of the Universe together, but which also draws all aspects of it back together towards their point of maximum unification post-differentiation. So, it really does boil down to what Joseph Campbell said years ago about following our bliss! When we follow that which we find the highest resonance with we are on auto-pilot heading into an experience of the state of Pure Being. One problem often encountered is that we may think that following our bliss means avoiding everything that seems as though it might be difficult or challenging. Quite to the contrary, any bliss we might be able to experience with this strategy would quickly vanish because we are designed to be creatively engaged, which brings challenge and difficulty as part of the package. Rather, following your bliss truly means to listen to your guidance and to follow it IMPLICITLY. When you do, you will find that sense of exhilaration that living on the edge brings. Lets face it, living 100% according to our guidance is living on the edge - the edge of uncertainty. That is the ultimate bliss! Fear of the uncertainty is what kills this process for many people. There is a pervading misunderstanding in the metaphysical, spiritual and holistic communities that guidance should be able to inform us of the details of the future in order to eliminate the uncertainty. How boring would that be! The Universe just does not work like that. It is true that we are traveling in a vehicle of our own design and that the vehicle knows exactly where it is going and will take us there with Godspeed if we don't interfere with the vehicle or its driver and that guidance occassionally lets us have a peek at what's ahead. However, if we as backseat riders were to know all the details of the journey and destination then what would be the point of the journey? The journey is about discovery. The journey is about learning to read the roadmap of limited experience as unlimited beings. The journey is about the development of consciousness from pure sentience. The journey is about remembering our nature in Pure Being while simultaneously being able to experience a more limited nature in the realms of manifestation, which includes the "Worlds of Pure Light." The purpose for all of this? To expand the beauty, textures, colors and radiance of love in the Universal Heart. Every time we give expression to the Being of Love that we are, it makes an imprint upon the Universal Heart Crystal. Each imprint is unique, like a fingerprint or snowflake, no two are quite the same. The journey through differentiation is what elicits the opportunities needed to give expression to the Beings of Love that we are. This occurs within an ever-changing environment ensuring that the beauty, textures, colors and radiance of love emanating from the Universal Heart Crystal will grow infinitely, forever, without end. As for Pure Being, it is therefore not a place or a space. It is a memory and a state of awareness. It is within you, always there just waiting for a moment when the energies of your human being make an opening for that universal memory to transport you into an awareness beyond all the mundanity and differentiation of your life wherein you can see it all in a different context afterward. We all experience these moments spontaneously every so often and cherish them deeply. What we seek is to be able to access Pure Being at will. Many spiritual traditions have attempted to formulate systems to teach us how to do this. For me, none of these have worked to any great degree. Instead, I have found over the years that simply accepting what I AM now as a human being, limitations and all, opens that gateway more profoundly than anything else. I have come to realize that in order to unconditionally accept ourselves, we must access this part of our being, so there it is every time we do. In order to help me accept myself (and others) in the full glory of all our struggles and limitations I find that the power of the heart is the key. I am going to share a simple exercise that is based on the tools developed and taught by the Institute of HeartMath. It was scientifically developed. I can attest to its effectiveness from my own experience and that of many others I have taught it to.

---

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

I can also say that its effectiveness in changing the Heart Rate Variability (HRV) waveform and the hormonal balance in the body has been proven in many laboratory settings. I also have a biofeedback device and software which allows me to see these changes in real time right on screen. Its undeniable both scientifically and experientially. Here are the simple basic steps. 1) Place your focus of attention on your heart chakra. You may find it easier at first to place your finger there to help you focus on that part of the body. Keep in mind the objective is to focus your attention there which is different than thinking about it. If you can recall a time when you were in a park or at a lake or some other beautiful place in nature where you were looking at something where you had your attention on it, but you were not thinking about it, but rather just taking it in. This is focusing your attention on something without thinking about it. 2) Gently, slowly and rhythmically start breathing in and out through your heart chakra. 3) Be aware of any sensations you may feel in the heart chakra or elsewhere in the body as you do this. These will be your specific signals or keys that let you know you are starting to become more coherent and thus are expanding your state of awareness. Also, focusing on the sensations in the heart chakra can help to intensify the energy effect. 4) Continue this heart-breathing process until you feel a sense of peace coming over you. You can keep going after this, the longer the better. But just reaching this state is powerful enough. It is from the place of inner peace that comes over you when you do this simple practice that you can more easily accept yourself and others. When you engage the activity of unconditional acceptance of self and other, also be aware of what you are feeling and experiencing inwardly. This practice can bring you rather easefully into a state of Pure Being if you are willing and able to surrender in that direction fully enough. This practice is wonderfully effective for dealing with the fear of uncertainty! Some people have called this state of being I am calling Pure Being the Void. It really does feel like that at first, so that is understandable. Yet, the more I visit this state of being the more I realize it is not a void at all. I do not really have any words to describe what is there that negates the idea of the Void other than to say it is the most rarified form of love one can ever experience. It's a pure power that is beyond human imagining and its available to all. In fact, it IS all! It is us and everything around us. Everything has its origin in this state of being and owes its existence to it. The Power of Pure Being is thus synonymous with the Power of Pure Love, they are one and the same. To the degree that we align ourselves to the Power of Pure Love we are increasingly drawn into states of Pure Being thus amplifying that awareness within the collective consciousness of humanity. When we focus on Numis'OM and the New Earth Star we would do well to remember these are realities which are way stations along the collective journey into Pure Being. The linear time cycles and meta sciences involved boggle the mind. However, when we realize that all of it is here now just waiting to be experienced by each of us individually prior to the larger collective events the heart lightens considerably! In fact, the heart gets downright effervescent and bubbly when we realize that to experience this ahead of the collective curve IS part of why we are even here! It is the Power of Pure Being and Love that are ultimately our road, our vehicle and our fuel. Have a blessed journey! I AM currently offering Radiant Heart Initiations if you would like to invite me to be a qualified facilitator on your journey. Thoth Raismes of Aphra by Maia Christianne Nartoomid AB-0003STD Atu Tehuti, Ati Hatu -- "in the rising of the breath I greet you, in the release of the breath I embrace you" Giselle: The esoteric society known as the Rosicrucians (I guess some of you have heard or read about them) states our evolution works as double spiral (or a helix, just like the DNA). First off, we are what they call "Virginal Spirits" and dwell in the high realms, although we are not individual souls and therefore, have no a developed conscience. We're only part of an "innocent", "unexperienced" or "virginal" Spirit. The Spirit begins its journey through a spiral that "goes down". As it goes down, it incarnates in many different forms of increasing "individual conscience", such as minerals, plants, animals and finally humans. As we "go down" in the spiral, we acquire a soul, we become more conscious or "wise" individuals. Rosicrucians state that human beings dwell in the bottom of the double helix. As we become even more conscious, we begin our journey up into the second spiral, until we become Spirit once again, but not a "virginal" one, but a conscience Spirit who is also formed of individual wise souls, such as God Father. The Rosicrucians also say going "up" or "down" the helix is not "right" or "wrong"; it's simply a necessary road for evolution, for the Supreme Energy to discover itself. We are the way God gets to know himself. Therefore, although human beings are below the helix and virginal Spirits are above, we are "wiser" (NOT "better") because we have already experienced individuality. Everything in the universe works in cycles within cycles: we experience similar states, but with an increasing level of complexity or conscience - such as a student that reviews geometry in highschool, but with more difficult concepts that those he learned when he was in junior high. Therefore, evolution is not in the form of a circle that repeats itself, but a spiral: a circle that moves into different levels and therefore brings infinite wisdom to the soul. An example of this: although we are currently experiencing the human state, within it we are still experiencing a reptilian conscience - conscience of low emotions, impulsive behavior lead by instincts and not reason, etc. After the so called "Earth's Ascension", we'll be experiencing a mammal-human conscience, and then a human-human conscience and so on. The Rosicrucian conception deals with current mankind, but perhaps, it's not the same for everyone. For example, fairies: I understand they follow a different path and therefore haven't been in 3D bodies, like us. Is it possible that there are many evolutionary paths? Thoth: Think of the whole of BEING as a many-faceted crystal. Each facet gives off a unique angle of reflection and yet contains the whole picture within it. "Evolution" is a man-made concept, although I use this term at times, as it is understood by humanity in their application of it. There is really only the ALL.

# Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron

As souls in various modalities of being reflect aspects of the "ALL," so they see this reflection as a path or evolutionary line that moves toward the ALL and expands to include more of it as it moves forward. In actuality, evolution is a product of time and time is a perception only. Yes, this perception can be measured and it can be warped - speeded up and slowed down. . . as “perception” creates subjective "realities." Thus evolution is bound within the same perception - that there is a timeline which it faithfully follows to an ultimate completion. Yet human beings and whole worlds of beings do expand AWARENESS. At first through an expansion of perception and then jettisoning perception altogether to become Awareness. It is then that awareness is no longer an action but a place that is all-inclusive. Expansion of awareness, however, is not the result of spiritual evolution but of simply turning loose of EVERYTHING to become NOTHING. This does not mean that evolution is an illusion. It does exist - but as a working concept within a specific consensual agreement of expression among the Many. This "Many" cuts to the cellular and even DNA level. . . so long as the original concept is in place within the self-created and sustained program of the Many. Nature Spirits go along with the program of the natural world which the "Many" have put into place. But unlike currently incarnated souls on this planet, Nature Spirits are far more sentient than they are conscious. This means that they don't self-reflect as humans do, and so are less caught in the snares created by the paradigm: "I think, therefor I am." Giselle: I read or already know that human beings dwell within this dimension because we have chosen to do so. In other words, our thoughts and feelings became denser and denser, and therefore our bodies became also denser. This makes sense to me, since it explains why Lemurians and early Atlanteans lived in "higher" realms. As the Rosicrucians and Maia say, density is not "right" or "wrong". It is simply a path of evolution. But what happens next? We become denser and then lighter, and then what?? The helix begins once again?? So, have there been multiple "creations" and "universes"? Thoth: From the perspective of evolution it is always forward motion, even when it appears otherwise. The wheel is never re-created. From the place of the "ALL" there is no wheel. More simply put, while cycles are in place to aid in the "evolution" of the universe, cycles are temporal and very localized to what humans and many of their kindred beings perceive and work with and within. When the perception that the Many have of the spiral of evolution and thus cycles - each point above another point on the same spiral being a more evolved cycle of the previous one- reaches a certain point of over-saturation in consciousness, the spiral becomes a torus - like a doughnut with a hole in the center - and then all being has no beginning and no end and thus no cycles either. Of course there are individuals incarnate on earth now and in your past who have a larger grasp of living in the torus than the Many, although they have not perfected it. Such individuals are usually yogic masters or others of great illumination. One can say that there are multiple universes or one universe with multiple arenas of interaction with Being. Giselle: If there have been creations and universes for all eternity, then what's the whole point of evolution?? Just evolving and evolving. . . forever? Thoth: I believe your question is indirectly answered above. Evolution is a sub-system of perceptual reality, and not the mainspring getting there. One could argue that turning from a spiral to a torus in Being is "evolution" but actually it is not, since the torus is already there. The Many simply choose not to perceive it yet. "Choice" is not a pawn of evolution although it knows how to play the game. Giselle: The fundamental question: what is "eternity"? Is Creation an "eternal movement," such as Aristotle said? Or can we speak of an eternal fixed Spirit? Thoth: Eternity is the IT beyond all categories and systems. The Lemurians called it the "ii" - the Sacred Nothing. Creation is an act of finding that Sacred Nothing that already IS. There is no “eternal fixed Spirit” because there are infinite ways to approach it, to know it, to BE it. So, from the evolutionary perspective, even God is evolving. . . and yet beyond the perception of evolution everything already IS. To the human mind this is, of course a paradox. To Divinity it is the formula of omni-being. Marieah: what is the relevance to the New Earth Star of the three serpent aspects of the goddess you spoke of through Maia ten years ago? Thoth: the three serpents become ONE as the helix tree of the Old Earth uncoils and reforms through the wave forms represented by the Blue and Red serpents (see article New Tree of Life / Serpent Rope and the Alpha-Omega Metatronic Spiral this issue) the third serpent is the power generated between the Red and the Blue. . . the Violet Flame Serpent of Transmuted Primal Energy. The three serpents of “conception, gestation and birth” then become the CHILD itself The Violet Flame of the New Earth. Marieah: are the bee, the spider and the dove other aspects of the goddess? How many aspects do each of us need to connect with and anchor as we move into the energy of the New Earth Star? Thoth: All “Living Symbols” of nature (including stones and crystals) are aspects of the goddess - the Mother. Each is drawn to different of Her energy-symbols at the appropriate times of their life. A symbol (sacred geometry) which incorporates them all is the ROSE MYSTICA. The Rose Mystica you might say, is the Flower of Life for the New Earth Star. Marieah: Do the seven veils relate to the Temple of Salomae and the progressive lifting of the veils over the third eye? Thoth: Yes. They also relate to the SEVEN FLAMES of Numis’OM - see article The Council of the Seventh Flame and the Duat Path this issue. PLEASE NOTE: if you wish to ask questions of Thoth relating to anything you read in this publication, or about planetary and cosmic happenings that you would like more clarity on, please submit your questions to us. We will attune to Thoth and will print his responses to those questions he selects to answer in the following issue of Numis'OM ~ Eye of Metatron. We cannot promise that all questions will be answered, but we will do our best to accommodate those with the greatest universal scope and importance. We will give you credit for the questions as well unless you request anonymity.

# Introduction

The "NEW EARTH STAR" is a name given to
the future Ascended Reality of the earth. It is a stage only in the whole
Ascension program of Light for this planet. In considering "ascension"
and "future" we need also realize that both the future and thus our
"ascended" selves can be lived NOW. But first there will be the "Heart Ascension," which
must come about for each
individual, before the planetary ascension can take place. Once ascended in the
HEART, one no longer pines for the physical uplifting into another realm, as the completeness of Heart Ascension allows the individual to know ALL realities
in the ONE of Divinity that is ever-present for them. What really is
"Ascension"? It is word only--one that helps us come to terms with the
illusional feeling of being separate from self. If we ascend to join something
whole, then we no longer need feel so isolated and alone. But we must come to
know that in the greater understanding, there is no separation, no need to
ascend to "something whole." We are already there. Yet, the healing of
the illusion may still be before us. So with such perspectives as the NEW EARTH
STAR, we can see not only what may be ahead for our planet and ourselves in a
cosmic sense, but what is ALREADY INSIDE OF US in the micro-universe that we
are.
The 44:44 Stargate and its sacred geometry is the earth's
portal into the next octave for humanity in the Return Home. Here we will move
into a closer look at the actual procedure of the ‘uplifting, the time when
ensouled human beings come together in a mass synergy of experience in which
they achieve a Light quantum within their cells, transferring them through
the 'eye of the needle'. The choice for ascension is made from the level of
the higher self for each soul who will pass through the 44:44 Star Grail gate,
and is that which represents the 'eye of the needle'.
And of the day, none has spoken, nor
have their eyes seen that which is manifest therein. The Coming is upon
wings of Light that circle in the grey dawn, as a nesting Anka bird. The
egg of the earth is born anew, cracked from within its sacred womb. Out
from its center the chick arises, its beak a slender knife that cuts
through the weave of the world. Lo, a web of gold is spun, a pattern of
the ageless stars. Souls move upon its fine threads, gathering eternity in
a wave of exaltation, as they plunge into the heart of the blue star.
