# In the Light of Higher Service

| In the Light of Higher Service by Rev. Simeon Nartoomid Higher service to the Light is an experience which a great many souls seek. These are dedicated souls who have the divine impulse within them to serve their Creator. There are many forms of service to the Light, what is it that constitutes "higher service." ? First I would like to clarify that by using the terminology "higher service" I do not mean to convey a comparative ideology. This term is being used herein to denote the range of frequency which Light service operates within. Service to the Light which operates in the higher frequency bandwidths of consciousness is far more demanding. It is also a perfect venue for the soul to further evolve itself, and that is its primary function. Whenever the soul is endeavoring to evolve itself, its service to the Light is automatically rendered. The red light in a rainbow is a lower frequency than the violet light, but they are both light, and one is not better than the other, yet one is a higher frequency. God resides equally in each color of light, and all are required to form the rainbow. There are circumstances where highly evolved souls will take embodiment within genetic forms and incarnate situations which are not seemingly congruent with their level of evolution. This in itself is one form of higher service. One problem which I have witnessed concerning this type of situation is when the soul experiencing it is not able to fully accept the limited situation they seem to be within. Often souls in these situations will feel like they have to combat these limited circumstances in the name of the Light. Within these soul's experience this will often take the form of "battling the dark forces" as they project this dynamic onto the external reality. This type of exercise serves the purpose of letting the soul experience these limitations from a dualistic perspective. It forms the basis of knowledge necessary for that soul to understand the nature of realities where polarity in imbalance is actually possible. This type of experience is also necessary in order for that soul to understand how to act as balancing force for such a reality by balancing itself. This is the nature of one of the functions of the Elohim consciousness, which we as an evolving humanity are aspiring to. On the more practical side of higher service, we can learn much from taking a closer look at some specific dynamics which I have studied and worked with in myself and others over the years. One of these has to do with the New Age maxim around "being in the flow." The general idea here is to follow the path of least resistance as an indication of God-based flow, guidance and directive. This is a higher spiritual principle, but is often misinterpreted. First, it is crucially important to understand the relativistic nature of the reality we exist within as a collective. Everything is relative to everything else, UNTIL one reaches the absolute, which is full God-realization. God-realization does not change the relativistic nature of the reality around you, but it does change your experience of it. Your experience becomes anchored in the absolute. All relativities can be viewed for what they truly are from this level of realization. Everyone gets glimpses of this type of perception from time to time, especially in meditation and prayer. The idea is to extend those glimpses until they become a continual experience. When they do, the first stage of God-realization has been achieved. Until this actually happens for you, everything in your experience outside of the "glimpses" is perceived through the system of relative relationships. For example, to someone who has been in a completely darkened room for a year, the beam of a flashlight would seem as bright as the sun. The brightness of the flashlight relative to what had been previously experienced would be quite great. To the person who had been in our normal world environment the brightness of the flashlight would not be so great. These two perceptions of the same thing are relative to each other and to other factors. Another example is a candle flame. Place the lit candle in a darkened room and its light has a profound effect. Take it out into the sunlight, and one cannot even see if the candle is indeed lit! So what does this have to do with "being in the flow" ? It demonstrates the idea of relativity. And being in the flow is not exempt from this system of relativities. To be in the flow of God's Light on the earth can be part of a higher frequency Light service, or a lower frequency Light service which allows a greater degree of personal comfort. The Omniscient does not make that decision for you. It is relative to your desire, orientation and evolutionary needs. For a person who chooses to be in a more easeful flow which better ensures their own personal comfort, there is a specific set of vibrational parameters which come into play for them. Following the path of least resistance in all affairs of their life is where they will find that sense of God's flow. This kind of experience is a service to the Light in and of itself. It allows the individual to get in touch with their inner divinity. A strong sense of orientation to that inner flame of divinity will be necessary to carry that soul forth on its evolutionary journey as it progresses into ever greater realms of evolutionary movement and challenge. For a person who has a very high degree of commitment to their own as well as the planet's evolutionary process, and who desires that higher level of service with a deep inner passion, an entirely different set of vibrational parameters will govern their experience. For such a soul being in the flow of God's Light can often bring some rather difficult challenges, initiations as we often choose to call them. Under these vibrational parameters, if the soul attempts to use the path of least resistance and difficulty in life as a means of determining where they are being guided to move or perform they may in effect be usurping their intention for higher service. What I am saying should not be construed to mean that one should always head in the direction of resistance or difficulty either. This also requires the development of a much finer degree of discernment. In order to develop this level of discernment the individual must establish new reference points. These reference points must be placed as close to the absolute as is possible for that soul. In addition, the soul must strive to continually move its reference points ever closer to the absolute as it evolves, and to not stagnate with them in any one place. As these reference points are placed ever closer to the absolute, the individual's ability to view the life situations they are faced with from an expanded perspective are greatly enhanced. From an expanded perspective it then becomes possible to understand that whereas your intuitive nature may be giving you a red flag because of impending difficulty which lies along a particular path of endeavor, your higher vision may be indicating that this is exactly where you must move in order to effect your personal evolution and higher service. All too often one senses some impending difficulty, or even starts to experience it, and then takes that as a "sign from Spirit" that this is the incorrect path for them. Every time this occurs when Spirit is actually attempting to move through that individual down a particular path of challenge or initiation, they actually cast themselves back into their former "safe" matrix and do not advance.

# In the Light of Higher Service

Sooner or later the soul will recognize what is happening and "go for it." In this sense these are learning experiences and certainly have an evolutionary effect. But without the needed awareness this can often take a very long time. This is complicated by the fact that the external reward for having made such a decision to avoid the perceived difficulty makes life easier for the moment. Despite the momentary rewards, what usually accompanies this dynamic is an overall sense of pervading dis-empowerment. The individual often wonders why that which they desire to manifest in their Light service does not come about in the way which brings them a sense of deeper fulfillment. These individuals also tend to have an undue concern for knowing why they are really here. They rarely realize that their approach to "being in the flow" is actually keeping them from experiencing the growth challenges which will bring them the necessary evolutionary movement. This movement results in connection with their own gnosis at a entirely new level of being. Within this gnosis lies the answer to their quest and the deeper sense of fulfillment they seek. The motivation to move forward down these higher paths of service to the Light and their subsequent challenges must come entirely from within. Higher service rarely brings with it the rewards of a stable or materially secure life. Pir-O-Murshid Inayat Khan (Sufi Master, father of Pir Valayat) stated (paraphrased) to a group of his students who were aspiring to greater service: "There has never been a sage, saint, seer or master who graced the face of this earth that has not met with great opposition in carrying out their mission here, do you think you shall be any different?" And this comes from a God-realized man who also met, and surmounted, tremendous hardship and difficulty in advancing his divine purpose on earth as well. There is another polarity which attempts to balance or correct this "being in the easeful flow" dynamic. That is represented in those who feel that higher service must be a painful, difficult, stressful and externally projected battle against all odds. This type of focus may be well-intentioned and coming from a true desire to serve the Light, but it also tends to feed itself, constantly generating more difficulty in the name of higher service to the Light. Those within this polarity expression will often be over focused on the opposition of the "dark forces." They often feel there are darker elements which have them specifically targeted because of their Light service, or which interfere with their attempts to serve. Many person's who truly desire higher service to the Light as part of their soul experience and who subscribe to the "be in the easy flow" dynamic are often making an attempt to balance out what they see in the collective concerning this opposite polarity. These individuals often carry this opposite polarity energy within themselves from previous experiences, whether that be in the current lifetime or others. Therefore these individuals are often also balancing out themselves as well as the collective with their "be in the easy flow approach." Coming into a higher degree of awareness of these two polarities so they can be balanced in your experience is an extremely important requirement to being able to truly move into higher levels of service to the Light. The balancing of these energies forms one of the primary initiations into higher service. It is often that both of these polarities exist in the same soul's experience. When this is true, the individual will usually "toggle" back and forth between them. Let's take a look at the idea of relativity and "being in the flow" from a slightly different perspective now. From the perspective of the absolute, being in the divine flow means being in the overall movement which is most attuned to the evolutionary forces of the universe. The destructive forces of evolution can be witnessed in the natural world in many ways. The eruption of a volcano destroys an entire forest with magnificent old growth trees thousands of years old in order to reshape itself in its own creative effort as part of the natural evolution of the earth. A star blows itself to smithereens in the phenomenal display of a super-nova as an entire solar system takes its ascension into higher dimensions of reality. In the latter scenario entire physical worlds may be destroyed along with all "life" forms residing upon them in the process. But then nothing in truth is ever "destroyed," for everything is pure energy, and that energy just assumes new forms in the overall evolutionary movement of the cosmos. In like manner your soul energy assumes new physical embodiments from one life to the next, experiencing the death transition over and again. Its an illusion, has it sunk in just yet? And I mean, really sunk in, not as a mental concept, but as a living reality of eternal life? Lets now apply this to your personal experience in service to the Light, and the idea of "being in the flow." If you are in the flow of evolutionary forces at the level of the divine, or even asking to be so, then your personal flow might have some "destructive forces" within it as well. These forces will manifest in your experience as challenges and downright difficulty at times. You must come to realize that you are being called to higher service by embodying these forces of evolution in your own life. They must be allowed their place in the human experience, for we are part of the cosmos as well. Love is a powerful force. Do volcanic eruptions or super-nova's occur as a result of anything other than Creator's flow of love for the Creation? Then it should not be to difficult to make the connection to your own personal experience. When you make this connection you shall then realize that the difficulties you may experience in your desire to reach higher levels of service are also part of the divine flow of Creator's love, and not some dark forces specifically singling you out for interference. Now there are those who might say that volcanic eruptions and earthquakes are the earth trying to release humanity's negativity. I used to fully subscribe to that. But if such were the case, then how do you explain the fact that the earth had volcanic eruptions, far more frequent and severe than those we have now, long before humanity as we know it existed on earth? And as well, there have been many volcanic activities witnessed by astronomers on other planets without life as we know it. Certainly humanity's built up negativity is now threaded into the evolutionary events which are affecting the earth, and have become part of the earth's primal evolutionary cycles of destruction and creation. But it is rather regal of us to think that we are responsible for such enormous evolutionary forces. We are part of them, and have responsibility to respond to them in ways which facilitate rather than inhibit them, but that is not quite the same thing as what is often entertained in this regard. If these evolutionary forces really are quite beyond our own control then it would seem we are but a mote of dust in the bigger picture and have no power whatsoever. From one perspective, that which I have just been speaking of, this is true. However, this now leads me to the key of all keys which opens the door to not only understanding how to move through the challenging pathways of higher service, but to also find a stronger connection to one's own divinity, the Source of all true power in the human experience. The key is this: you have the power to change your EXPERIENCE of anything, without attempting to alter the outer circumstances.

# In the Light of Higher Service

In other words, you must own your experience fully. Often, once this is accomplished, the outer circumstances will indeed change as well. But to hold even the slightest thought/feeling that changing the outer circumstances is why you are making the inner change, actually places limits on the process. In other words, the intent MUST be PURE. The purer the intent, the greater the effect you will experience. When you are using your intuitional body as a guide as to whether or not a particular direction or activity may be correct action for you, it is imperative that you incorporate your higher wisdom body and awareness in the process. And if you get a conflicting signal between the two, which is often a negative response on the intuitive level and a positive response on the level of higher awareness, this is where you must come to understand that the intuitive body is responding to the old "fight or flight" response. It is telling you, "difficulty ahead, beware." This in and of itself is as it should be. It is part of a survival mechanism which we are not ready to dispense with just yet. However, it can also block one's path to higher level initiations and service if not placed into the proper perspective and seen for what it truly is. This type of signal is a "descending" vibration. Whereas the affirmative or positive responses in the intuitive body are "ascending" vibrations. This is often where the confusion takes place. When we are in firm connection to Spirit as in meditation or prayer, we experience ascending vibrations. When we are in fear, we experience descending vibrations. We can therefore easily interpret all descending vibrations to not be of Spirit, and as such to be avoided. This is especially true if we are working diligently to overcome fear-based consciousness: anything which feels like fear will be avoided. This kind of interpretation of these signals emanates from a very simple and basic understanding. It serves us well in the early phases of spiritual development, but later we must come to develop and integrate far more complex waveforms within our intuitional bodies. When you bring your higher wisdom body and awareness into contact with your intuitional body, and work to reconcile and effect balance between the duality which may exist between them, this effects an inner marriage of forces. This is often called the Mystic Marriage. It also esoterically represents the blending of the fire and the water elements. The higher wisdom body and awareness in this case represents the fire element, and the intuitional body represents the water element. Once this marriage or blending of forces has taken place to a high enough degree the complex waveforms which are held in the fiery higher aspects of your being, such as the wisdom body and the fields of higher awareness, are modulated on the simpler magnetic waveforms of the watery intuitional body. This creates a whole new Light form in your auric field. It has been called the "seamless garment" esoterically. It emits a specific kind of radiance that looks like a "molten sea" of bronze, and was called such by some of the ancients. The better integrated these two aspects of being become, the more radiant this Light form is. Once this takes place, the individual starts to realize a higher level of service to the Light than they previously could entertain as possible. This higher service is often not recognized by others who have not yet donned their seamless garments. It is, however, no less real for lack of recognition. In fact, souls who are called to arenas of higher service where outer world recognition is not generally forthcoming face specific initiations. These initiations are generally not required of other souls who are called to forms of service which do receive recognition. It may be that these souls have already undergone such initiations at other times, or that they are simply called to fulfil those roles carrying more visibility and recognition for various reasons. In the long run it really matters not, as they say "different strokes for different folks." It takes many differing forms of service to transform a planetary collective consciousness. It is crucial to remaining within the vibrational parameters of higher service to not get into comparisons between yourself and others. Every soul is called to its own specific platform of service in the whole, and the Divine Director knows better than any of us how all the pieces of the puzzle may come together for the benefit of all. This does not mean you should not acknowledge the truth of what you know within about your specific positioning in the overall evolutionary matrix of the collective. It does mean that this truth must be accepted completely within yourself. To attempt to have it accepted externally will lead to major problems energetically, and actually can take you out of your higher service role of it goes unchecked. This is part and parcel of owning your own experience. Owning your own experience means that if you feel it, its yours. Anything else is some level of projection. Projection is the source of all separation. You as a human being are limited from experiencing your own divinity by only one thing. That one thing is projection. Projection is when you attempt to view or understand your reality through examining something outside of yourself. EVERYTHING is within you. This does not negate the fact that there are objects or things outside of you physically in the manifest collective reality. It DOES mean the truth of what those things are is ultimately within you. This is an area that is crucially important, and yet so often overlooked. The empathic experience is one of the most difficult to reconcile in this regard. Empathy happens when the individual's etheric/astral bodies are open to experiencing other as self. This is a necessary part of the evolutionary process and is common in healers. Often, when this first opens up for a person, they are still operating in a projected mode in ways they are not yet aware of. This then can cause them to be inundated with other people's emotions. The common solution used to resolve this type of experience is constant protection and clearing. This will work up to a point, but when the soul's evolutionary frequency crosses a specific threshold they are then required to abandon those techniques and work to align to their own divinity far more strongly. What generally causes this condition to linger on for longer than is necessary is when the person does not understand what is taking place, and assumes it to be somewhat of a permanent condition they are given to deal with. There are souls who are "wired" in such a way where this will be a much greater challenge than for others. The solution, however, is the same for all souls. Strong identification with the empathy as being part of one's spiritual gifts will cause the individual to become locked into this modality. As one who has passed though this enigma, I can speak experientially to you on it. Once a person locks onto their divinity strongly enough, the impact on them by other people's emotions dissipates quickly. And, they still maintain the ability to experience other as self, but in an entirely new manner than before. For those of you who may be attempting to move beyond this enigma, I can tell you that the signal which tells you are about to lose your spiritual gifts when you move to deeper levels of being is false, don't listen to it.

---

# In the Light of Higher Service

It's the egoic fear that tells you that which you have formed an identity to is about to be dissolved, and that much is true. But to read this signal as a "no go" for going deeper into your being is an error in discernment. Your spiritual gifts will shift to an entirely new level of experience, one which is far more wonderful than you might imagine if you simply go for it. The way people are attempting to process their emotions in many of the therapies being used today utilize various means of projection as well. These therapies have value in that they help to clear the grosser elements of one's emotional body. These therapies also help the soul to learn about love; what it is and what it isn't. There comes a time, however, where the soul must step beyond such therapeutic modalities and completely own its experience. It will remain in a cyclical experience of pain, release and joy until it does. That cyclical experience may become less dramatized through the use of these therapeutic means, but it will not dissipate for good until the soul own's its experience fully. This is an inward movement, and one can ride it like a wave into the center of their being. When things which are difficult to deal with enter your experience, the first tendency is to assess the situation according to what energies are being presented to you through your external environment. Then one generally decides how to position themselves according to these energies. How should you respond, act or speak in any given situation? These questions are all born of projection. To the soul who takes the experience inward and owns it fully, such questions do not arise. Any outward action or speech which may be required flows from the center of being without pre-meditation or quest. This is true empowerment. Empowerment which is anchored in the true spiritual center of being, not in the ego-personality. From this point of empowerment, your higher service to the Light will expand exponentially. You will be able to fully own your experience of that service regardless of what obstacles you may encounter. You will experience these obstacles as just another part of the service, nothing more or less. You will not feel like a cosmic victim. You will KNOW within that what you do in the name of the Light is a spiritual accomplishment, and that any outer indications of accomplishment are quite unimportant. The external accomplishments which are truly necessary to facilitate your higher service will naturally flow from this font of higher inner service. The time for stepping into higher service is now. Own your experience as fully as you are able to at all times. Effect your inner Mystic Marriage, set the intention, bring your wisdom body and higher awareness into contact with your intuitional body increasingly every single day of your life. Continue to expand your awareness consciously every day of your life. Ask yourself the question: "how might I perceive this situation/person/object differently?" Do this continually until that type of introspective consciousness becomes an integral part of you. When difficult feelings arise, seek within yourself to know what it is in YOU that these feelings reveal. These techniques will carry you towards the center of your being. They will help you to bend your reality inwards on itself, so that you become complete within yourself, existing in a state of non-projection. You will find the fulfillment you seek by doing so.

# Relativity, Reality and God Consciousness

| Relativity, Reality and God Consciousness by Rev. Simeon Nartoomid Moving into a relativistic modality of perception is extremely important to understanding the nature of reality and to the attainment of God consciousness or God realization. The universe is comprised of a system of ever-expanding relativities. The one and only absolute is found in the point where all relativities merge. That point is known as the ultimate Creator, the one God. As you progressively attain higher degrees of God consciousness, you are constantly moving through the universal system of relativities. This system of relativities is hierarchical in nature. The further one progresses through the system the fewer the relativities one has to contend with. Along the path to divine union each subsequent set of relativities encompasses all that the previous ones did but distills them into a finer essence. Eventually you will reach the last set of relativities and find yourself within the finest essence of all. You will have found your point of union with that omnipotent, omniscient, all-loving and all-pervasive Presence called God. And what is a relativistic modality of perception? How would this be experienced in life? A relativistic modality of perception perceives the relativity between different objects, beings and energy. Such a modality of perception works in conjunction with an expanded awareness. This awareness has inherent within it a well established third reference point which allows an individual to "triangulate" with any given set of polarities thereby freeing that individual's consciousness from entrapment within them. Thought forms which are blatantly dualistic in nature work within the grosser levels of relativity. Within these types of dualistic thought forms the concepts of either/or, right/wrong, right/left, black/white and so forth exist. One can think of these polarities in terms of the opposite ends of a baton. Ultimately you will have to learn to hold the baton by the middle to twirl it. The closer to the middle you hold it, the more symmetrical and easeful your attempts to twirl it will be. The middle of the baton is that third reference point which allows triangulation to occur thereby diffusing the illusion of the two polarities involved which are represented in the ends of the baton. The polarities themselves are not illusions, but rather only represent one portion of a total reality and are thus incomplete. It is when one can recognize the common truth in each polarity that they are brought together into a more holistic reality. The illusion is that the incomplete reality is all there is, that it is complete. One must develop an acute awareness of when they are within the domain of dualistic thought forms. The grosser primary warning signs are when you begin to experience a sense of depression, conflict, contradiction, uncertainty, confusion, pain, suffering and/or opposition. The subtler warning signs are when you find yourself experiencing thoughts and feelings which tend to move from one perceived truth to another in an attempt to find a point of reconciliation. These subtler warning signs are also indicative that the individual is attempting to move into a new set of relativities which will eventually change the way they perceive reality. An individual who has a well-developed relativistic modality of perception will not have a propensity to view the world in terms of what is right and wrong, or to initiate oppositional interactions with others. They may well state their position and others may attempt to persuade them otherwise, but the activity which may appear to be oppositional will generally not have been initiated by them. Souls who have attained this modality of perception will be animated more through inner response than outer initiative. They also understand that life is simply an evolutionary experience and what the underlying value of that experience is. These souls will realize that what may appear true from one perspective may appear false from another and they will understand the nature of polarities in imbalance. What is a masculine polarity relative to one given set of vibrations, may well be a feminine polarity relative to another given set of vibrations. An example of this would be the soul itself. The soul is masculine relative to the earth, but feminine relative to the Godhead. This is why mystics speak of the soul as the bride, and God as the bridegroom. This is also why we refer to the "Mother Earth." We are her children, but we are also masculine in polarity relative to her. Humanity is in the active-assertive modality relative to the earth, while the earth is in a passive-receptive modality relative to humanity. While being within dualism without a third reference point has its obvious limitations, attempting to move beyond duality consciousness and its related concepts has inherent dangers as well. I would cite the effort to move beyond concepts of right and wrong particularly in this regard. At this point I need to state that what I am speaking of here should not be construed as a convenient sidestep to morality and ethics. An individual needs to develop their personality and character foundationally such that an effort to move beyond concepts of right and wrong will not cause them to violate the most basic of spiritual principles and consequently the rights of others. If an individual attempts to move into these non-dualistic concepts too quickly certain spiritual aberrations will often be the result. Such aberrations lead to illusions which then generate rationalizations to support the illusions. In instances of this nature the perception of that individual is often such that they will firmly believe they are living according to higher universal principles and laws, and yet be in violation of the most basic foundational principles of higher consciousness in the human experience. These foundational basics are rooted in ethics and morality. When an individual gains an intellectual understanding of non-dualistic concepts and principles, they are often start to believe that is also where they are in terms of their path of realization. It is extremely important to understand that intellectual understanding of spiritual principles and concepts is only the first step towards actualizing the consciousness the intellect has revealed to the whole being. In this thought, you are faced with the dualistic nature of your human-ness. This is witnessed in the fact that you can be very well aware of a spiritual concept or principle, and yet not be living it very well. These aberrations which can result from misapplication of higher spiritual principle and concept when an individual has not yet actualized the consciousness they represent are seen exemplified in various ways. One of these ways is when someone feels it is incorrect for them to help someone in need and uses the rationalization that it is because they might "enable" that person's problematic patterns. This is an illusion at best. If you are not able to help another person who you know is in need, it is because of something going on inside you, not them. This does not mean that your perception of their problematic pattern is necessarily incorrect, only that in truth an act of love is an act of love, and there is no karmic implication for the soul who acts freely and unconditionally in love to help another. What that person does with the assistance you offer is between them and their Creator. In this example the individual generally feels they are operating from some place of higher consciousness which is beyond the grosser levels of dualism in their refusal to help the other person. They will generally rationalize that they are in mastery for not becoming potentially implicated in the other person's affairs.

# Relativity, Reality and God Consciousness

In fact, they are usually firmly enmeshed in that which they feel they have transcended or mastered and have attempted to separate themselves from it by avoiding the situation altogether. A more truthful response if one truly feels they are not in a stable or strong enough position to help the other person in need is to simply state that you wish you could help them but your personal situation is such that you really don't feel you can right now. This at least places you in the highest place of truth you can live up to in that moment while you are growing towards greater strength in balance. By addressing a situation in this manner you set the stage for your future realization when you will be strong enough to respond to such a request for assistance from one of your brothers or sisters affirmatively knowing full well that your own needs are met in the same action. Once you reach a specific threshold of God consciousness, you will not have that sense that you can actually get out of balance by extending yourself to others in need. There are a lot of potential variances in the example I have just related, and which would take an article of their own to elaborate on. What I am attempting to convey relative to this article is the potential spiritual danger which comes along with opening to states of consciousness beyond the dualistic threshold of reality. As this process unfolds for a soul, it is quite frequently a perilous time as the flame geometries of higher thought and being start to intermix with the dualistic human animal nature. Those individuals who have the most sincere commitment to spiritual evolution are those who are most susceptible to the many pitfalls which rapid evolutionary movement brings. Seems like a cosmic joke until one realizes that it is just perfect, and serves to strengthen the soul in its inner Light. This same type of potential pitfall is also present in the metaphysical principle that "you create your own reality." There is definitely a truth to this principle, but there is much more to it than such a simplistic view might entertain. One needs to better understand the relativities involved in this principle, which is an involved subject, so I will simply relate what is needed for this article. Reality is structured in a hierarchical manner. This is evident in all of nature. You are "creating your own reality" in one very small section of that overall hierarchical structure called the universe. It is the one which is most important to you, but its overall relationship with the universe itself is somewhat less significant. Its as though God took you to a shopping mall. The shopping mall represents the universe. You are given the right to go into one of the stores and buy whatever you want. That store is the reality which you are creating as part of the whole shopping mall reality. Another soul shopping in that same store might create an entirely different reality than you. You might buy socks and useful things, and they might buy bangles and beads which serve no utilitarian purpose. The two realities are inextricably interlinked as they both occurred in the same store, AND the same shopping mall, yet they are also unique realities unto themselves occurring within the shopping mall. Thus, these realities can be perceived relative to each other, relative to the store and other stores and to the entire shopping mall. Once the individual acquires the ability to perceive reality from the level of the whole shopping mall, the importance of what is purchased in each store diminishes relative to the importance of the activity of shopping itself. In other words, the level of importance one assigns to the details of their reality changes. The focus of one's perceptions moves towards essence, which is a more refined set of relativities. In like manner, as you move steadily along your evolutionary path, you will find that what you once perceived to be true is either no longer true to you, or that it was incomplete and your increased awareness will help to complete that perception. And what you believe to be true today, will stand revealed as being incomplete or untrue at some point in your future, UNLESS you have reached that point of ultimate fusion with the absolute where all relativities meet. This fusion takes you into the experience of God consciousness. It is important to realize, however, that even your experience of that consciousness is subject to the laws of relativity within the limited reality in which you exist. In other words, there will be times along the path to full realization of this consciousness where one experiences a relative degree of it or isolated moments of full experience within it. These isolated experiences will gradually expand into a rapidly unfolding series of them. This series of experiences will then progress into a pulsing but continual experience, and yet it will still be expanding relative to the depth of the experience. That depth, may quite frankly, be infinite. There comes a point, however, where the individual's experience shifts in such a manner that the "quest" comes to an end. What was once a quest is now a certainty. The certainty is that sense of the absolute reference point within the soul, and is not based on any knowledge of details or facts related to the manifest creation. Once one knows that point of certainty within their being, all other endeavors pale relative to the enormity of what one experiences relative to their direct relationship with God. This does not necessarily mean that soul is fully realized in their divinity. It does mean that they have reached a unique point in the evolution of their consciousness. They have no need to seek outwardly for that which fulfils them, they only need to respond to that divine impulse coming from within that they are now so well attuned to. At this point in its journey the soul is now faced with another set of relativities. That soul's experience relative to the world around it takes on a new meaning. The individual who has reached this place is basically freed from the experience of the trivial and the mundane. They still have to deal with that aspect of life, but they simply experience it differently. God is witnessed and experienced in all activities of life no matter how seemingly mundane or trivial they may seem. At first the soul who has crossed this threshold may falter a bit in maintaining this consciousness but quickly strengthens its resolve to stay firmly centered within it. Once this state of being is experienced nothing else will do This type of experience and realization represents a MAJOR shift in relative perception. The only difference between that soul's experience on the earth and another who struggles to be free is awareness and perception. Your perceptions and experience are the store in the mall where you are empowered to create your own reality, to shop for whatever you want. The common tendency in human experience is to try and change one's relative experience of reality by changing things in one's outer life experience. This often involves trying to change other people in your life experience as well. This type of endeavor has merit in that it allows the soul to experience its power to create and to make change in a way where the results are quite visible, and thus real. Its downside is that you have to try and change things which are being held in place by the will of others, and that can ultimately be a very dis-empowering and frustrating experience when it doesn't work out as you hoped. As the soul advances on its evolutionary journey it gains the ability to perceive ever subtler realities. You can see this exemplified in life.

# Relativity, Reality and God Consciousness

The more one immerses themselves into a specific endeavor, the more keenly they become aware of the subtle nuances of the reality that endeavor represents. When the individual begins to develop spiritual awareness this natural tendency then manifests in that effort as well. The natural progression of this tendency will in time lead the soul to an ability to perceive ways of making subtle changes within its own perceptions which subsequently alter its experience of the surrounding environment and therefore its entire reality. These changes eventually become so subtle, relatively speaking, that they are completely within that individual, with little or no effort expended to change the outer circumstances. And yet, to the individual working on this level of relative subtlety, that which they perceive will not seem so subtle TO THEM at all. Attaining the ability to work with these very subtle dimensions naturally directs the individual's attention inwardly. This does not mean, however, that an individual who has reached this level of subtlety in perception and experience will not be actively engaged in the outer circumstances of life. In fact, they may be more engaged than ever before. The relative difference is to be found within their experience of that activity, not the level or type of activity itself. A soul which has reached this level of realization is simply responding to the very powerful yet subtle forces which it is now open to experience within itself. It is not the same type of effort for such a soul to create as it is for others, that soul is simply responding to the deeper creative impulse within it. Any artist knows what I speak of here when they are engaged in their artwork. They are animated from a place which is highly inspirational. They are not planning and plotting so much what that piece of art will be when it is finished, they are simply responding to the immensely powerful force which is coursing through them and taking form in their creation. What I am speaking about is the manifestation of that same type of inspirational impulse in all of life. Life itself becomes the canvas, and one begins to approach it in a relativistic sense. Within a relativistic modality of perception there is no such thing as comparison, for each thing is seen for what it is in its own uniqueness. Each thing is seen RELATIVE to the others in the ever expanding and unfolding process of life. The first object the artist commits to canvas may not have much meaning until it is seen relative to all the other objects which wind up on the canvas. Life is the same way, its meaning is relative to the other objects within it, and the other person's who are experiencing it with you. In such a modality of relativistic and non-dualistic perception the idea's which populate the earth about light and dark, good and evil, right and wrong, good guys and bad guys et cetera are revealed as incomplete and/or even false. What you once called darkness now appears to be that which is operating in the dimness of non-evolution. What you once thought was dark forces attempting to steal your birthright to the Light appear to be your very own Judas, who betrays you only so you may manifest your own unique destiny. The illusion of maya stands revealed and you wonder why you did not see this before so clearly. Ahhh, such is the nature of perception. How many times have you bought a different car and all of sudden became aware just how many others like it there were on the road? They were always there, but it wasn't until you shifted your awareness to include that type and color of car that you came to perceive them. Your perceptions were relative to your awareness. Awareness is therefore a primary key to moving through the universal system of relativities toward the absolute where they all merge into the One. The more your awareness expands, the more refined the set of relativities you will operate within becomes. The one primary dynamic which stops one's awareness from expanding is self-judgement. Judgement forms a vibrational wall which separates your conscious self from the higher aspect of your being. The minute you cast a judgement of yourself you immediately separate your conscious being and your God-self. In so doing, you stop your awareness from expanding into the God-self aspect of who you are. Self-judgement also comes in sets of relativities. No matter how clear you think you may be of self-judgement there are always subtler realms of it permeating your experience unbeknownst to you. Take the attitude that such is the case, and hold an open mind to having more of it revealed to you. If you were completely free of self-judgement, you would be completely free of all other limitations as well. Until you can honestly say that such is true for you, then you must accept there are self-judgements still operating in your subconscious and unconscious aspects of self. You will not be able to clear all aspects of self-judgement until you have become FULLY conscious of EVERYTHING within the subconscious and unconscious aspects of self, which is a tall order indeed. Working to strengthen and hold the intention that you wish to continue to become more aware of your self-judgements will go a long way towards expediting the process. In increasing your awareness of self in this manner you also automatically increase your awareness of the entire reality you exist within. Your awareness will then expand beyond into ever more refined systems of reality culminating in direct experience of, and eventually union with, God.

# Thoth, a Legacy from Orion

| Thoth, A Legacy From Orion by Simeon Nartoomid in conjunction with Maia Nartoomid Thoth has been known throughout the ages primarily for his accomplishments as the Master architect of the Great Pyramid of Giza, and is generally associated with ancient Egypt, although many refer to him as Thoth the Atlantean. Thoth tells us that he actually came to the Earth from the Blue Star Rigel in Orion with an energetic patterning called the Enochian Table, and that the plan for the Great Pyramid was mathematically encoded into that blueprint. He came to Earth as an Ultra-Terrestrial being, which he distinguishes from Extra-Terrestrials by explaining that Ultra beings are of a much higher evolutionary order. He oversaw the building of the Great Pyramid as a pure Orinian Ultra being after coming to Earth in a ship of Light, and had a residence in Atlantis for an extended period of time while that took place. The name he used in that experience he tells us was Toth-Mus-Zurud. At a later period he then took embodiment upon the Earth through the more normally understood process of birth. He informs us he was actually born in Tibet in that lifetime, and had considerable experience in Egypt and Greece as well as Atlantis again. This embodiment was around the period of the Great Deluge which Noah and his Ark immortalized. In fact, he lived through the Great Deluge and after that oversaw the re-building of the Great Pyramid, as it had been severely damaged in the flood. He was also know during that time for his expertise as a Master Physician and Alchemist. The name or title of Thoth, which is associated with Egypt, is vibrationally encoded from higher dimensions and as such has its origins from greater schema than Egypt. However, the name Thoth became associated also with Hermes, the Greek God of Mercury (spiritualized mind), and Trismesgistus (meaning thrice great), through his experience in Greece at that time. Thus he became also known as Thoth Hermes Trismesgistus. Another title associated with Thoth is the great Tehuti, also commonly spelled as Tahuti, these are all one and the same being, however to add to the confusion he informs us that other beings have also used the title Thoth. Thoth Hermes lived 300 years in that lifetime at which time he translated his form and entered another dimensional experience. Thoth tells us that his soul has seen experience either solely, or in combination with other souls that conjoined for a specific purpose, as several of the well known entities of our planet’s past. Some of these entities are Amenophis; Imenhotep; Hiram Abiff; Quetzalcoatl / Kukulkan; Hiawatha; Merlin; Enoch and John the Beloved / Divine. His last incarnation was as Christian Rosencreutz. It is important to understand that Thoth was and is also an archetype. The study of archetypes is lengthy and complex, but suffice it to say in this case the Thoth archetype existed prior to his embodiment within Earthen genetics previously described. Once his experience on the Earth in that lifetime was completed, High Priests and Priestesses of the ancient Temples worked to infuse his soul’s knowledge and experience into the Thoth archetype more strongly. Thus now we have both the soul being we know as Thoth, and his archetype which is imbued with that soul essence. It can be very difficult to discern the difference between these when one makes inner planes contact. In the bigger picture it makes little difference however, if the initiate in receipt adheres to the essence of what they receive rather placing limiting interpretations upon the energy and / or becoming egoically attached. So now that we know something about Thoth’s past, what is his role in the current planetary transformation, and the future within the ascended reality he refers to as ‘The New Earth Star’? Currently Thoth resides in an Inner Earthen dimension within the eight sphere of consciousness in what he refers to as a cosmogenic embodiment. You can think of this as being similar to an Ultra-Terrestrial being, but of a much higher vibratory rate. He tells us that his focus and assumed form are different in nature from that of the other well known Ascended Masters, although they are each assuming complimentary roles for the overall movement towards unification with the One. He has stated that while the Ascended Masters took the descent into matter karmically in order to use their own strength in the Light to help blaze a trail back into the higher worlds of knowledge, his involvement with the Earth has never been embedded karmically as his Light purpose was to intermingle with the earthen experience to bring the higher knowledge forms from Orion into the planetary consciousness. Every so often he would re-embody to renew, refresh or update those Light programs. He would not have been able to accomplish this had he become karmically involved with this world. This is kind of like a fueling of the Flame that the other Ascended Masters were keeping lit within this world. There were specific dispensations and some rather unusual ‘shieldings’ permitted by the hierarchies to make all of this possible, particularly in the later embodiments such as Christian Rosencreutz where the planet was within great density. Thoth has a specific focus to bring forth ancient sacred knowledge forms at this time through duly sanctioned hermetic Stations of Light such as Spirit Heart Sanctuary. These knowledge forms have been kept safeguarded within an area of the higher akashic fields of the Earth called the ‘Record of Thoth’. Thoth is of course the guardian of this repository, and as such releases certain knowledge from this record when it is deemed appropriate for the planets evolution. This record was established because it was seen by the hierarchies that as the planet went through its de-evolution and re-evolutionary phases the interaction of many souls with this knowledge could, and most certainly would scramble it over time. By creating the repository known as the Record of Thoth, the knowledge could be released at various intervals to refresh the planetary memory. This is very congruent to what we were saying about Thoth’s purpose for embodiment on the Earth as well. So in essence, Thoth serves as a guardian and disseminator of the sacred knowledge forms from Orion. By bringing these knowledge forms into our present experience, we serve as the channel to update them and funnel them into our future through our own personal interaction with them, thereby effecting the closing of the circle between past, present and future. Thoth’s role in the future ‘New Earth Star’ reality, is still as guardian and disseminator of the sacred knowledge from Orion, but the main difference will be that he can then be amongst us as a wayshower as well. In addition Thoth informs us that he is one of a small handful of Masters whom sit upon the orchestration council for the organization of that ascended new reality. The Ascended Masters will still each have their individual Temple foci within this new reality, each gathering their "children" unto the fold so to speak, and Thoth will be integrally involved with helping to redesign the path back to greater unification through their individual efforts.

# CAMALONIA – A Covenant between R

|
CAMALONIA
a Covenant between Realms
by and thru Maia Alaula Kamala
"Camalonia" is a name I was inspired by Thoth to use to describe a new reality
being formed on this earth between two realms of its being:
"Avalon" – the state of the natural world in its purest form; that which was
first created from the Un-manifest.
"Camelot" – The Law of the Land embodied in a united "kingdom" of consensual
reality: the action of human souls as God-appointed stewards of the earth. The
true laws of Camelot supersede the "lesser" laws of humanity. The Law of the
Land is the original template human souls vowed to uphold in their stewardship,
which they for the most part have abandoned in their quest for the "false
grail".
By uniting these two sacred forms, so humanity of the 21st century may come to a
completeness, a resolution of that which their souls assumed in the Beginning
Time. We cannot hope to move into the vibration of the ascended realm, which my
sources call the "New Earth Star" until we have completed the responsibility of
our original vows with this reality.

# Overview of 44:44 Stargate

Overview of World Ascension through the 44:44 Stargate 1) Maha Ratri Membrane on this side of the Stargate. Oritron - within the realm of the ‘Dark Star habitation’ or Black Cube of Kabba. 2) Maha Rhim Membrane on the other side of the Stargate. Metatron - within the realm of the ‘White Star habitation’ or the ‘Cube of Stars’. 3) The Golden Pillar of Light The protective and formulative envelope for passage of matter between the two membranes of the 44:44 Stargate: the Maha Ratri and the Maha Rhim. The Pillar of Light which extends from the Haha-Ratri membrane through the Star Grail (the 44:44 Stargate) and into the Maha-Rhim membrane is called the Skittuim pillar. This pillar is inclusive of both the Maha-Ratri and Maha-Rhim membranes themselves as well. This pillar forms the ‘Field of Deliverance’ from the Oritronic Earth into the New Earth Star of Metatron. The Golden Pillar of individuation which aligns to each soul / bio-system that is in resonance with the dynamic of the Star Grail is called the Avatalkim pillar. This pillar represents the ‘Individual Extension’ of the 44:44 Star Grail dynamic to that individual. 4) Star of David Transfer Star Tetrahedron merkabah interface with human beings, transferring their complete Light Bodies (inclusive of the physical) into a higher “Pure Gem” state. 5) The Aramu Temple of Thoth / The Numis-Ohm The Temple of Thoth sits in the ‘overlap or ‘Var’ of the Maha-Rhim and the lip of the Star Grail. The ‘Numis-Ohm’ is the yet undeveloped plane that is to become the New Earth Star. 6) Aeriopax / Isis Eye The main geometric for LP-40. It will fit within the ‘Pillar of Light’, that zone of protection and formulation that will keep our matter-bodies inviolate as we pass through the ‘Eye of the Needle’, the 44:44. Process of Ascension: Light Principle Forty (LP-40) 1) The Earth Moves into the ‘Conversion Zone’ This zone can be seen in sacred geometry as the central diamond-shaped containment field within the Aeriopax that holds the jewel flame. There will be certain astronomical and astrological corollaries to the Earth’s entrance into this region, beginning with our movement spatially into the inner zone of the Photon Belt (we are already in the outer sheath of this belt.). As this begins to occur, we will see greater geologic disturbances in the Earth, especially earthquakes and volcanic action. Once the planet is fully within the Conversion Zone, so it’s central sun atoma (in the center of the Earth) will lock onto the greater Aeriopax coordinates coming from the 44:44 Stargate, placing this sphere we currently inhabit into the center of the Isis Eye. 2) The Opening of the Lotus The Great Pyramid at Giza becomes the ‘Thresholding Chamber’ for the Ascension fulfillment. Within this ancient structure is contained an etheric temple counterpart Thoth refers to it as the ‘Temple of the Morning Star’. i) Adonai Kodesh: Inside the Temple of the Morning star is a golden cube with a sphere inside connected to a ’blue hole’, which differs from a ‘black hole’ in that it is responsive to sentient consciousness control. ii) Projection of ‘blue needles’ into pyramid’s Vault of Osiris iii) Activates the Violet Flame iv) ‘Lotus unfolds, sending golden needles out into the planet, calibrating the vibration of all matter to register above a specific threshold which The Keys of Enoch calls the ‘Sacred Formula Grid’. 3) Calibration of the Midnight Sun i) Shield of the Sun: the sun will begin to create an opposite force field, an ‘anti-matter’ or ‘midnight’ sun ii) Ultra-matter rushes through the blue hole as it is drawn upon by the anti-matter solar shield. This ‘ultra-matter’ envelopes the entire planet. iii) Lightning Paths: paths for high transmission of Metatronic overlays within the Oritronic membrane. These electrical passages are created by the anti-matter of the solar shield into the ultra-matter now permeating the Earth. The lightning paths will cause the atmosphere of Earth to become charged with ‘itons’. iv) Itons: particles of supra-atomic substance created by breaking atomic bonding to the Oritronic Spiral. These particles act as ‘seeds’ for the Metatronic consciousness in this reality system. Itons are atoms that have been turned inside out. Once our physical atoms have the proper Light mathematic encodings to itonize we will be able to safely pass through the LP-40 ascension. v) The Golden Taya and Tetratryons: The Golden Taya are the land areas on the planet (a total of 20% of all surface area of the Earth) which will move through the Stargate with those humans who are ready to ascend. Tetratryons are hyperspace tetrahedrons with open ends connecting to one another to form dimensional transference zones It is through the tetratryons that energy travels between different dimensions....As the tetratryonic activity escalates within the Golden Taya zones, there will be gradient levels of Light interaction at the cellular level for all living things within these energy fields. (Note: tetratryonic activity will not be present in land regions of the Earth not within the Golden Taya.) 4) The Sacred Rushing Uprushing of energy response from the central sun atoma of the planet. Will be transmitted to the center of all bio-physical brains as a humming, like a hive of bees. Will create a state of Euphoria in all animals and most humans. Most humans who have not chosen ascension, and thus are not encoded with the transference fire letters, will die in this experience. Inner Earth Elohim will awaken and move upon the surface of the Earth, visible to those who bear the Light codes for ascension into the New Earth Star. 5) The Release of the Gaiavatha and the Transference of the Planetary Genius A wave of golden light, known as the ‘Gaiavatha’, will updwell from the atoma of this sphere and enter all matter resonant with the 44:44 octave of ascension. This golden light, which will be plainly visible to the human eye at that time, contains all the Light codes of the Earth; even those portions that will not go through the Stargate. These codes will be saturated into the ascending matter to be carried as a full hologramic insertion into the New Earth Star. The Planetary Genius will be retrieved from the center of the Earth and transferred into the New Earth Star. The ‘Planetary Genius’ is, according to Thoth, “the completed thought form containing the identity of consciousness for your World Domain from its Alpha through Omega (beginning to end).

# Overview of 44:44 Stargate

It is untainted, free of all illusion, and yet it is not omnipotent, as it defines and identifies, therefore it has a distinct polarity, and that polarity is to qualify and preserve the Eshaton of the Earth.” Rowena P Kryder’s ‘Gaia Matrix Oracle’ defines ‘Eshaton’ thus: “The Earth is a wisdom body. Gaia has the perennial tradition at her core. Eshaton means ‘the last things’. All can be consumed except the truth, represented by the New Earth Spiritual World....The phase of Eschaton is an illuminative, fiery, spiritual consummation of the earth and all beings within and upon her.” 6) The Or-a’him Vehicles of Light Activate and Conduct the Star of David / Star Tetrahedron Merkabahs for Primary Ascension Higher dimensional vehicles of Light from Orion will come into our skies which will now be consumed with swirling diffuse clouds of myriad colors, and begin to create the pathways for primary ascension. i) The Or-a’him will create a unified field in our space-time, allowing all other electromagnetic zones within our Earth’s spectrum to become present in one wave-form. Thus, we will see many beings among us and they will see us. All these ensouled ones will share the ascension experience with us, as there will no longer be the separate zones or compartments to this fractured planetary consciousness as in the past. Included will be the Sidhe races of the Fairy beings, those residents of the Inner Earth and other ‘dwellers’ of our Earthen sphere who have, until now, remained ‘behind the veil’ for us. ii) The Or-a’him Light vehicles will create ‘stability zones’ around the Golden Taya regions, and further codes of Light will be inserted through these fields, allowing greater beings of Light to enter our domain without being of the same Light vibration. These supernal beings will prepare us spiritually and physically for our ascent through the Gate of the Star Grail and into the New Earth Star. They will begin the sequencing of Light code firings in our bodies (already greatly transformed by the LP-40 process thus far) which will register the sacred ‘Star of David’ configuration around our individual forms. This star will then become an eight-pointed star tetrahedron, encompassing the whole body within it. Division of Souls During LP-40: i) The New Earth Voyagers Those souls who have chosen through their higher self, to move through the 44:44 Stargate and into the New Earth consciousness. They will be euphoric, but alert in the ‘now’ moment with the transformation of LP-40 as it takes place. ii) The Sleepers Those souls who are not ready for the Metatronic path of the New Earth Star, and have chosen to ‘die’ and insert themselves into the incarnating field of another Oritronic world. The ‘Sleepers’ will be in a dreamy euphoric trance during LP-40, and most will blissfully leave their bodies during LP-40, moving away from this realm and into another world presence with the half-Light universe. iii) The Walkers These are the souls who have so little Light body, whether through physical and emotional damage to it, or due to very dense karma, that they will not experience any of the beauty of LP-40. They will see the world darkly, seeming to exist in a dark cloud. They will not be able to think or reason clearly (due to the breaking up of the lower akashic) and will be fearful and in emotional anguish. Some will experience physical discomfort. Most will perish in the rushing of energies from the center of the planet, which will electrocute most of these persons. However, some will survive through sheer personal will, only to die in the final entropy break-down of the planet within a 30 day period after LP-40. The Walkers, like the Sleepers, will then move into another world of the Oritron. 7) The Secondary Ascension From among the ‘First Wave’ or those who ascended in the ‘Primary’, will be souls who choose to come back through the threshold and aid other souls, who in the ‘Eleventh Hour’ have made the decision to ascend into the New Earth Star. They will assist the ‘Angelics’ in helping these ‘later-comers’ through the portal. Many of the Sleepers will be guided through. Fewer of the Walkers. In the entire count of First and Second Wave, only approximately 40% of the then-currently incarnated humanity will be taken up into the Pillar of Light. 8) Transport of Un-embodied Earth Souls Into the New Earth Star Souls of the Earth who are not embodied during LP-40 will go through their own process of transference into the New Earth Star. The dis-embodied Voyagers will go through an alignment of their etheric bodies with the Adam Kadmon template, so that they will be able to enter the New Earth physical format. In fact, some Voyager candidates currently within the non-corporeal, are already working between the two sub-zones on either side of the Star Grail: the Maha Ratri and the Maha Rhim. They will, of course, have to be inscripted during LP-40 in order to actually enter the New Earth Star, but in the meantime, some souls are being allowed entrance into the Numis-Ohm, the pre-formative New Earth matrix. ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ ASCENSION FYI LINKS ON MY BLOGS ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

# The 12th Crystal Skull

In a recent (June, 2008) session for a
friend concerning her daughter's dream about a blue crystal skull, I
received the following from Thoth:
This skull is one of the
Dwellers. At this time, it is
being activated as the
re-alignment of the Heart Stone under the Rosslyn altar in Scotland is
triggering the Roil
Point in Hawai’i to send out Light code signals through the Mother Earth
Grid so that the Dwellers on the Earth will all become activated again (this
is but a first step). This Blue Crystal Skull of the Star-One O’duma is the
12th to become a LOTUS Skull, and the first to become activated. This
process of it’s activation will not be completed until July 30th, at which
time it will create it’s duplicate in the New Earth Star. As they become
activated, each Dweller Crystal Skull will be ‘cloned’ within the New Earth
of Numis’OM.
When the now 12 LOTUS Skulls are all activated and duplicated (one could say
expanded) into Numis’OM, the 13th as a living human being will come forth to
join them. It is then that the prophecy will be complete... yet there are
more Dwellers in and beyond the Earth, all which will eventually be
activated and duplicated in the New Earth; but when the 13 LOTUS Skulls are
activated and in place also within Numis’OM a major Threshold for the 44:44
Star Grail Ascension of the Earth shall be crossed.
More on this topic will appear in the
upcoming volume (5 - 2008) of
Numis-OM - Eye of Metatron.

# Rex Mundi

Images in this series suitable for hi-quality prints are now available for viewing, purchase and immediate download in our Spirit Store Rex Mundi A Metatronic View of the “King of the World” Rex Mundi: that mysterious esoteric figure with whom the Templars and other esoteric orders of the past were fascinated, is viewed in the akashic library of Thoth to be a much more expanded dynamic that the Satan /Christ personas (the two polarized views). Followers of the Renne Le Chateau mystery and the recent Da Vinci Code have also included “Rex Mundi” in their esoteric vocabulary. An author going by the name of Chronos Apollonios has written on his website: The idea of "Rex Mundi" also relates to the "Axis Mundi", which for these concerns is both the axis of precession, and the earth's magnetic axis. There is the same implication in that, that there may be in Tolkien's drawing of the Gate of Moria. There is no shortage whatsoever of archaic figures of Christ and many other persons who seem to be holding their staff at the exact angle which the true magnetic north polar axis deviates from the geographical polar axis, concerns which may have entered (C.S.) Lewis' first book in the "Chronicles of Naria" series in a whimsical and casual yet complex manner, the form of the appearance of Father Christmas. Chronos Apollonios further gives his research around the Phoenix rising from the ashes (the alchemical symbol) in context with the axis of precession, in which I see in direct association with Rex Mundi on the Cross of Light suspended on the world and also embracing the world. As many of you know who have followed my material, I see Orion as the key gateway for this universal continuum, and indeed for the earth’s formation within that continuum as a planetary realm (in this latter regard, the point of creation radiating from the “Blue Star” Rigel). My good friend Rami Sadji in Jordan occasionally incorporates in his work some of my akashic material, as a basis for his research and own intuitive perspectives. On a page in his website he writes about the “Star-Trinity” of Orion, the Pleiades and Sirius (based on material in my old Source / Temple Doors archives). He also gives some interesting information that I feel relates to Thoth’s perspective on Rex Mundi The Orion Constellation, 'Al Jabbar', occupies the mid-way of the heavens during the Winter Solstice (Dec.21-Dec.25 ) of each year. And during this time Orion takes a standing position in the mid night skies at mid night. It is suggested that in the Winter Solstice, the energies in the region will be at peak emission. This occurs during each Winter Solstice within which the period of Grace or Golden Mean is reached. This Grace period was also called the ''Osiris Gate.'' According to my insights, Thoth has written in his akashic library : The esoteric figure of Rex Mundi both masks and contains within it, the universal dynamic of AWAKENING in the human being to his/her PURE GEM body, which is the complete hologram of gnosis contained within all substance and being in the universes created through the El’ohim. In this context as ‘Rex Mundi’, both the Twin Flame Light Bearers (Christ and Lucifer) are combined in a non-dualistic whole cosmology of Perfection and Light, suspended upon the cross of immolation in the Flame of Burning Love, offering eternal regeneration of the light geometries, as they become more and more brilliant in the Fire of Love. This is the greatest act of the Phoenix–that through the cyclic movement of the spiral, one comes to the moment of awareness that the spiral is only the springboard of immediate and complete translation of the form AND consciousness into the torus of perpetual harmony, where no ebb and flow is necessary in order to sustain Presence. Thoth’s record also tells us that human form is present in this reality which we claim as “real” where universal streaming lines of “Creational Light Language” intersect. Out of this intersection, not only does the soul express it’s forms (various ones on multiple levels of Creation), but also it’s worlds and associate accommodations for other living forms, such as plants and animals. Each organized system is brought into form through streaming lines of Light Language, but the human being (and all beings that are generated from the ‘Kadmon’ template, from whence our ‘Adam Kadmon’ template is spawned) sets the stage, the arena, for the world in which the planet and it’s nature inhabitants gather and are formed from resonate intersecting creational streamings. The positioning and geo-magnetic properties of an ensouled planet are key to it’s ‘Rex Mundi’ dynamic, for it is from and to this point in space-time that the forms take shape in the ‘physical’ and evolve as the soul moves through it’s procession in development. Rex Mundi, the King of the World, is also the Bearer of the Cup of Transfiguration, in which the human being moves through stages of his own duality until he reaches a platform in which he assumes in a specific and dedicated way, the “Wound of the World.” Through this embodiment, he becomes the “Wounded King / Healer” of Grail lore, whose wound is born for the world. Through his glorious act of crucifixion and transfiguration upon the cross of this gnosis which has become his Bodhisattva vow (hyperlink to definition...enclosed below), he heals others who touch his wounds of Light. It is then that the Wounded Healer is transformed into Rex Mundi, for he has now overcome his own creation (the world) to be exalted in the Phoenix Flame of pure Illumination. What sets him free? His becoming (with complete presence) the gnosis that all wounds are only love longing to be illumined in the heart. The cosmic / world dynamic of Rex Mundi is an important aspect of the “Solar Mysteries”. The Solar Mysteries trace the soul’s development and evolution through the rays of the “Great Solar Cosom”, which is the center of the creative font and from which all sun-stars gain their Presence of Living Light, or what we know in our World Myth as “angelic” beings and realms (which would also include related categories such as the Jinn). The Light Language streamings which intersect the Adam Kadmon and from whence our humanity is formed, are issued from the constellation of Orion (regardless of from what Star Tribe that particular incarnating soul may originate). Thus, Rex Mundi is very much an “Orion figure” in that he (ie, this universal dynamic) strikes the balance of the Gate of Orion in the universe. In the 21st century it is my belief that we are being infused with codes of the New Earth Hologram which will enable us to more fully enter and receive the higher level Light Language of the ‘Rex Mundi’ dynamic. It is the Phi Crystalline Geometries now coming into our realm and being that offer us the next state of evolution through the Light Language they contain in their crystalline codes.

# Rex Mundi

With the assistance of the Amatrix Angels we will be better prepared for full receipt for the New Birth that awaits us. The path that led me into a deeper akashic exploration of Rex Mundi came about recently, when I wished to create an art work on the symbolic association of the Wounded King / Healer with the life and continued archetypal presence of Elvis Presley, who was and still is a major catalytic spiritual figure for me in my life and personal spiritual development. I began with the art, as I often do now (with the written translations coming afterward). As the art evolved, it brought me to the more complete symbol of Rex Mundi, who is as mis-understood as is Elvis Presley! In my Rex Mundi art series, you’ll notice that ‘Rex’ looks a bit like...well, you-know-who.

# Crystals Available - Fredaricka

Dedicated Lightworker
Fredaricka Yarom of Israel has access to crystals from China, Tibet
and South Africa, among other locations around the world. Many of these
crystals are quite unique. Through me, Thoth has identified a certain type
of crystal from China and Tibet as
GATE OF LOKI.
Another channel calls them "calchelsite."
Fredaricka has donated many crystals to
Spirit Heart Sanctuary for use in planetary and personal (my healing) energy
work. (see my
Sacred Things galleries 2 &3)
I have set up a gallery of Fredaricka's
currently available crystals, linked to this page (below). It would be best to make
a 1st, 2nd and 3rd choice in the event that she has already sold some which
are pictured here. Since they are mostly grouped together in the
photographs, you will need to identify your choices. Example: "1st gallery
image, from left to right on fourth row, 2nd crystal."
Also, it would be best to
contact Fredaricka
by e-mail first with your crystal selections, before sending her funds by
mail. You will find the pricing accompanying the images in her gallery. Her
mailing address is on her "contact" form.
HOW TO SEND FUNDS: Fredaricka
prefers that you send her U.S. cash, or the equivalent in British
Sterling or Euro through the mail. Wrap in in two
sheets of paper or a card. If for some reason she does NOT receive your
mailed funds, she will still send you your order.
Thoth has given me special
Seraphi Codes
to be programmed into these crystals Fredaricka is offering. I sent these
codes to her and she has charged the crystals with them, following
instructions as given by Thoth. Each "type" (ie, Greenery Grid, Stellar
Grid, etc.) has it's own encoding.

# Seraphi Personal Profiles

Your Seraphi Personal Profile will be
determined by Maia through her Source Translations from Thoth. It will be placed on the
Seraphi Personal Profile Template (shown above without path numbers) and sent to you in a PDF file (5 pages), which will
also contain information on the Pymander Seraphi Personal Profile Program
in general as well as your personal "Path Sequences."
Your Personal Seraphi Profile will include four Personal Seraphi Path Sequences as follows: Venus Path (Earth Guardian) / Earth Atoma Path (Holy of Holies) / Solar Path (Living Angelic Light's Home) / Galactic Center Path (Holographic Galactic Genesis Field). These will be expressed on the above shown Seraphi Programs radionics template like this example demonstrates: 4529.7639.8884.4444.
You will also receive a bit of information on each of these Seraphi Paths, what it means, and information on how to best work with them.
For related information on this program
please read THOTH ON
THE PYMANDER'S SERAPHI PROGRAM (including all links in text on that
page).

about about 1 - 4 weeks
