# Priestess Oracles

Through the bonding of this couple (both sexually and spiritually), the oracle was given a means to ground her vision into the physical world. The consort created a knowledge form that polished the pure essence the oracle received. The inner intricacies of this procedure are far beyond present day esoteric perspective, nor am I at liberty to discuss the innermost workings of these sacred and magical rites. Yet it needs to be understood that the sexual aspect of these relationships was far removed from the consciousness of carnal sexuality. Nor was physical sexual interaction the major definition of the magical practice. The priestess oracle and the priest consort worked outwardly in specific roles as well. Sometimes the oracle would speak directly to the Temple, but never to the masses. Always when communicating to the masses, and often within the function of the Temple, the oracle would connect her source flow into the essence and being of her consort who would then be the one to speak the oracle's truth. In later periods this process was altered somewhat, with the consort silently focusing the frequency of the oracle's receipt on the cellular level, thereby grounding it into the human element so that as the oracle spoke her message, it was more comprehensible on the feeling level. With the take over by the male priests of the Melchizedek Temple in Lemuria and later in Atlantis, most of the female oracles who had not been killed receded into caverns of solitude far from the newly formed patriarchy present at the Temple complexes. Yet as age turned into age, and both Lemuria and Atlantis were plunged into the seas, so the female oracles once again brought their Light Seed into the Temples. In this period, they were mostly remnant Temple Cities of Atlantis, such as on the Isle of the Sun in Lake Titicaca, Peru, and the Bimini Islands in the Atlantic. While there were some exceptions, the priestess oracles in this post Atlantean age seldom included males in their practice, nor were there many male oracles. The few that existed then, were considered Mages by title and seen as a different sort of spiritual facilitator, more along the lines of a magical instructor. Most priestess oracles in this age were understandably touchy about placing males in any position of power within their realm. These women were the original Sea Priestesses, the Stella Maris (stars of the sea) which appeared in the legends of future civilizations such as the Greeks, Romans and Celts. The next age of the oracle found itself spreading into the largely unpopulated and dense forest regions of Europe and Asia after the post Atlantean Temple oracles had reached their zenith. The European-Asian oracle was also mostly female (there were more frequent exceptions in this period), although men were brought into the sacred procedure as consorts once again. These oracles built no Temples unto themselves, instead integrating their spirit and magic with nature in the sacred groves and mountain recesses. However, they were often called upon to preside in certain services within the monolithic structures of the period, those sacred Temples of galactic resonance. By Cassandra's time, oracles had become fashionable to the masses. The enclave at Delphi in Greece had once been a remote oracle cavern complex that served only those who would have been guided by spirit and persistence to find them. As the oracle trend developed, Delphi became as popular as a current day tourist attraction, but with implications of power and rulership attached to its destiny. If the people believed in and acted on the messages of the oracles, so it stood to reason that those who sought power by controlling the people, would seek to also control the oracles. Thus, the insidious internal struggle began. It was at first resisted, but just as a single raindrop at a time can eventually wear away a granite boulder, so Delphi like many sacred oracle shrines, finally succumbed to the debacle of entertainment concealing a more lustful design. Originally, a true priestess oracle was not solely restricted to prophecy, but was a vehicle for a wide range of wisdom and insight. In fact, foretelling the future was seldom incorporated in their speakings'. Only when it was deemed granted by the divine beings with which they communed, could the oracles speak with the tongue of forecast. It was understood that too much prophecy interfered with the co-creative aspect of human spiritual evolution. Planetary events were more likely revealed than were individual destinies. The first Lemurian and then Atlantean oracles focused their power and intent mostly through the movement and configuration of the stars. This is not to say that they were astrologers, although this knowledge was a part of their learning process. These priestess oracles worked directly with the dynamics of the star fields, the energies moving through the Universe, only a small portion of which can be determined through astrology. As oracles became more connected to the Earth in the post Atlantean period (most especially in the European-Asian phase), they aligned more with the natural ley lines of the Earth, and the purpose for which they could better incorporate them in their whole dynamic. They never abandoned the stars, nor were the most ancient oracles unconscious of the Earth, but there was a definite shift of major focus through the ages. Largely, this was due to the female having been cast out of the star Temples by the radical priests of Melchizedek. Thus, she sought an even greater connection with her primal Mother. She literally burrowed herself into sacred ground to find the healing and nourishment she had been denied by the male usurpation of the star consciousness. There are many sacred cavern areas on the planet that once were the womb centers for priestess oracles. These were no ordinary caves however, each contained a special interaction with a planetary power zone. They were therefore often geologically active places. Norma Lorre Goodrich writes in her book, Priestesses': "Chasms above all, are fearsome places. Delphi is chasm, precipice, dark mountainside, murderous sun, with eagle's shadows overhead. Delphi soars, appears out of nowhere, is a navel situated, as were most oracular shrines, near the sea....The Oracle's dark, prophetic cave must always have felt like a shrine so awesome that the feet can only stumble over worn white squares. The eyes can afford only a quick glance now and then up to the darkness of the cliff sides." From Manly P. Hall, in The Secret Teachings of All Ages': "The most famous oracles of antiquity were those of Delphi, Dodona, Torphonius, and Latona, of which the talking oak trees of Dodona were the oldest. Though it is impossible to trace back to the genesis of the theory of oracular prophecy, it is known that many of the caves and fissures set aside by the Greeks as oracles were sacred long before the Greek culture. The oracle of Apollo at Delphi remains one of the unsolved mysteries of the ancients. Alexander Wilder derives the name Delphi from delphos, the womb.

# Priestess Oracles

This name was chosen by the Greeks because of the shape of the cavern and the vent leading into the depths of the Earth....Some believe that the Delphic fissure was discovered by a Hyperborean priest, but as far back as recorded history goes the cave was sacred....For many centuries during its early history, virgin maidens were consecrated to the service of the oracle. They were called the Phoebades, or Pythiae, and constituted that famous order know known as the Pythian priesthood. "Iamblichus, in his dissertation on The Mysteries, describes how the spirit of the oracle - a fiery daemon, Daemon' is a nature or elemental being, and does not denote the same meaning as does the word demon'. Even Apollo himself - took control of the Pythoness and manifested through her: But the prophetess in Delphi, whether she gives oracles to mankind through an attenuated and fiery spirit, bursting from the mouth of the cavern; or whether being seated on the adytum on a brazen tripod, on a stool with four feet, she becomes sacred to the God; whichsoever of these is the case, she entirely gives herself up to a divine spirit, and is illuminated with a ray of divine fire. And when, indeed, fire ascending from the mouth of the cavern circularly invests her in collected abundance, she becomes filled from it with a divine splendor. But when she places herself on the seat of the God, she becomes co-adapted to his stable prophetic power: and from both of these preparatory operations she's become wholly possessed by the God. And then, indeed, he is present with and illuminates her in a separate manner, and is different from the fire, the spirit, the proper seat, and in short, from all the visible apparatus of the place, whether physical or sacred.' "Serpents were much in evidence at the oracle of Delphi. The base of the tripod upon which the Pythia sat was formed of the twisted bodies of three gigantic snakes." The serpent (and dragon) in most ancient times, was a representation of the primal Mother Earth. However, with the assuming of male dominance in religion, the symbology of the serpent was changed to suit the patriarchal dismemberment of the Goddess, and thus, the serpent became the power that must be vanquished beneath the heel of the God. In conquering' the serpent, so the Delphic oracle sanctuary demonstrated to its following the power of their Gods to overcome the Old Religion of the original priestess oracles. As Earlyne Chaney writes in Lost Secrets of the Mystery Schools': "The image of the kundalini or primal force of the serpent goddess was very much evident at most oracle and school sites "Serpents carved in stone were very conspicuous in the sacred cave (at Delphi), which again alerts us to the realization that the cave had much to do with transformation of consciousness and raising the kundalini." Although many eons have passed and the priestess oracle has undergone a de-evolution of her role through time, her true essence remains in the consciousness of the Earth. The age is upon her once again to come forth into the world. What is the pure essence' of a true priestess oracle, whether it be one of ancient Atlantis, or one in our current New Age' cycle? Tehuti's definition is revealed as follows: "Firstly, a priestess oracle is in her fullness when she is receptive to the balance of duality, able to accept her role as a feminine receptor to be integrated and grounded through the masculine charge. In other words, the role of the consort should not be shut away. This does not imply that every female oracle must have a male partner in the consort role, but that she must be receptive to this principle and open to the possible experience in her life." The application of balance in duality is also seen in the oracle's embrace of both masculine (God) and feminine (Goddess) root consciousness in her Work. Her highest watermark of achievement should be one of integrity. Many outside forces are forever active around and within her, consciously and unconsciously, magnetically attempting to pull her focus toward the lower desires of others or self. To remain centered in the pure streaming of the source is the one essential principle that must be adhered to by the oracle, both female and male alike. Yet her focus is not austere. Rigidity has no place in one who administers to others, whether it is in the manner of physical healing, or as with the oracle, spiritual revelation. The oracle in her truest role, must find her heart to be the innermost Temple of her passage to the Otherworld. She must connect that heart centered consciousness to the Earth through her ability to be compassionate to the emotions of those for whom she divines, without becoming entangled within their lower desirous forms. She needs to recognize that although her gift is of a divine nature, she is still within the human element, and therefore subject to her own process of evolution. Only by clearly defining what that process is for her, may she be able to operate as a clear receptor to the source. The true oracle refrains from over prophesying, especially concerning individual destinies. She maintains a sense of absolute discernment as to when such an insertion into the personal and world consciousness on that level should take place, so as not to offset the delicate co-creative balance within the human condition. The Akashic records tell us that at Ephesus in ancient Turkey, the priestess oracles were descendants of the Amazons, the original founders of the Temple City. It was the custom of the Amazons to take into individual families a foster child from the Temple. Thus at Ephesus, a young girl being groomed by the Temple as an oracle, would live with a foster family of the city from the age of 12 to 16, so that she would know the sorrow and suffering in the world and not be set apart from it. By the age of 12, most of these young girls had been Temple-raised' since their fourth or fifth year, and thus were well on their way to being molded into their roles. Yet lest they become too sculpted with otherworldly ways, they were to live five years of their lives within the world they would one day serve as oracles. They still received training during this period, primarily focusing upon the goal of integrating spirit and matter. The current day oracle is unlikely to have undergone such conscious training in her life. Yet all oracles have received instruction through a combination of past life experience, inner plane development and Otherworld guides and mentors. We are moving ever closer to what Tehuti calls the New Earth Star', which is that next step in our spiritual evolution, when we ascend or break through the veil of this current reality to reestablish the Kingdom of Heaven on Earth. As we progress toward this transcending point Tehuti calls LP-40', the priestess oracle's role will become more akin to the most ancient doctrines of her service on the planet. The beginning and the end of all things stem from the one sourcing.

# Priestess Oracles

Yet the priestess oracle will also reveal a new face, upturned to star patterns never seen before by this world, and the dynamics they insert into our field of cognition. The Earth under our feet will shiver in the coming dawn of a new wonder, and the priestess oracles will be among those whose sensitivity to the greater truth within, will be the way showers for many. Of course, as humanity further integrates with their individual God-Selves, each will become his / her own oracle. This occurrence will truly be rejoiced by those Radiant Ones who have had to speak through the select few to the all through so many ages of time. It will then become evident that the voice within' is the harmonic of a Universal knowing which transcends even the need for the Masters themselves as our guiding lights.

# Saint Brigid

|
Patron Saint of RITE OF AVALON
|
Symbols:
the White Dove, the Rose, the Holy Cup, the Shepherd's Staff,
Hearth, Sacred Well
Keywords:
Fecundity, Compassion, Nurturing, Well-Being, Mystic Vision,
Illumination
Elements: The
Sacred Four (Fire, Water, Earth & Air)
"In 1993 the fire was
symbolically re-lit, and a light from that flame now burns in
Solas Bhride community, established by a group of Brigidine sisters
who are bringing 'Brigid' back to Kildare. The fire is kept burning
and is tended by these women today.
"This fifth century
woman was a strong, compassionate and delightful person with a
special love for the poor, and a deep sense of learning and culture.
The memory with a commitment of Brigid is currently undergoing a
revival and renewal, not only in Ireland, but also among religious
women and others in North America, Canada, Scandinavia, Africa,
Holland, here in Australia and many other countries across the world.
"...as we move into a
new millennium, Brigid is again revealed as threshold woman, lighting
our way along the path of justice and renewal across the earth."
- Gail Donovan, 02/2000
Gail
Donovan
Ode to Brighde
by Maia Christianne
Brighde, guide me to thy Holy Ground where
still, twixt and 'tween the veils of time, thy temple doth arise.
Offer me thy waters sweet with wisdom poured
from the Christed Cup; and I, a servant of His flock shall drink from
this proffered dish sublime.
Who shall stand beside me when all the flowers
dim and die,
and every tree is bared and glazed with wintery bones of ice and
storm?
Who shall sooth my brow at night, when light
evades my weary eyes, and life is drawn from the sap to break the
bough of time?
Come to me then, Mother of the Well, and tend my
tattered mind. Shake me gently from my sleep and lift me to thy flame,
That I shall wake and follow thee, back into the
hills,
where all the Children are gathered 'round thy skirts,
and sun and moon doth join as one, about thy golden hair.
Never shall I stray again when I return to thee
in the Land of Avalon.
WOMEN OF THE AVALON SHIELD, gather
about the Sacred Flame in the Temple of Brighde. What do
you see in the Flame? What is your heart's desire to serve the
Light? Look not to the "doing" but the
"being" of the service. How does it sing to thee?
As Keepers of the Flame, so you must come to know that nothing
is too little or to great to feed the Flame. Move to that space within
you that embraces the TRUTH of your soul. Pad unshod, down the silent
halls in the glow of candlelight to the one place in your Heart that
opens to the Sun. When you do, so there shall you stand,
unadorned and FREE from all contrivances that limit your experience of
the Divine.

# Cassandra - Prophetess of Troy

The historical Cassandra was
indeed the daughter of Priam and Hecuba, the King and
Queen of Troy. She was a seer, who as a child had been visited
by a serpent in her visions and told she would foresee the doom
of her people. However, according to my akashic insights, she
did not murdered in Mycenae, but managed to escape to Delphi in
Greece, where she became a Delphic Oracle for a short period of
time.
When she was commanded by the
political power of that age to give false prophecies, she
refused. A band of soldiers came to Delphi with the purpose of
arresting her. At that point she ran and flung herself of a
cliff, rather than become their prisoner.
It would seem that Cassandra
had a sad life and tragic ending, but she maintained a deep
belief in the Spirit that guided her, and in this she was able
to taste of the eternal spring of joy at times when it seemed
that the world had abandoned her.
For the mythology of
Cassandra, see
Wikidepedia.

# Tribe of the Moon

I am a healing light that comes from my center
and expands into all around me.
I am a fire in the night, a cool stream in the
heat of day. I feel the growth of new life as the seeds burst to the surface
with their greening potential.
Vines follow the natural inclination of my body
and bud in the recesses of each curve of my heart.
The hawk is my sight, the rabbit my tenderness,
the doe my graceful right to "be."
I walk tall with the bear and move as one with
the shadows of the forest like my brother fox.
I sing the lone song of the swan and the keening
laughter of the coyote.
I am the sleekness and sureness of the cat as it
stretches in the sun, a smile of mousing dreams buried mischievously in its
silky whiskers.
The dog pads softly beside my heal, sensitive to
my every move, for it is my own longing for union that weaves his dream.
A thousand eyes I have, all seeing the dream from
different places, coming together as one truth in my heart. I am from the Tribe
of the Moon, reflecting the golden rays of the sun into all the sacred places of
the earth...the earthen body that I dwell within.
Sparrow, come nest in me, for my branches are
strong and safe for you.
Lion, eat my flesh, for the more you devour of
me, the stronger we both grow.
Dolphin, I call you from the deep. My waters
are warm and sunlit and my current sure and rhythmic against your smooth body.
I circle, I enfold, yet I am always an open hand.
I am the dream you create of me and the truth that never wavers. I AM YOUR SOUL.

# New Earth Life Pulse

The New Earth Life
Pulse is a message to you at this time in your life from
a future incarnation of your soul in the
New
Earth Star state of being.
While it
is usually only one to two pages in length, it contains a
powerful input, directed through me by my inner-planes
mentor,
Illuminari ThothHorRa, with whom I have have
been consciously in contact since 1977. He forms a
bridge for me to a future self of YOU. The New Earth
incarnation begins to connect more deeply and
consciously with the current you. Through me (in the
written session) She/he gives you the first link and
understanding, so that the connection can continue and
go deeper. In conclusion is imparted what you need to
know on your current “event horizon” and how you maybe
develop this understanding and direction toward
encompassing all your Being and moving yourself forward
on your New Earth Path.
The “Life Pulse” as Thoth chooses to call it, is
not just information. It is a
transmission.
It begins when you write to me requesting your Life
Pulse (when I receive your order). When you receive
and read the written information - especially if you do so in a clear and
restful space (more than one or two times) you will be
activated on key levels to adjust your frequency to
face-match with your New Earth Path.
It may be
as long as three weeks from the time you order your Life
Pulse until the time you receive it. Sometimes this is
due to backlog of sessions, but usually not. It is most
often that Thoth is not ready to give this to you right
away. He explains to me that you make the choice
followed by the effort, to engage your “Life Pulse” -
subliminally he begins to work with you – adjusting your
frequency to match your universal pulse (which is your
hologram of the greater universal pulse). When he is
ready for you to receive the next stage, which is your
written page...then he gives it to me. (To some extent,
this holds true for all the activational material I
offer.)
* * * * * * *
Response
to a New Earth Life Pulse:
This is "spot on" for me! Thank
you so much. I had a soul mate, a white poodle, with me
in this lifetime who was quite foxy with a long lean
nose and I have always admired foxes! So I can relate to
this animal as well as to the She-Leopard. The messages
for me are exactly what I needed to hear and the
exercises just right.
With Love and Gratitude,
Alison

# Nepal Matri Griha

|
|
Nepal Matri Griha (Nepal Mother Home) is a Non-governmental Organization, dedicated to provide shelter, food, health and education to under-privileged children, as:
Nepal Matri Griha was founded out of an emergency situation. A group of 20 needy children were badly juggled in the hands of three different guardian organizations and lived in pitiable conditions.
Ms. Shobha Rai, a young Nepali Social Worker, was close to the children during that period. After having seen what the children had gone through, she decided to open Matri Griha.
The motivation was to help the children in providing them a safe and reliable place to stay and to create an atmosphere in which the children feel at home.
Matri Griha started in February 2000 with seven children in a basic house at Gangabu-5, Kathmandu.
OUR AIMS VISION AND BELIEF
Nepal Matri Griha firmly believes that underprivileged children are the weakest people in our society and need our help. They are children at risk, often belonging to poor communities, deprived of basic health, shelter and education.
We believe that helping these children is a moral and humanitarian duty.
We are convinced that through our approach these children will be able to find their own way in life. We consider it is our responsibility to reach this goal.
OUR OBJECTIVES
You will find several photos of the children in Nepal. I am also including information concerning direct deposit to the account in Nepal. A second method which I use often is via Western Union. I find this simple even though there is a small fee, it is direct and they are always "delighted" to pick up the funds to help out and it is very near to them. so please note the following information and use-post as guided. Feel free to share with anyone. I am guided to send you a little news letter posting concerning my trip there, which someone may wish to read along the way if you post it on the site. Again, I trust in your guidance within so, here below are the (3) three ways to contact and (2) ways to send a donation or gift as guided from within.

# Rainbow Bridge Update - 2006

UPDATE (2006) THE RAINBOW BRIDGE A PLACE FOR CHILDREN OF ALL AGES by Erika De Bly, in Holland First of all I would like to say thanks to all of you who have given us a response to the information on this website. It is great that we get this opportunity to share our experiences with those interested in a different approach towards education in different parts of the world. Especially for the last half year we have received a lot of emails from parents and facilitators sharing their experiences with children and telling us about the urge to start a place like The Rainbow Bridge. Meeting Point A lot has happened since the article about The Rainbow Bridge was placed on the website. With no funding anymore to pay for the monthly income of the facilitators the school closed at the end of 2003. The children went to different schools and doing well as far as we know. They sometimes ask when The Rainbow Bridge is coming back. The facilitators have either gone back working with children in the system using the experiences at the time of The Rainbow Bridge and some of them are working out their process to find out what their dream is. I (Erika) am at home with all the signs of a burn-out which is my way to go through this part of my process to find the rainbow bridge within myself. But it seems that the process of The Rainbow Bridge is a continuing story. And that’s what it is all about the process and not about a goal in itself. I would like to share these experiences of this process with you. Why? After a while I was confronted with “spiritual projects” of friends who experienced the same kind of situations during the time they were or are working with their particular project. While sharing ins and outs I realized that they were going through the same steps as we did. Everyone gets the opportunity to work out processes alone or with each other. They come and go, stay or return at a certain time. For me it was all part of my journey to find out that it was ok what had happened during the years The Rainbow Bridge was a school and that the time was right to close. It seems that we all get our own project's). It was and is a learning process and a beautiful gift which was given to us all. When we started in Holland there were no other educational initiatives with the same intention at the time. Our journey was one of trial and error and most of all of trust in the way the children were guiding us. A new direction We all want to move into a new direction. Many of the old paradigms of education are changing in the light of new knowledge. The children being born today will force changes in the system simply by being unable to adapt to schools in their present form. Many teachers experience the same thing. Parents are confronted with children getting sick because they feel isolated and not understood. It seems to happen in many countries all over the world. The magazine Children of the New Earth keeps us updated about what is new or different in the field of education, health & nutrition, parenting, among other things, in different places of the planet. What is the new direction? It were the parents or children through the parents asking to start a private initiative. I felt guided to do so and meet the right people to work together. Just like I felt guided to organize the WESAK children's festival (see part I). I cannot explain how this happens. The feeling is there like an inner-knowing. What I did not know and did not realize is that meeting the right people is one thing. The confrontation with everybody’s processes including my own, recognizing and dealing with it is another thing. I knew intuitively what was happening although I did not have any references. When I start talking about it and tried to explain what was going on hardly anybody could follow me. Everybody was so pre-occupied with what was going on. For me it also was a whole new situation and I had to learn how to cope with it. Now I know that by going through an experience you are aware of that particular situation and you understand. I have also learned that we can only proceed when we act as one, when we are working together and everyone involved takes responsibility for his or her part of the project. Together we share responsibility for the whole project. During the years it became clear that The Rainbow Bridge is one of those places where people meet and get the chance to work on their own processes. The children were and are the mirrors most of the time. Mirrors of Love, Peace, Compassion, Joy, Abundance……….They asked for guidance to learn about the world on planet earth and to get advice about using their spiritual tools being human. But most of all they needed to be recognized for who they really are. Communication At the time we invited a trainer to give a reading and healing course for facilitators and parents. When you are together with the children lots of them communicate directly through energy in ways we still have to learn and/or re-member. For example through colour(s), sound(s), scent(s), emotion/feeling telepathically. It is also important to keep the place clean energetically. I know of a school in Russia where children or adults after having been in contact with the outerworld cleansed their aura’s upon return. In an article by Mary Bell Nyman about ‘Raising Psychic children’ examples are given from the time the children’s psychic pre-schools and elementary schools Yin Yang in Berkeley and San Jose, California still existed. The schools closed in the early 1990’s. All the teachers were unique in that they were all trained in clairvoyance and completed a minimum three years of training as a clairvoyant healer and psychic reader. The teachers were the guides and the children the creators. The teachers communicated with the spirit of the child and acknowledged the free will of each spirit and what their spiritual intent was for this lifetime. Children were not taught how to be psychic – they already were! Teachers were trained to use their psychic tools to create a safe haven for children where they could use their natural psychic abilities. The children were also trained in the academic areas of math, reading, writing, science, language, socialization skills, and problem solving. Allowing children space and permission to grow and have all the knowledge they acquired from past lives, in their present body, was an essential part of the process at Yin Yang. Teachers served as spiritual guides who helped the children discover and enhance their spiritual autonomy and communication with the Source (God, Spirit….). Each morning, as a child said good-bye to his parents at the classroom door, he learned to make spiritual separations. This meant pulling his energy out of his parents’ space, allowing them to have their day, and also sending the parents’ energy back to them, from his space. Children disconnected by putting their parents’ energy in an imaginary soap bubble and releasing their energy with an “I love you, Mom, I love you, Dad, see you later,” and popping it. They used an imaginary magnet to call their energy back from their parents’ space as well. Before entering the classroom, the child learned to ground and match the energy set for the day. This allows any foreign energy to be released, making it easy for the child to be present inside her body.

# Rainbow Bridge Update - 2006

When children matched the energy of the school, it meant matching a vibration set for permission to learn and discover themselves. This vibration was usually a color. This allowed the child to separate from home and say "hello" to school, being present in the moment. At the Rainbow Bridge the facilitators meditated in the morning and cleansed the place and set the energy for the day. Sometimes there were parents who joined them. The children choose not to meditate. We were on our way to do games with children to learn to ground, cleanse their energy and protect their aura bubble. Sometimes using Aura Soma essences with all the beautiful colors and lovely scents. Not all the children were open to participate yet. When I worked with a child on an individual basis it was a combination of energy work and cognitive work in a playful way. During the time I had my private practice, prior to the school, the children started to teach me and they still do. At times I felt lonely and not understood. I can remember the conversations I had with Steve Rother (The Group) about the school. He used to say: “I know you want to meet the other old Indigo’s so you can facilitate this project together and understand each other. I am sorry but they are still working within the system, they are not ready yet.“ So I had to go through the whole process by myself to recognize and learn how the process is actually working. I had to find out what the key is. This might sound familiar to you. I learned to trust deeper and deeper and deeper. I learned that everything has a deeper meaning and is ok. I learned that LOVE is the keyword. I learned that all I had to do was just be. I learned what it means to be in Service. This year I learned what it is in depth to let go of old patterns and come closer to my pure Self. The process is still going on and I am still learning. On a deeper level I know how it is working. I am becoming more and more aware of it. And so facilitators were coming and going; children were coming and going; parents and facilitators loved you or hated you; trusted you or distrusted you. And the children….. I dare say that they felt The Rainbow Bridge was the right place for them. We had situations that parents took their children from school, because it was too much for them, started their own place, failed and came back. There were parents who stood right behind me/us and children who are thankful for the time they spent with us; there were parents who did not communicate directly to us and used the newspaper to get to us. I realize now it is all part of the game. One of the parents told me lately that her daughter (12 years now) recently mentioned (in her own words) that “Children at The Rainbow Bridge were light already. They did not need a school anymore. The parents made a fool of themselves.” I talked to the parent to look behind the words and we both realized she is right. When the mother asked how the school should look like. She did not know. I understand because it is not about a school but a haven where children may grow and develop their talents in their own way. The environment of the school and we were not ready (like the article I referred to about the Yin Yang school) yet. The intention was there and we certainly have planted a seed. Not everybody was fully aware what it meant to be a spiritual guide. The intention we have for the future (whenever) is starting a center for children in the age of 0-100+ and not a school. It is more a center of consciousness. Vision Unity in Diversity The Rainbow Bridge is a private initiative with a different approach and contents towards education. A dynamic center created by and for children in the age of 0 – 100+. The center is a bridge between people, organizations, religions and nationalities Inside and outside The Rainbow Bridge, where all hundred colours of the rainbow are One. The Vision that everybody is unique is central to the daily processes of learning through experience . The facilitators serve as spiritual guides and the children are the creators, masters in the art of living. I do not mean to offend parents or people working with children by saying it is you who need to go to school. It is of great importance to open up and learn about who your/these children are and who you are. The Third Wave If we look into the history of education and now I restrict myself to Europe, we see that during the medieval ages the first convent schools were in service of the church. Before that time children were considered small adults. Philosophers of the 18th century discovered the child as a child. They pretended a special place for young people, separated from the worries of the adults. The other side of the coin was: the child was protected from the social reality, relieved from his own responsibility. Children were raised by keeping them small. There were pedagogues like Jean-Jacques Rousseau who came with theories about the development of a child. During the 19th century the attention was drawn to children. Professor Lea Dasberg (University of Amsterdam, Holland) speaks of three waves of emancipation of the child in her book ‘Grootbrengen door kleinhouden als historisch verschijnsel’ (1984). “In 1750 the first emancipation of the child was showing a wave with the emphasis from society to the child; the second emancipation after the second world war was showing a wave from the child back to society. The Third Wave where the emphasis is neither only on the child nor only on society but is showing the integration of the two hasn’t been realized (yet). “ Are the children of today showing us the Way?? Like Jesus said: Follow the children! A crop circle ‘The Third Wave’ was reported in August 2001 in Knap Hill, Wiltshire England and has been drawn as a hologram by Janosh. with the translation: makes you aware of your choice to be here on Earth. For me the Third Wave reflects the meaning of what it is to live from the Heart. The Heart meaning the pure connection with our true! Nature. Many children of different ages reflect this way of living. For us to listen, observe and recognize what they are telling us. It is about a shift from consciousness to awareness. Breaking the Walls The world as it is today is one of rules and regulations, power and control, fear and chaos. We built it ourselves. We have come a long way from home. Aren’t we supposed to be the guardians of this beautiful water planet? Have we forgotten? It looks like it and the children of today are reminding us. They have come to help us change the web of social structures and ideas of what society needs. They change the ideas about parenting and the way we will earn our living. They are here to restructure old believe systems. The children create a new way of living, a new structure in greater harmony with the direction in which the human evolution is moving. They are breaking the walls. That’s what has to be done when we really want to change our way of living into one of Love and Peace. Right now these children have to live according to the present system to which they cannot adapt.

# Rainbow Bridge Update - 2006

They will create new ‘systems’ of living who will not force them to change their way of living. They open the door for us to help re-connect to our true Self. It is a difficult but challenging time for parents. Specially if they try to raise them according to old patterns of this disharmonic society. They follow the upbringing of their parents and try to pass on these patterns and believe systems. I love the way Kahlil Gibran used to say in his poem: Your children are not your children They are the sons and daughters of Life’s longing for itself They come through you but not from you And though they are with you, yet they belong not to you You may give them your love but not your thoughts For they have their own thoughts You may house their bodies but not their souls For their souls dwell in the house of tomorrow Which you cannot visit, not even in your dreams You may strive to be like them, but seek not to make them like you For life goes not backward nor tarries with yesterday You are the bows from which your children as living arrows are sent forth The archer sees the mark upon the path of the infinite, and he bends you, With his might that his arrow may go swift and far Let your bending in the archer’s hand be for gladness For even he loves the arrow that flies So he loves also the bow that is stable. Law and Order In Holland the whole educational system is falling apart. Because a lot of children cannot adapt anymore to the present situation private initiatives appear and more and more parents choose for home schooling. The Ministry of Education is not happy about this. In our constitution there is an article speaking about Freedom of Education. The founding of a private school and home schooling are neither prohibited nor permitted in the legislation regarding education. Because there is an increase of initiatives and of parents choosing for home schooling over the last five years the Ministry wants to adjust the legislation in a way that they get more power and control. When we founded The Rainbow Bridge in 2000 we only had to do with the Inspection of Education of our municipality. Today you have to make a request to the Ministry of Education. The Law with regard to inspection of the schools is being extended (???) for private schools and probably also home schooling. It is probably part of the process. We are in the middle of it and trying to find our way. I am curious how this process unfolds in other countries. Children as advisors We have always been careful giving names like indigo’s, crystals, new age children, starchildren etcetera to the children. There are so many different interpretations of the names depending on which articles or books you read. If you ask children ‘Are you a …..’ most of the time they do not like to be named like that. Once at a presentation when a girl was asked the question if she was a new age child she answered ‘No I am an old soul’. I once heard a story from a man who used to live with the indigenous people of the Amazon river for a long time. It seems that when a child is born they know when it is an old soul, which they call a Day-1 child or a young soul. A Day-1 child has been on earth from the very first day humanity was part of this planet. These beings carry all the information about the history of Mother Earth. In different countries there are these beautiful souls sitting on the front row with messages for the world. Do you remember the boy in South Africa who was HIV-infected and addressed the audience of a conference on Aids just before his death? It was broadcasted all over the world. How about this young boy in the United States who has his own organization and speaks with the great leaders of the world about world problems in relation to children. The other day I read an article in the newspaper of the area where I live in Haarlem near Amsterdam. There is this daughter of a congressman who told her daddy: When do you people finally start listening more to children? He took her seriously and started a competition for children of preliminary schools called “Because children are magicians, something can change in Haarlem” The children could express themselves in different creative ways. And…………. a couple of suggestions will be realized next year. All great examples of the role of children as advisor. Not only hear what children have to say, listen carefully and be aware, take them seriously. It will make a world of difference. The next steps To be honest there are no next steps actually. It is a continuing process. I trust that the next steps will unfold for me personally and for another project at the right time, right place and with the right persons. I am still in touch with people in the field and through this website with you who are reading this article right now. e-mail Erika

# Art Licenses

All of my material which Spirit Heart Sanctuary has for sale
in our new Spirit Store is
available through that venue for personal use ONLY. When you purchase an art
image file from the Spirit Store you are in fact purchasing not the art, but a
license to use that art and to make a single print of it for your own personal
use. This is true of all copyrighted material you might purchase through any
means.
If your print becomes damaged or worn out or lost we
additionally extend the right to you to reprint it [much better than having to
buy another print!]. If you lose or damage your copy of the image file, however,
you will have to re-purchase it at that point. If you wish to print copies to
give to friends or family, you will need to buy more than one copy of the image
or publication [an option is provided for this in the Spirit Store check-out
process]. You will still only get one image or publication file, but you will
have purchased the right to print more than one copy of it. This is all
explained in more detail on the Spirit Store's "Licensing"
page.
If you would like to use my art on your website, or in conjunction with your book, CD
or DVD project or any other commercial venue, it may be possible to license it for such purposes. I do not
license all the artwork available on this site, but with some of it I am willing
to do that.
Licensing fees vary according to your
intended use, what piece of my artwork you are interested in, and various other
parameters. If you
are interested in licensing my existing artwork for your project or purposes, please
contact me.

# Solar and Lunar Personal Akashic Mythos

|
IF YOU ARE INTERESTED IN THESE
SESSIONS, PLEASE READ CAREFULLY
(Print out if necessary)
Solar and Lunar Personal Akashic
Mythos
written sessions with Maia
Written Sessions: Your personal solar and lunar akashic mythos
will be revealed in symbolic visionary description, followed by basic keys of
understanding which you may use to navigate the akashic vision. Any guardians,
archetypes or archetypal avatars present for you in your ‘Mystery’ will be
identified. In a sense, I will be ‘opening the scroll’ to a virtual
reality in the Akasha, where your solar and lunar paths are inscribed. While I
give my vision of it and certain interpretative keynotes from my akashic
perspective, it is up to you to utilize this program of Light within your own
field in order to go deeper into your own resonance, understanding and receipt
of the strong currents of Solar and Lunar initiations that are beckoning you
onward to Source. A suggested process to facilitate this personal journey will
be included. I suggest that you also read about my regular written sessions, as
most of that is applicable to the Solar-Lunar sessions as well, other than the
initial questions. You MAY submit questions concerning the Solar-Lunar sessions
once they are completed...see my
written sessions
guidelines.
Energy-Art: An energy-art work reflecting the primary symbology that has
surfaced in the written session. One for each session: solar and lunar. This
energy-art can be used for specific attunement and re-patterning in your akashic
field. The process for this will be included.
OPTION #1
-
One Solar written Akashic session
-
One Lunar written Akashic session
-
Price: $200
-
Follow-up: You may send one set of
follow-up questions after each session (provided that they relate directly
to that session) for $1.00 per
minute over-time rate. There is no minimum...it can be just one question.
OPTION #2
-
One Solar written Akashic session
-
One Solar symbology energy-art work
reflecting your primary Solar symbology
-
One Lunar written Akashic session
-
One Lunar symbology energy-art work
reflecting your primary Lunar symbology
-
Price: $400 (the value of each individual
energy-art work is $250)
-
Follow-up: You may send one set of
follow-up questions after each session (provided that they relate directly
to that session) for $1.00 per
minute over-time rate. There is no minimum...it can be just one question.
Sessions and art are packaged in PDF format
I AM TEMPORARILY NOT TAKING ON ANY MORE
SESSIONS. IF YOU WISH TO HAVE A SESSION, PLEASE
CONTACT ME. I WILL PLACE YOU ON MY WAITING LIST
AND INFORM YOU WHEN I AM READY TO SCHEDULE SESSIONS AGAIN. ~ MAHALO, MAIA
If you have not yet done so, you may wish to read
more about the Solar and Lunar Mysteries by beginning
here.

# Sphinx Invocation   Tomeh

|
Tomeh, Tomeh,
Haatshput Tanset
By the Star of Isis
I betoken Thee
I ask to receive the passage of Thy Vessel
From the East shore,
From the West shore,
From the North shore,
From the South shore.
I AM in the presence Khemeb Hunar,
the ‘Most Ancient Solar One’.
Used to call upon the Inner Doorway of greater power
while standing between the paws of the Sphinx. Individual to
face the Sphinx except when calling upon the vessel from
each shore.

# The Shamagicians

|
|
In 1982 I had an inner experience with the Shamagicans of Gathgwana. It was very real to me. In The Source issue 2-82 I wrote about these Shamagicians and their "Hall of Gathgwana." Recently I read it again for the first time since I published it in The Source. My now more mature, rational mind scoffed a bit at the seeming fantasy of shape-shifting. Yet the strong sense of it's trueness for me is still present....most especially since my contact with the Interior beings had been re-assumed in 2002 with my journey to Zion National Park and subsequent contact with the Merkabah of the Host through Thoth. Now, when I re-visit my memories of the Shamagicans, I have the tools to re-create visually a semblance of them and their world. This, I present to you here in the gallery below. I would suggest that you first read my original article on the subject before proceeding to the Gallery.
An additional note: As I was giving these pages the finishing touch before uploading them, a copy of Mitch Battros "Earth Changes" e-letter was passed on to me in which the Mayan Elders were quoted on the subject of the upcoming earth changes. At one point in the message, an Elder was quoted as saying:
Receiving this information concerning Xibalbay, the "underworld" struck me profoundly, as I had been strongly feeling that placing this recent additional material and art in the inner earth section of Spirit Mythos the Shamagician & Interiorscapes pages) was being specifically guided by the Shamagician Burning Man, Thoth and the Merkabah of the Host. I now believe that the intention is to open a window on the Interior world so that the viewer may connect more deeply to the core of the planet as a sacred heart-stone inside their own inner spaces. There is no separation. The Mother Planet reflects us and we reflect it. Through this deep, inner experience with one's interior planet-self, a greater unification of the whole can take place. There is also the re-connection with our Brothers & Sisters within the earth...many of whom are actually incarnations of our own souls in another dimension of earth reality. ~ Maia, 9/24/03
SOURCE ARCHIVAL - SHAMAGICIANS
LINKS RELATED TO THIS GALLERY

# Malkuth

Malkuth (Maleuth) / Kingdom: mold of Heaven
in the Earth; template of the cosmos embedded in the planetary consciousness.
Most ancient name, Makateth.
Divine the perimeters of form and affix the
imprint into the soluble firma. Conjuncto is achieved. Life concedes to new
doctrine.

# Yesod

Yesod (Iesod) / Foundation: Brass; Server of the Divine in
the creation of the Temple; that which facilitates the authority and power of
Service. Most ancient name, Iysod.
Yesod: Incubation of substance components while
secondary distillation occurs; periodicity is introduced to facilitate
integration with elemental sequencing. Align to Service. The tithing of the
soul to the future perfection. "What is given forth must be brought up
from the Foundation."

# Hod

Hod (Hod) / Honor & Glory: The merkabah or
whirlwind of alignment with pure intent and reason; that which lifts the soul
beyond the karmic faculty for a specific event or function in time, or as with
the Masters, in a state of full perpetuation of divine receipt. To be 'clothed
in Honor and Glory' is to wear the golden raiment of orientation with the
Divine. Most ancient name, Yud.
Find the foci within each sub-system while in the
nascent state, and create a bridging from within the fluidium of each foci, to
organize the crystalline permuted consciousness into a radiant system of
cohesion. Receive the mantle of spiritual perpetuation. Allow your original
intent to become manifest in sublime substance, which is the Prima Matra, or
First Matter conceived of Spirit.

# Netzach

Netzach (Nizah) / Victory: organization of
Spiritual Will focused through the Eye of the Needle in the Five Principles of
Victory: 1) Clarity to Know 2) Knowledge to Reconcile 3) Will to
Participate 4) Activation toward Solvency 5) Mediation within Essence. Most
ancient name, Nizah.
Full association is achieved. All sub-systems are now
in permutation with one another. Insertion of motivation to nest in ordered
patterns of atomic stratum is now performed. Move intent into future form.
Advance the state into its full sovereignty through visionary cognition.

Tiphareth (Tiphareth) / Beauty & Grace: fortification of Divine Spirit centered in the heart; gateway to the
Greater Spheres of Holy Ordinance. Most ancient name, Tipharzeth.
Strike the fire at the core of the distillation,
igniting each sub-system with an individual degree of initiation to the flame.
Re-create heart resonance within your own life experience; release the Lesser
Mystery to become the Greater Mystery.

# Geburah

Geburah (Pechad) / Severity & Strength: within Geburah
is the Dweller on the Threshold, the masculine aspect of discernment where
judgement is not withheld, but given in proportion to opposition of truth. The
Dweller may move freely from the feminine who receives unbidden from the
distillation of Grace as Mercy (Chesed), to the masculine who metes out the
judgment of Jah-Hoh-Vah to the fearful soul. To the intrepid, Geburah is an
empowerment of Higher Self. Most ancient name:, Pechad.
Separation of blocking codes from the field of
substantiation. Implementing feeling as a tool for soul retrieval (gathering
parts of self from time and dimensions).

# Chesed

Chesed (Chesed) / Mercy: the Mercy Seat upon which
the Sophia or Illumined Feminine is stationed; radiation of divine compliment
to the Dweller on the Threshold aspect of Geburah. Within Chesed is the
indwelling Mother of Pearl, the Moon on the Horizon. "I give thee Mercy
as a helpmate to thy soul." - from the lost doctrine of the Qabbalah,
known as the Books of Noech (Noah), also the Yejesuhod (the Living Tree of
Flame). Most Ancient Name, Shezhod.
Form crystalline sub-systems, distilled within the
larger matrix. Create pathways into the World Soul, entraining to all sentient
being at the purest undiluted level of Spirit.

Genius of the Universal in its unrevealed state.

to the disruption of Stillness.

# Working with the Sacred Tree

|
|
Working with the Sacred Tree
There is no one way to benefit from the knowledge in this "Tree of Life" section. However, the following is one procedure:
1) Lay out the pattern of the Sephirothic Tree as in the diagram below using quartz crystals. It would be most helpful if you can align Malkuth to the south, better yet if you can align it to the apogee of Orion for that day. You may choose a place to sit next to, or within this design. If more than one person is involved, have these people form a circle or pattern around the Sephirothic tree. If it is only two people, one should be at Malkuth and one at Kether, and you may wish to switch positions somewhere during the procedure.
2) Beginning with Kether, take one sphere at a time and visualize the energy of that sphere in motion while you speak or think about its properties (given previously). Then move to the next sphere with the same practice and so on, until you have grounded the process with Malkuth.
3) Alternatively you can work over a greater period of time in the same sequencing, spending time each day with a different sphere in sequential succession.

---

# comptext

|
|
Tree of Life - Template of Manifestation
The Sephirothic Tree of Life is the manifold for the Adam Kadom. It outlines the integration of Spirit into Matter through the process of Divine Man becoming Hue-Man, and Hue-Man becoming Divine Man. The following was given to me as a basis for understanding and generating manifestation as an Initiation of Spirit.
Malkuth (Maleuth) / Kingdom: mold of Heaven in the Earth; template of the cosmos embedded in the planetary consciousness. Most ancient name, Makateth.
Yesod (Iesod) / Foundation: Server of the Divine in the creation of the Temple; that which facilitates the authority and power of Service. Most ancient name, Iysod.
Netzach (Nizah) / Victory: organization of Spiritual Will focused through the Eye of the Needle in the Five Principles of Victory: 1) Clarity to Know 2) Knowledge to Reconcile 3) Will to Participate 4) Activation toward Solvency 5) Mediation within Essence. Most ancient name, Nizah.
Hod (Hod) / Honor & Glory: The merkabah or whirlwind of alignment with pure intent and reason; that which lifts the soul beyond the karmic faculty for a specific event or function in time, or as with the Masters, in a state of full perpetuation of divine receipt. To be 'clothed in Honor and Glory' is to wear the golden raiment of orientation with the Divine. Most ancient name, Yud.
Tiphareth (Tiphareth) / Beauty & Grace: fortification of Divine Spirit centered in the heart; gateway to the Greater Spheres of Holy Ordinance. Most ancient name, Tipharzeth.
Chesed (Chesed) / Mercy: the Mercy Seat upon which the Sophia or Illumined Feminine is stationed; radiation of divine compliment to the Dweller on the Threshold aspect of Geburah. Within Chesed is the indwelling Mother of Pearl, the Moon on the Horizon. "I give thee Mercy as a helpmate to thy soul." - from the lost doctrine of the Qabbalah, known as the Books of Noech (Noah), also the Yejesuhod (the Living Tree of Flame).Most Ancient Name, Shezhod.
Geburah (Pechad) / Severity & Strength: within Geburah is the Dweller on the Threshold, the masculine aspect of discernment where judgement is not withheld, but given in proportion to opposition of truth. The Dweller may move freely from the feminine who receives unbidden from the distillation of Grace as Mercy (Chesed), to the masculine who metes out the judgement of Jah-Hoh-Vah to the fearful soul. To the intrepid, Geburah is an empowerment of Higher Self. Most ancient name:, Pechad.
Binah (Binah) / Understanding & Intelligence: liberating mind from the organization of matter and synchronizing it with Heart. Acceptance of formative principle; orientation with Divine Mind. Most ancient name, Binhaja.
Chokmah (Cochma) / Wisdom: arising from the Sea of Saf-Fire (the ‘I Am* Intelligence in the perfected blood); Intelligence is separated from the lower mind and thus is reclaimed by the greater 'genius'. Most ancient name, Chumeh.
Kether (Kether) / Crown: vehicle of the Metatron and the All-Seeing Eye of Divine Penetration of Worlds; the Realm of Perfected Worlds and the Seat of the Eternal Flame. Most ancient name, Kephira.
Following are the alchemical procedures (in italics) for using the Sephirothic Tree as an ark of Spirit-to-Matter manifestation, starting from the capstone Kether on down:
Kether: Begin with the unbraiding of present cohesion. Insertion of Spiritual Principle into planetary modality.
Chokmah: Braiding of greater consciousness into the original pattern. Orientation of primary potential with Divine Mind.
Binah: Introduction of multiple potential kinetic strengths. Co-ordering of multiple realities with Illumined Intelligence.
Geburah: Separation of blocking codes from the field of substantiation. Implementing feeling as a tool for soul retrieval (gathering parts of self from time and dimensions).
Chesed: Form crystalline sub-systems, distilled within the larger matrix. Create pathways into the World Soul, entraining to all sentient being at the purest undiluted level of Spirit.
Tiphareth: Strike the fire at the core of the distillation, igniting each sub-system with an individual degree of initiation to the flame. Re-create heart resonance within your own life experience; release the Lesser Mystery to become the Greater Mystery.
Hod: Find the foci within each sub-system while in the nascent state, and create a bridging from within the fluidium of each foci, to organize the crystalline permuted consciousness into a radiant system of cohesion. Receive the mantle of spiritual perpetuation. Allow your original intent to become manifest in sublime substance, which is the Prima Matra, or First Matter conceived of Spirit.
Netzach: Full association is achieved. All sub-systems are now in permutation with one another. Insertion of motivation to nest in ordered patterns of atomic stratum is now performed. Move intent into future form. Advance the state into its full sovereignty through visionary cognition.
Yesod: Incubation of substance components while secondary distillation occurs; periodicity is introduced to facilitate integration with elemental sequencing. Align to Service. The tithing of the soul to the future perfection. "What is given forth must be brought up from the Foundation."
Malkuth: Divine the perimeters of form and affix the imprint into the soluble firma. Conjuncto is achieved. Life concedes to new doctrine.
How To Use This Format:
There is no one way to benefit from the above sacred wisdom. However, the following is one procedure:
1) Lay out the pattern of the Sephirothic Tree as in the diagram below using crystals. It would be most helpful if you can align Malkuth to the south, better yet if you can align it to the apogee of Orion for that day. You may choose a place to sit next to, or within this design. If more than one person is involved, have these people form a circle or pattern around the Sephirothic tree. If it is only two people, one should be at Malkuth and one at Kether, and you may wish to switch positions somwhere during the procedure.
2) Beginning with Kether, take one sphere at a time and visualize the energy of that sphere in motion while you speak or think about its properties (given previously). Then move to the next sphere with the same practice and so on, until you have grounded the process with Malkuth.
3) Alternatively you can work over a greater period of time in the same sequencing, spending time each day with a different sphere in sequential succession.

form must surrender its calling to the ONE VOICE of the Absolute.
There is no-thing which I am other than within the sound of the
sacred. I am the trackless sand of the desert, blown by the winds of
time into patterns of the breathing earth. I am all sounds of nature
in which the voice of God is heard. I am a part of all and yet I am
separate from any need to be.

the Ain Soph. From this point of "No Thing" I move into the
Manifest world of knowing, of being, of accepting form and place. I
become aware moment by moment, as I move down through the Sephiroth of
the Sacred Tree upon the path of lightning, that I am awakening to the
Body of Christ...to Yeshua's Mystery of Purpose in the earth.

---
# Fearless Flame Visualization

Fearless Flame Visualization
Visualize an incandescent white tube of light
vertical in space. See the Milky Way in the background. Know that this tube of
light is at the center of the Milky Way. About the center of the tube is a
circle of green light. This is the encompassing power of the Emerald Ray, which
is a focus of Victory. Gather within the tube all the refuse of the astral
plane, all the contaminate of Earth's realm. See all this sludge within the tube
of White Light. Now focus the Blue Ray of Michael's Sword coming down from above
into the top of the tube and cutting this refuse into biodegradable dots.
After this has been achieved, power the violet elixir of St. Germaine into the
tube and watch the transformation begin.
All the tiny dots of sludge are consumed by the
transmuting Violet Ray. Feel the mighty presence of the archangel Metatron
over-lighting this transmutation, and see the angelic Seraphimic beings intoning
in rapture the son of purification in a circle about the tube of Light. Radials
of Gold streak forth from the auras of the Seraphim toward the tube. From these
golden beams, the Phree-Niphilm or "Redeemed Lords of Light" are
brought into manifestation as they each carry a perfect pearl, glowing against
the abyss of space. They then drop the pearls, one by one into the tube of light
and as they do, the tube becomes a cauldron of spheres with tentacles of matter,
resembling jellyfish swimming in the celestial soup of divine consummation.
View the earth. The cauldron has been transported
into its central sun, where the Magda, the divine feminine creational matrix of
the earth, stirs the cauldron. As she stirs, the forms become beautiful
animal-like creatures arising into the Avalonic Realm within the center of the
Menhir circle of standing stones. The Nine Mensa, the priestesses of
Avalon are present, standing with their bodies erect, holding their right arms
up in the air, extending a glistening sword to the heavens.
See yourself as one among the
Mensa. Behind each of the Mensa
stands a large stone female image, in basic outline only. This image is made of
snowflake obsidian. It is the form of the Goddess of the FEARLESS FLAME. Each of
the Mensa / You brings to life the Goddess of the Fearless Flame within
her. She indeed has become that flame...invincible, just, empowered.
Now each Mensa / You points her sword at
the beautiful creatures within the Menhir circle. Static blue bolts of
electricity come from the points of their blades and electrify these animal
creatures, who then are transfigured. Their new forms are golden beings of
human-angelic presence. They are the New Angels of the Age. Make a conscious
choice to release them from the Circle of Love and into the Cosmic Earth.

# Timely Transmissions

This art work contains a photograph of Mount Waia'ale'ale
(rippling waters) with it's waterfalls, which I took from the lanai of our
home on Kaua'i. According to my akashic insights, this mountain is the top
of the ancient Lemurian volcano which created the entire original land mass
of Lemuria (actually known in that age as "MU"). The balcony is of a
Lemurian temple. Of course I am taking artistic license in this composite,
as when Lemuria existed, what is now Mount Waia'ale'ale appeared somewhat
differently. Yet I wished to bring the vibration of the two times together
in the above artwork, which I am calling "Temple of Tears". The crystals
sphere represents a single "tear" or droplet from the Mother Mountain,
blessing the seeker with Her Wisdom and Love.
The temple displaying the Tear Crystal was a Ai'mu'laka
(home of the mother of tears). Waia'ale'ale was Mu'laka, the "Mother of
Tears".
I chose this temple and Tear Crystal as the focal point
for the merkabic (vehicle) of Light I am intentionally creating with TIMELY
TRANSMISSIONS.

# New Page 1

"By studying various ancient texts (James) Churchward had discovered the existence of a long lost continent with an advanced civilization that 60,000 years ago had sunk below the Pacific Ocean after a cataclysmic earthquake. There were 64 million people who died in the sinking, and that it dated back over 50,000 years. The Hawaiian Islands and the Pacific Islands are the remaining mountain peaks of the lost continent. "
"Precise detailed maps of the lost continent of Mu and Atlantis were found on stone tablets from Pre-Inca Ica, Peru, by Dr. Javier Cabrera, engraved in stone and photographed by Robert Charroux. United Nations diplomat Farida Iskoviet, assistant to United Nations President Adam Malik, came to Maui in 1972 and researched Lemurian ruins and history and concluded that they were real. One of Hawaii's leading authorities on Lemurian research was Sgt. Williard Wannall from Army Intelligence in Oahu. He reported that ruins of a submerged Lemurian city was between Maui and Oahu. It was a Top Secret project in Naval Intelligence in 1972. "
- excerpted from: Crystal Links (Ellie Crystal)

# IE_interiorscapes

In this "Inner Earth" section, are visions of
the Interior as I view it through the akashic, along with certain prose, taken
from both worlds. Of course, as with all my akashic landscape &
architecture art, I attempt to capture the basics and essence and not every rock
and stone.
According to my akashic perceptions the
natural hollow is largely un-populated. The cities and towns are clustered
together in a few regions, with outposts here and there in the wilderness areas,
which are in abundance. The "interiorscapes" I have depicted in this
section are all wilderness vistas.
Since the inner earth domain is a very
dimensionally flexible zone (I refer you to the
inner earth intro), there are numerous "threads" connecting electro-magnetic
clusters of zones in the Interior. As a result, if you were to start out
walking from point A to point B, you may not wind up at point B, but instead at
point Y or Z...or even back at A! However, the inhabitants of the Interior
instinctively know how to move around in their world. They accomplish this
through a combination of both linear and inter-linear access. I use the term
(which I just made up) "inter-linear" as to call it "inter-dimensional" is not
completely accurate. Inner earth inhabitants are not making large changes in
their dimensional reality when they move about. Instead they are "re-threading"
linear waves through the bio-magnetics of their brains and thus their cells.
The inner realm inhabitants also do a
great deal of astral traveling , so the combination of astral and physical
inter-linear locomotion transports the Interior dweller to many places in their
world.
The following images of the Interior are
accompanied by quotations from both surface and inner dwellers of this beautiful
planet.

---
url: "http://www.spiritmythos.org/earth/EC/IE/auragarden.html"
title: The Aura Healing Garden
tags:
  - earth
  - ec
  - ie
  - aura
  - garden
  - healing
  - come
  - interior
  - many
  - there
---
# The Aura Healing Garden

|
|
The Interior world contains many healing centers, but the most prominent is the "Aura Healing Garden." It is here that many souls come both in the physical and non-physical to be attuned to the healing graces within them. Years ago, I came into the inner-planes presence of the guiding entity of the Garden, who addressed himself to me as "Michael" (no, not the archangel...or at least that was not my impression). I was experiencing health problems at the time and his guidance and my presence (etherically) in the Garden was very healing for me.
The grounds of the garden a beautifully landscaped, replete with flowers, trees, fountains and graceful, gentle animals. within this magical setting are several white, luminous buildings. These contain rooms with picture window views of the Garden, some including vistas of the Treal Mountain range as well. The rooms are not large, but arranged so that there is a feeling of expansiveness and light. They are each decorated simply, with the predominant colors usually white, accented with delicate colors. The sparse furnishings include a pallet couch-bed. Above the pallet and set into the ceiling is a large multi-faceted crystal, moveable within it's socket. While much of the healing work utilizes these crystals, the Garden itself is the most powerful radiating force. since many seekers come in astral body, it is not unusual to see people appear and disappear as they journey down the paths of the grounds, like ghosts in a floating dream, blending their minds and hearts with the great oaks, twining roses and butterflies. In such a state, one can glide through the air above a curling stream, with a toe in the water, tracing the currents like a dolphin's fin. (I did this once!) Yes, those of the surface earth can and do visit the Garden in astral form at times. Unlike the Interior world habitants, most surface dwellers do not realize where they are, thinking it to be only a dream of their sleeping mind.
The High Devas (Faerie) of the Garden are there for the purpose of devoting Light, Love and Essence to the rejuvenation and comfort of the human souls who venture there.
The waters of the stream and the many springs gushing and bubbling up from the sacred ground there are the purest and most energizing of the Interior. While one may come across small springs, pools and uplifting fountains throughout the Garden, the favored place for the partaking of the elemental life of the Aura waters is at the Tortoise pool. It is the smallest and most sequestered in the Garden. Here, near the stream's shoulder where the bright moss forms golden ringlets upon the dripping rocks, is the figure of a large tortoise carved of milk-green jade. The tortoise is a symbol of wisdom and patience. It is also an icon of inherited knowledge, being harbored for an Age to come. It is said in the records of the People of the Interior, than when the tortoise finally speaks, the world will listen. The great Shamagicians often turn themselves into tortoises for ritual memory and communion with the past.
Unicorns (as well as live tortoises) can be found
in the Aura Healing Garden. They are rare now, even in the inner earth. Unicorns
are not what they appear to be to us...that is, horses with a horn on their
foreheads. They have assumed this shape from the mass consciousness and
archetypification of the world's image of them. In a future addition to Spirit
Mythos I will write more about them from my akashic perspective. In the Aura
Garden, the unicorns are more communicative with human guests (both in the
physical and astral) than they are in the wilderness regions of Subterranea.

# Links

|
|
I personally do not find a great deal of resonance with most theories and beliefs which circulate concerning the hollow (inner) earth, many of which are somewhat "conspiracy theory" in nature. The links below lead to a few websites I have found on the topic that seem more middle-of-the-road, although I have not thoroughly researched any of them. I am not sure that any of these sources include the concept that the interior hollow is removed from the surface earth's dimensional physicality through the natural process of moving toward the center of the magnetic sphere. Yet I stress once again, my view of the Interior planet is based purely on my akashic perception and personal pseudo-experiences.
- Maia
